|

---
My parents came to America in 1966 with $7, knowing no one, to start their new lives from scratch and practice their Sikh faith in peace.
My parents instilled in me a sense of civic responsibility, and one of my earliest memories of that was when my father took me into the voting booth with him during the 1984 US Presidential Election. It showed me that part of what it means to love our country is to always strive to make it better.
As a civil rights attorney, I made it my mission to defend folks from discriminatory policies that infringed on their rights based on how they look or how they pray.
I’ve seen that bigotry firsthand: During my first Hoboken mayoral campaign, someone targeted my campaign by distributing racist flyers. And it broke my heart to see my daughter’s reaction to that kind of disgusting, hate-filled rhetoric.
**In fact, immediately after being sworn in as the mayor of Hoboken, my first act was to immediately sign an executive order to declare our city a fair and welcoming community, and ensure equal opportunity for all.**
That’s what we deserve from our elected officials: **_A commitment to defending peoples’ lives, their freedoms, and their families._**
**_But that’s not what the people of NJ-08 are getting from Robert Menendez Jr._**
That’s why I’m running against him in the Democratic primary, and why I hope I can count on your support.
**[My team and I want to build up our grassroots campaign to show we’ve got the strength to weather this race, and I would love to have you on the team. Will you contribute $25 to give our grassroots effort a big momentum boost?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77555436/450774413/-2096267061?refcode=EM_BS_BHA_2312XX_FR_OBLaunchG_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkwMjAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOThlZTZhYWItODJiOS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Gp_ldk-W3eleJGNBvq-fB2acCfpz5fCY2XuIEr2M8QQ=)**

clean_body: | | | = Friends, I’m running for Congress to represent the people of New Jersey’s 8th District! I’m excited to share my story with you and explain why I’m running for Congress, but before I do that:= | | | = My parents came to America in 1966 with $7, knowing no one, to start their new lives from scratch and practice their Sikh faith in peace. My parents instilled in me a sense of civic responsibility, and one of my earliest memories of that was when my father took me into the voting booth with him during the 1984 US Presidential Election. It showed me that part of what it means to love our country is to always strive to make it better. As a civil rights attorney, I made it my mission to defend folks from discriminatory policies that infringed on their rights based on how they look or how they pray. I’ve seen that bigotry firsthand: During my first Hoboken mayoral campaign, someone targeted my campaign by distributing racist flyers. And it broke my heart to see my daughter’s reaction to that kind of disgusting, hate-filled rhetoric. In fact, immediately after being sworn in as the mayor of Hoboken, my first act was to immediately sign an executive order to declare our city a fair and welcoming community, and ensure equal opportunity for all. That’s what we deserve from our elected officials: A commitment to defending peoples’ lives, their freedoms, and their families. But that’s not what the people of NJ-08 are getting from Robert Menendez Jr. That’s why I’m running against him in the Democratic primary, and why I hope I can count on your support. = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you so much for your support, friends. —Ravi Bhalla | | = | | We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in touch with supporters like you. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77555632/450775744/-2042826227?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTk0MDNlNC04MmI5LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yuHPCXotJXLMiCXMZXB3HO6JoiymBeAaPmQaAzbkfPk=)

**Peter, today is the 51st anniversary of _Roe v. Wade_.**

Sadly, instead of celebrating the right to abortion and reproductive autonomy, tomorrow is a reminder that women and people who can get pregnant in the U.S. have **_fewer rights today_** than they did during the era of _Roe_.

And why? Because of a small fringe minority who want to strip Americans of their reproductive rights.

The truth is most Americans agree: Abortion decisions should be made between a woman and her doctor. Period.

**With today’s 51st anniversary of _Roe_ , NOW is the time to boost momentum for abortion rights.** [**Will you sign my petition joining me in recommitting to the fight for abortion rights? name: Eve Schiff
subject: Adam’s debate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| For the last few years, Adam has been at the forefront of some of our nation’s most important fights.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=5179%2E5257348%2Er0lFg9)
Hi Derek, this is Eve, Adam’s wife. Yes, we’ve heard all the jokes — Adam and Eve.
Adam is going to take the debate stage for the first debate of this primary election for the U.S. Senate.
Before he does, will you show your support for his campaign by pitching in? It would mean so much to us. You can use this link: **[secure.actblue.com/donate/jan2024_abs_em_debate](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2024_abs_em_debate.U6fU0L&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240122_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=5179%2E5257348%2Er0lFg9)**
For the last few years, Adam has been at the forefront of some of our nation’s most important fights.
Adam investigated Donald Trump. He led the first impeachment trial. His work has helped hold people accountable for January 6th.
But as you and I have seen, these fights have also made Adam one of the GOP’s top targets.
By _Fox News_.
By the likes of Kevin McCarthy, Matt Gaetz, and Marjorie Taylor Greene in Congress.
By Trump himself — all the time.
Adam is tough and has weathered the attacks well — but I will admit, the viciousness of the attacks concerns me. It wasn’t easy watching him get censured in the House of Representatives, but I was so proud of Adam and how he fought back.
The attacks have only gotten worse since launching his Senate campaign.
But Adam is resolute in his mission.
Because this campaign is not just about protecting our country from the likes of Donald Trump. It is about the positive vision Adam has for the future of our state and country, the vision that I know you share. _Where right, truth, and decency matter. And the oath of office means something_.
Where the economy works for everyone, and everyone has a chance to succeed. Where parents can put their children to bed knowing they will be safe, knowing that if they get ill, they can get the care that they need, and knowing that the planet can be as healthy as they are.
Adam will share this positive message on the debate stage tonight, and I’m excited to cheer him on. I hope you are too, Derek.
**And if you can, please pitch in a few dollars to his campaign to show him — and everyone — that you believe in his work to create a better California for us all.**
**[secure.actblue.com/donate/jan2024_abs_em_debate](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2024_abs_em_debate.U6fU0L&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240122_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=5179%2E5257348%2Er0lFg9)**
Thank you for always standing alongside us. I know there’s nothing we can’t accomplish with you on our team.
— Eve
| | [DONATE WEEKLY](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/3492?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240122_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=5179%2E5257348%2Er0lFg9)

We did something that has never been done before: **We forced Lauren Boebert to pack up her bags and run scared out of the district because she knew we were going to defeat her in November.**
Now, I’m facing a group of new potential Republican opponents – including one who was at the Capitol Building on January 6th and another who is _Lauren Boebert’s current district director!_
**This race just got a lot harder.** We no longer can run against Lauren Boebert’s well-known craziness and extremism. Our new opponents are going to try to make themselves look palatable, even though they’re _more extreme_ than Boebert.
And after we ran off one of their favorite extremists, the Super PACs are about to attack me like never before. Remember: **This was the closest race in the entire country in 2022.**
**This is a must-win race and a must-win seat. But I’m not taking money from corporate PACs, so if we’re going to win and replace Lauren Boebert in Congress, I need grassroots donors like you to give now:**

clean_body: We did something that has never been done before. Hello, We did something that has never been done before: We forced Lauren Boebert to pack up her bags and run scared out of the district because she knew we were going to defeat her in November. Now, I’m facing a group of new potential Republican opponents – including one who was at the Capitol Building on January 6th and another who is Lauren Boebert’s current district director! This race just got a lot harder. We no longer can run against Lauren Boebert’s well-known craziness and extremism. Our new opponents are going to try to make themselves look palatable, even though they’re more extreme than Boebert. And after we ran off one of their favorite extremists, the Super PACs are about to attack me like never before. Remember: This was the closest race in the entire country in 2022. This is a must-win race and a must-win seat. But I’m not taking money from corporate PACs, so if we’re going to win and replace Lauren Boebert in Congress, I need grassroots donors like you to give now: = Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = We’ve gotten this far because of support from people like you – and it’s your continued support that is going to ensure we win this swing seat in November. Thank you for everything you do. With gratitude - Adam ** Paid for by Adam for Colorado. name: Rick Larsen
subject: A symbol of progress and a cornerstone of reproductive freedom
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen
body:
Today's anniversary
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77556265/450786112/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTg5NjhlYy04NWI5LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3f3YVznMyagaEaZXYe0pvv5GJGPVvelttApcl5yYrog=&emci=78c02212-74b9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=4e8968ec-85b9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=9494239)
---

| | Today marks the anniversary of the historic Supreme Court decision in _Roe v. Wade._ In 1973, the Supreme Court established the legal right to abortion. This decision marked a crucial moment in the fight for reproductive rights, recognizing autonomy over our own bodies, and safeguarding the right to make family planning decisions. For decades, _Roe v. Wade_ has been a symbol of progress and a cornerstone of reproductive freedom. However, the _Dobbs v. Jackson Women's Health_ decision in 2022 has posed a significant challenge to the principles established by _Roe v. Wade_. This decision allows states to impose restrictive abortion laws and undermines the foundation of reproductive rights. This catastrophic decision jeopardizes access to safe and legal abortion services. Now, in communities across the country, citizens are living with the devastating and deadly consequences of this ruling. In the years since the _Dobbs_ decision, there has been an escalation in attacks on reproductive freedom, including a forced vote in the House by the radical right-wing majority attempting to limit abortion care. **I voted no because my job is to protect your ability to make decisions about your body — and to keep the politicians, judges, and radical extremists out of it.** Abortions are deeply personal medical decisions that should be between someone who is pregnant and their doctor. Earlier this month, I asked you to sign a petition in support of mifepristone. Mifepristone is a safe, effective drug used for medication abortions — making up nearly half of all abortions in the United States — but it is coming into question before the Supreme Court this year. Abortion is health care, and people have the right to make their own decisions without government interference. This should not be political whatsoever, and a strong majority of the American people agree. As long as I have the privilege of serving the people of Northwest Washington in Congress, I will stand for the right to safe and legal abortions. More soon, _Rick_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:

subject: Obernolte votes to fund deceptive“crisis pregnancy centers”

body:
| | |
On Friday, Rep. Jay Obernolte voted to continue taxpayer funding of deceptive “crisis pregnancy centers” - right-wing organizations that serve as anti-choice propaganda fronts.
Crisis pregnancy centers lure pregnant women in, falsely promising abortions, pregnancy care, and contraception.
Instead, they barrage women with anti-abortion propaganda and medical falsehoods - even claiming non-viable pregnancies were viable, or that clinics could “reverse” abortion pills.
**Democrat Derek Marshall is running for Congress to protect reproductive rights, restore Roe v. Wade, and stop MAGA Republicans like Jay Obernolte from banning abortion nationwide.**

Box 2836 Victorville, CA 92395 | | Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Derek Marshall for Congress, please .

name: Justice Democrats
subject: AIPAC rewarded this Republican for passing $14 billion in aid for Israel
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

While AIPAC spends $100 million in attempts to unseat progressive Squad
members in their Democratic primaries this year, the anti-Palestinian
lobby group is also rewarding Republicans for funding the ongoing genocide
in Gaza.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240122.4jWFAi&refcode=em20240122-32955&t=1001&akid=32955%2E1203867%2E0m7pln ]The Intercept: After House Speaker Mike Johnson pushed through Israel
aid package, AIPAC cash came flowing in. The pro-Israel lobby donated
around $95,000 to Johnson after he led the House passage of an extra $14
billion for Israel.

A new report from The Intercept reports that AIPAC was GOP House Speaker
Mike Johnson’s biggest donor in 2023. After he led the passage of $14
billion in additional aid to Israel, Johnson received a $95,000 campaign
contribution from AIPAC last November.

AIPAC is using their money and influence to play both sides in Washington:
they’re giving money to right-wing extremists like Johnson while
simultaneously trying to shape Democratic primary elections by running
moderates against progressive incumbents who refuse to do their bidding.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240122.4jWFAi&refcode=em20240122-32955&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1002&akid=32955%2E1203867%2E0m7pln ]We’ve taken them on and won before, and we need to do it again. Will
you make a grassroots donation of $3 or more to help
Justice Democrats fight back against AIPAC’s attacks and re-elect the
Squad this year?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240122.4jWFAi&refcode=em20240122-32955&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1021&akid=32955%2E1203867%2E0m7pln ]Contribute $3

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time.

There are other ways to make an impact in support of peace and equality in
Israel and Palestine: please urge your member of Congress to support a
ceasefire through [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139873?t=1022&akid=32955%2E1203867%2E0m7pln ]Adalah Justice Project’s petition or by calling them
using [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139874?t=1023&akid=32955%2E1203867%2E0m7pln ]Jewish Voice for Peace’s dialer here. Your voice matters in this
critical moment.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20240122-32955-footer&t=1024&refcode2=32955_1203867_0m7pln&akid=32955%2E1203867%2E0m7pln

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=32955%2E1203867%2E0m7pln

name: Katie Porter
subject: Getting ready to step on the debate stage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Pundits have said this debate is our big opportunity to have a breakout moment and gain the momentum we need to win this race.
Derek,
It’s almost time for our first California Senate debate!
There’s a lot at stake tonight. Pundits have said _this debate_ is our big opportunity to have a breakout moment and gain the momentum we need to win this race.
So while I’ll be giving it my all on the debate stage, **I can’t turn this debate into a game-changing moment without your support.**
We need the resources to turn clips from the debate into ads and social media posts, so that we can reach the millions of Californians who are undecided about who they’ll support in the March primary.
Before I head out there, can you make a contribution? **Any amount is sincerely appreciated:[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240122-2 ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240122-2?refcode=em20240122-36887&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36887_3422442__DRz8g&akid=36887%2E3422442%2E_DRz8g)**
You can watch tonight’s debate from 6-7:30 PM PT by tuning into Fox 11 Los Angeles, or watch on their YouTube channel at: [https://www.youtube.com/@Foxla/videos ](https://act.katieporter.com/go/19958?source=em20240122-36887&t=1&akid=36887%2E3422442%2E_DRz8g)
Katie Porter

Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)

subject: Not here for the horse hockey
body:
Jesse isn't a pretend rancher or farmer, he's a newspaperman and a businessman who knows the value of hard work | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mullenformontana/not-here-for-the-horse-hockey?e=805e709ff8)
---
[](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=c43212f415&e=805e709ff8)
[](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=2b264a45a0&e=805e709ff8)
_NEW VIDEO:_[_Not here to feed you a load of horse hockey!_](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=e61a8caff6&e=805e709ff8)
Hey team, it’s Jesse James Mullen. I got to spend some time out on the land last week.
It got me thinking about the Ranchers and Farmers who call Montana home.
**I’m blessed to have founded and built my company from the ground up with the help and support of many great people.**
Like I had support, Montana’s agriculture industries need support from our business services office, and they’re not getting it under our current Secretary of State.
Please help us put personal accountability and good character back in the Capitol.
**I need your help!** The GOP machine is out-raising us five to one, but we’re doing a lot with a little. I get better media and make more connections with Real Montanans than our MAGA opponent. Our team is also having more fun doing it because this campaign is about bringing Montanans together, not dividing us.
[ **Help increase the production budget.**](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=5c593d791a&e=805e709ff8) A few dollars a month will help me spend more time working directly with Montana’s voters, spreading our message of [hope](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=d9b002080c&e=805e709ff8).
I can’t beat the far-right machine by myself. Please help with a recurring [donation](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=78c7bc7938&e=805e709ff8) right away.
God Bless,Jesse James Mullen

| [DONATE HERE](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=8c5646e39e&e=805e709ff8)

name: Michael Bennet
subject: How we can fight back for reproductive rights
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BENNET FOR COLORADO
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_012224_RoevWade_lim [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_012224_RoevWade_lim]
Today marks the 51st anniversary of Roe v. Wade, the landmark case that protected abortion under the Constitution.
In June 2022, the conservative majority on the Supreme Court overturned Roe . In the year and a half since, we’ve witnessed the devastating consequences of that decision, which denied women their right to make choices about their bodies and their futures.
Today, twenty-one states have abortion bans in place. In states that criminalize abortion, doctors are caught between upholding their oaths to do no harm or facing prison time, and women and girls are being forced to pay out-of-pocket to travel hundreds of miles to access care or risk suffering life-threatening health complications at home.
Just last week, Republicans in Congress passed two different anti-abortion bills through the House. They'll stop at nothing until they pass a nationwide abortion ban.
The consequences of overturning Roe have been tragic. But we won’t give up hope — and we won’t give up the fight.
Across the country, people have shown up to vote for reproductive freedom. Even in deep red states, like Kansas and Kentucky, voters rejected ballot measures that would’ve further restricted reproductive rights. And in Ohio, voters enshrined the right to choose in their state's constitution.
I’m working nonstop to elect a pro-choice majority in Congress — and to make Roe v. Wade law.
Friend, I'll keep you informed about the best opportunities to protect and defend reproductive rights. For now, you can support my work to elect pro-choice Democratic candidates in Colorado and across the country by chipping in today >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_012224_RoevWade_lim]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

name: =?utf-8?Q?Michigan=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: MIGOP E-Newsletter January 22, 2024
body:
We have a lot to update you on. | | | |
---
| [View email in browser](https://mailchi.mp/migop.org/newsletter-jan-22-2024?e=a2af77507c)
---
|
## Welcome to the MIGOP Newsletter!
Each Monday, the Michigan Republican Party sends important information about what is happening within the party, state, and nation and how you can get involved.
---
|
---
| | | Hello:

Over the last week, you have no doubt noticed stories in the media that I have been replaced as the Chairwoman of the Michigan Republican Party. Nothing would give the Left—as well as grifters and chaos agents within the Republican Party—more pleasure than to see me gone. _**These stories are false.**_

What has remained true, however, since my election last February is that there has been a well-orchestrated effort to sabotage any systemic election reform I and my administration seek to make.

It is through elections that we express our freedom of speech.

It is through elections that We the People choose from among our fellow citizens those individuals deemed best to fight on our behalf, on behalf of our freedoms.

If we do not secure our elections, we cannot provide the necessary checks and balances to those in power. There is already a vast, unconstitutional gap between us and unelected bureaucrats at all levels of government.

If we do not secure our elections, we cannot fight effectively against the malignant forces seeking to gain a stronger foothold in our state.

It sounds dramatic and intense, but that is because it is, and I need your help. I ask you to partner with me and the real Michigan Republican Party today.

In Liberty,
Kristina Karamo
Chairwoman
Michigan Republican Party

[Karamo administration sends cease-and-desist letters](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=9250a55fcb&e=a2af77507c)
[Message from MIGOP General Counsel Dan Hartman](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=6720b02083&e=a2af77507c)
---
|
---
|
---
Join fellow Republicans at events throughout the state, including the [Questions, Answers & Facts](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=777fbe4fd7&e=a2af77507c) series with Chairwoman Karamo. This week she will deliver remarks as well as answer questions from Precinct Delegates on the following dates:

Mon, Jan 22 – District 2
Wed, Jan 24 – Northern Michigan
Thu, Jan 25 – U.P.

If you are a Precinct Delegate in one of these areas, please attend!
* * *
Delegates throughout the state will be selected at the February 15 county conventions to participate in the MIGOP District Convention on Saturday, March 2.

For more information about upcoming events, visit the [MIGOP events page](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=f1b0b6966d&e=a2af77507c).
|
---
|
---
The January 19 edition of _[Friday Lunch with Chair Karamo](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=2421f8bf70&e=a2af77507c)_ is available on the MIGOP website. Topics discussed:
* Official State Committee Special Meeting: January 13, 2024
* MIGOP District Convention: March 2, 2024
* District Precinct Delegate Townhalls
* [Good Neighbor Program](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=c8f394d48a&e=a2af77507c)
* Funding Challenge

By Noon each Friday, a new interview with the Chairwoman will be posted. All previous interviews are also available.
* * *
[Update re the Hillsdale County lawsuit](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=890d5f7a2b&e=a2af77507c)
* * *
[An important message from Chairwoman Karamo](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=14381ff64a&e=a2af77507c)
* * *
[PSA from the Michigan Independent Citizens Redistricting Commission](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=6f50eb32b1&e=a2af77507c)
|
---
|
---
**SPECIAL ANNOUNCEMENT**

On January 13, 2024, the Michigan Republican State Central Committee adopted the following resolution: [Resolution to Stop the Prosecutions of Donald J. Trump](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=ebd38236e2&e=a2af77507c)
* * *
**MIGOP AND CMV PARTNERSHIP UPDATE**

A powerful partnership between the Michigan Republican Party and [Check My Vote](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=b0f5e929d5&e=a2af77507c) continues to advance our election security efforts. The CMV QVF Cleanup Team has just unearthed disturbing allegations of voter registration fraud in Holland, MI. As a result, we have filed criminal charges against 19 people registered by the Secretary of State’s Department of Motor Vehicles to vote from a _non-existent_ address. CMV’s Tim Vetter told [_The Gateway Pundit_](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=1025558a93&e=a2af77507c) : “There is no such address, and no one is paying taxes on the lot.” But it does not end there. Eight of the 19 voted in the 2020 and 2022 elections!

The MIGOP’s Election Security Operations Program is aggressively pursuing these and other election law violations, and we need your help in the form of volunteering and donations. Contact **phil@migop.org** to get involved.
|

clean_body: We have a lot to update you on. | | | | | | Welcome to the MIGOP Newsletter! Each Monday, the Michigan Republican Party sends important information about what is happening within the party, state, and nation and how you can get involved. | | | | Hello: Over the last week, you have no doubt noticed stories in the media that I have been replaced as the Chairwoman of the Michigan Republican Party. Nothing would give the Left—as well as grifters and chaos agents within the Republican Party—more pleasure than to see me gone. These stories are false. What has remained true, however, since my election last February is that there has been a well-orchestrated effort to sabotage any systemic election reform I and my administration seek to make. It is through elections that we express our freedom of speech. It is through elections that We the People choose from among our fellow citizens those individuals deemed best to fight on our behalf, on behalf of our freedoms. If we do not secure our elections, we cannot provide the necessary checks and balances to those in power. There is already a vast, unconstitutional gap between us and unelected bureaucrats at all levels of government. If we do not secure our elections, we cannot fight effectively against the malignant forces seeking to gain a stronger foothold in our state. It sounds dramatic and intense, but that is because it is, and I need your help. I ask you to partner with me and the real Michigan Republican Party today. In Liberty, Kristina Karamo Chairwoman Michigan Republican Party | | Join fellow Republicans at events throughout the state, including the series with Chairwoman Karamo. name: Mazi Pilip
subject: I am honored to be the nominee in the New York special election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazi for Congress
body:
Special Election declared

| |
---
| | | Friend,

I never thought I'd have running water, let alone be running for Congress.

My name is Mazi Melesa Pilip, but you can call me Mazi for short!

I'm the Republican nominee running in the New York special election that was just declared.

If you don't already know- this is the one & only seat we absolutely have to win to defend the House Majority.

I'm a black, Jewish woman & I'm not afraid to tell you that I am 100% Pro-Law Enforcement, Pro-Border security, and Pro-Family.

Democrats & the liberal media have spent years saying the GOP will never support someone of my ethnicity & my creed.

They say women like me don't exist & that we can't be any of those things.

And now they're spending millions to bury me in negative headlines, hit pieces, and TV commercials.

They take great pleasure in laying waste to minority women who don't fall in line with their sacred narrative.
And without your help today- I'm afraid I'm going to be one of them.

The only way to stop them is to come out of the gates strong with the full weight and might of the conservative movement behind me.

---
| [](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=eccfbe80095442088190148da9f313da&_e=N-PzOedMSEaBEP-DK_pZQac56l5GR2z4Ip4ofO_sKVdeToKARvKlvvvEHldqEMDg-S-GrCAQwPXMZd5ODJlp7vhWrmrhi6wKLUtdGEdUk-cOcBOQrE5Yet3ltUDOYNOgxMU6eFzfzJfHDAAx79CrHbX4M4JLeEogjVu2t9r2xXZeh4e6BbrbPrvHGokIt6q6qWLxDISMSCJvkTyG87bvqcnny2aTvblO4YnUbiBcK4s2xlkOTLOsjm7DMfzS3K2J17PMwhIbLhCrLrslmeN5_vYuvg2FCY2NHjNMLCgN56sLTLF0phaw6-dtp0yYCtv_KWvPj0WD7fQTDYYmi77W414sxGZhSwZt53CjN-IZgSC62z9TmHy-LU6Vh3iwWeRlCX8Olp5EsHj5qJWPyp-VMbmGybzZLrsc2ft_Q6AJddeG7f5tnqfLjOldP7fgwFqE)
---

I've just launched my campaign to keep NY-03 red & so I'm humbly asking you to stand with me as we embark on this sprint to the finish line.

---
| | [SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN TODAY](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=eccfbe80095442088190148da9f313da&_e=N-PzOedMSEaBEP-DK_pZQac56l5GR2z4Ip4ofO_sKVdeToKARvKlvvvEHldqEMDg-S-GrCAQwPXMZd5ODJlp7vhWrmrhi6wKLUtdGEdUk-cOcBOQrE5Yet3ltUDOYNOgxMU6eFzfzJfHDAAx79CrHbX4M4JLeEogjVu2t9r2xXZeh4e6BbrbPrvHGokIt6q6qWLxDISMSCJvkTyG87bvqcnny2aTvblO4YnUbiBcK4s2xlkOTLOsjm7DMfzS3K2J17PMwhIbLhCrLrslmeN5_vYuvg2FCY2NHjNMLCgN56s6l9OXk62jHj1tfnnT9DrsI-EkCpMurOMd5ReqNuywW7LSyG7L5h79t6jKa_aqaxHO5HeEPzgokfCIKHmffeCA2QY-k42mE3ocZxNSmCENmej_L0PovJ8As7viWrYzJO0lEJwAJ3MpuFFLhAlN4Sb3)
---

Early voting begins in just a few weeks. Voters are already planning to head to the polls & that makes this the most important race in the nation right now.

I hope you'll step up & stand with me today to defeat the Democrats & hold the House Majority.

---
| | [SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN TODAY](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=eccfbe80095442088190148da9f313da&_e=N-PzOedMSEaBEP-DK_pZQac56l5GR2z4Ip4ofO_sKVdeToKARvKlvvvEHldqEMDg-S-GrCAQwPXMZd5ODJlp7vhWrmrhi6wKLUtdGEdUk-cOcBOQrE5Yet3ltUDOYNOgxMU6eFzfzJfHDAAx79CrHbX4M4JLeEogjVu2t9r2xXZeh4e6BbrbPrvHGokIt6q6qWLxDISMSCJvkTyG87bvqcnny2aTvblO4YnUbiBcK4s2xlkOTLOsjm7DMfzS3K2J17PMwhIbLhCrLrslmeN5_vYuvg2FCY2NHjNMLCgN56u-teQxMmc8JXD-spvyK-R-aAuAi-haPhPjPM0vXnjIvqsrVE_1jkqH4op26XFCV9Hgdr1w2dx5wxLZ9tk0Nmk2FTUnHQaN44saZwxCc0npGaeicyejHaeJUqj0xHkFzIXp-0-lhlVjYzmHcezXR-2b)
---

And if I can ever help you the way you've helped me, please just say the word.

All the best,

Mazi Melesa Pilip
GOP Nominee
Special Election NY-03

---
| [](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=eccfbe80095442088190148da9f313da&_e=N-PzOedMSEaBEP-DK_pZQac56l5GR2z4Ip4ofO_sKVdeToKARvKlvvvEHldqEMDg-S-GrCAQwPXMZd5ODJlp7vhWrmrhi6wKLUtdGEdUk-cOcBOQrE5Yet3ltUDOYNOgxMU6eFzfzJfHDAAx79CrHbX4M4JLeEogjVu2t9r2xXZeh4e6BbrbPrvHGokIt6q6qWLxDISMSCJvkTyG87bvqcnny2aTvblO4YnUbiBcK4s2xlkOTLOsjm7DMfzS3K2J17PMwhIbLhCrLrslmeN5_vYuvg2FCY2NHjNMLCgN56tprq_sakBBLNy0JnmdXHYcclwSsnEaDhBidc7ya_QMDP6pOr_rpCVwtdPughqCta7SqR2h1Hv-UqnQmRNXWYu-wHvvXieoFFmr1wbZfvPMii0xXEMithbKvn0liPRwmeCZqLXemAGJ1aUdV8sh_nh9)

name: Kari Lake
subject: Who will you vote for:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kari Lake for Senate
body:
November 5th

| [ ](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=67c2397855b34d63918bcd275425b99e&_e=3Itp6svhaSdMuzbpmRNa8ibQNhq9vBA0YMtlD05IKsXcX2ePqFu4wXsATHkcGZTkMraymjMEe69ylfE6DUVGNA0y-hCBPfjqGucvkG-tcKzmsgb7UymtYH7DRjU6rdzgDHKa9ASgl6fmucas-qUEEaE3f-HbiM1Jy722tYjlG7_cQpwNnpR6LiAm8CmJFh1pV5Z6zg3d4QhmssIDM1IHcy-Q6qK7HW7KFuGdXy2BQgSu1_Jx9mr2oIYmDFYs6d_dyIQJq1peZKbB4_8PzEZ4ZTV0Kaw6OrxJ5LniMfyWwgdF0iOL6a9lPdSa3bqrPFFdxpN9V84voF6vB37HiY3BzOT6z8uTxcEMZVwiiAZkHVu3jdn15SM9joZaz-yPKPa4E5pmhyTdsdF0Q9xEnUoG78gLynmAm6cRdX79JPY4rlU%3D)
---
Fellow American,

When we vote on November 5th, what will you let influence your decision?

Will you listen to the lies of the media or believe the misinformation from the left?

OR will you listen to your heart and do what’s right — put America First?

The left won’t stop until every conservative gets the Donald Trump treatment.

They want all of us to be remembered for when we’ve misspoken or hurt feelings rather than for what we’ve done to make this country great.

That’s the reality of living in America in 2024 — this is what we will have to deal with leading up to Election Day. They will try to cancel us, lie about us, and call us every nasty name in the book.

Together, Fellow American, we can do this.

clean_body: November 5th | Fellow American, When we vote on November 5th, what will you let influence your decision? Will you listen to the lies of the media or believe the misinformation from the left? OR will you listen to your heart and do what’s right — put America First? The left won’t stop until every conservative gets the Donald Trump treatment. They want all of us to be remembered for when we’ve misspoken or hurt feelings rather than for what we’ve done to make this country great. That’s the reality of living in America in 2024 — this is what we will have to deal with leading up to Election Day. They will try to cancel us, lie about us, and call us every nasty name in the book. Together, Fellow American, we can do this. **If you EVER wanted to help our movement, I’ve been told one patriot is willing to MATCH every contribution made before midnight. 13X MATCH: ACTIVATED | Thank you, and God Bless America. Kari Lake Paid for by Kari Lake for Senate If you'd like to donate by mail, **.

name: Team AOC
subject: 51 years
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Are we screwed?
#
51 years ago today, the Supreme Court ruled that access to an abortion was a fundamental right protected by the right to privacy in the Constitution. Roe v. Wade set the precedent for legal abortion access in all 50 states.
51 years later, abortions are now entirely banned or heavily restricted in 21 states. Last week, Donald Trump won the Iowa Caucus by a record-breaking margin — just days after saying he was ‘proud’ to help overturn Roe v. Wade.
In moments like these, it can be easy to feel hopeless.
After the ruling to overturn Roe v. Wade was leaked, someone asked Alexandria on Instagram, “Are we screwed?” Here’s what she had to say:
What is important in moments like these is not to think in binaries. Good/bad, screwed/not screwed. There is no doubt that things are bad. Some things, really bad. And they may likely get worse.
But that does not preclude the fact that slowly but surely, some good can be growing as other things fall apart. This is not some syrupy sweet silver lining case for optimism. Rather, it is really about a choice all of us will have to make in life, either consciously or unconsciously: **will I be a person who is safe and creates good for others?**
Will I be a person who stands up? Will I be a person who primarily minds my business and serves myself or try to be part of something bigger? Or will I just be a passive, “neutral” observer of it all?
What I sometimes tell my staff is that **the world we are fighting for is already here**. It exists in small spaces, places, and communities. We don’t have to deal with the insurmountable burden of coming up with novel solutions to the world’s problems.
Much of our work is about scaling existing solutions, many created by small, committed groups of people, that others haven’t seen or don’t even know are around the corner. So while we can’t change the world in a day, we _can_ and _do_ have the power to make our own world within our own four walls, or on our own blocks.
We can grow from there with the faith that somewhere out there, everywhere, others are doing the same. **And we will come together.**
That’s why if you’re a parent, how you parent matters. If you’re a neighbor, how you are a neighbor matters. Many of our biggest problems are results of massively scaled up isolation from others. That means many of our solutions can be found in creating community.
Ultimately, we live in this world and in this time. We have no choice but to engage in it while we’re here. Even running away is a form of engagement. So will your engagement hurt or heal? Build or bring down?
There is no neutral choice, so we can at least do our best to make good ones and learn and do better the next day.
You are allowed to be scared. To grieve. To be angry. But you are also allowed to create good, to be soft, and enjoy the small reprieves. Struggle lasts as long as we do.
In solidarity,
Team AOC

Our movement for progress is entirely powered by grassroots support.
[Will you make a $5 contribution today to keep Alexandria's work for a better world going strong?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20240122.4xGflM&refcode=em20240122-5681-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=5681%2E2526796%2ENyPFXy)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20240122.4xGflM&refcode=em20240122-5681-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=5681%2E2526796%2ENyPFXy)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20240122?refcode=em20240122-5681-P_FND_EGR_GOL&t=21&refcode2=5681_2526796_NyPFXy&akid=5681%2E2526796%2ENyPFXy)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20240122-5681-P_FND_EGR_GOL&t=22&akid=5681%2E2526796%2ENyPFXy)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=23&akid=5681%2E2526796%2ENyPFXy) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=24&akid=5681%2E2526796%2ENyPFXy) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=25&akid=5681%2E2526796%2ENyPFXy)
---|---|---

To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

name: Patty Murray
subject: On this day in 1973 ...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
instead of celebrating this milestone, we mourn the void it left when the Supreme Court overruled this decision in 2022
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77557689/450806299/-1278413943?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=http%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fmurray-2024-roe-anniversary&code=jtk213-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTk0NzM2Yy04YmI5LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7n7Mkd_cbukinMEUzsPEvfFZaBoABCdJJG7snvDdqew=&emci=cb76acff-58b6-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=3594736c-8bb9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=13116610)
---
**Today would have been the 51st anniversary of the Supreme Court’s _Roe v. Wade_ decision. **
But instead of celebrating this milestone, women across the country are suffering because of Republicans’ decades-long anti-abortion and anti-women crusade that led to the overturning of _Roe_ and opened the floodgates for more extreme, dangerous attacks on reproductive rights.
So, instead, today we’ve got to speak out and fight back.
**[If you're with me in the fight to restore _Roe_ and protect reproductive rights, I need you to sign the petition before 11:59 p.m. tonight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77557690/450806301/-1278413943?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=http%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fmurray-2024-roe-anniversary&code=jtk213-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTk0NzM2Yy04YmI5LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7n7Mkd_cbukinMEUzsPEvfFZaBoABCdJJG7snvDdqew=&emci=cb76acff-58b6-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=3594736c-8bb9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=13116610)**
| | [ADD MY NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77557691/450806302/-1278413943?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=http%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fmurray-2024-roe-anniversary&code=jtk213-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTk0NzM2Yy04YmI5LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7n7Mkd_cbukinMEUzsPEvfFZaBoABCdJJG7snvDdqew=&emci=cb76acff-58b6-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=3594736c-8bb9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=13116610)
---
I’m furious that this generation of women has** ** fewer rights than their mothers and grandmothers. And it’s what fuels me to keep fighting. Republicans have made clear that overturning _Roe_ was not the beginning of their efforts – far from it. They’re coming after all aspects of reproductive rights like abortion medication, IVF, and even the right to birth control.
I promise that Senate Democrats will keep fighting back against Republicans' push for a nationwide abortion ban and all of their cruel attempts to rip away reproductive rights in every way we can and for as long as it takes to restore _Roe v. Wade_ and protect every woman's right to abortion.
**But until then, we must stand united in demanding the right for every woman to control her body and her future –[so please, add your name to my petition now if you're with me in the fight to restore _Roe_ and protect the right to abortion. We can't win without everyone on board.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77557693/450806303/-1278413943?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=http%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fmurray-2024-roe-anniversary&code=jtk213-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTk0NzM2Yy04YmI5LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7n7Mkd_cbukinMEUzsPEvfFZaBoABCdJJG7snvDdqew=&emci=cb76acff-58b6-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=3594736c-8bb9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=13116610)**

clean_body: instead of celebrating this milestone, we mourn the void it left when the Supreme Court overruled this decision in 2022 | | | Today would have been the 51st anniversary of the Supreme Court’s Roe v. Wade decision. But instead of celebrating this milestone, women across the country are suffering because of Republicans’ decades-long anti-abortion and anti-women crusade that led to the overturning of Roe and opened the floodgates for more extreme, dangerous attacks on reproductive rights. So, instead, today we’ve got to speak out and fight back. | | I’m furious that this generation of women has fewer rights than their mothers and grandmothers. And it’s what fuels me to keep fighting. Republicans have made clear that overturning Roe was not the beginning of their efforts – far from it. They’re coming after all aspects of reproductive rights like abortion medication, IVF, and even the right to birth control. I promise that Senate Democrats will keep fighting back against Republicans' push for a nationwide abortion ban and all of their cruel attempts to rip away reproductive rights in every way we can and for as long as it takes to restore Roe v. Wade and protect every woman's right to abortion. But until then, we must stand united in demanding the right for every woman to control her body and her future – | | Thank you, Patty Murray | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. People for Patty Murray PO BOX 3662 Seattle, WA 98124 United States | | PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY

**Former Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy is running against one of Chuck Schumer’s foot soldiers in the Senate who votes to deliver the Biden-Harris agenda of open borders and big government spending that fuels the fires of inflation. And Tim needs OUR HELP to win.**

name: Cecile Richards
subject: Jacky is the reproductive rights champion we need in the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
Today marks 51 years
| | |
---
Friend,
**Today marks 51 years since safe, legal abortion became the law of the land in America.**
But instead of celebrating this landmark anniversary, we're living with the aftermath of the Supreme Court's decision to overturn _Roe v. Wade._
Since the Court took away this fundamental right, Republicans have banned and restricted abortion in states across the country, and threatened to pass a nationwide ban on abortions if they regain Senate control. They've even indicated they plan to go after birth control.
In other words, there's a whole lot riding on what happens in Nevada this November. And I can tell you this: **My friend Sen. Jacky Rosen is exactly who we want in the Senate to keep fighting for reproductive freedom.**
Right now, _CNN_ analysts are calling Jacky one of the most vulnerable senators in the race that will likely decide Senate control, and a shady billionaire has already poured $2 million into Nevada to flip her seat for Republicans.
Jacky's strong stance on reproductive rights is one of the reasons why the GOP has made her a top target for defeat – **and that’s exactly why we need to do everything we possibly can to help her win in Nevada and defend our Democratic Senate majority this year.**
**[_So please, friend, will you join me in supporting Jacky today by making a gift of $5 or more to her and Debbie Mucarsel-Powell now to keep Nevada and the Senate blue and help restore reproductive freedom in America? _](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77557910/450811454/1971945393?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk702-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjIxYTZiMzktOGViOS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zLxIWMn-8WBOujqoZR-oM09FQqYaLNOVB14aByu6ZW8=)**

51 years ago today, the Supreme Court ruled in Roe v. Wade that abortion is a constitutionally protected right. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77557940/450812169/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20240122_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYWEzY2FkOS04ZWI5LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tqOIYHeOs6QM5XE7Cm5ezgsthqaYpgK9TcKTt_TVAbg=&emci=c8a3cad9-8eb9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=eaa3cad9-8eb9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=252045)

Friends — 51 years ago today, the Supreme Court ruled in _Roe v. Wade_ that abortion is a constitutionally protected right. Less than two years after the Supreme Court’s ultraconservative majority overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , it’s clearer than ever that ending _Roe_ was only the start of Republicans’ attacks on reproductive rights. From 21 states banning or severely restricting abortion to the conservative push to take abortion pill mifepristone off the market, reproductive rights have not been more at risk since before _Roe_. Here in New Mexico, we fought and organized to elect pro-choice legislators who took an archaic abortion ban off the books. I’m proud to have been part of that effort and know that women in New Mexico now have their rights protected. But Republicans won't stop until they pass a federal abortion ban. This November, they could take back the Senate, hold their House majority, and elect a GOP president to ban abortion in every state. **Now that I have a challenger backed by Mitch McConnell’s allies, who has already poured $500,000 of her funds into this race, we need to fight harder than ever to keep New Mexico and the Senate blue.** **[On the anniversary of _Roe v. Wade_ , will you support my re-election campaign so I can keep fighting to codify the right to abortion into federal law? Defending our Senate Majority and expanding reproductive rights has never been more important.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77557941/450812170/-1374307457?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20240122_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYWEzY2FkOS04ZWI5LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tqOIYHeOs6QM5XE7Cm5ezgsthqaYpgK9TcKTt_TVAbg=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77557942/450812171/-1374307457?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20240122_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYWEzY2FkOS04ZWI5LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tqOIYHeOs6QM5XE7Cm5ezgsthqaYpgK9TcKTt_TVAbg=)

The first $6,600/$10,000 from a person/multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Biden for President, with the first $3,300/$5,000 designated for the primary and the next $3,300/$5,000 for the general election. The next $41,300/$15,000 from a person/PAC will be allocated to the DNC. The next $510,000/$255,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from these states: AK, AL, AR, AZ, CA, CO, CT, DC, DE, FL, GA, HI, IA, ID, IL, IN, KS, KY, LA, MA, MD, ME, MI, MN, MO, MS, MT, NC, ND, NE, NH, NJ, NM, NV, NY, OH, OK, OR, PA, RI, SC, SD, TN, TX, UT, VA, VT, WA, WI, WV, and WY. Any additional funds will be allocated to the DNC, subject to applicable contribution limits.
A contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant by contacting contact@joebiden.com. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution. Contributions will be used in connection with federal elections, may be spent on any activity as each committee determines in its sole discretion, and will not be earmarked for any particular candidate. body:
and how you can help keep all three of these candidates out of Congress
|
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77558065/450812939/-1678304462?refcode=odp_em_240122_3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTJkYjE3Yi04ZmI5LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rUhAe3Qx1SqQfh1kCAalCCB6ZNDMzt5PvgkFhoNmLeY=) Team, The GOP Senate field just wrapped up their first public debate. I’ll share my thoughts with you in a moment, but before I do, **[can you pitch in $5 to help protect this Senate seat and our Democratic majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77558066/450812940/-1678304462?refcode=odp_em_240122_3&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTJkYjE3Yi04ZmI5LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rUhAe3Qx1SqQfh1kCAalCCB6ZNDMzt5PvgkFhoNmLeY=)** While most debates are often full of unexpected, unscripted moments, we had an inkling this one was going to be messy. And we weren’t alone. Political pundits have called the GOP Senate primary in Ohio “bloody” and “the messiest Senate primary of 2024.” And boy were we right. As per usual, the attacks flew. But our personal favorites include Moreno attacking Dolan saying "this guy will do anything to achieve political power" and Dolan dishing it right back with "I don't know if we can trust you." _We couldn't have said it better ourselves._ How long have we been saying these three are only looking out for themselves? That we can't trust them to prioritize working Ohioans? But the one thing Ohioans didn’t hear? **Meaningful positions on the issues that matter most to Ohioans**. While the three politicians stood there on stage and lobbed attacks at each other, Ohioans are still left wondering what these guys are planning to do to make our lives better. The only thing they have promised is to overrule the majority of Ohioans who support reproductive rights and pass a national abortion ban in Washington. We can’t let them buy this U.S. Senate seat that will likely decide control of the chamber. **[Will you donate today to ensure we have the resources we need to defeat whichever candidate comes out of this messy primary so we can protect our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77558067/450812941/-1678304462?refcode=odp_em_240122_3&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTJkYjE3Yi04ZmI5LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rUhAe3Qx1SqQfh1kCAalCCB6ZNDMzt5PvgkFhoNmLeY=)** Thank you, Liz Walters | ****Control of the House and Senate runs right through Ohio this year. Can Ohio Democrats count on you to chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can to help fuel our fight to hold on to the Senate and flip the House? →**** | **********[********](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77558068/450812942/-1678304462?refcode=odp_em_240122_3&amount=5;email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTJkYjE3Yi04ZmI5LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rUhAe3Qx1SqQfh1kCAalCCB6ZNDMzt5PvgkFhoNmLeY=)****[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77558069/450812943/-1678304462?refcode=odp_em_240122_3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTJkYjE3Yi04ZmI5LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rUhAe3Qx1SqQfh1kCAalCCB6ZNDMzt5PvgkFhoNmLeY=) **************

name: Mark Mullet
subject: Codifying abortion rights in our state constitution
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elect Mark Mullet
body:
| | This issue is personal for me because I have four daughters. It was sobering to see the change in just two years from when Isabel was choosing a college in January of 2021 to Eloise choosing a college in 2023. For Eloise, it was the first time in 50 years that women had to Google reproductive health care policies of the places where they were considering going to college to make sure they would still have reproductive health care access. Eloise always liked Boise State, but reconsidered knowing she would not be able to fully access reproductive health care. It is for my daughters and many others that I support changing our state's constitution to codify reproductive freedom. While the Legislature continues to fall short of the votes needed, I'm optimistic that with different leadership in the Governor's office, we could reach the two-thirds threshold necessary. Protecting women's reproductive rights and supporting our LBGTQ+ community are two of the primary motivating factors that drove me to run for the State Senate back in 2012. I am the only candidate for governor with a proven track record of supporting women's reproductive health and rights. **[Check out my record.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77558208/450813793/769231469?source=MM_EM_PT_WL_240122_1_1&refcode2=e44c0c51-90b9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&contactdata=3yj0XlY3x0QTV4xZX7gBkm0ReX/5qQWX74ymJyVdooyIoBq8+XehD3bpYZtjFlUu&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MzAxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDRjMGM1MS05MGI5LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7Cqww0wqO3GCeIJys4riisoyT5A5RqiBXPMbidHa8ss=&emci=c5c881e2-72b9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=e44c0c51-90b9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=45626167)** [I believe our next Governor should codify abortion rights in our state constitution. Do you agree?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77558209/450813794/-318975982?source=MM_EM_PT_WL_240122_1_1&refcode2=e44c0c51-90b9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&contactdata=3yj0XlY3x0QTV4xZX7gBkm0ReX/5qQWX74ymJyVdooyIoBq8+XehD3bpYZtjFlUu&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MzAxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDRjMGM1MS05MGI5LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7Cqww0wqO3GCeIJys4riisoyT5A5RqiBXPMbidHa8ss=&emci=c5c881e2-72b9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=e44c0c51-90b9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=45626167)
| | ****[YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77558210/450813795/-318975982?source=MM_EM_PT_WL_240122_1_1&refcode2=e44c0c51-90b9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&contactdata=3yj0XlY3x0QTV4xZX7gBkm0ReX/5qQWX74ymJyVdooyIoBq8+XehD3bpYZtjFlUu&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MzAxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDRjMGM1MS05MGI5LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7Cqww0wqO3GCeIJys4riisoyT5A5RqiBXPMbidHa8ss=&emci=c5c881e2-72b9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=e44c0c51-90b9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=45626167)****

Mark

name: Mazie Hirono
subject: I won’t stop fighting like hell for reproductive freedom
body:
|
#
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77558305/450814234/262933052?refcode=AU_MKH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20240122_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMGQzOGNiNy05MWI5LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OZYjYtODQ-9x3c7LNVtMAA1VRyCFi8c_yQIH6jj7KmM=&emci=b5ba8bdd-8fb9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=b0d38cb7-91b9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=23190490) Aloha Peter, Fifty one years ago today, the Supreme Court handed down its decision in _Roe v. Wade_ , ruling that women have the right to make their own reproductive health care choices. Ever since that historic decision, the conservative movement spent decades meticulously plotting ways to chip away at this constitutional and human right. They lobbied ferociously. They allied with dark-money donors. Anti-abortion Republican presidents packed the Supreme Court with right-wing judges with radical viewpoints. Then, less than two years ago, the Supreme Court handed them their ultimate prize — overturning _Roe v. Wade_ and upending decades of precedent. It was the first time in American history that the Court had taken away a constitutional right from the people. This disastrous decision instantly stripped millions of Americans of their right to make their own reproductive health care choices. And it emboldened GOP-led states across the country to go even further by passing laws that criminalize doctors for providing essential, life-saving care — without exceptions for cases of rape or incest. _Peter, as of now, abortion is completely banned in**twenty one** states across the country — and extremist Republicans are working to enact an abortion ban nationwide._ Republicans will claim that this is about “states’ rights,” but that could not be further from the truth. This is about controlling women’s freedom and bodily autonomy, full stop. **And I won’t stop fighting to protect the fundamental right of every individual to make decisions about their bodies, or our futures.** **[Peter, please join me in commemorating the anniversary of _Roe v. Wade_ by urging the Senate to immediately pass the _Women’s Health Protection Act_ immediately >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77558306/450814235/262933052?contactdata=+eCOUx3vGf/8JbXy+pOJhmY6faM06iTWQkMJsKFvXFDTCe9DbSm9b+Fi0c4pfWXI70H9c9y/3TJImKXXFX7hlze/J1yOF2p7nbDYviXXT8gbFfZDV4zSJcxW5inJ3q3H8ECNipTDH1J7YCJy2SerIqH6f3tkd7PIql30eHDRc9g=&refcode=AU_MKH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20240122_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMGQzOGNiNy05MWI5LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OZYjYtODQ-9x3c7LNVtMAA1VRyCFi8c_yQIH6jj7KmM=&emci=b5ba8bdd-8fb9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=b0d38cb7-91b9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=23190490)** | | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77558307/450814236/262933052?contactdata=+eCOUx3vGf/8JbXy+pOJhmY6faM06iTWQkMJsKFvXFDTCe9DbSm9b+Fi0c4pfWXI70H9c9y/3TJImKXXFX7hlze/J1yOF2p7nbDYviXXT8gbFfZDV4zSJcxW5inJ3q3H8ECNipTDH1J7YCJy2SerIqH6f3tkd7PIql30eHDRc9g=&refcode=AU_MKH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20240122_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMGQzOGNiNy05MWI5LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OZYjYtODQ-9x3c7LNVtMAA1VRyCFi8c_yQIH6jj7KmM=&emci=b5ba8bdd-8fb9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=b0d38cb7-91b9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=23190490)
---
The _Women’s Health Protection Act_ would make the Constitutional right to an abortion, which was protected under _Roe v. Wade_ , the law of the land across the country. It protects the bodily autonomy of millions across the country to seek care without fear of prosecution or unjust restrictions.
**The need to codify the right to an abortion for every person in this country has rarely been greater.**
**[So Peter, will you sign on to my petition calling on the Senate to pass the _Women’s Health Protection Act_ immediately? clean_body: | Aloha Peter, Fifty one years ago today, the Supreme Court handed down its decision in Roe v. Wade , ruling that women have the right to make their own reproductive health care choices. Ever since that historic decision, the conservative movement spent decades meticulously plotting ways to chip away at this constitutional and human right. They lobbied ferociously. They allied with dark-money donors. Anti-abortion Republican presidents packed the Supreme Court with right-wing judges with radical viewpoints. Then, less than two years ago, the Supreme Court handed them their ultimate prize — overturning Roe v. Wade and upending decades of precedent. It was the first time in American history that the Court had taken away a constitutional right from the people. This disastrous decision instantly stripped millions of Americans of their right to make their own reproductive health care choices. And it emboldened GOP-led states across the country to go even further by passing laws that criminalize doctors for providing essential, life-saving care — without exceptions for cases of rape or incest. Peter, as of now, abortion is completely banned intwenty one states across the country — and extremist Republicans are working to enact an abortion ban nationwide. Republicans will claim that this is about “states’ rights,” but that could not be further from the truth. This is about controlling women’s freedom and bodily autonomy, full stop. And I won’t stop fighting to protect the fundamental right of every individual to make decisions about their bodies, or our futures. | | The Women’s Health Protection Act would make the Constitutional right to an abortion, which was protected under Roe v. Wade , the law of the land across the country. It protects the bodily autonomy of millions across the country to seek care without fear of prosecution or unjust restrictions. The need to codify the right to an abortion for every person in this country has rarely been greater. | Thank you for your continued support for this essential legislation. Mahalo, Mazie Friends of Mazie Hirono Friends of Mazie Hirono 335 Merchant Street #677 Honolulu, HI 96809 United States

body:
| Peter,

Today marks the 51st anniversary of _Roe v. Wade_. But instead of celebrating, because of the Supreme Court dismantling all those years of precedent with their Dobbs decision a year and a half ago, instead today serves as a reminder that we need to fight to protect reproductive health care rights from extremist fringes.

Just this month, MAGA republicans in the House introduced new anti-choice legislation—they’ve made it clear that if they win big in November they would push for a national abortion ban.

We’re also seeing the Supreme Court prepare to hear arguments in a case that could undo the FDA’s decades old approval of the leading abortion medication—a terrible precedent not just on this issue, but for the whole medical community.

This all falls under the backdrop of more states pushing unpopular anti-choice bans through.

Extremist Republicans are working hard to strip women of their right to choose and I’m not going to stand for it.

**_[Will you help me defend the right to choose from the interference of the far-right? **Myth #1** \- Women regret getting an abortion. FALSE, over [99 percent](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/4PfL751D8g4IfLXFw3QfXedgxhAP5p-fpkTdrrvi1Or6dhej9WzomLBPMqKDDEKKOSjM44yw1UKq_ixctjH5L0M3G3x3KSMls4efod64R2o4yf7yvnm-J1ONo99LhXcNZabRu1_9n2lZPavEVFptVbtkqy0rHCXfInoRiFuuP3wUlOfmxX_fSmAQf6XTaTcPmZt0JnU4JaJb3ACKbkZ2dXg0C-nj5y-74DFX8WckIxWBni8suHHiJy1mGSZ59iKFoGLX0s4edCHl9aQtE_ZKG9DwxxD4qlFyC3sWr4gJ7lwjUmqCkwT7A3EhFoPLFJxXFsIS722YTMPfff49E4htbia1odL5NdfEsOsYnuHlkgTKafD6KtZlvcuao2qlUF9HtNwmOhs5UV37j6YBpvJ-SGHWX-auVSD6QHiNbo0cJZjkSL5wkVnQCcz5gnEVWIpmK3oVan2Adi34NBi0PU763F8lt2B4JcdrTA737PKTFYY/438/jg2uN0EcQe2RBZMJfNhHEQ/h1/CxX25Td9idjvlD4aDnM5TgjqNRadrwBy3xQim0B9XY8) of women did not regret getting an abortion three years after the procedure. **
** **Myth #2** \- Abortions aren’t safe and can lead to complications, infertility and even increase the risk of breast cancer. FALSE, the National Academies of Sciences [reported](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/SVVf6UGddUySPN6znLYVWviiTJEdLbLTMDlI7v-P7iYRyULuPZXNZEuq2h9rfQIyK_ekqjp34pIPLAmXXxeSepB-WAjuVx80vy-ktAQSJAIju33OcsMxZfdkVo4hy9plF9gvD_HPj35tC33oItMD7rd8jh9UiaVeSnPKiRIet7x0Po0kZq9Cx485lWfXOq7v6KhF7_yxtdtyRNsOmbx1Ajxq19hH-tTdXgxSXpP406gIQnihYj7rIbCS_jIkEpeM1SN0XQXEW_c99auGMFEQJbsTVYKClqQzGvPSZQOKzjiFF8xyflyy1uU3k5DPp0Km9wD8WGnZRL918cNJ7SwotVLAS7Fmctt5pg00sXTXFN2oUuObu6xCGt7MQOpuYAugJP4OLpSiGyI2bmabw0p7VOoDiAvX_dgGF61zFohznLsCZLXyzm5eGD-Y4LAOtepr3ZJ2vUb2DxmHNoicSlQzDHnnazmQpIhvCZ98E2J55_Q7SWYgeKkjicZCvWtrZ7Ceash9Qz2eLIWlXzvZP87pDg/438/jg2uN0EcQe2RBZMJfNhHEQ/h2/R-FQfY7APsAfOlvaleuVn2dUGUbrNtxnab0yx9jysbM)that having an abortion does not increase any of those risks.
Yet “Crisis pregnancy centers” (CPCs) promote both of those myths. They claim to offer free pregnancy tests, abortion “counseling,” and after abortion help, but they refuse to help patients get an abortion and offer little to support those they persuaded not to have an abortion.
**Sixteen states have awarded _hundreds of millions of taxpayer dollars_ to fake unregulated abortion clinics, whose primary mission is to trick or manipulate patients into continuing their pregnancies. **
_Cedar Key Progress is raising funds to support pro-choice candidates who will fight for reproductive freedom in the South and across the country._

CPCs aren’t legitimate. They don’t have to keep patient information private like real clinics do. In fact, they can give it to other anti-abortion groups that could use it to harass pregnant people, surveil them, and may even help to criminalize them.

These fake clinics try hard to look legit with ultrasound machines, white coats, and authentic sounding names, but they use false information, emotional manipulation, and delays to divert pregnant people from accessing comprehensive and timely care.

**Republicans are planning on funneling even more taxpayer money to CPCs rather than prioritizing taxpayer money for public health and access.**

_Cedar Key Progress stands up for reproductive freedom for all._

| **51 Years After Roe, Abortion Rights Are Under Attack More Than Ever Before** The MAGA majority on the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade,_ enabling Republicans to ram through the most EXTREMIST abortion bans in history.

But _Roe v. Wade_ is just the tip of the iceberg — the Supreme Court will soon make a decision on access to life-saving abortion medicine!

We REFUSE to let them destroy our rights, but we can’t be in this fight alone. **That’s why we need to hear from at least 5,000 Democrats by midnight:** [**Do you approve of the Supreme Court? »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/scotus-approval-poll?source=VPP_20240122_EMPOLL_E4_T0_AC&t=6&akid=12542%2E878179%2ENE-fqc) | [YES »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/scotus-approval-poll?source=VPP_20240122_EMPOLL_E4_T0_AC&t=7&akid=12542%2E878179%2ENE-fqc)

subject: I won’t stand by and let MAGA Republicans trample on reproductive rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lynn Peterson for Congress
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77558540/450815109/-2024045026?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzU0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTkxZDAzYy05NGI5LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PqyZVzqUMRjzRh4ud6vPsQeTVKwTQOcvQItx8y1cov0=&emci=d9fa0ea3-7db9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=6a91d03c-94b9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=29359352)
---

| | Peter, On today's anniversary of the landmark decision in _Roe v. Wade_ , I want to make something unequivocally clear: **Abortion is healthcare.** Full stop. _No one_ should be denied access to this essential care, regardless of where they live. In 2022, the Supreme Court's _Dobbs_ decision ripped the fundamental right to an abortion away from millions of Americans in the blink of an eye. Now, more than 20 states have abortion bans or severe restrictions with deadly repercussions. We've witnessed a horrifying surge in maternal mortality rates in states with abortion bans to the point that women are three times more likely to die during pregnancy while giving birth or soon after birth in states where abortion is banned. **Despite the overwhelming evidence that abortion saves lives, MAGA Republicans in Congress are relentlessly pushing to restrict reproductive healthcare access on a national scale**. **And my opponent has been complicit in these efforts.**[**We have to take this seat back for the people of Oregon. Will you chip in $3 today and send a champion of reproductive freedom to Congress?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77558541/450815110/974409837?refcode=2024-01-22-roe&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=6a91d03c-94b9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzU0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTkxZDAzYy05NGI5LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PqyZVzqUMRjzRh4ud6vPsQeTVKwTQOcvQItx8y1cov0=) [Donate Today](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77558542/450815111/974409837?refcode=2024-01-22-roe&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=6a91d03c-94b9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzU0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTkxZDAzYy05NGI5LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PqyZVzqUMRjzRh4ud6vPsQeTVKwTQOcvQItx8y1cov0=) Chevez-DeRemer said she would defend abortion rights for Oregonians. Then, **she quickly flip-flopped** and voted for a bill that would make it hard for our brave service members to seek abortion care. At the end of the day, representatives like her give Republicans a House majority and can block a vote on legislation that would restore the rights taken away by the _Dobbs_ decision. If we don't take back the House next year, Republicans will be further empowered to push national restrictions on reproductive rights — including access to birth control. **I will not stand by and watch extremist Republicans trample on our rights.**[**I'm running for Congress to fight for**** _everyone's_****right to make their own health care decisions – and I won't back down.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77558543/450815112/974409837?refcode=2024-01-22-roe&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=6a91d03c-94b9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzU0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTkxZDAzYy05NGI5LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PqyZVzqUMRjzRh4ud6vPsQeTVKwTQOcvQItx8y1cov0=) Donate Now If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:

clean_body: | | | | Peter, On today's anniversary of the landmark decision in Roe v. Wade , I want to make something unequivocally clear: Abortion is healthcare. Full stop. No one should be denied access to this essential care, regardless of where they live. In 2022, the Supreme Court's Dobbs decision ripped the fundamental right to an abortion away from millions of Americans in the blink of an eye. Now, more than 20 states have abortion bans or severe restrictions with deadly repercussions. We've witnessed a horrifying surge in maternal mortality rates in states with abortion bans to the point that women are three times more likely to die during pregnancy while giving birth or soon after birth in states where abortion is banned. Despite the overwhelming evidence that abortion saves lives, MAGA Republicans in Congress are relentlessly pushing to restrict reproductive healthcare access on a national scale. And my opponent has been complicit in these efforts.= = Chevez-DeRemer said she would defend abortion rights for Oregonians. Then, she quickly flip-flopped and voted for a bill that would make it hard for our brave service members to seek abortion care. At the end of the day, representatives like her give Republicans a House majority and can block a vote on legislation that would restore the rights taken away by the Dobbs decision. If we don't take back the House next year, Republicans will be further empowered to push national restrictions on reproductive rights — including access to birth control. I will not stand by and watch extremist Republicans trample on our rights.= Donate Now If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = ---|--- = | = = Bodily autonomy is not up for negotiation. Anyone who's willing to trade that belief away for political clout should not be in Congress. Together, we can create a future where reproductive rights are protected. Crime is increasing across the country, and states with governors who are tough on crime can greatly aid in the resolution of this issue. Each and every American deserves to feel safe in their home, their neighborhood, their school, and their place of work.

Our team is collecting answers to a simple question today.
**Would you be more likely to vote for a governor who is tough on crime, backs the blue, and keeps dangerous criminals in jail?**

_**"Let's put an end to Democrats representing conservative states in the U.S. Senate."** \- U.S. Senator Chuck Grassley_

Peter,

It’s Senator Chuck Grassley reaching out because I need a favor.

**Former Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy is running against one of Chuck Schumer’s foot soldiers in the Senate who votes to deliver the Biden-Harris agenda of open borders and big government spending that fuels the fires of inflation. And Tim needs OUR HELP to win.**

You see, Jon Tester has successfully tricked the people of Montana into sending him to Washington on their behalf since 2006. How, I don’t know. Because his views are not at all in line with the views of voters in Montana – heck, he’d have a real easy time being elected in Oregon, California, or Massachusetts.

**Let’s put an end to Democrats representing conservative states in the U.S. Senate.** If you cannot read to the end of this note, please click this link to donate to defeat Jon Tester before closing your browser.

[**JOIN ME
SUPPORT NAVY SEAL TIM SHEEHY FOR SENATE TODAY **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=fda7238196184abb8644980c1c215f14&_e=oldLcS9SknRgjrTuA0xE8p9zOeCAmTasJWQVbTBqRcV1WoUxNZwV262wytuDmnpr1sgaAPxLhjttMdnlHeFqP2USiA8z-SjxP2NrHSl6bpOGpBYTIngBvxrW6vsEFyiSiewBriXVWYn7LiaZzM8e_pPl5hp_2xJpeSm9AvEuGygUMfqSkgeK5hFstE-h_V1muBvrnSiXwMMHQ5fyR8MBCL5hAJDet_88vZKi87o-9-bT3heUqwMyM4fQlHv7RnYaixEx1kZGKmIdDsO6fIIJycI1BbnPfz8NItJ2za9wrtAIhjigxUNYZhi85fNTcYwZfbxCkVBFjo51KVj7QwdjQkq7vmygT4fL8xfUOozPYmxTbjFBhckelBGQ_A8QtMAHPLukzMY3CsmYWiGyn9RPdvkyadbP3GSDU8NqI2wR4gU%3D)
