name: Don Jr.
subject: The roadmap to victory
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
My father needs a solid Republican Senate Majority to pass his America First agenda. Please step up now to support Senate Republicans in critical races. | Peter -

The path to victory in the U.S. Senate leads through key races determining the U.S. Senate Majority. Ten seats are competitive and up for grabs this year. We have a HUGE opportunity to flip the Senate back into Republican control and build a robust Republican Majority.

**We could take all ten,**or we could take 0.**** It will all depend on our efforts leading up to the election and whether we step up for our candidates or watch them fall.

[**Step up with a $10 gift now**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=66770637835e4263975dcc8c5549edd1&_e=cUEEJz2Az8tEv4Q6fplM5Pp3ZIH_3LBd9FEdWf_j0mOb2t-yISftRWm3yLgj6A1Uf_-_bmM8lNqZKT4y4UCs6EvHmh0BcN5GUxHISGQk5VFbvNzTM4RwP22_KaV-6_uzYKGKxuYP2mKO0rFP-WwRlTeJxJtUUyY4vMYA0htr-XloV5sbqyHV9a5Y2nrGpaBNjwn8bAhnfEFl_twojvYSwjNzxmxHhy5ZZNB18RWV-TBKqkBrzXR21mIrxsVS78E90fS5shCX6dlvRkBwtLoeM1hEYHxUfJS_BOqa_yCZns2Zn53RcclbIfGuDNjZv-lwpivYPz1m2zL9mLW3a9R9yF7XOuZUVLJc_khQhZC52kngVaE3aaBSlYud6pLG21CEdCiIVFx7-5gPoO_AIFRWsS8d4hi5hPwM5l2BSsQzaAU%3D)
Because Democrats will be running smear campaigns in all these competitive races, they will go to their year-in, year-out playbook and attack our candidates personally, trying to drag them and their families through the mud.

But we know it is coming, so we must be prepared. How we best fight back is with our own media campaign to spread the truth to voters about Democrats' dangerous agenda and our incredible conservative candidates for the U.S. Senate.

**And that campaign will be costly, but it is an expense we cannot avoid.** We must punch back when the media starts spreading lies for the Democrat Party and tearing our candidates down to sway elections.

**_You and I both know the media has not been fair or objective to Republican candidates in a long time, if ever._** We know that media bias only gets worse every year. And we know the best way to fight back against it.

Can I count on your generous support for our campaign to elect conservatives to the U.S. Senate who will fight for our values and stand up to the liberal agenda?

[**Please pitch in your most generous gift to support Senate Republicans and Republican candidates running in competitive races that will decide the majority.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=66770637835e4263975dcc8c5549edd1&_e=cUEEJz2Az8tEv4Q6fplM5Pp3ZIH_3LBd9FEdWf_j0mOb2t-yISftRWm3yLgj6A1Uf_-_bmM8lNqZKT4y4UCs6EvHmh0BcN5GUxHISGQk5VFbvNzTM4RwP22_KaV-6_uzYKGKxuYP2mKO0rFP-WwRlTeJxJtUUyY4vMYA0htr-XloV5sbqyHV9a5Y2nrGpaBNjwn8bAhnfEFl_twojvYSwjNzxmxHhy5ZZNB18RWV-TBKqkBrzXR21mIrxsVS78E90fS5shCX6dlvRkBwtLoeMzDBjz3G6W5FWoGL5M1avZMFp11Y24QHuKW24JmHqzP5gMixseKJKlaDyT1fNZJH683iZVxm9RHux_QOIJRbaZsKrHJw4Apga0N1CfW9WHcTTuRN_BAHhzqpzJSTlzuIP4al46qGsXIfs-qwSqpaEWE%3D)

Thank you,

We could take all ten,or we could take 0.** It will all depend on our efforts leading up to the election and whether we step up for our candidates or watch them fall. Because Democrats will be running smear campaigns in all these competitive races, they will go to their year-in, year-out playbook and attack our candidates personally, trying to drag them and their families through the mud. But we know it is coming, so we must be prepared. How we best fight back is with our own media campaign to spread the truth to voters about Democrats' dangerous agenda and our incredible conservative candidates for the U.S. Senate. And that campaign will be costly, but it is an expense we cannot avoid. We must punch back when the media starts spreading lies for the Democrat Party and tearing our candidates down to sway elections. You and I both know the media has not been fair or objective to Republican candidates in a long time, if ever.** We know that media bias only gets worse every year. And we know the best way to fight back against it. Can I count on your generous support for our campaign to elect conservatives to the U.S. Senate who will fight for our values and stand up to the liberal agenda? Thank you, Donald Trump Jr. If you want to help Republicans TAKE BACK THE SENATE, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! Message and data rates may apply. Text "STOP" to opt-out. | | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Fellow Conservative,

Republicans are the only thing stopping President Biden and Chuck Schumer from bankrupting our country.

This isn’t just political hyperbole. It’s as real as it gets!

It’s our Republican majority that allows us to hold them accountable. Without it, we would effectively be relegated to “sitting on the sidelines” and watching as:
* The Biden Administration does nothing to address the growing border crisis,

* **Crime continues to rise, and dangerous drugs pour into our country,**

* The Washington swamp holds critical funds hostage in order to send more untracked American tax dollars to Ukraine, and

* Liberals try to protect their political power by brazenly opposing election integrity measures ... _**even going as far as trying to keep President Trump off the ballot!**_****

But thankfully, our majority acts as a backstop against Democrats running roughshod over our values, our wallets, our country, and our constitution.
**_
But Fellow Conservative,...all that goes away if we lose our majority in November’s election...and I would be lying to you if I told you that wasn’t a real possibility._**

As we head into the most important election in recent memory, our majority has recently shrunk from four to TWO.

**How did this happen?** Over the past couple of months there have been several Republican members of Congress who resigned or retired. Having such a slim majority puts us in a very precarious position going into an election year –and to be honest, we’re in real trouble right now, which is why I’m reaching out today.

It’s anyone’s guess right now as to how things will play out, but if I can tell you one thing it’s this: **if we lose control of the House and fail to retake the Senate, Republicans won’t be able to block Democrats from crushing our economy, diverting taxpayer money to their pet projects or stop them from prosecuting political opponents who dare to speak the truth!**

I’m certain Democrats will have all the money they’ll need in the fight to flip the House. But will Republicans? Democrats will turn in big numbers. That’s why we’re beginning the long, arduous process of identifying conservatives to help us hold onto our slim majority now.

Time is of the essence, and **[we need to know whether you’re on our team.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=7be62f492c9e4e848fe035bfbb72b80b&_e=_VWksbYWq-foblsFM1GP_vfHwVxB5GOOeww72pKIcb8hf-0HwS3JtGCSH6N7tghfDBZw1-N5_14hVUMun5DhSv0Zo-PuRiSXB3QB-a0WW3-A6Dw5zBaNy_J5lANu4CciT1WOqllXg-uM0zWbxD0KC4HhaRGIe1j3pbmfWgaOB3NbWGzZdaBKhm6CI0BZ3LL94Tah_cfWAN-XGxsgn08vu1sb0On2yCtEQXJsqA9EKk-ptwXDD_wPG4AiouG-RZGsA6C-XuupP1E0DctPdYRUQWDzhLat1_PcDY85D36j0GG0UuWtTkTHo-ygpJnrqLVEUrsxJRmvm7ocwj58TalDZeYpCYe9KB4C8Y27gkoFyKRJgcLR-B_6ytW71NKH3On9N9a3WimyAJp1_F12MxNfBp0zIphQavUho6P-ZCvMI70VN6BtlI367py_Vc_kw1vIYVcpH_5KjwyL0VwnHvT_27x-MATdSdLq_fE6xgPXQ1g6eqncbMnDjUtm0HXjkMKwmllZf1lrll13v5wiNaV3HUCzlLCfwU4b2Wxuvkhx4Fg%3D)**

For Liberty,

name: Josh Kaul
subject: 51st Anniversary of Roe
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaul for Attorney General
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77558913/450816364/-1558759641?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mjk3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MWQ5YzM3ZC1hMWI5LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pbbbmyuQVa5MrmfPCUTSA2halNJxpKi7kitUiKBxDk4=&emci=063aaa17-a0b9-ee11-bea1-002248223794&emdi=91d9c37d-a1b9-ee11-bea1-002248223794&ceid=349307)

| | Peter,

Fifty-one years ago today, the U.S. Supreme Court issued its decision in _Roe v. Wade_. For nearly five decades, that precedent protected access to safe and legal abortion.

But on June 24, 2022, the Supreme Court issued its decision in Dobbs overruling _Roe_. On _Roe's_ 50th anniversary, abortion was largely unavailable in Wisconsin.

**A year later—on the 51st anniversary of Roe—the situation for reproductive freedom in Wisconsin has improved.** In a decision on a motion to dismiss issued in July 2023, a Dane County Circuit Court judge determined that “there is no such thing as an ‘1849 Abortion Ban’ in Wisconsin.” In September 2023, Planned Parenthood of Wisconsin resumed providing abortion services. And in December 2023, the Dane County Circuit Court judge mentioned above issued a decision declaring that abortion is not prohibited by a Wisconsin law dating back to the mid-1800s.

I’m proud of the progress that’s been made since the 50th anniversary of _Roe_. And I’m going to keep standing up for reproductive freedom in Wisconsin.

Josh | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77558914/450816365/658397360?refcode=240122embttn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mjk3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MWQ5YzM3ZC1hMWI5LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pbbbmyuQVa5MrmfPCUTSA2halNJxpKi7kitUiKBxDk4=)

name: 1600 Daily
subject: An Education in Character
body:
This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College
While in exile, Dante wrote one of the greatest epic poems

| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z44mvdf7e1smr6rvi9hpn0jklklavdai0ilompi8_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c1g6eor1cdh2bs)
---
| | Dear fellow citizen,
Over 700 years ago, Dante Alighieri was exiled from his beloved Florence. Stripped of his property, he spent the rest of his life as a guest in foreign places.
While in exile, Dante wrote one of the greatest epic poems, _The Divine Comedy_. Taking an imaginary journey through the three realms of the afterlife—Inferno, Purgatory, and Paradise—he encounters old enemies and cherished friends, crooked politicians and great statesmen, infamous sinners, and holy saints.
The result is a profound education in character, as the poet learns how to order his soul to lead a free and happy life. And _The Divine Comedy_ is a delight to read.
**This is why Hillsdale College has produced an online course, “Dante’s _Divine Comedy,_ ” about this monumental work of literature. **
---
| | And now, the course about this timeless masterpiece is available on DVD for your home library, Bible study, or book club.
You can receive the DVD of **“Dante’s _Divine Comedy_ ” **in a handsome box set for a gift of $100 or more in support of Hillsdale and its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty, like free online courses.
We**** produce our free online courses, as we do all of our work, without accepting ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
Our work is entirely dependent on the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z53jvcf3topb87v3bfvvsug0r941dld6a935tosg_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c1g6eor1cdh2bs)
---
| | With your tax-deductible gift today, we can enroll tens of thousands of Americans in online courses, as well as reach and teach increasing millions for liberty. Please support Hillsdale’s educational outreach on behalf of liberty and receive your DVD of **“Dante’s _Divine Comedy_ ” **by giving your best tax-deductible gift of $100 or more today using this secure link:
**_[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-dante-divine-comedy-course](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zjgj2i15somrs6ce15op61j51t6rpks3laikq47g_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c1g6eor1cdh2bs)_**
We are deeply grateful for your friendship and support.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

1600 Daily
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Hillsdale College via Pro Life Update
subject: I hope you’ll join us
body:
I'd like to invite you to join me in Hillsdale College's newest free course studying the greatest Christian apologist of the 20th century, C.S. Lewis.

| | |
---
| | | | This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z3rcb9vb6e0o6h0i02dqpei22tp72p3voqabr5r8_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c1g6eor2c9h2bs) [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zvf6vi93ijkp02nfr12990p7muggsgg96ej5ntro_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c1g6eor2c9h2bs) | Hello Friend,

Thomas G. West, professor of politics at Hillsdale College, is one of the great scholars and teachers of the American Founding.

That's why we're so excited to offer a course that explains his core teachings about the American Founding, **which is now available on DVD.**

In this course, Dr. West sits down with David Azerrad, his former student and current professor at Hillsdale's Graduate School of Government, to reveal the truth about the American Founding. | **
### What students are saying
** “I appreciate the brevity of explanation and new information in a way I hadn't known or realized myself. The quizzes are helpful. Having two teachers converse brings an interesting perspective.” **- Darlena** “It helps put into context the thinking of our founders at that time. That’s very important and misunderstood by so many people today!” **- Robert**
---|---

As Dr. West explains, the Founders' political theory is so foreign to Americans today--even to scholars and teachers of American history and politics--that the task of uncovering the truth about the Founding is like unearthing something from a "deep and long-forgotten pit."

This course goes about this task by examining the actual words and actions of the Founders, and it brings their theory to life by comparing it to the dominant views of contemporary America.

The result is an exciting and often surprising account of how the Founders established a free government in America and what they thought was necessary to sustain it.

As you know, our online courses are free. That's why we depend on the generosity of people like you to help us share the course with as many people as possible.

Would you consider making a tax-deductible donation to help promote this course?

And now, for any donation of $100 or more, you will receive this beautiful DVD box set for **" The Real American Founding: A Conversation,"** by clicking the link below.

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/real-american-founding-dvd](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2za3qkaa3av986v3dkb2qnb2b4l34h8d326prepd0_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c1g6eor2c9h2bs)

I hope you'll join us in this fun and important work of sharing the truth about the American Founding with your fellow Americans.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

name: American Action News
subject: The Divine Comedy
body:
This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
While in exile, Dante wrote one of the greatest epic poems

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zk2ove8ign488auc9mikpb8phgb6u0hsb7o64ls8_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c1g6eo70cph2bs)
---
| | Dear fellow citizen,
Over 700 years ago, Dante Alighieri was exiled from his beloved Florence. Stripped of his property, he spent the rest of his life as a guest in foreign places.
While in exile, Dante wrote one of the greatest epic poems, _The Divine Comedy_. Taking an imaginary journey through the three realms of the afterlife—Inferno, Purgatory, and Paradise—he encounters old enemies and cherished friends, crooked politicians and great statesmen, infamous sinners, and holy saints.
The result is a profound education in character, as the poet learns how to order his soul to lead a free and happy life. And _The Divine Comedy_ is a delight to read.
**This is why Hillsdale College has produced an online course, “Dante’s _Divine Comedy,_ ” about this monumental work of literature. **
---
| | And now, the course about this timeless masterpiece is available on DVD for your home library, Bible study, or book club.
You can receive the DVD of **“Dante’s _Divine Comedy_ ” **in a handsome box set for a gift of $100 or more in support of Hillsdale and its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty, like free online courses.
We**** produce our free online courses, as we do all of our work, without accepting ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
Our work is entirely dependent on the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8l9bn6n3kt5njnstdk18p8588sotcdilt61e0a0_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c1g6eo70cph2bs)
---
| | With your tax-deductible gift today, we can enroll tens of thousands of Americans in online courses, as well as reach and teach increasing millions for liberty. Please support Hillsdale’s educational outreach on behalf of liberty and receive your DVD of **“Dante’s _Divine Comedy_ ” **by giving your best tax-deductible gift of $100 or more today using this secure link:
**_[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-dante-divine-comedy-course](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5sc4u3sc2m59b858iome4qj6b53dmflu2gss5ug_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c1g6eo70cph2bs)_**
We are deeply grateful for your friendship and support.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

American Action News
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5rchei8h9q1pbi9o6ej56t2ct74s3vmlqb8o5h8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb4d9nkvijbo9getqb3cdkmppmeo0n6mq39cdjkorrbcp4mni64pj4cpjm9oh1k8gn48n24hjm0or0c1jm1o36c8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6albqcf9havahcok1vt9khegsqk2anle4k2kca0_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c1g6eo70cph2bs)_

name: Kristan Hawkins, Students for Life Action
subject: today is the day. . .
body:
Dear Pro-Life Friend,

On this day in 1973, the deadliest decision in American history was issued by the Supreme Court in a 7-2 decision.

That decision, of course, was _Roe v. Wade._

And since that horrific day, the Pro-Life Movement has fought for decades to undo this grave injustice that ended up costing the lives of over 64 _**MILLION_** babies.

As you know, despite the naysayers, on June 24, 2022, the Supreme Court finally did the right thing and reversed _Roe._

Today, as we celebrate the fact that the Abortion Lobby isn’t celebrating _Roe’s_ 51st anniversary today, let’s not forget all those who told you and me we couldn’t win – _and that reversing Roe would never happen._

Because those same people are now telling us now that we’ll never succeed in abolishing abortion in America.

It’s up to you and me to keep fighting – _or else nothing we’ve achieved so far will matter._

You’ll see what I mean when I tell you what President Joe Biden and Vice President Kamala Harris are up to now in just a minute. . .

**[But before I explain, can I count on you to make a special contribution to celebrate that _Roe v. Wade_ is no more](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sdjkyid-duchtdja-y/)?**

**[Perhaps you could give $500, $250, $100, $50, or $25 as a “non-anniversary gift” and join me in dancing on _Roe’s_ grave](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sdjkyid-duchtdja-j/)?**

With everything on the line in 2024, your support would make a tremendous difference.

You see, according to Breitbart, President Joe Biden’s top priority if he’s reelected this November is reimposing something far worse than _Roe v. Wade._

President Biden’s pro-abortion backers want to force every state in the country to allow abortion up until the moment of birth.

Meanwhile, Vice President Harris, is launching a cross-country pro-abortion tour which is kicking off in Wisconsin TODAY to try and incite radical support for her and President Biden’s extreme abortion position.

Let me make something very clear: We **_CANNOT**_ allow those two puppets to undo everything the Pro-Life Movement has accomplished over the past 51 years!

We owe it to the generations of pro-life women and men who fought for Life throughout _Roe v. Wade’s_ bloody history, and who got this movement to where it’s at now.

We owe it to them to finish what they started and abolish abortion for good!

But I can’t do it alone. . . I need you to be with me now more than ever before.

That’s how we’re going to defeat the Abortion Lobby just like we defeated _Roe_ – _with grassroots pro-life support from good folks like you._

**[So, would you please consider making your most generous “non-anniversary” contribution of $250, $100, $50, or even $25 to celebrate the fact that _Roe_ is no more](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sdjkyid-duchtdja-i/)?**

Pro-Life Friend, my biggest fear isn’t that we can’t win – _reversing Roe was proof that we absolutely can._

My biggest fear is that I won’t be able to reach all the young people we need to defeat the Abortion Lobby.

The Abortion Lobby has mastered roping in young voters with lies about “personal choice” and “bodily autonomy” or even calling babies “clumps of cells” and calling abortion “healthcare.”

This has historically skewed young people toward their agenda. . .

**That is, until now.**

Recently we’ve been seeing the tables turn on the Abortion Lobby with young people souring on their increasingly radical position and leaving the pro-abortion camp in droves!

Many of them have already flooded into the pro-life movement, but there are more pro-abortion/on-the-fence young people who we need to reach if we’re going to beat the Abortion Lobby on election day!

Pro-Life Friend, that’s why our ability to convert 19% of these same young people to the Pro-Life Movement is so crucial!

In fact, _Students for Life Action_ is the _**ONLY**_ national pro-life organization turning young people against abortion right where the Abortion Lobby is targeting them – _on college campuses!_

And with over 1,446 student chapters and counting, _Students for Life Action_ is also the largest and most active pro-life student organization in America.

But this is where my fear I shared with you comes in. . .

I can only do so much with the funds I have – _and to help build up the next generation of pro-lifers, every bit counts!_

If I head into late 2024 without the resources I need to fight and gain the support of more young voters, then I don’t want to think about what would happen on Election Day.

I’ll just say, it wouldn’t be pretty. . .

**[So, will you please consider making your most generous contribution to _Students for Life Action_ so I can stick it to President Joe Biden and Vice President Kamala Harris as they try to stir-up the pro-abortion mob before the November elections](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sdjkyid-duchtdja-d/)?**

Your support is crucial in the coming months, so please be as generous as you can.

Thank you for everything you did to help us overturn _Roe v. Wade._

And thank you for everything you continue to do for Life!

For Life,

Kristan Hawkins
President, _Students for Life Action_

**[Donate to _Students for Life Action_ ](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sdjkyid-duchtdja-h/)**

Students for Life Action is a non-profit, tax-exempt advocacy organization under section 501(c)(4) of the IRC. Contributions or gifts to Students for Life Action are not tax deductible for IRS purposes; they do, however, avoid recognition of gain on appreciated assets. Students for Life Action's mailing address is 600 Princess Anne St #7667, Fredericksburg, VA 22401. Any donations raised above or short of the goal will be used in the next area of greatest need towards our mission, as determined by the organization.

# **[It's not a lie if you believe it](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9MTE0NDUwIn0/zFMuHTNO-FzUJuEp5flLnA)**
---
In an episode of Seinfeld, Jerry has lied to one of his girlfriends who is about to put him through a lie detector test. As he apprehensively leaves to take the test, George offers the following advice: “Jerry, just remember: it’s not a lie if you believe it.”

subject: Clarence Thomas falls on the sword?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Service and Honor
body:
We’re organizing a major response to these disgusting attacks

| |
---
| | | | | | | | **NEW SCOTUS UPDATE**

---
As you read this, the Radical Left have organized a stunning movement to **PACK & DESTROY the U.S. Supreme Court **and end the careers of our brave conservative judges like Clarence Thomas.

This is NOT what we wanted to be telling you today - **but you 're an adult & we're not going to sugar coat it. **

These are all the _left-wing radical groups that are currently mobilizing to pack and destroy the conservative court._ Together, they account for millions of radical left activists & even more financial support to the socialist movement.

## Will you stand with us against the disgusting attacks on SCOTUS JUSTICE CLARENCE THOMAS?
| [YES](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zheoirl4kjbsipfio2pii7il2m622st5bmuhta6g_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c1i68oj4c1h2bs)| [NO](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z425if7s0jnvrbnikll0jajvho5j1jo69jajbjlo_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c1i68oj4c1h2bs)
---|---
##

Every single one of these Democrat organizations is bankrolled by deep-pocketed liberals and have been mobilizing non-stop to remove SCOTUS Justices Thomas, Kavanaugh, and Barret.

_**We 're outraised & we're out organized. So here it is: if we don't see historic turnaround at the local grassroots level, it's all over with.

Biden will pack the court with his handpicked liberal activists & academics. He'll have complete & total control to do whatever he wants and that is nothing short of horrifying. **_

name: Your America
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38467%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hN8MCCnc6ERomFAtR5khwQ&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear Friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That’s why we produced “[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38468%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Oe%2ba1EjLvrSkaPME6%2fLI%2bQ&sysid=1)” which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38469%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tXWFRUOWV8YsGhBhWfAXAg&sysid=1)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis’s profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful DVD box set](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38460%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9Ayy7DQIS46dUvdqrECQ9w&sysid=1).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Your America News
---
_Your America News • PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: The David Horowitz Freedom Center
subject: We live in Barack Obama’s America now
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWAhq1wiNx

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWAhq1wiNx

"Trump
Prosecutor: They're Attacking me Because I'm Black"

Friend,
Fulton County District Attorney Fani Willis should clearly be
fired and her cynical and politically motivated case against
Trump dropped.

Unfortunately, neither of these things are likely to happen
because we no longer follow the rule of law in America.

We live
in Barack Obama's America now.

The only
thing that matters is "the fundamental transformation."

Fani
Willis paid her secret lover, Nathan Wade, $650,000+ to help
prosecute Trump.

Much of
the money spent was provided in grants from the Biden Justice
Department.

This
special prosecutor attended multiple meetings with the Biden
White House and also met with the hyper-partisan "January 6th
Committee."

The
corruption, collusion and cynical political motivations are
clear.

But in
Obama's America, the facts don't matter.

It only
matters that Trump is threat to his great project of transforming
America into a Marxist utopia.

And we
all know that the Biden administration is just a shadow third
term for Barack Obama.

In my
opinion, he's the worst thing that happened to our republic.

Look at
the unprecedented attacks against Trump that continue to this
day.

Obama was
the original mastermind behind the weaponization of government
against Donald Trump when he allowed illegal FISA warrants to be
used to spy on Trump's 2016 campaign.

The
unraveling of law and order that we're seeing today has been over
a decade in the making - and most of the American people have no
clue what we're up against.

But all
roads lead back to one source: Barack Obama.

That's
why Freedom Center colleagues Robert Spencer, Daniel Greenfield
and Jamie Glazov have created a blockbuster expose called Barack
Obama's True Legacy - and why I want you to receive a copy this
important book.

So many
of our fellow citizens think the crippling societal issues we're
facing in America are unrelated to each other.

I'm here
to tell you that they are all connected by one common source:
Obama.

The
leftist takeover of our schools, the weaponization of government,
the erasure of our history and the support for the
Islamo-fascists in Iran and hatred of Israel all spring from the
same Marxist ideology.

Nothing
that the American Left does today happens without the blessing of
Barack Obama.

If you
turn on the TV today and see pro-Hamas protesters blocking
highways and terrorizing synagogues…

…
you can be sure that Barack Obama is sitting in one of his many
mansions cheering them on.

Many
people think the Biden "administration" is made up of fools and
that our drastically declining standard of living is the result
of Joe Biden's incompetence.

But the
truth is much darker, friend.

This
decline was by design - and in many ways, Barack Obama was its
chief architect.

That's
why I believe Barack Obama's True Legacy is one of the most
important books of the year, and why if you give a generous gift
of $35 or more to the Freedom Center today, I'll send you a
complimentary copy.

Unlike
Fani Willis, we don't have millions of your tax dollars to spend.

We rely
on generous like-minded individuals like you to voluntarily
provide for 100% of our funding.

Please
pitch in what you can -- $50 or more today would be great -- but
just $5 or $10 a month would help us make sure we can sustain our
crucial mission.

Sincerely,
Michael
Finch

President, The David Horowitz Freedom Center

PS: If
you haven't recently, please check out our news and opinion web
site www.frontpagemag.com.

You can
also join us in keeping tabs on the left by visiting another one
of the important sites we produce at www.discoverthenetworks.org.

donations are tax-deductible to the extent allowed by law.

clean_body: "Trump Prosecutor: They're Attacking me Because I'm Black" Friend, Fulton County District Attorney Fani Willis should clearly be fired and her cynical and politically motivated case against Trump dropped. Unfortunately, neither of these things are likely to happen because we no longer follow the rule of law in America. We live in Barack Obama's America now. The only thing that matters is "the fundamental transformation." Fani Willis paid her secret lover, Nathan Wade, $650,000+ to help prosecute Trump. Much of the money spent was provided in grants from the Biden Justice Department. This special prosecutor attended multiple meetings with the Biden White House and also met with the hyper-partisan "January 6th Committee." The corruption, collusion and cynical political motivations are clear. But in Obama's America, the facts don't matter. It only matters that Trump is threat to his great project of transforming America into a Marxist utopia. And we all know that the Biden administration is just a shadow third term for Barack Obama. In my opinion, he's the worst thing that happened to our republic. Look at the unprecedented attacks against Trump that continue to this day. Obama was the original mastermind behind the weaponization of government against Donald Trump when he allowed illegal FISA warrants to be used to spy on Trump's 2016 campaign. The unraveling of law and order that we're seeing today has been over a decade in the making - and most of the American people have no clue what we're up against. But all roads lead back to one source: Barack Obama. That's why Freedom Center colleagues Robert Spencer, Daniel Greenfield and Jamie Glazov have created a blockbuster expose called Barack Obama's True Legacy - and why I want you to receive a copy this important book. So many of our fellow citizens think the crippling societal issues we're facing in America are unrelated to each other. I'm here to tell you that they are all connected by one common source: Obama. The leftist takeover of our schools, the weaponization of government, the erasure of our history and the support for the Islamo-fascists in Iran and hatred of Israel all spring from the same Marxist ideology. Nothing that the American Left does today happens without the blessing of Barack Obama. If you turn on the TV today and see pro-Hamas protesters blocking highways and terrorizing synagogues… … you can be sure that Barack Obama is sitting in one of his many mansions cheering them on. Many people think the Biden "administration" is made up of fools and that our drastically declining standard of living is the result of Joe Biden's incompetence. But the truth is much darker, friend. This decline was by design - and in many ways, Barack Obama was its chief architect. That's why I believe Barack Obama's True Legacy is one of the most important books of the year, and why if you give a generous gift of $35 or more to the Freedom Center today, I'll send you a complimentary copy. Unlike Fani Willis, we don't have millions of your tax dollars to spend. We rely on generous like-minded individuals like you to voluntarily provide for 100% of our funding. Please pitch in what you can -- $50 or more today would be great -- but just $5 or $10 a month would help us make sure we can sustain our crucial mission. Sincerely, Michael Finch President, The David Horowitz Freedom Center PS: If you haven't recently, please check out our news and opinion web site www.frontpagemag.com. You can also join us in keeping tabs on the left by visiting another one of the important sites we produce at www.discoverthenetworks.org. DONATE The David Horowitz Freedom Center is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization. All donations are tax-deductible to the extent allowed by law. Support the Freedom Center through a contribution today. © David Horowitz Freedom Center | www.HorowitzFreedomCenter.org P.O. Box 55089 Sherman Oaks, CA 91499

**HOLD THE HOUSE PETITION:** With recent retirements and resignations, _**our Republican House majority has shrunk from four to two**_.

The only way that we're going to defy expectations and defend our House majority is if we have the right people in place leading up to November. _**[For us to be successful, that means we need conservatives like YOU on our team.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62720425:WQF4Cwi2N:m:1:2680754589:FF4010DB91F919C26BE6D92172E3085C:r)**_

**Support from people you know counts for something,********, and I’m proud to share with you that 21 GEORGIA SENATORS have endorsed my campaign for Congress.** These are conservatives who know me, know my record, and know that I’m a man of action. During my ten years in the Georgia Senate, I worked with these Republicans to pass the largest income tax cut in state history, hold the line against Biden-era inflation, pass Constitutional carry, support law enforcement, put parents and kids first, and more. **[I’m proud to have their support, and I’m asking you to join them. name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: This is the most tragic lie in America today
body:
Planned Parenthood is lying to itself, to vulnerable women and young girls

| [ ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c681273%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7A8Gf0z7q73RfDtyC0B9kw&sysid=1)
---
Fellow American,

Care, no matter what.

This is the motto of Planned Parenthood. While it sounds great on the surface, Planned Parenthood is lying to itself, to vulnerable women and young girls, and to the American people through manipulative and dangerously subtle language.

While they claim to provide healthcare services to women no matter who they are or where they live, abortion can never be healthcare. Further, while they claim to provide numerous services to women, 97.2% of Planned Parenthood’s pregnancy resolution services are devoted to abortions, the purposeful ending of an unborn baby’s life.

**[Does 97.2% of cases brought to Planned Parenthood that end in the death of an innocent child sound like “care” to you?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c681274%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=P30s1avLgzSxW06NGY0UYg&sysid=1)**

Planned Parenthood cares only about the business. It preys on the vulnerable, thrives on women’s fear, and fuels itself on greed. When a woman arrives seeking answers to an unexpected pregnancy, the clock to gain a profit starts ticking. They will do whatever they can to make a woman agree to an abortion because each abortion completed is more profit in their pockets.

At SBA Pro-Life America, we are committed to stopping the manipulation and the gruesome deaths of innocent babies. In the last 10 years, Planned Parenthood has the lifeblood of 3.4 million babies on their hands.

[We cannot be the only voice fighting for these precious children and exposing the lies of Planned Parenthood.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c681285%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=AeK6aLCkyXCkuiDj7E0dWw&sysid=1) Would you stand with us and commit to protecting women and unborn babies from the dangers of Planned Parenthood? By signing our pledge to stop Planned Parenthood, you are helping SBA Pro-Life America fight this “ _David vs Goliath_ ” battle.

Whether you know it or not, Planned Parenthood is impacting YOUR community and YOUR family by taking your hard-earned tax dollars to fund abortions and devaluing the unborn in our country.

**The lies, manipulation, and millions of deaths must come to an end now.**

Help us fight for the vulnerable by standing up against Planned Parenthood by signing our pledge at the link below:
[SIGN YOUR NAME](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c681286%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IzaVxvNPx%2bhmOnrvAUuG%2bg&sysid=1)
| I can’t tell you how important your commitment is today to the pro-life movement and the generations to come tomorrow.
---
For LIFE,

Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, SBA Pro-Life America

Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America
2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr.
PO Box 803
Arlington, VA, 22206

American Update
---
_PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c2283%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=ft8x2F6OpGm7Aol4s%2bH3ZA&sysid=1)

name: Restore Our Nation
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/n5stnFexRkLk_4ALnI4Ckw~~/AARclAA~~)
---
| | Dear Friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/n5stnFexRkLk_4ALnI4Ckw~~/AARclAA~~)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/n5stnFexRkLk_4ALnI4Ckw~~/AARclAA~~)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful DVD box set](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/n5stnFexRkLk_4ALnI4Ckw~~/AARclAA~~).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Restore Our Nation
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

# TUESDAY, JANUARY 23, 2024
---|---
**Good Morning**! On this day in 1957, the first Frisbees came off the machine presses at the Wham-O toy company, setting off a flying-disc craze that has never waned, as any Frisbee golfer can attest. ([See How Frisbees Are Made](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7FugzAURb_G3oKenw2GwUOlBqlDukRqR2TsZ3Bl4og4oPx9Reeu90rn6HxfhouNKd6mT7uQKSEP1pW40SBOKE-oBsW9CURIkpMRGhoQbaeRzwbbRnintW10LUi3oQt2BNSKagECHY8GARUIlALqGqCqZeuwBa9GtCNIzRSQjyWv1U-OtzJTSK-80Vq5vPBk5lLuDybfGPYM-33fq1d-ludIx38striZyX5j8n3SeL12569z_uCr8fc9phQfzaGYFhvTH7L8G_gbAAD__5fdT6Y)) For more than 100 years, New Hampshire has been the home of the nation's first primary, and we wish our Granite State readers a happy election day today! Have you signed up for _The Flyover_ yet? If not, you can fix that [with one click](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFurDAQheGnsbtF4xmDuYWLK62oQtqUyOABJjF4xTob5e0jlDLbHn06xf_WD32QJPvyGjb2Zc5DmIo8eDAXpAvaweroZ2Zk0uyNgwZM-8-hXn3jLLdhHuPcWOd45DoAUhzpnAMaLR4BLRgkA3UNUNXUTthCtCOGEcgpCxyl5KN6z7KXlef0nR98VFPedPJrKbe7ov8KO4XdX6Kw68Mi04vsH6ehjhVd4-1LUpJ7c94vW5D0a5vPsim6WtCHf250eRrgJwAA__8n11s-). ## New Hampshire Heads to the Polls
New Hampshire voters [go to the polls today](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0D1vwyAQxvFPY29EcIAhA0OXbOna0QLuHF-FX4RR3Hz7Kp07PnqWn_5f9_EeufD6-IwLhTZtY8yNnzQqAVqAGU2PYSIC0j0F5eQglb866OcwGY_JZWsNWkI_TOBykhqSQpWQcs8BJBipQCtprZQXq30GL9EkiElq1xlJyG2rl--N1zbTVF7bk-olb0tfwtzafnT6o4NbB7e4r3Qe7-s9auNcqIPbSqeY47IfM1cSe-Ul1pc459hE2wT97JSbmNzgruCcN9EDWqPBIxkEBZSUzbmvAfeTS-FjeKseS-Typ2j_NvkNAAD__3_SYcw) in what has suddenly become a two-person election in the Republican primary between Donald Trump and Nikki Haley, now that Gov. Ron DeSantis has dropped out. Trump leads in the latest polls by 19 points, and [Haley's main hope](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L1urDAQxfGngW7QeGw-tnBxG7q9bUo04GFxZDAyXtC-fUTqtOc0P_2_nsOTffDb6z-vYvMcB56yP2VQQBrIDKZ0dhYh0aVY1WKDqnu0VC62RjOzzG3t2BE7aRgf3GrVTCN2tdGlt4RkUJFWWNeIVa27iTp0ZiQeUbeFQXE-x1R9R7_lRebwiaekaoprGeyS834U-l9BfUH9dV1VkneWdNz_vcQUXEH9-yioXzjIB3J6rztMvO7sXxtscsHC634sPgk4_sAoc0wCuz9j5gBnzAK3ElABUUF9mazbLx-CP5ob-FrZh19Q_jPPTwAAAP__FJdmrw) is for a large turnout of independents and a small one for Republicans. The state election office is projecting a record-setting 322,000 voters will show up. On the Democratic side, President Biden isn't on the ballot, but analysts will be watching closely to see if he gets a strong write-in vote against challenger Rep. Dean Phillips. Last night, Nikki Haley [swept the traditional voting](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFyhCAQgOGnwQ5nXRCloEhjd2lTOhyu52ZQHOQ09_aZXJ36b775v27jzXPk7fHpV3JlTqMPhU8aG4lKoh51NbmZCElV5JoODDS97bBanDKmRdJz2xkz3zsLs7ZGg21UsMb2fcUOATU0qBpoW4C6VX3AHiZ9R38H1QkNNHFJuf5OvJWF5vhKJ-U6pLWKbillP4T6EDgIHK7rqq_1-Y4CB58Lh0gCh40uufh1PxbOJPfMq88vOfHPyTGS3FIJi6RIoXDaZKbjGcshcNBG29b2WGU37RfHyIf5Iz1Wz_FNKP8O-Q0AAP__jDhhiA) at Dixville Notch, a tiny resort town that's been recording its results at midnight for 64 years. Haley grabbed all six votes.
## FDA Approves New Therapy for Cancer
Strand Therapeutics, a biotech firm specializing in mRNA technology, [won approval](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1uwzAMhJ_G3mRQFP2TQUMXb-na0VAkOmYhS4GsJsjbF-7cm-9wH76v63J1EiXdP93Otq55cb7Kkxet0CikhdpgV2Zk07LVIwygp8uI7WZ7GMiNAYlgGmDSA-JEfgyke2AK1IpFQAKNRkPfA3S9mTxOEOiG7gZmbAg4SM2l-86S6sZrfOcnl87nvY12q_VxNOajwbnBeZXkkufu7bacz0aDc-LX0eB81OJSUHXj4h78U8UfqrBnefKhJAXlI7tyrpU2cOZC3Vb32BYbHi-JUY7hpLnvTuLfe_3XxW8AAAD__zvbXvw) from the Food and Drug Administration Monday to begin human testing on a new cancer-fighting therapy. The new treatment could represent a breakthrough immunotherapy for treating solid tumors. The therapy uses [self-replicating, programmable RNA](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD3TmzAQhH8NdGKkEx9-C4o0dE6bkjmkw1xGIOZ0NvG_zziT8u13Z_d5ft3nO3Li4_ETdxp1zTMG5RfNzoA30M5tHceVCMjXNLrB9tbdvgaot3Gw9qsPFMPg4jK0LrZ-7R100HV-QPQ1j2ChtQ68s11nbdP5W4Cbje0CuFg_VK2lyJql-Z350I3W9M4vkibkvU7jpnqWyv-oYKpguq6rWTiXEwN9AhVMKMohUQWTUCIsVCqYigoe0ehGgic9lUMxQoH4RcXwEU1IhIJHILNmMafkh-C-45LI7HLg_-bbFP1jrHVGs1EhVFNy4mj0uWf5DNUyxvPilLj0H5THjpz-XddvRf4NAAD__6VId7o) that can precisely target and terminate cancerous cells. This marks the[ first time a programmable](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1urDAQRp_GdKDx2Bhu4eI2dJs2JTJ4AEf-WZnJon37iNRpv684R-fzMT9ciCHvHy6R5a3MbuXwolm2qFrUs2683YiQVENWDmBAjv8GbA6rDS6jHlDhtvSg0aFE8MYbXKQzQE2wCKhBopLQ9wBdr8YVR_B6QbeAGoQG8oFL7b5KyHzQFt_lRbVbS2qiPZifp1D_BU4Cp-u6uitU8vcrcDq51LfAaXV5pdoe35lD3ttUs2uftezVpXQPXMlxoswt08kCp6Za_7xCjOE0t8KeXIi_SP4zwE8AAAD__-BsXQI) form of mRNA will be tested on humans. Researchers expect the first round of testing to begin this spring.
## Gallup: Trust in Ethics Drops to New Lows
A new Gallup survey shows that Americans' view of the ethics and honesty of nearly all professions is [down significantly from 2019](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGO6yAQRb8Gd7aGwcROQfEad3ntlhaBsT0rAgjYZPP3K2-90u1ucY7Ox229WQ4c9__2QaZtabWu8ZNW2aPqcVzHzpuNCEl1ZOQEF5DzdcLuMPfNXkFO5xzgrJ0Gq3HUcpZuIvQdGwQcQaKSoDXAoNXscAY_3tHeQU1iBPLcUhk-E8d20Bbe6UllcOnRBXO0lqtQ_wQuApdIrzrsNoSvfP4Cl5xCELhcYL6CErhQO9jVvtjGca99JFvCu88lbVQrp1h7n15xsDV_d8X4_OIQuF5Ojf1hOfxi258RfgIAAP__3yBdXw). Highest on the list were nurses, veterinarians, engineers, and dentists. The lowest were politicians, car salesmen, marketers, and stockbrokers, with less than 10% believing in their ethics. Journalists dropped about 30% from 2019, and lawyers dropped about 25%. Even the clergy was down, with only 32% of Americans trusting their honesty. For a full breakdown of the poll, [click here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGO6yAQRb8Gd7aGwcROQfEad3ntlhaBsT0rAgjYZPP3K2-90u1ucY7Ox229WQ4c9__2QaZtabWu8ZNW2aPqcVzHzpuNCEl1ZOQEF5DzdcLuMPfNXkFO5xzgrJ0Gq3HUcpZuIvQdGwQcQaKSoDXAoNXscAY_3tHeQU1iBPLcUhk-E8d20Bbe6UllcOnRBXO0lqtQ_wQuApdIrzrsNoSvfP4Cl5xCELhcYL6CErhQO9jVvtjGca99JFvCu88lbVQrp1h7n15xsDV_d8X4_OIQuF5Ojf1hOfxi258RfgIAAP__3yBdXw).

clean_body: New Hampshire voters in what has suddenly become a two-person election in the Republican primary between Donald Trump and Nikki Haley, now that Gov. Ron DeSantis has dropped out. | | | | | | TUESDAY, JANUARY 23, 2024 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1957, the first Frisbees came off the machine presses at the Wham-O toy company, setting off a flying-disc craze that has never waned, as any Frisbee golfer can attest. () For more than 100 years, New Hampshire has been the home of the nation's first primary, and we wish our Granite State readers a happy election day today! Have you signed up for The Flyover yet? If not, you can fix that -. Today's edition is brought to you by our friends at . | New Hampshire Heads to the Polls New Hampshire voters in what has suddenly become a two-person election in the Republican primary between Donald Trump and Nikki Haley, now that Gov. Ron DeSantis has dropped out. Trump leads in the latest polls by 19 points, and is for a large turnout of independents and a small one for Republicans. The state election office is projecting a record-setting 322,000 voters will show up. On the Democratic side, President Biden isn't on the ballot, but analysts will be watching closely to see if he gets a strong write-in vote against challenger Rep. Dean Phillips. Last night, Nikki Haley at Dixville Notch, a tiny resort town that's been recording its results at midnight for 64 years. Haley grabbed all six votes. FDA Approves New Therapy for Cancer Strand Therapeutics, a biotech firm specializing in mRNA technology, from the Food and Drug Administration Monday to begin human testing on a new cancer-fighting therapy. The new treatment could represent a breakthrough immunotherapy for treating solid tumors. The therapy uses that can precisely target and terminate cancerous cells. This marks the form of mRNA will be tested on humans. Researchers expect the first round of testing to begin this spring. Gallup: Trust in Ethics Drops to New Lows A new Gallup survey shows that Americans' view of the ethics and honesty of nearly all professions is . Highest on the list were nurses, veterinarians, engineers, and dentists. The lowest were politicians, car salesmen, marketers, and stockbrokers, with less than 10% believing in their ethics. Journalists dropped about 30% from 2019, and lawyers dropped about 25%. Even the clergy was down, with only 32% of Americans trusting their honesty. For a full breakdown of the poll, . subject: The greatest Christian apologist of the 20th century
body:
His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5fd6d2d467fb4a419112059c8e318e89&_e=C0PnJlJGU47Sbu1kwLgHyCaD_br9HwektJxR6WYdilyI4qDmmrCSg2TYMfY9e6AmZNZ1Wm0cMQ9qd8GYjR4jZafMRi8bAj2O9Sf6_4y51GW-qNIezDAppLVl_N8-rQJfbSDR_Vw3p3CYI-Pl8LtILQfmbOU-w2obL5Zii4196LjyIvISw120-S5tjMBhQ-11kCnikEuyo0qIOzPfpuOMP5JbI6_GguNpC5nmOeOHPoSpzQwHjnRpaZlcBwLx1dzSLphaz0J_aE8_e-YqCaWAidmid08jkT0KQfnDBNoCATW9mohf4iG1QbU9o494MuiXzQkznpgWzCnATWB63HxrSqQwnJ6eHbTZcZlAcZeqKWyHoHLC_GfEY9dGr-0Wv1KR1xPz36NHdubB0kIIsEycc--jQLE1V8GDLSq6dCkTrPQfFwquZqcybPVMXED3AT-t)
---
| | Dear Friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5fd6d2d467fb4a419112059c8e318e89&_e=C0PnJlJGU47Sbu1kwLgHyCaD_br9HwektJxR6WYdilyI4qDmmrCSg2TYMfY9e6AmZNZ1Wm0cMQ9qd8GYjR4jZafMRi8bAj2O9Sf6_4y51GW-qNIezDAppLVl_N8-rQJfbSDR_Vw3p3CYI-Pl8LtILQfmbOU-w2obL5Zii4196LjyIvISw120-S5tjMBhQ-11kCnikEuyo0qIOzPfpuOMP5JbI6_GguNpC5nmOeOHPoSpzQwHjnRpaZlcBwLx1dzSLphaz0J_aE8_e-YqCaWAidmid08jkT0KQfnDBNoCATVWlclZKCc6vqKswtMgP4wkU4lOVKAQISt0I_WiWlpKABi0YHGebKVinEJQiMs-Sr7TjIIKI1Kcz_56wt0BSGdpXW_lsi95Gcewf6d2TY5DBlTEEpTuPfjturOcEiL6qE5MlSkc6nEy1EyozNFypvPv)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5fd6d2d467fb4a419112059c8e318e89&_e=C0PnJlJGU47Sbu1kwLgHyCaD_br9HwektJxR6WYdilyI4qDmmrCSg2TYMfY9e6AmZNZ1Wm0cMQ9qd8GYjR4jZafMRi8bAj2O9Sf6_4y51GW-qNIezDAppLVl_N8-rQJfbSDR_Vw3p3CYI-Pl8LtILQfmbOU-w2obL5Zii4196LjyIvISw120-S5tjMBhQ-11kCnikEuyo0qIOzPfpuOMP5JbI6_GguNpC5nmOeOHPoSpzQwHjnRpaZlcBwLx1dzSLphaz0J_aE8_e-YqCaWAidmid08jkT0KQfnDBNoCATUWKwxf7iaJPnDOtC4GOBf0A1E7QBNnJH094f-3o-NmchI-DChPuisN5L6yJFGLt4GtiAXg9Z3MxKUc6VnvEH0rm5t2By9e8zlTDNFcpl4p8znitFUaYojyytsYCHMRsqbSZGz2Es0dE4bPod-Vwngn)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful DVD box set](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5fd6d2d467fb4a419112059c8e318e89&_e=C0PnJlJGU47Sbu1kwLgHyCaD_br9HwektJxR6WYdilyI4qDmmrCSg2TYMfY9e6AmZNZ1Wm0cMQ9qd8GYjR4jZafMRi8bAj2O9Sf6_4y51GW-qNIezDAppLVl_N8-rQJfbSDR_Vw3p3CYI-Pl8LtILQfmbOU-w2obL5Zii4196LjyIvISw120-S5tjMBhQ-11kCnikEuyo0qIOzPfpuOMP5JbI6_GguNpC5nmOeOHPoSpzQwHjnRpaZlcBwLx1dzSLphaz0J_aE8_e-YqCaWAidmid08jkT0KQfnDBNoCATUGrSYqTLgKWZ2awkps-k3B1IOVhfcu_YGIy4uJEqrB30E3mF7qg6Ci-xNIwOni_m2syiTdJY5BSh2CF8AumToj14T3XHAUKDdJTfWowmIvUYsC8Zb8whsz9QlsVznXAcL-9u7RM7ZstvLUFxgCw8jK).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |

| | | | This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d1ce8837522d4216bdae801dca274205&_e=t2CEZLNSRbhKZyt_MLUgUFXkFMxKEUyO0r0nTFgpun8-em_RIwT3nnziDUxCe5ePt9J5fjDxvwPD-IClK72ljB12ExXTqpmrDsTZx8GkhjtjeJwrKlrDHaGrM8sXRiEADGFI7-kE6XdThlqTomoa9w5CNVqaqbW2Q7xisa3B1Fq4kuSG1m_mr_L9wZPBtf3Tqeb1NnpmcHjl2VQBFq2hNLHk809ojMu_qqTpqEyXpeL3SFgbfoQ5W89d-2adfTJGX3lIt7SUi65_TKkLZ5zhM4FqhrRTMC11KktoiZnXSkE_oX0sq6UnSveU-SCPZqEq7rgavNg9rifO59WEtAi2ChMLxV2kYshHgp_NjdBGEj-Nzmee5RlK-mhDmqIrWVUP5NIrY_0PqBaJIoyG6NHIUQI1ZWeol3yWL0yjuvjuhCIycoMmHos6pbtXR_ZvXsuP) [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d1ce8837522d4216bdae801dca274205&_e=t2CEZLNSRbhKZyt_MLUgUFXkFMxKEUyO0r0nTFgpun8-em_RIwT3nnziDUxCe5ePt9J5fjDxvwPD-IClK72ljB12ExXTqpmrDsTZx8GkhjtjeJwrKlrDHaGrM8sXRiEADGFI7-kE6XdThlqTomoa9w5CNVqaqbW2Q7xisa3B1Fq4kuSG1m_mr_L9wZPBtf3Tqeb1NnpmcHjl2VQBFq2hNLHk809ojMu_qqTpqEyXpeL3SFgbfoQ5W89d-2adfTJGX3lIt7SUi65_TKkLZ5zhM7GsNOvvepmWa5-EzUDxIKrSLE8czrLqXRQytPmrI11l-7mJSSJkX3o9bXnl8PwIlubZgJ62qW49ON2CVGKFQqSuxmTkGZjKdXLjBcmwVypvxqxv3k-EaFzbDPRuzK_uFpDPF3Hbd9vRrsFhvrysbwIweFebUU_LiYSKOGgitkCP) | Hello Friend,

Thomas G. West, professor of politics at Hillsdale College, is one of the great scholars and teachers of the American Founding.

That's why we're so excited to offer a course that explains his core teachings about the American Founding, **which is now available on DVD.**

In this course, Dr. West sits down with David Azerrad, his former student and current professor at Hillsdale's Graduate School of Government, to reveal the truth about the American Founding. | **
### What students are saying
** “I appreciate the brevity of explanation and new information in a way I hadn't known or realized myself. The quizzes are helpful. Having two teachers converse brings an interesting perspective.” **- Darlena** “It helps put into context the thinking of our founders at that time. That’s very important and misunderstood by so many people today!” **- Robert**
---|---

As Dr. West explains, the Founders' political theory is so foreign to Americans today--even to scholars and teachers of American history and politics--that the task of uncovering the truth about the Founding is like unearthing something from a "deep and long-forgotten pit."

This course goes about this task by examining the actual words and actions of the Founders, and it brings their theory to life by comparing it to the dominant views of contemporary America.

The result is an exciting and often surprising account of how the Founders established a free government in America and what they thought was necessary to sustain it.

As you know, our online courses are free. That's why we depend on the generosity of people like you to help us share the course with as many people as possible.

Would you consider making a tax-deductible donation to help promote this course?

And now, for any donation of $100 or more, you will receive this beautiful DVD box set for **" The Real American Founding: A Conversation,"** by clicking the link below.

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/real-american-founding-dvd](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d1ce8837522d4216bdae801dca274205&_e=t2CEZLNSRbhKZyt_MLUgUFXkFMxKEUyO0r0nTFgpun8-em_RIwT3nnziDUxCe5ePt9J5fjDxvwPD-IClK72ljB12ExXTqpmrDsTZx8GkhjtjeJwrKlrDHaGrM8sXRiEADGFI7-kE6XdThlqTomoa9w5CNVqaqbW2Q7xisa3B1Fq4kuSG1m_mr_L9wZPBtf3Tqeb1NnpmcHjl2VQBFq2hNLHk809ojMu_qqTpqEyXpeL3SFgbfoQ5W89d-2adfTJGX3lIt7SUi65_TKkLZ5zhMzUWCfyjAH6xWwIT_hAITmynQ87jMAOMVcXF5McV-uKGnqVBZeR-rTTA5UcsmifpwWlOc-nZ5sB85dnuTO2g4uPFpHlYzTv8d8egXPTMdujmEAfBALpHkGVSRCnjDtvNOqL6f1F5RePXjQqUWgbmz9LlzYfVnA_k7zALTP9THWb0)

I hope you'll join us in this fun and important work of sharing the truth about the American Founding with your fellow Americans.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

body:
I'd like to invite you to join me in Hillsdale College's newest free course studying the greatest Christian apologist of the 20th century, C.S. Lewis.

| | | | This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a139287d86444d78a32ccdd8602ce7e4&_e=ehXs_6sLFRbvm9lLQzGM96tRNjBP_3T5A53T9BDk-uG9nRo4zggMH7hvPSpLURLkcRi2T_Fa6c_gwKdj9u_otmmjOT1_kWqHArOg5GI7T9N8LRhAJKhSv8-UiTezRCWVCt-AlY9hOa13kayGbxn-_-Oj25aVWWYmJK7nztYDTvuqoFCI6ajtacwPzL0b7pAYoI7kGeQe2JDWN8_mZEc-8ZGiX9FMUz5S6UPbu73Z4Ty2jGbSU4aCXBGJG48LxM2U8iNwNG6EOH7XqEeIJ3F03RjCgsyhx7bMbY06TzfhW2l8R7x7DzxnrQ0gItiPbNGheGCnFyc-nJNeCb-LkMwahYgH4CcqW353zOv8fATjWcyL9tf-bskI2Tto0i-DIqBYXdacVliZNN-tAUnlszzbrijanUaVZ0k3K--0K_1pp1i6kkHBmW-dGuRffx6TBByi) [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a139287d86444d78a32ccdd8602ce7e4&_e=ehXs_6sLFRbvm9lLQzGM96tRNjBP_3T5A53T9BDk-uG9nRo4zggMH7hvPSpLURLkcRi2T_Fa6c_gwKdj9u_otmmjOT1_kWqHArOg5GI7T9N8LRhAJKhSv8-UiTezRCWVCt-AlY9hOa13kayGbxn-_-Oj25aVWWYmJK7nztYDTvuqoFCI6ajtacwPzL0b7pAYoI7kGeQe2JDWN8_mZEc-8ZGiX9FMUz5S6UPbu73Z4Ty2jGbSU4aCXBGJG48LxM2U8iNwNG6EOH7XqEeIJ3F03VtpE_dyqTbZli1nIvnvK5sHe4j2Bc5I418Ju6PX4C0FY3p4G2RjmFbbMcqLb7RYyAi6dqPc4FxTctPrOZdCIOgLt3XvciQooEptDYftNl1V9lRLmGMQHBoXTyDYE7hqCHaIGh1FZcaMXscgmQz_FUZK1t1nkU7gPxNfr0r6CE8p) | Hello Friend,

Thomas G. West, professor of politics at Hillsdale College, is one of the great scholars and teachers of the American Founding.

That's why we're so excited to offer a course that explains his core teachings about the American Founding, **which is now available on DVD.**

In this course, Dr. West sits down with David Azerrad, his former student and current professor at Hillsdale's Graduate School of Government, to reveal the truth about the American Founding. | **
### What students are saying
** “I appreciate the brevity of explanation and new information in a way I hadn't known or realized myself. The quizzes are helpful. Having two teachers converse brings an interesting perspective.” **- Darlena** “It helps put into context the thinking of our founders at that time. That’s very important and misunderstood by so many people today!” **- Robert**
---|---

As Dr. West explains, the Founders' political theory is so foreign to Americans today--even to scholars and teachers of American history and politics--that the task of uncovering the truth about the Founding is like unearthing something from a "deep and long-forgotten pit."

This course goes about this task by examining the actual words and actions of the Founders, and it brings their theory to life by comparing it to the dominant views of contemporary America.

The result is an exciting and often surprising account of how the Founders established a free government in America and what they thought was necessary to sustain it.

As you know, our online courses are free. That's why we depend on the generosity of people like you to help us share the course with as many people as possible.

Would you consider making a tax-deductible donation to help promote this course?

And now, for any donation of $100 or more, you will receive this beautiful DVD box set for **" The Real American Founding: A Conversation,"** by clicking the link below.

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/real-american-founding-dvd](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a139287d86444d78a32ccdd8602ce7e4&_e=ehXs_6sLFRbvm9lLQzGM96tRNjBP_3T5A53T9BDk-uG9nRo4zggMH7hvPSpLURLkcRi2T_Fa6c_gwKdj9u_otmmjOT1_kWqHArOg5GI7T9N8LRhAJKhSv8-UiTezRCWVCt-AlY9hOa13kayGbxn-_-Oj25aVWWYmJK7nztYDTvuqoFCI6ajtacwPzL0b7pAYoI7kGeQe2JDWN8_mZEc-8ZGiX9FMUz5S6UPbu73Z4Ty2jGbSU4aCXBGJG48LxM2U8iNwNG6EOH7XqEeIJ3F03SmRmWd5lbsDaYj6BOMb1GK33qvjYZ6inB9QBDYUax21ZFCeOg9TTmA0O_FWjIiu6NOA7VZs2Dzfu_rMURmqM8htRVxnRLjGQTnMvVrmxRhog1dCIYGsMw4eiPSlmyMWGj8WTiKet1inWhZd_R_Dl_a1KW9iRSTnSpDjW2bQJB3F)

I hope you'll join us in this fun and important work of sharing the truth about the American Founding with your fellow Americans.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

name: Jon Tester
subject: Montana til I die:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7d9d91f7-b3ba-43cb-aa4f-8aa22ff2bb4c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, I won’t beat around the bush. [Can you pitch in three bucks to fuel my people-powered reelection campaign? Your gift will be split between Blue Amp Action and my campaign.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc49cba65-70b1-475b-a373-1dec63edd631/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [DONATE $3 >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb32fceaf-dbde-4258-a71f-0d3880889ee8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) This might surprise you, but $3 goes a long way toward winning this race. That’s because we’re powered by folks just like you and I’m damn proud of that. I don’t answer to super PACs or special interests. We’ve got what it takes to defeat Mitch McConnell and his cronies, but the truth is that they’re already pouring truckloads of money to defeat me. They’re trying to turn me into something I’m not, because they can’t beat who I am. I’m a farmer. I’m a senator. And I’m a Montanan til I die. I’ve never let my time in Washington change me. I’m not about to start now. [If every person reading this email chipped in $3 today, we would get ahead on our fundraising goals for the month and kick off the election year swinging. So I need to ask you: Will you support our grassroots-funded campaign and split a donation today?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T502213d5-4683-4dde-ab30-9830649b6048/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. name: National Gun Owner
subject: We paid for this already
body:
Grab your Complimentary Shoulder Holster now, before it’s too late.
---
| We are a community of gun-loving Americans. We hope you stick around but remember you can [unsubscribe](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/3687/6374453/db0b4a7a70ed53b789fa7253e47f1e748218df3f/161031f38b1608aa73340db4977e61792b60cba7) here at any time. January 23rd, 2024 \- Breaking News - Firearms Reviews - 2nd Amendment - Ammo & More -. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | \- We’re happy to tell you **we’ve paid the Full Price** of American Tactical Supply’s new “invisible” Shoulder Holster for you.

So you can own one of the 382 available Shoulder Holsters for FREE!

[Just click here to claim your complimentary Shoulder Holster today.](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/3687/6374453/cf3761b42904f2a612bc80cf68901a68028510a4/161031f38b1608aa73340db4977e61792b60cba7)

We’re doing this as a **“No More Gun Control”** awareness campaign -- and to give a __big ol’ middle finger__ to Biden’s surge of insane new gun laws.

This is our #1 favorite holster.

It fits nearly all handguns...

It’s unbelievably comfortable...

And it’s so good at concealing guns... it can make a large frame pistol **disappear in plain sight.**

Plus, the fact you can get it for $0.00 today is a huge selling point. ;)

The only problem is that there are a limited number available to give away.

Once they’re gone, you can still get one... **but you’ll have to pay full price**.

Right now, there are enough Free Shoulder Holsters [for the next 382 people who request on here](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/3687/6374453/cf3761b42904f2a612bc80cf68901a68028510a4/161031f38b1608aa73340db4977e61792b60cba7).

After that, we can’t make any promises.

**So HURRY and grab your Free Shoulder Holster now** , before it’s too late.

**Thank You.**

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: Learn about the real American Founding
body:
I'd like to invite you to join me in Hillsdale College's newest free course studying the greatest Christian apologist of the 20th century, C.S. Lewis.

| | |
---
| | | | This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=29cb393929234558b2ca8dd428ce2635&_e=pnC17s3w9vQuZJp5VDEcu32I5pQ4nvb5BGnbfsYBXeP9bGv8cFu2Y9YXqYrDexAPSx_o58vfXdR8LWhX312vaHAfDaHnyGbixrzQy6l6l0h822_JLi3PNh5U4kJLoq3EHjq_1jOnd1CRD39xVQQloHezFpv4iRiWE6HKOAcDQhJBePp8Swd30TSREVwOaDjKbMhI7Q379FVPP3doL4mh_eRHSw5o_K-qupG980aPFOFifx51Q6AvxEhegljcBvVlPZtdtm4nEqXJ1XUT4BDGLymgOg4tU3bDP8wvvr8I3oFdwjWpmcSBKq4VPNwnSwnAEioLSDPZ_0Z0sGXnJ6Mn1QWmMqz0flFE-L80hTIqsPtWdLkUGjTyfEE2Q05KlujPI-s0niH1cP3HfS6V62r70Sga3LNiueoYpPWPGFD4ZCDh8vhF86-TvXqowAQhhod5) [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=29cb393929234558b2ca8dd428ce2635&_e=pnC17s3w9vQuZJp5VDEcu32I5pQ4nvb5BGnbfsYBXeP9bGv8cFu2Y9YXqYrDexAPSx_o58vfXdR8LWhX312vaHAfDaHnyGbixrzQy6l6l0h822_JLi3PNh5U4kJLoq3EHjq_1jOnd1CRD39xVQQloHezFpv4iRiWE6HKOAcDQhJBePp8Swd30TSREVwOaDjKbMhI7Q379FVPP3doL4mh_eRHSw5o_K-qupG980aPFOFifx51Q6AvxEhegljcBvVlPZtdtm4nEqXJ1XUT4BDGL5xpVr1tEXO35BqgyJWi1Jqde_xZnFV8qJ7Cef4RASiL8QR2-yrX2kKHfljltoNd-JJZbEzZ7nphx8F6u7uvuub_iF_q8QSmo-s907S_aFGvJgV6OSAqbYE-vBjipOnt9HLog8EsNm8LeyG7cCsPdHvo0fNLVOK7gKNPUHkbwnHp) | Hello Friend,

Thomas G. West, professor of politics at Hillsdale College, is one of the great scholars and teachers of the American Founding.

That’s why we’re so excited to offer a course that explains his core teachings about the American Founding, **which is now available on DVD.**

In this course, Dr. West sits down with David Azerrad, his former student and current professor at Hillsdale’s Graduate School of Government, to reveal the truth about the American Founding. | **
### What students are saying
** “I appreciate the brevity of explanation and new information in a way I hadn’t known or realized myself. The quizzes are helpful. Having two teachers converse brings an interesting perspective.” **- Darlena** “It helps put into context the thinking of our founders at that time. That’s very important and misunderstood by so many people today!” **- Robert**
---|---

As Dr. West explains, the Founders’ political theory is so foreign to Americans today--even to scholars and teachers of American history and politics--that the task of uncovering the truth about the Founding is like unearthing something from a “deep and long-forgotten pit.”

This course goes about this task by examining the actual words and actions of the Founders, and it brings their theory to life by comparing it to the dominant views of contemporary America.

The result is an exciting and often surprising account of how the Founders established a free government in America and what they thought was necessary to sustain it.

As you know, our online courses are free. That’s why we depend on the generosity of people like you to help us share the course with as many people as possible.

Would you consider making a tax-deductible donation to help promote this course?

And now, for any donation of $100 or more, you will receive this beautiful DVD box set for **“The Real American Founding: A Conversation,”** by clicking the link below.

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/real-american-founding-dvd](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=29cb393929234558b2ca8dd428ce2635&_e=pnC17s3w9vQuZJp5VDEcu32I5pQ4nvb5BGnbfsYBXeP9bGv8cFu2Y9YXqYrDexAPSx_o58vfXdR8LWhX312vaHAfDaHnyGbixrzQy6l6l0h822_JLi3PNh5U4kJLoq3EHjq_1jOnd1CRD39xVQQloHezFpv4iRiWE6HKOAcDQhJBePp8Swd30TSREVwOaDjKbMhI7Q379FVPP3doL4mh_eRHSw5o_K-qupG980aPFOFifx51Q6AvxEhegljcBvVlPZtdtm4nEqXJ1XUT4BDGL2-XpsFC2js9fAK80RLcpZ5bbqCWtin3fuKvMS2bRP4vUTOtWOF-QO2M_N54QtaSXE0vfld3mO7UWyjru3vs3Fx9VuAGdcN5z8v6Cqg78Y3pVwSwrMD4TrNFqjJ1uYMIpcDtvVTGx6TOi4U4O5-nzmlT3SF8yqP9A6J3RaseL4ab)

I hope you’ll join us in this fun and important work of sharing the truth about the American Founding with your fellow Americans.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Freedom Nation Today
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=29cb393929234558b2ca8dd428ce2635&_t=9z4hD324tumuBd6Mnse_JNMZwdDd3lRngD9gmm53-F-vgnAOEG9OvkMCOStyXFFfQHUjqtcpsi7qeVdxEuizN_RbwP3pfL343aKf6u5NTMOj6TNE-FYBYjJmVXz_4ahx1KC1pP8KIAUmmPcgg1cvpPpKp2F57mIh3P3iO_15dxw%3D)

name: Alliance Defending Freedom
subject: Seventh grader punished for telling the truth
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.libertyledger.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MDIzLTQyOTI3NmNmZTAwODQwODg5MjVjZWEwMzQyMDViMGVlIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjAiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvaHV0dXFsaGZ1Zj9zcmM9TExPNDU4MjYifQ/jHTAT21xpfFTGBZqOjEZlg)
---
Fellow American: A Massachusetts school has censored a seventh grader for wearing a shirt that expresses biological truth. Throughout the entire nation, a debate is raging on the very nature of what it means to be human. What makes a person a man? A woman? Our Constitution guarantees freedom of thought—the freedom to share your beliefs. **Twelve-year-old Liam Morrison’s school has decided that debate is out—and government orthodoxy is in.** Liam, a 12-year-old student at Nichols Middle School in Middleborough, Massachusetts, quietly observed how the school proclaimed loudly that a person’s feelings, not their biology, determines their sex and gender. Liam holds different beliefs. Informed by a scientific understanding of biology (and backed by millennia of human history), he believes that there only two sexes (male and female) and that a person’s gender is inseparable from their sex. **So, one day Liam wore a shirt to school that says, “There are only two genders.”** The principal of the school, along with a school counselor, pulled Liam out of class and ordered him to remove his shirt or go home. Liam politely declined and was sent home. **Public school officials cannot censor a 7th grader’s speech by forcing him to remove a shirt that states scientific fact. This is a gross violation of the First Amendment.** **[Please stand with this brave 7th grader as he challenges his school’s violation of free speech. Sign our pledge to show that Liam isn’t the only one who is standing up for these truths.](http://trk.libertyledger.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MDIzLTQyOTI3NmNmZTAwODQwODg5MjVjZWEwMzQyMDViMGVlIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjEiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvaHV0dXFsaGZ1Zj9zcmM9TExPNDU4MjYifQ/B-8cvY3j3NWTMFkNShocDg)**
---
| | [**Sign the Pledge**](http://trk.libertyledger.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MDIzLTQyOTI3NmNmZTAwODQwODg5MjVjZWEwMzQyMDViMGVlIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjIiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvaHV0dXFsaGZ1Zj9zcmM9TExPNDU4MjYifQ/QJt6HQn2iOIo0q6WzYwxEQ)
---
**“They completely took away my ability to have a different opinion than they wanted me to have,” Liam says.** This case isn’t just about a shirt.
* **It’s about a public school telling Liam** —and thereby all other students—that he can’t wear a shirt with a message that’s important to him unless it’s the same opinion as the government’s.
* **It’s about a public school trying to force a student** to forfeit his free speech when he walks into the school building.
* **It’s about a public school imposing its view on students** —and censoring students who disagree.

“The school is talking about this issue all the time,” ADF Senior Counsel Tyson Langhofer, who is defending Liam, says, “and all Liam wanted to do was express his opinion, which is actually shared by a lot of his classmates.” After the school punished Liam for wearing the shirt, he wore another shirt to protest the school’s censorship that said: “There are censored genders.” Again, the school told him to take off the shirt. That’s when Liam and his family decided to ask Alliance Defending Freedom and the Massachusetts Family Institute to take legal action.
---
[**Sign the Pledge**](http://trk.libertyledger.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MDIzLTQyOTI3NmNmZTAwODQwODg5MjVjZWEwMzQyMDViMGVlIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjMiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvaHV0dXFsaGZ1Zj9zcmM9TExPNDU4MjYifQ/GTlitKveh5MqeecLd-x7jg)
---
“I don’t complain when I see pride flags and diversity posters hung throughout the school,” Liam told a meeting of the Middleboro School Committee in April, after he was punished the first time. “Others have a right to their beliefs just like I do.” **The First Amendment protects people of all beliefs, especially people that disagree with the government. If you only have freedom to agree with those in power, you don’t have freedom at all.** Across the nation, government officials are trying to silence views that differ from radical gender ideology. And it’s falling to brave 12-year-olds like Liam to stand in opposition and not affirm lies when school officials, who should be modeling adulthood, have failed students. **[Will you join Liam today?](http://trk.libertyledger.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MDIzLTQyOTI3NmNmZTAwODQwODg5MjVjZWEwMzQyMDViMGVlIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjQiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvaHV0dXFsaGZ1Zj9zcmM9TExPNDU4MjYifQ/u_fgFympdWDftu4cE-I-4Q)**
