clean_body: | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. | | | | Fellow American: A Massachusetts school has censored a seventh grader for wearing a shirt that expresses biological truth. Throughout the entire nation, a debate is raging on the very nature of what it means to be human. What makes a person a man? A woman? Our Constitution guarantees freedom of thought—the freedom to share your beliefs. Twelve-year-old Liam Morrison’s school has decided that debate is out—and government orthodoxy is in. Liam, a 12-year-old student at Nichols Middle School in Middleborough, Massachusetts, quietly observed how the school proclaimed loudly that a person’s feelings, not their biology, determines their sex and gender. Liam holds different beliefs. Informed by a scientific understanding of biology (and backed by millennia of human history), he believes that there only two sexes (male and female) and that a person’s gender is inseparable from their sex. So, one day Liam wore a shirt to school that says, “There are only two genders.” The principal of the school, along with a school counselor, pulled Liam out of class and ordered him to remove his shirt or go home. Liam politely declined and was sent home. Public school officials cannot censor a 7th grader’s speech by forcing him to remove a shirt that states scientific fact. This is a gross violation of the First Amendment. | | “They completely took away my ability to have a different opinion than they wanted me to have,” Liam says. This case isn’t just about a shirt. It’s about a public school telling Liam —and thereby all other students—that he can’t wear a shirt with a message that’s important to him unless it’s the same opinion as the government’s. It’s about a public school trying to force a student to forfeit his free speech when he walks into the school building. It’s about a public school imposing its view on students —and censoring students who disagree. “The school is talking about this issue all the time,” ADF Senior Counsel Tyson Langhofer, who is defending Liam, says, “and all Liam wanted to do was express his opinion, which is actually shared by a lot of his classmates.” After the school punished Liam for wearing the shirt, he wore another shirt to protest the school’s censorship that said: “There are censored genders.” Again, the school told him to take off the shirt. That’s when Liam and his family decided to ask Alliance Defending Freedom and the Massachusetts Family Institute to take legal action. “I don’t complain when I see pride flags and diversity posters hung throughout the school,” Liam told a meeting of the Middleboro School Committee in April, after he was punished the first time. “Others have a right to their beliefs just like I do.” The First Amendment protects people of all beliefs, especially people that disagree with the government. If you only have freedom to agree with those in power, you don’t have freedom at all. Across the nation, government officials are trying to silence views that differ from radical gender ideology. And it’s falling to brave 12-year-olds like Liam to stand in opposition and not affirm lies when school officials, who should be modeling adulthood, have failed students. —Alliance Defending Freedom P.S. Liam isn’t the first student to be censored—and he won’t be the last. ** 15100 N. 90th Street, Scottsdale, Arizona 85260 All donations are secure, private, and tax-deductible. Member ECFA. name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: The truth is, no one knows for certain
body:
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zcqd8iupr4rqu4q8u91cah0o9c70lnpv53prfc3o_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c1h69oj2cjh2bs)
---
Hello Friend,

Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return.

That's the heart of Revelation.

Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness.

Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead.

It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near.

This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey.

Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ.

When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence.

As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King.

In my brand-new book, _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into:

1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist?
2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event?
3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture?
4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance?
5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem?

Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure.

In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative.
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ziic8gio0lp8tem030csfu81k2gaftae24jmn34o_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c1h69oj2cjh2bs)I would like to send you my brand-new book _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_.
Make your generous gift here: [https://secure.ptv.org/mysteries-of-the-end-times-generous-gift-1-dr-robert-jeffress](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5v942h2f66o8a0cheamicuo2sna19f6he3ldpr0_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c1h69oj2cjh2bs)

_Pathway to Victory_ is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support.

May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus.

Sharing the Truth of God's Word, ____
---
| | Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas
---

1600 Daily
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbcmonb4j4j9fsu405m56pb8t9gf5vnobnn5f93g_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkhhm0o316gqb3d7jkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8oj6chgecor246h22sh2s8i6eo33c1h69oj2cjh2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z36vksi5g7mi2vq137664fk2mtl3mhubdkik65lo_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c1h69oj2cjh2bs)_

We could lose the House, and I haven't heard from you. This isn’t just political hyperbole. It’s as real as it gets! We're looking for 100,000 conservatives to join our efforts in support of flipping the House before Biden's first State of the Union on February 23rd. Don't want to receive our emails? **HOLD THE HOUSE PETITION:** With recent retirements and resignations, _**our Republican House majority has shrunk from four to two**_.

The only way that we’re going to defy expectations and defend our House majority is if we have the right people in place leading up to November. _**[For us to be successful, that means we need conservatives like YOU on our team.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=97643bd9591745b2b7f065a67115de50&_e=E2BJJGxBIxBB5U8wnX_-j-Z0Ll_qs1BRslKDlvl4O8GO4ASPqaOTLMapec9jEifdibb5ytsnDz1a__VXwJ1N_YyR3xboeAzewtvL5-d-hGGH6AyFrgFjmPvYWemhIPkPjgNkKH3dv07V2ZCpvUuCEDJVNr9gKcNgtFVrcCSKNoqQGVe-C03YLUVGq1vU2rWU2EFiPVuQgzQGFSu4VsZFN7erBiIy4VSQhWHcjJorlUoQ6oqGkm1KJWpukjqDtD0B7_Ou_g11G7KdsGY21rwiize8XrTZciq255oHjV6oMaPwAei3zi16hX7-b3-wJiyQQIvcFl2mBHIB4Nvsl9MlSteRyW4F9GelT1cjjfidI26Y8urksh2JntK2Knsa6SnwRjgjHwzjFVdDdRAKr9fpUEjR-LERFengKJwkK8tkTiDOjhyMIYFLYagzt1EjEq4Qh_Bf1X30TMR9N7voBb2doBLXJNZ6BZkuJ6PX13sriRNkQXjaUybLH1ws4TNvoXgkOsLxIJC-Ue2LIqqMoEGi6yjh1Zw6gMdhIe87WvqW2Bc%3D)**_

We’re laying the groundwork now, and that’s why I’m asking for you to sign up to be a member of my 2024 House Majority Taskforce. _**[We’re looking to add 100,000 conservatives to this initiative by the end of the week and hoping we can count on you to sign up today](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=97643bd9591745b2b7f065a67115de50&_e=E2BJJGxBIxBB5U8wnX_-j-Z0Ll_qs1BRslKDlvl4O8GO4ASPqaOTLMapec9jEifdibb5ytsnDz1a__VXwJ1N_YyR3xboeAzewtvL5-d-hGGH6AyFrgFjmPvYWemhIPkPjgNkKH3dv07V2ZCpvUuCEDJVNr9gKcNgtFVrcCSKNoqQGVe-C03YLUVGq1vU2rWU2EFiPVuQgzQGFSu4VsZFN7erBiIy4VSQhWHcjJorlUoQ6oqGkm1KJWpukjqDtD0B7_Ou_g11G7KdsGY21rwiize8XrTZciq255oHjV6oMaPwAei3zi16hX7-b3-wJiyQQIvcFl2mBHIB4Nvsl9MlSteRyW4F9GelT1cjjfidI26Y8urksh2JntK2Knsa6SnwRjgjHwzjFVdDdRAKr9fpUHKPXkps43q89h80Jd58p-gC6a6tONWsiXPCW1ytS3BBNEK3UTHbJkc1RHnoxt30d7M1lCbRmBhUO9_9K4GFKkfepeKrSUMGOWwkw4g16Q-Skoy3UMx5hHaDsZf9sjRgJuZmrkW1zxzocGaZvhwhXv0%3D)**_.

Fellow Conservative,

Republicans are the only thing stopping President Biden and Chuck Schumer from bankrupting our country.

This isn’t just political hyperbole. It’s as real as it gets!

It’s our Republican majority that allows us to hold them accountable. Without it, we would effectively be relegated to “sitting on the sidelines” and watching as:
* The Biden Administration does nothing to address the growing border crisis,

* **Crime continues to rise, and dangerous drugs pour into our country,**

* The Washington swamp holds critical funds hostage in order to send more untracked American tax dollars to Ukraine, and

* Liberals try to protect their political power by brazenly opposing election integrity measures ... _**even going as far as trying to keep President Trump off the ballot!**_****

But thankfully, our majority acts as a backstop against Democrats running roughshod over our values, our wallets, our country, and our constitution.
**_
But Fellow Conservative,...all that goes away if we lose our majority in November’s election...and I would be lying to you if I told you that wasn’t a real possibility._**

As we head into the most important election in recent memory, our majority has recently shrunk from four to TWO.

**How did this happen?** Over the past couple of months there have been several Republican members of Congress who resigned or retired. Having such a slim majority puts us in a very precarious position going into an election year –and to be honest, we’re in real trouble right now, which is why I’m reaching out today.

[**Join The 2024 House Majority Taskforce
Add Your Name->
**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=97643bd9591745b2b7f065a67115de50&_e=E2BJJGxBIxBB5U8wnX_-j-Z0Ll_qs1BRslKDlvl4O8GO4ASPqaOTLMapec9jEifdibb5ytsnDz1a__VXwJ1N_YyR3xboeAzewtvL5-d-hGGH6AyFrgFjmPvYWemhIPkPjgNkKH3dv07V2ZCpvUuCEDJVNr9gKcNgtFVrcCSKNoqQGVe-C03YLUVGq1vU2rWU2EFiPVuQgzQGFSu4VsZFN7erBiIy4VSQhWHcjJorlUoQ6oqGkm1KJWpukjqDtD0B7_Ou_g11G7KdsGY21rwiize8XrTZciq255oHjV6oMaPwAei3zi16hX7-b3-wJiyQQIvcFl2mBHIB4Nvsl9MlSteRyW4F9GelT1cjjfidI26Y8urksh2JntK2Knsa6SnwRjgjHwzjFVdDdRAKr9fpUI9o0nP1ys5vmamOqrmAaiECCQtqGgzv0oTgfJUcolQN2EK3p8-mDs_vWzZWwe_U30cyLC5nSI1tvWyMswjcwv0g6RC--ZW8iyJf3MvwvdyTw1tvD312Z9KPQLEv8g8gsS9VIss722TPoKDlTiZplXo%3D)
[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=97643bd9591745b2b7f065a67115de50&_e=E2BJJGxBIxBB5U8wnX_-j-Z0Ll_qs1BRslKDlvl4O8GO4ASPqaOTLMapec9jEifdibb5ytsnDz1a__VXwJ1N_YyR3xboeAzewtvL5-d-hGGH6AyFrgFjmPvYWemhIPkPjgNkKH3dv07V2ZCpvUuCEDJVNr9gKcNgtFVrcCSKNoqQGVe-C03YLUVGq1vU2rWU2EFiPVuQgzQGFSu4VsZFN7erBiIy4VSQhWHcjJorlUoQ6oqGkm1KJWpukjqDtD0B7_Ou_g11G7KdsGY21rwiize8XrTZciq255oHjV6oMaPwAei3zi16hX7-b3-wJiyQQIvcFl2mBHIB4Nvsl9MlSteRyW4F9GelT1cjjfidI26Y8urksh2JntK2Knsa6SnwRjgjHwzjFVdDdRAKr9fpUB2KrJgw791HWKNwv7PDNQPolOHeCGiKMD2OTP1TcHF-318fTLDEua5D7KsW-wMlB447T2zM4VJi8nDHgMp7eIWAldgcKLqUiqUkvjVRsgJjNl4NQ53O-jHR1Xomt9pZZFaJdXttbAghUQ7j3E6wGGQ%3D)
It’s anyone’s guess right now as to how things will play out, but if I can tell you one thing it’s this: **if we lose control of the House and fail to retake the Senate, Republicans won’t be able to block Democrats from crushing our economy, diverting taxpayer money to their pet projects or stop them from prosecuting political opponents who dare to speak the truth!**

I’m certain Democrats will have all the money they’ll need in the fight to flip the House. But will Republicans? Democrats will turn in big numbers. That’s why we’re beginning the long, arduous process of identifying conservatives to help us hold onto our slim majority now.

Time is of the essence, and **[we need to know whether you’re on our team.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=97643bd9591745b2b7f065a67115de50&_e=E2BJJGxBIxBB5U8wnX_-j-Z0Ll_qs1BRslKDlvl4O8GO4ASPqaOTLMapec9jEifdibb5ytsnDz1a__VXwJ1N_YyR3xboeAzewtvL5-d-hGGH6AyFrgFjmPvYWemhIPkPjgNkKH3dv07V2ZCpvUuCEDJVNr9gKcNgtFVrcCSKNoqQGVe-C03YLUVGq1vU2rWU2EFiPVuQgzQGFSu4VsZFN7erBiIy4VSQhWHcjJorlUoQ6oqGkm1KJWpukjqDtD0B7_Ou_g11G7KdsGY21rwiize8XrTZciq255oHjV6oMaPwAei3zi16hX7-b3-wJiyQQIvcFl2mBHIB4Nvsl9MlSteRyW4F9GelT1cjjfidI26Y8urksh2JntK2Knsa6SnwRjgjHwzjFVdDdRAKr9fpUEdogTL8YppAnV-H79-7ieL_T5_MJuh2nQLKKaPWkM_nHTgaem7xTHTbW8n3EUu3PqMhu00XwpXEQWpMsDl4PlEbC3aj7c31VhwdGmiYM5xQcz4BWB5CaMSvd8_Qi_ywBX3ykiixXToBSKiSnYgK-hc%3D)**

We hope you will be among the first to **[sign up and signal your commitment](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=97643bd9591745b2b7f065a67115de50&_e=E2BJJGxBIxBB5U8wnX_-j-Z0Ll_qs1BRslKDlvl4O8GO4ASPqaOTLMapec9jEifdibb5ytsnDz1a__VXwJ1N_YyR3xboeAzewtvL5-d-hGGH6AyFrgFjmPvYWemhIPkPjgNkKH3dv07V2ZCpvUuCEDJVNr9gKcNgtFVrcCSKNoqQGVe-C03YLUVGq1vU2rWU2EFiPVuQgzQGFSu4VsZFN7erBiIy4VSQhWHcjJorlUoQ6oqGkm1KJWpukjqDtD0B7_Ou_g11G7KdsGY21rwiize8XrTZciq255oHjV6oMaPwAei3zi16hX7-b3-wJiyQQIvcFl2mBHIB4Nvsl9MlSteRyW4F9GelT1cjjfidI26Y8urksh2JntK2Knsa6SnwRjgjHwzjFVdDdRAKr9fpUKXb3g_4hfy9X2UWKy8Srpg6m2iME3lpvkzRgTy1w89aKb3ECRvC0lRv9POqzE5l7ek0QQPI3vCb2catoPGtQqEC0pDL93Py6rSlJKKMIjQrPiwOk0MYRX6stgqSDcSJlnz-UvPSoptKhnJoQ7_roXM%3D)** to holding onto our Republican majority in the House.

For Liberty,

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ef1adcc0112244808ca14f31b0e7f42d&_e=BsKrytdmX1-T0H8EviW6KeAV4AV-DhRP8dtnmtvhm-KDAnwWM5f_nP5l-JA9gjH2OEXkBulZoLJrgcvtDYPBuFyl0qPPzST-5L2uTJu394xvdL0ln0vUz-6D_BhBeH7Wt9TNth7ewaCbzjpDWYZhfF6sj2tXantDaAU8n2MYeNhQUgmjbVezpglfpdo_NHsrjbEyOxeFGf1NsA4esguDe6_0WcHgGavCgSJohJP-ntd2oseCsZ-Jhv_0Jb72AcxR6h1FmJWak2MydjbKtoCy7H603Pr-V4cIXuyrM_hGEHMQorrLRDA2PulTpFY2-vX-bJUFi_bpcn04tFJT40jwpRz38f7HouGHYad22OERfk5_3Fa625UmkWt1zOaKC7syIYnCdbUvI--05zvaYj98e1B0kYrJC80HSrKW7iSbyc9RtotvpwPvSSnjckVKzOOg)
---
| | Dear Friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ef1adcc0112244808ca14f31b0e7f42d&_e=BsKrytdmX1-T0H8EviW6KeAV4AV-DhRP8dtnmtvhm-KDAnwWM5f_nP5l-JA9gjH2OEXkBulZoLJrgcvtDYPBuFyl0qPPzST-5L2uTJu394xvdL0ln0vUz-6D_BhBeH7Wt9TNth7ewaCbzjpDWYZhfF6sj2tXantDaAU8n2MYeNhQUgmjbVezpglfpdo_NHsrjbEyOxeFGf1NsA4esguDe6_0WcHgGavCgSJohJP-ntd2oseCsZ-Jhv_0Jb72AcxR6h1FmJWak2MydjbKtoCy7H603Pr-V4cIXuyrM_hGEHOBJ7LwipC4UzvD8dBQosKiDsUPB0KQvcGi7xbStoYMkzmdbBIM0Q-MXzLmV2lCHMauO688-twKOgrGC34MbqYo_fr4sfmiv2rBwWa1IP8fG5-YA5JetUVvb2whWUaN0u643uSj2GzQs1DcrtFRCLKx)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ef1adcc0112244808ca14f31b0e7f42d&_e=BsKrytdmX1-T0H8EviW6KeAV4AV-DhRP8dtnmtvhm-KDAnwWM5f_nP5l-JA9gjH2OEXkBulZoLJrgcvtDYPBuFyl0qPPzST-5L2uTJu394xvdL0ln0vUz-6D_BhBeH7Wt9TNth7ewaCbzjpDWYZhfF6sj2tXantDaAU8n2MYeNhQUgmjbVezpglfpdo_NHsrjbEyOxeFGf1NsA4esguDe6_0WcHgGavCgSJohJP-ntd2oseCsZ-Jhv_0Jb72AcxR6h1FmJWak2MydjbKtoCy7H603Pr-V4cIXuyrM_hGEHMGD95K_mNRsf7baZIlXvcpwyctTJClTCZTxxCoBTGxC8t6BHonI6AJcZw9Fy7Hy5vGFDy_ym38us0l_xb1CA7LQXdJWMyt0dCz658c5FqJho-i0HibtqcqajlVgMzM8FWGjtFtyCKaYEANBREwG0Ep)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful DVD box set](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ef1adcc0112244808ca14f31b0e7f42d&_e=BsKrytdmX1-T0H8EviW6KeAV4AV-DhRP8dtnmtvhm-KDAnwWM5f_nP5l-JA9gjH2OEXkBulZoLJrgcvtDYPBuFyl0qPPzST-5L2uTJu394xvdL0ln0vUz-6D_BhBeH7Wt9TNth7ewaCbzjpDWYZhfF6sj2tXantDaAU8n2MYeNhQUgmjbVezpglfpdo_NHsrjbEyOxeFGf1NsA4esguDe6_0WcHgGavCgSJohJP-ntd2oseCsZ-Jhv_0Jb72AcxR6h1FmJWak2MydjbKtoCy7H603Pr-V4cIXuyrM_hGEHM4eAeaYp9lDBcGgjDixvmd_3sQSEe6mt-WQESXUqonlf6Z2QZYtmjLbJckiV-CgWR6lPEsXIDrGE-GCSo1irtuPHLvDNZ1NBOVCsVw1YPRiwZAzgaZY7swQ5SwDYp3z4ijG1jp7JHi0CsUdFRYBjQR).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Defend the Constitution
---
_PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=ef1adcc0112244808ca14f31b0e7f42d&_t=-XxVOnBcX2_o6U6sbgs8cUo7DyRV_T_9BQlRgtgeFLEI84PiL4Uu_IExTa25kxRKn-ET0GyNSMmqJad6--aV40IJ1JKNy9_4B7yGV85v1EKL0JJuHNPS62pBgsFC3qtav5nb40LC5rMEtjOKESm5rmtQBaR5Moz6-bktLDjQlCs%3D)

name: Combat Veteran Troy Downing
subject: These emails aren’t working anymore.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
I guess I had too high of hopes, and I was wrong.

| |
---
| | | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38476%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SktX4dsxNQfEgukMx0o9uQ&sysid=1)
---
These emails aren’t working anymore.

I guess I had too high of hopes, and I was wrong.

I was praying there’d be a bunch of Patriots like you who would have stepped up to help -_but it hasn’t happened._

**Friend, this is Troy Downing.** You don’t know me, but I’m emailing you today with a **[humbling final plea for your help.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38477%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dKamcP6OGg86JIi2%2f9JYkA&sysid=1 "humbling final plea for
your help.")**

**I’m a combat veteran. A God-fearing Christian. A husband and a proud dad.**

**[And I’m also the conservative Republican running for Congress in Montana in the biggest race on the map.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38478%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NO6R2oAw5K1VX%2fIO13UscQ&sysid=1 "And I’m also the
conservative Republican running for Congress in Montana in the biggest race on the
map.")**

**My plan is really simple:

_Tell the truth

Put America first

Have a backbone_**

But that’s exactly why Biden and the Radical Democrats will smear me and bring my candidacy to an end - **and they already have $100 MILLION ready to go.**

So, I’m just going to come out and say it: **[Will you have the heart to chip in just a few bucks to help me?](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38479%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Bd68IZ7NRPy6wcmpC0qybA&sysid=1 "Will you have the heart to
chip in just a few bucks to help me? ")**
---
| | [SUPPORT THIS COMBAT VET >> CHIP IN A FEW BUCKS](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38470%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MUZm6I6jgcDwPkTsCL1EAQ&sysid=1)
---
It might not seem like a small contribution will matter but trust me - it’s the only thing that will save my campaign. **I’m not looking for anything big,[just a few bucks if you can.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38471%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NF17DN9vKbF%2bM%2fzH2UOk0w&sysid=1 "just a few bucks if you
can. ")**

**If I can win this, it’ll be an absolutely humiliating defeat for Joe Biden.**

**[What do you say, Friend- will you help a combat vet like me beat Biden and the Democrat machine?](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38472%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=V0O3VPdWNP2PgOK%2b3lW%2bAg&sysid=1 "What do you say, Friend
– will you help a combat vet like me beat Biden and the Democrat
machine? ")**

Your support would mean the world to me.
---
| | [SUPPORT TROY DOWNING](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38473%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6%2fTAIlLAgMgCSV%2fncjEUPQ&sysid=1)

Thank you and God Bless,

Troy Downing
Conservative Veteran

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: The truth is, no one knows for certain
body:
Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zql23031m54pvbeojj2nehot01tptj7d9qfrgkc0_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c1j68o31c3h2bs)
---
Hello Friend,

Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return.

That's the heart of Revelation.

Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness.

Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead.

It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near.

This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey.

Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ.

When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence.

As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King.

In my brand-new book, _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into:

1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist?
2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event?
3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture?
4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance?
5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem?

Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure.

In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative.
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zu9vmia2pnn72has0qkkh5qkkicfjjh9bpfrcfqg_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c1j68o31c3h2bs)I would like to send you my brand-new book _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_.
Make your generous gift here: [https://secure.ptv.org/mysteries-of-the-end-times-generous-gift-1-dr-robert-jeffress](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqcba5jdpe19ffmi7q70m77tcuf5h88rger1ddh0_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c1j68o31c3h2bs)

_Pathway to Victory_ is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support.

May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus.

Sharing the Truth of God's Word, ____
---
| | Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas
---

Trump Train News
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zo6q2jrplhqmkvugvlhg33f5tab363vvpd6q9g08_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8oj6chge9o3246h22sh2s8i6eo33c1j68o31c3h2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhd2pcrsla1285omip8gh16lhgvs8sp87tnq1l1o_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c1j68o31c3h2bs)_

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqg4uq1m9e558o823l4jl6ofoq5rd68ma5u1j690_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c1j68o31c3h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

Friend,

Crime is increasing across the country, and states with governors who are tough on crime can greatly aid in the resolution of this issue. Each and every American deserves to feel safe in their home, their neighborhood, their school, and their place of work.

Our team is collecting answers to a simple question today.
**Would you be more likely to vote for a governor who is tough on crime, backs the blue, and keeps dangerous criminals in jail?**

Thomas G. West, professor of politics at Hillsdale College, is one of the great scholars and teachers of the American Founding.

That's why we're so excited to offer a course that explains his core teachings about the American Founding, **which is now available on DVD.**

In this course, Dr. West sits down with David Azerrad, his former student and current professor at Hillsdale's Graduate School of Government, to reveal the truth about the American Founding. |
### What students are saying
"I appreciate the brevity of explanation and new information in a way I hadn't known or realized myself. The quizzes are helpful. Having two teachers converse brings an interesting perspective." **- Darlena** "It helps put into context the thinking of our founders at that time. That's very important and misunderstood by so many people today!" **- Robert**
---|---

As Dr. West explains, the Founders' political theory is so foreign to Americans today--even to scholars and teachers of American history and politics--that the task of uncovering the truth about the Founding is like unearthing something from a "deep and long-forgotten pit."

This course goes about this task by examining the actual words and actions of the Founders, and it brings their theory to life by comparing it to the dominant views of contemporary America.

The result is an exciting and often surprising account of how the Founders established a free government in America and what they thought was necessary to sustain it.

As you know, our online courses are free. That's why we depend on the generosity of people like you to help us share the course with as many people as possible.

Would you consider making a tax-deductible donation to help promote this course?

And now, for any donation of $100 or more, you will receive this beautiful DVD box set for **" The Real American Founding: A Conversation,"** by clicking the link below.

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/real-american-founding-dvd](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=49347d9fe99242f5a90e2c8a16582aea&_e=bZVxhQ9FuW1HCtsj0qJ6dFE3mQ_DbbyQms8msUX7R3255veatpV5_zIzEvUrLu3fT6tkvWYNSggaq789cv9dh3kYsQUlDfzGX6Su_Hxp3q9-x0otyqqxxmagPeeijonMCKVCwOnkT9_bBHsGhIUfPHx5ipc8CIP83iYiAqhC4TbVHB_u4RhE0FBPSoJLauIriXA-nLiOUtHPdoqIFG2bBWxlNYZkgV5jOFS9sBHEgpzPjoAq7qfGUmCZKPQvfC1XTDyxpAiQqQSkxlVfBO8uz2bwA63cYTGHRaFa1YjIvnVCuqZcJHTfuB_58D7jRI3Ve4Wyo9QyT8YQJOg5ku4b9bmGRQ9DFME5Q1-6YOv_KT800GBOLwPRpm4S4lA56Kgw47FxnFrnBEaBbQnFccOUprsQ38okPtT6ljfPCiH2O9H_ZgZYy-wuwxIUzFA3722D)

I hope you'll join us in this fun and important work of sharing the truth about the American Founding with your fellow Americans.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09

making a plan to move forward without Boeing after the manufacturing
company grounded its MAX 9 planes, according to CNBC. Boeing has
suffered a series of problems in the last several weeks after multiple

name: Team Kennedy
subject: Help RFK Jr. Hold Dr. Fauci Accountable
disclaimer_text: paid for by taxpayers for nearly 100 years, on the brink of insolvency
body:
Dr. Fauci’s policies crushed middle-and working-class American families.

|
---
| | | **Dr. Fauci’s policies crushed middle-and working-class American families.
**
---
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fauci_1_23_24_email_2rs_1_nd&n=1)
|
---
Dear Peter,
It's bordering on criminal the way our medical establishment and public health experts are ignoring vaccine injuries and the newly-emerging long-term vaccine side effects.
On top of the health agency pile is none other than Dr. Anthony Fauci, whose misdeeds, injustice, and crimes Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. willingly exposed time and time again.
You may remember in early 2000 when Dr. Fauci shook hands with Bill Gates in the library of Gates’s $147 million Seattle mansion, cementing a Pharma-Fauci-Gates partnership that would aim to control _a very profitable $60 billion global vaccine enterprise_ forced on us by the U.S. federal government.
And for those of us brave enough to call out Dr. Fauci, CNN’s television doctor Peter Hotez called for expanded “hate-crime” legislation to make criticizing Dr. Fauci a felony.
You and I were doxxed by the mainstream media, deplatformed by social media, and put on a government watch list.
The reality is: Dr. Anthony Fauci dictated a series of policies that resulted in the most deaths—one of the highest percentage COVID-19 body counts of any nation on the planet—and his actions earned him the highest government salary in the USA.
While Dr. Fauci, Gates, and their pals in Big Pharma cashed in, their anti-science lockdowns and mask mandates put 58 million Americans out of work and shuttered 41% of Black-owned businesses. Globally, over 300 million humans fell into dire poverty, and 93,000 Americans died of drug overdoses in 2020—a 30% increase over 2019.
Dr. Fauci’s policies put Social Security and Medicare, earned benefit programs paid for by taxpayers for nearly 100 years, on the brink of insolvency.
**Dr. Fauci’s policies crushed middle- and working-class American families and the American dream of home ownership—and single-handedly ended any faith we once had in our nation’s health agencies.**
In fact, a new poll found that 53% of American adults believe Covid-19 vaccines may be to blame for many unexplained deaths, and nearly one in four say someone they know could be among the victims.
**And our opponents for the presidency, Joe Biden and Donald Trump, are complicit in Dr. Fauci’s crimes.**
>>>>> Joe Biden and Donald Trump stood idly by, doing nothing as Dr. Fauci destroyed lives and the economy.
>>>>> Joe Biden and Donald Trump endorsed Dr. Fauci time and time again, abdicating any leadership that Americans entrusted to them.
>>>>> And to date, neither Joe Biden nor Donald Trump have called Dr. Fauci to account for his historic crimes against millions of people worldwide.
_Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. never endorsed Dr. Fauci or his “Operation Warp Speed” vaccine plan._
_Unlike Biden and Trump, Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. will hold Dr. Fauci accountable for his crimes._
To help make RFK, Jr.’s Presidential campaign victorious in November and restore power to the people—and to hold those in authority accountable for their actions—we need to hear from you.
We're falling short of our monthly goal and need your support to bridge the gap. Any amount you can give will help us achieve the 100% participation we need to sustain the incredible momentum we’ve built together!
First and foremost, we must ensure RFK, Jr.'s name is on the ballot in all 50 states.
While the candidates from the two major parties are automatically on the ballot, we face a different challenge. To secure our spot, we need to mobilize a 50-state ground game, _and this effort comes with a price tag of $18 million_.
**Your financial support is the lifeblood of our campaign.[Every dollar brings us closer to securing ballot access and reaching our monthly goal.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fauci_1_23_24_email_2rs_1_nd&n=2)**

name: Special Election Update (via DLCC.org)
subject: MI + NH + PA + You »
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DLCC PAC
body:
We’re gearing up to face majority-defining special elections in Michigan, New Hampshire, and Pennsylvania. These elections are not just about winning seats; they're about safeguarding our democracy. | | |
---
| |
---|---
**Here at the DLCC, we’re gearing up to face majority-defining special elections in Michigan, New Hampshire, and Pennsylvania.** These elections are not just about winning seats; they're about safeguarding our democracy, and if we want any chance of continuing last year’s winning streak of over _30 special election wins_ , we need your support. 📍**In Pennsylvania,** the House is TIED 101-101. The upcoming special election is _crucial_ to defending Democratic control. Extreme Republicans are itching for payback, so we can’t afford to lose _a single seat._ 📍 **In Michigan** last year, our Democratic trifecta repealed an archaic abortion ban and safeguarded abortion rights. Now, the House is TIED 54-54, and our trifecta is at risk. With _two_ special elections later this year, it’s _imperative_ that we win _both_ specials if we want to protect our majority. 📍 **In New Hampshire,** the Republican majority is as thin as it gets. We’re only four seats away from FLIPPING the House, making right now the perfect opportunity to tip the scales in our favor. And your $7 donation could be the deciding factor in whether our Dems _win_ or _lose._ **These races will set the tone for our upcoming elections this year. The upcoming special election is crucial to defending Democratic control. Extreme Republicans are itching for payback, so we can’t afford to lose a single seat. 📍 In Michigan last year, our Democratic trifecta repealed an archaic abortion ban and safeguarded abortion rights. Now, the House is TIED 54-54, and our trifecta is at risk. With two special elections later this year, it’s imperative that we win both specials if we want to protect our majority. 📍 In New Hampshire, the Republican majority is as thin as it gets. We’re only four seats away from FLIPPING the House, making right now the perfect opportunity to tip the scales in our favor. And your $7 donation could be the deciding factor in whether our Dems win or lose. These races will set the tone for our upcoming elections this year. body:
# [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77567089/450828221/18334046?refcode=UTS_FR_90DO_240123_2_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY3MGFhM2VmLWYyYjktZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzg0OCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=N1ekfeG6ZHEZ_vLsU-d-rj9jzxQ4NPTXPILSzkDnr1M=)
Peter,
The risk we're facing ahead of Election Day is daunting: **MAGA Republicans are gaining ground, not just in Congress, but all the way to the White House.** The progress we've strived for and achieved over the last four years is _dangerously_ close to being undone.
We've come so far together:
✅ Strengthening our economy with sustainable growth.
✅ Expanding health care access and lowering prescription costs.
✅ Advancing crucial climate action and clean energy initiatives.
✅ Upholding and expanding reproductive care.

| Dear Supporter,
Please join me at 5:30 pm on February 15th at 80 Main Banquet Hall in Lockport and help kick off our 2024 campaign for State Senate.
It is my great honor to seek another term representing the folks of Senate District 62 in Albany. One thing is very clear, New Yorkers have had enough of a downstate radical activist dominated legislature that finds new ways to divide and destroy our state every day.
Our fight for common sense and accountability in Albany would not be possible without your support, and I can't wait to share our vision for 2024 with you in Lockport.
You can RSVP online here: [www.robortt.com/2024](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WBgboXFD13SpRzjnfyC0fNzivhWsIDk8M7r1AsrKAIWmqnTUdNPJmBTiJxRyfMC053J039th-7vxfBT-U-TsSSS4v6c8PVbuAQFbpJ9CupUzmuRKV1Yc3hVbXiW3-G1MuzpzPYaK73zoyQJdDm6teoLcOUXmg8yO0DCOziKvcnlPPYOa4-4_HyRDbubylhoy&c=L7gE4dTAAS7aoV28qXiAJrdIy2XGxlpuFNo77bHWFqFz-giBkhCU2g==&ch=ej9rucTU9Beo_n3lbgk_NVoKNNvGyKcfnn8Rh54gUUKHxilwxVUcag==) or email [finance@robortt.com](mailto:finance@robortt.com).
Thank you for your continued support!

clean_body: OFFICIAL INVITE: Please join us and help kick off the 2024 Campaign with Team Ortt! | | | | | | == | Dear Supporter, Please join me at 5:30 pm on February 15th at 80 Main Banquet Hall in Lockport and help kick off our 2024 campaign for State Senate. It is my great honor to seek another term representing the folks of Senate District 62 in Albany. One thing is very clear, New Yorkers have had enough of a downstate radical activist dominated legislature that finds new ways to divide and destroy our state every day. Our fight for common sense and accountability in Albany would not be possible without your support, and I can't wait to share our vision for 2024 with you in Lockport. You can RSVP online here: == or email mailto:finance@robortt.com. Thank you for your continued support! | | == | == | | == | | | Can't make it? name: =?utf-8?Q?Kevin=20Dellicker?=
subject: Dellicker Campaign Update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KEVIN DELLICKER FOR CONGRESS
body:
22 Days of Candidate Petitions Start Today |
---
| | [ ](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=d28c06f9c3&e=1090c5c412)
---
|
---
| Dear Friends and Neighbors,

Twenty-two. That’s how old I was when I graduated from college. It’s the route number of the busiest highway in the Lehigh Valley. And it’s the title of a song by Taylor Swift. It’s also the number of days my campaign has to gather enough signatures to get me on the ballot.

For the next three weeks, more than 100 volunteers will be helping me collect 1,000 signatures from registered Republicans in PA’s 7th District. It’s humbling to have that kind of help, and it’s a ton of work. But it’s also one of the best parts about running for Congress. I get to meet hundreds of new people face-to-face from all parts of Carbon, Lehigh, Monroe, and Northampton counties.

During the next 22 days, I’ll be in dozens of places to gather signatures and talk with voters. The first week's activities are listed below under "Upcoming Events." I’ll meet firefighters, police, and veterans. I’ll visit schools, churches, and sportsman’s clubs. And I’ll be knocking on doors in all four counties.

My campaign is a big tent, and there's room for people with all kinds of backgrounds. It doesn’t matter if you’re young or old, rural or urban, rich or poor. If you love your country and your neighbor, if you want safe communities, good jobs, and strong families, if you respect the U.S. Constitution and value your freedoms, there's a place for you in my campaign.

I’m offering authentic, conservative, and effective leadership that’s in touch with local voters. That’s in contrast to Susan Wild and all the other career politicians who are neither authentic, nor conservative, nor effective.

Thank you to all my volunteers and team members who are working so hard to win this election. My family and I truly appreciate your support. If you would like to circulate a petition, I could use your help please. Just click on this link ([here](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=79942e6bb8&e=1090c5c412)) or email Michelle ([michelle@dellickerforcongress.com](mailto:michelle@dellickerforcongress.com)) and we’ll contact you to get started. Regardless, I hope to see you out and about in the next 22 days.

**Keep America Free.**

_Kevin Dellicker is a Republican from Heidelberg Township, Lehigh County, running for U.S. House of Representatives in Pa.’s 7th District. He is a 28-year military veteran, technology company owner, husband and father to three sons. He’s not a career politician. He’s a proven leader with the experience and courage to Keep America Free. Learn more at[www.dellickerforcongress.com](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=391ad113d7&e=1090c5c412)._
---
| |
---
| Get involved with Kevin Dellicker for Congress and help Keep America Free!

**Please consider volunteering and/or making a campaign donation.**
---
| [DONATE](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=78c68b3dee&e=1090c5c412 "DONATE")
---
| [VOLUNTEER](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=7e7d5e83ba&e=1090c5c412 "VOLUNTEER")
---
| If you wish to contribute by check, please mail it to Kevin Dellicker for Congress, P.O. Box 86, Germansville, PA 18053. Please write your employer and profession on the check to comply with federal campaign finance laws.

**Learn more about Kevin's campaign at[www.dellickerforcongress.com](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=44c540d9ea&e=1090c5c412). **

Thank you!
---
|
---
|
---
**ENDORSED BY REP. LOU BARLETTA**
| I am honored to receive the endorsement from Rep. Lou Barletta, former Congressman, Mayor of Hazleton, and statewide candidate. Lou Barletta was effective because he never lost touch with his neighbors who sent him to Washington. That’s a lesson I’ll remember when I get to Congress.

**"Kevin is no career politician. I’ve seen too often people who say they want to be elected to fix the problems in Washington and then they become the problem. Kevin Dellicker won’t get caught up in that."**
**– Rep. Lou Barletta**

Read the full release [here](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=e1bdc3205b&e=1090c5c412).
---
|
---
| **UPCOMING EVENTS**
Our campaign is in high gear as petitions are underway. For up-to-date events and details, please check our campaign Facebook page regularly.
* **Petition Kickoff, New Tripoli** \- 23-Jan, 4-7 PM | Olde Homestead Golf Club, 6598 Route 309, New Tripoli
* **West End Republican Club, Kresgeville** \- 23-Jan, 7-8:30 PM | Cherry's Family Restaurant, 593 Interchange Road, Kresgeville
* **Monroe County Republican Women** \- 24-Jan, 5:30-6:30 PM | Pinebrook Bible Camp 5539 Pinebrook Rd, East Stroudsburg
* **In the Community- Pen Argyl** \- 24-Jan | Pen Argyl
* **In the Community - Allentown** \- 25-Jan | Allentown
* **In the Community - Slatington** \- 25-Jan | Slatington
* **In the Community - Bethlehem** \- 25-Jan | Bethlehem
* **Meet and Greet - Villa Lentini, Schnecksville** \- 26-Jan, 6-8 PM | Villa Lentini Restaurant, Schnecksville
* **Meet and Greet - Archery Addictions, Lehighton** \- 27-Jan, 10 AM-Noon | Archery Addictions, 400 Interchange Road, Lehighton
* **Meet and Greet- PA Innovation Leadership Fund, Bethlehem** \- 27-Jan, 4-6 PM | Adagio's Seafood 530 Pembroke Road, Bethlehem
* **In the Community- Bethlehem- 27-Jan | Bethlehem **
* **Petition Signing - Retriever Brewing, Orefield** \- 28-Jan, Noon - 3:30 PM | Retriever Brewing Company, 2844 Township Line Road, Orefield
* **Meet and Greet - Slatington Farmers Market** \- 28-Jan, 2-4 PM | Slatington Farmers Market, 8281 PA-873, Slatington
* **In the Community- Palmerton- 29-Jan | Palmerton **
* **Meet and Greet - Sapore Pizza, Lehighton** \- 29-Jan, 6:30-8:30 PM | Sapore Restaurant, 99 East Bridge Street, Lehighton
* **Petition Signing - Lehigh County Republican Committee, Allentown** \- 30-Jan, 6-8 PM | Hops at the Paddock, 1945 West Columbia Street, Allentown

For additional information about upcoming events, please check the campaign [website](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=f24f5fa637&e=1090c5c412) or email [michelle@dellickerforcongress.com](mailto:https://www.pavoterservices.pa.gov/Pages/PollingPlaceInfo.aspx?subject=Events).

Follow us on Facebook: [https://www.facebook.com/KevinDellickerforCongress](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=ef5e1e165e&e=1090c5c412)
---
|
---
| Last week, my team and I focused on preparing for petitions. I spoke with Republican committee members in Carbon and Lehigh counties, who are doing good work to elect qualified, conservative candidates. I met with local church leaders, who are doing God's work in our communities. And I had a busy week with my regular job, completing another big project to improve broadband infrastructure and save taxpayers money. If you would like to help with petitions or volunteer, please email [michelle@dellickerforcongress.com](mailto:michelle@dellickerforcongress.com). Thank you!
---
|
---
|
---

Kevin Dellicker for Congress1400 N Providence Rd Ste 1040Media, PA 19063-2079
[Add us to your address book](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/vcard?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=d572757edc)

You can [update your preferences](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/profile?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=d572757edc&e=1090c5c412&c=35a420a609) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=d572757edc&e=1090c5c412&c=35a420a609).

| | | It's hard to express how utterly humiliated we feel at this moment.

Democrats in their attempt to sabotage our elections rallied millions of their supporters in favor of ERASING Voter ID laws across the country.

_**In response, Republicans started our own petition to protect these laws and ensure every election in the country is safe and secure.**_

But the number of responses we got was embarrassing... and the defeat we may face in the next election because of it will be even more heartbreaking.

But we've got another chance, Friend. This fight is too crucial and our election integrity is too important to quit. **[So we're asking ONE FINAL TIME: will you sign the petition and help us secure our elections right here and now?](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zh6guu3hp674lrbc4ur72g41j0i6c9a6h8hq6q00_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c1j66ob4cjh2bs "So we’re asking ONE FINAL TIME: will you sign the petition and help us secure our elections right here and now?")**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Niki=20Conforti?=
subject: Our Rights Are Slipping Away!
body:
Our Rights Are Slipping Away! | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/931efe9b4144/conforti-for-congress-8394828?e=25f4fa3311)
---
| | |
---
| | | Dear Peter,

It started with our right to bear arms and then our right to free speech, and now our right to worship. Our religious freedoms are evaporating before our eyes!

Whether you exercise your religious freedoms or not, it is hard to dispute the attack on Christians that is permeating our society. References to Jesus, and in many cases God himself, are being erased from our schools, from media platforms, and from print materials. Shockingly, NBC recently edited out the Houston Texans' quarterback's references to Jesus when commenting on a playoff win.

The effects of this are far-reaching and devastating to the moral compass of society. The drop-off in church attendance and the rise in crime, gambling and drugs is not a coincidence.

This country was founded on religious freedom, and people have the right to choose to worship as they see fit - and publicly express it.

The atheist, Sean Casten, is a promoter of the degradation of religious freedoms. According to a DuPage Policy Journal article dated Oct. 14, 2020, Casten has gone so far as to say that religion is for "scoundrels" and repeatedly mocks legislators that refer to the Bible.

Casten is working against the people of the 6th Congressional District - and against all Americans. Once I am in Congress, I will work to protect our inalienable rights, including Religious Freedom. It is time to remove the radical Casten and protect Americans.

Stay Safe! Stay Strong!

Can you help support the Conforti for Congress campaign's efforts to beat Casten? Your contribution will go a long way in helping us win! You can click the link below to make a donation today.

[](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=f5e52b4c79&e=25f4fa3311)

Your support is greatly appreciated.
---
| Thank you,

Niki Conforti
Candidate
Illinois 6th Congressional District
---
| PS: Follow my campaign on [Facebook](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=c968125dbe&e=25f4fa3311), [Twitter](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=e12f6518f0&e=25f4fa3311), and [Instagram](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=6cf6b1dfc3&e=25f4fa3311)!

Fellow Conservative,

It’s Senator Chuck Grassley reaching out because I need a favor.

**Former Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy is running against one of Chuck Schumer’s foot soldiers in the Senate who votes to deliver the Biden-Harris agenda of open borders and big government spending that fuels the fires of inflation. And Tim needs OUR HELP to win.**

You see, Jon Tester has successfully tricked the people of Montana into sending him to Washington on their behalf since 2006. How, I don’t know. Because his views are not at all in line with the views of voters in Montana – heck, he’d have a real easy time being elected in Oregon, California, or Massachusetts.

**Let’s put an end to Democrats representing conservative states in the U.S. Senate.** If you cannot read to the end of this note, please click this link to donate to defeat Jon Tester before closing your browser.

name: Michelle Vallejo
subject: Are you ready to join the fight for a better future for ALL of us?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michelle Vallejo for Congress
body:
I am running for Congress to represent TX-15.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77570564/450835766/-1345170518?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDUzMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDU4ZjQzMS1mOWI5LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM4NDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h62Qk5Akymbrrz_RzCax1GP3HdGXXPrpfH7RZl6Gi_M=&emci=552cf663-f8ab-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=2458f431-f9b9-ee11-bea1-002248223848&ceid=19195699)
Hola Peter, I am running for Congress to represent TX-15.
In just a bit, I’m going to ask you to become a founding donor to our campaign. But first, I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I’m jumping into this race.
I come from a big family of immigrants, farm workers and entrepreneurs. My parents, immigrants who made their way to the Rio Grande Valley from Mexico, did a little bit of everything to make ends meet. But running Pulga (flea market) Los Portales, serving thousands of our community members on a weekly basis and helping dozens of working-class entrepreneurs start their businesses, defined my family's values — our South Texan values.
But my life changed forever when I was in college. While at Columbia University, after years of fighting multiple sclerosis, my mother took her last breath at just 46 years old. It was then I decided the best way to honor her legacy is to fight for a better future for my family.
To fight for a better future for ALL of us — including you, Peter.
Every day, I see how hard the people of South Texas work just to scrape by. At our family’s pulga, dozens of vendors come each week, hoping to make enough to put food on the table. They are the overlooked emprendedores who make our community strong.
I’m working for stronger and healthier neighborhoods in TX-15 and I have a plan to make this happen.
It starts with fighting for quality affordable healthcare, protecting workers, providing good-paying jobs and a thriving economy, protecting women’s reproductive rights — and that’s just the beginning.
**[But to accomplish all of this, I need your help to jumpstart this campaign and put us in the best possible position as we launch this campaign. Can you make a contribution and become a founding donor today? What we are able to raise in these early days will be our first chance to show the state — and our opponents — just how much grassroots power we have.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77570565/450835767/1640391652?refcode=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDUzMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDU4ZjQzMS1mOWI5LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM4NDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h62Qk5Akymbrrz_RzCax1GP3HdGXXPrpfH7RZl6Gi_M=)**
**[Become a founding donor](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77570566/450835768/1640391652?refcode=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDUzMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDU4ZjQzMS1mOWI5LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM4NDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h62Qk5Akymbrrz_RzCax1GP3HdGXXPrpfH7RZl6Gi_M=)**
We’re at a critical moment for the future of South Texas. In South Texas, Monica De La Cruz makes a lot of promises to us, la gente. But in Congress, her record tells a different story. Her budget bill makes devastating cuts, from slashing veterans’ health care to taking away millions from our schools, and even jeopardizing Medicare and Social Security.
What’s more, she’d let the government interfere in women’s private medical decisions and take away our freedoms.
She wants to distract us with extremist issues in hopes that we won’t notice how badly her policies are hurting our communities. And, more importantly, so that we won’t notice how powerful we can be if we all come together to fight for a better world.
South Texas needs an advocate — no a una politica vendida.
I’m not afraid of the fight ahead because I’ve been underestimated and questioned before. Time and time again while growing up, I dealt with questions about why I spoke Spanglish, or why I mixed English and Spanish, about how I wore my curly hair and whether it looked too frizzy or if it was professional enough.
But instead of letting that change me, I chose to proudly represent my roots through my education and work. It’s why I decided to return to the Rio Grande Valley and get to work.
And it’s something I’ll continue in this fight to become your next Congresswoman of TX-15.
¡Vamos Por Quince!
Michelle Vallejo

clean_body: I am running for Congress to represent TX-15. Hola Peter, I am running for Congress to represent TX-15. In just a bit, I’m going to ask you to become a founding donor to our campaign. But first, I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I’m jumping into this race. I come from a big family of immigrants, farm workers and entrepreneurs. My parents, immigrants who made their way to the Rio Grande Valley from Mexico, did a little bit of everything to make ends meet. But running Pulga (flea market) Los Portales, serving thousands of our community members on a weekly basis and helping dozens of working-class entrepreneurs start their businesses, defined my family's values — our South Texan values. But my life changed forever when I was in college. While at Columbia University, after years of fighting multiple sclerosis, my mother took her last breath at just 46 years old. It was then I decided the best way to honor her legacy is to fight for a better future for my family. To fight for a better future for ALL of us — including you, Peter. Every day, I see how hard the people of South Texas work just to scrape by. At our family’s pulga, dozens of vendors come each week, hoping to make enough to put food on the table. They are the overlooked emprendedores who make our community strong. I’m working for stronger and healthier neighborhoods in TX-15 and I have a plan to make this happen. It starts with fighting for quality affordable healthcare, protecting workers, providing good-paying jobs and a thriving economy, protecting women’s reproductive rights — and that’s just the beginning. = = We’re at a critical moment for the future of South Texas. In South Texas, Monica De La Cruz makes a lot of promises to us, la gente. But in Congress, her record tells a different story. Her budget bill makes devastating cuts, from slashing veterans’ health care to taking away millions from our schools, and even jeopardizing Medicare and Social Security. What’s more, she’d let the government interfere in women’s private medical decisions and take away our freedoms. She wants to distract us with extremist issues in hopes that we won’t notice how badly her policies are hurting our communities. And, more importantly, so that we won’t notice how powerful we can be if we all come together to fight for a better world. South Texas needs an advocate — no a una politica vendida. I’m not afraid of the fight ahead because I’ve been underestimated and questioned before. Time and time again while growing up, I dealt with questions about why I spoke Spanglish, or why I mixed English and Spanish, about how I wore my curly hair and whether it looked too frizzy or if it was professional enough. But instead of letting that change me, I chose to proudly represent my roots through my education and work. It’s why I decided to return to the Rio Grande Valley and get to work. And it’s something I’ll continue in this fight to become your next Congresswoman of TX-15. ¡Vamos Por Quince! I won't sugarcoat it. This is the single most difficult race in America. I can't do it without you. **[That's why I am counting on you to rush in your GARVEY FOR SENATE campaign R.S.V.P. of $35 today.](http://links.electionsupdates.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=3fc61bf092b64b58bf6a536721f93e14&_e=AJLDYfaFDR6q5KFelxut50b7CvsJSIJSVc7QS_z0nbZJHtFbN5bstWl26iI_HjTm7gjOTejqquDalyFl5MZUN7El6nKziZnrvGG4C9AY5P75A9NsFOhpF6uETpDCFgHkDiJ3-TvB_9180wow7zH5JqQ-ngjh_fUaxX-Fwn2vmCnuFUN8CScPZMAKwUlFMsMBwhhoKoGEPKnDgwuKVBh6juLG4imH6CBU0JhgxK7E13Aak0Nxq-WdPLcvOgLi-GLDqvotroDjTPAtgcvrP0hbE1UWN9cTAcVF5ZGX2mskxv_0UCSOMaKxJH0MTH0OYeaLCpxej7JqvI5vo1rHL-vAwTFluuOhZ3vlDZ0pzMhNlyvwxuLfQemBo9KATGq3rUi-UjQjNF7i7gE1Y9wj3xmIIA%3D%3D)** Here's the thing. As it now stands, 100% of Californians are being forced to live with:
---
• Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California. • Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don't lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction.
---
That's what led me to enter this race. **[And that's why I'm urging you to join me by rushing me your GARVEY FOR SENATE Campaign R.S.V.P. without delay.](http://links.electionsupdates.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=3fc61bf092b64b58bf6a536721f93e14&_e=AJLDYfaFDR6q5KFelxut50b7CvsJSIJSVc7QS_z0nbZJHtFbN5bstWl26iI_HjTm7gjOTejqquDalyFl5MZUN7El6nKziZnrvGG4C9AY5P75A9NsFOhpF6uETpDCFgHkDiJ3-TvB_9180wow7zH5JqQ-ngjh_fUaxX-Fwn2vmCnuFUN8CScPZMAKwUlFMsMBwhhoKoGEPKnDgwuKVBh6juLG4imH6CBU0JhgxK7E13Bcl_xvq2Dxfm7eaMnz_eZgTQHMmPRKsSkM03ugVN042rlPR6dsiL2W3YSemGm9VpDcC-40Iz5LYhJd6OeBnAE-Jq534_SkVkSO8J-UMAZu0SxKYuM6WgL18Zc1xLNz3WmXE7ZIVQlt8KzUPNCAxaEFEO7BomaQUMqq0Mfhdth5mQ%3D%3D)** I get up every day and ask God to give me the strength to make a difference in people's lives. This really gets to heart of why I'm running... You see, the same dream and the same opportunity I was given is fading. It's fading all across America. But it's fading at an even faster pace right here in California. I pray you'll stand with me today.

Steve Garvey Republican for United States Senate

**MY VISION**
---
My campaign is focused on quality-of-life issues, public safety, and education. As your U.S. Senator, I will serve with commonsense, compassion, and will work to build consensus to benefit all of the people of California. I've been fortunate to wear many hats in life - from professional athlete to businessman to philanthropist. But the one thing that has remained consistent is my love for this great state and my desire to make a difference. In baseball, it's not about the individual; it's about the team. I believe the same holds true for politics. It's time we come together, find common ground, and work towards a brighter future.

Democrats were already facing one of the worst Senate maps in recent memory this year: We have to defend 23 seats — nearly half of our caucus — including in tough states like Ohio, Montana, and Nevada.
But it's gotten even worse for Democrats: Sen. Joe Manchin announced he will not seek re-election. Now, his critical seat in West Virginia is all but guaranteed to flip red. Even if we still defend every other seat up for grabs, Senate control would still be split 50-50.
**That's why flipping Florida blue is our ONLY viable option to guarantee a blue Senate this November.**
Thankfully, Democrats have some good news from the Sunshine State: Experts rank Rick Scott as one of the top ten most vulnerable senators on the ballot this year. **He only won this seat by 0.12% — just 10,033 votes. And that narrow victory cost him $64 MILLION of his own fortune. Now, his approval numbers are TANKING, and polling data shows that Debbie has pulled one point AHEAD of him!**
Debbie is a proven, trusted leader who's already flipped a tough seat from red to blue. She's got what it takes to win in November — _but only if she has strong grassroots resources to compete with Scott's massive fortune_**.**[**So please, if you care AT ALL about saving our Senate majority, will you rush $5 before midnight to invest in flipping Florida blue and stopping MAGA extremists from retaking power in Washington?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77574478/450849701/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk612-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjg4NDhmOTMtZmNiOS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzODQ4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JWPPauBJDvg1WPZv3cslI2NJTnP2Brg19sxmi_qae8g=)

Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. clean_body: everything that we care about is on the line | | | Friend, the next presidential inauguration is less than a year away — and the stakes couldn't be higher. Polls show that the race for the White House is neck and neck. With control of Washington up for grabs and everything that we care about on the line, defending our Senate majority has never been more important. But experts are warning that Republicans have a "clear path" to flipping the Senate red! In a year like this one, playing defense will not be enough to stop the GOP from taking control. The only way to guarantee a blue Senate is by flipping Florida blue. Rick Scott has never been more vulnerable, and Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is giving us a huge opportunity to defeat him. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Democrats were already facing one of the worst Senate maps in recent memory this year: We have to defend 23 seats — nearly half of our caucus — including in tough states like Ohio, Montana, and Nevada. But it's gotten even worse for Democrats: Sen. Joe Manchin announced he will not seek re-election. Now, his critical seat in West Virginia is all but guaranteed to flip red. Even if we still defend every other seat up for grabs, Senate control would still be split 50-50. That's why flipping Florida blue is our ONLY viable option to guarantee a blue Senate this November. Thankfully, Democrats have some good news from the Sunshine State: Experts rank Rick Scott as one of the top ten most vulnerable senators on the ballot this year. He only won this seat by 0.12% — just 10,033 votes. And that narrow victory cost him $64 MILLION of his own fortune. Now, his approval numbers are TANKING, and polling data shows that Debbie has pulled one point AHEAD of him! Debbie is a proven, trusted leader who's already flipped a tough seat from red to blue. She's got what it takes to win in November — but only if she has strong grassroots resources to compete with Scott's massive fortune.= | | = Thank you, Team DMP | * | | | = Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Statistically, I shouldn’t even be here.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
But I had a lot of help over the years. And if we win this race it’ll be because I had the support of people like you.
#

Peter, I’m no pundit. I don’t have a crystal ball. But it sure looks like Trump is going to win in New Hampshire tonight.
Kari Lake, my opponent, she’s out there with him right now.
She thinks Trump is her ticket to the Senate. But that’s her game. We have to play ours.
Today is the one year anniversary of the day we launched this campaign together. And before Kari Lake makes her way back to Arizona with Trump in tow — before they rally together this Friday — I need your help.
I need you to rush a donation to my campaign. Can I count on you? Please, use this link:
[**https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/statistically**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-jan24.RCwesN&refcode=em240123-1-90&t=1&akid=1811%2E734936%2EHhtkb0)
You don’t see much of Kari Lake in Arizona lately. Don’t see a whole lot of Kyrsten Sinema either, to be honest. But I’ve been crisscrossing my state — going to cities, towns, reservations, parades, community centers, businesses, local news stops. Anywhere I can get to.
I can’t count on somebody else’s huge platform to lift me up. A bunch of billionaires aren’t going to airdrop pallets of cash for our campaign. I’m just a kid who grew up poor, the son of a single mom.
Statistically, I shouldn’t even be here.
But I had a lot of help over the years. And if we win this race it’ll be because I had the support of people like you.
So please, I have to ask:
[**Make your first online donation to my campaign for U.S. Senate in Arizona. I’m going to need a huge team behind me to hit my goals and win. But with a bunch of people chipping in together, it’ll add up fast.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-jan24.RCwesN&refcode=em240123-1-90&t=2&akid=1811%2E734936%2EHhtkb0)

subject: “Tell me what you’ve done.”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kiggans for Congress
body: ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ To unsubscribe from the Kiggans for Congress, click here “Tell me what you’ve done.” That’s a question I hear often…and it’s totally fair. So, let me give you a quick summary of some of what I’ve been working on in the House. - We passed H.R. 1, the Lower Energy Costs Act, which promotes an all-of-the-above energy strategy to help bring costs down for families. - We passed H.R. 2, the Secure the Border Act, which puts in place critical policies to cut down on illegal immigration and keep our communities safe. - We passed H.R. 5, the Parents' Bill of Rights Act, which makes clear that parents should have a say in their children’s education. - We passed the Protection of Women and Girls in Sports Act, which makes clear that biological men shouldn’t be allowed to participate in womens’ sports. - We passed a D.C. crime bill to protect mandatory minimums in the District of Columbia, which has one of the highest crime rates in the country. - We passed a resolution condemning anti-Semitism around the world and showing our support for Israel. - We have prevented the democrats from bringing to the floor and passing their far-left progressive agenda bills that we saw under Nancy Pelosi’s reign.Those are just a few of the BIG issues we have tackled with our GOP Majority. But I also want to highlight some work I’ve done on issues that are near and dear to my heart. - I’ve introduced and championed legislation to support greater mental health resources for our servicemembers, veterans, and health care providers. - As a Navy wife and Navy veteran myself, I’ve worked to make sure our military families and veterans have better housing, better childcare, and better health care. - As a Nurse Practitioner, I’ve introduced legislation to protect Social Security and Medicare from harmful cuts to ensure our seniors have the care they deserve.These are just a few of the things I’ve done in just one year to help secure America’s success….and we’re just getting started! But all our progress could be wiped out if Democrats retake control of the House, and with a razor-thin GOP majority, that is a real threat! So now that I’ve shared what I’ve done, I’m humbly asking you to chip in $5, $25, $50, or $100 today to help me keep fighting for you and our conservative values in Congress. https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=f0bf9051fd1a2c139ee701afffb70f7ca5cd43e6c69401f54704aee4306af4a50adee2f2bcd127ed89ab096c34b6ece4071488b2e34b6d84142c3c36cdc0f028 DONATE NOW Thanks for your continued help and support! It means the world to me!!! https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=f0bf9051fd1a2c139ee701afffb70f7ca5cd43e6c69401f54704aee4306af4a50adee2f2bcd127ed89ab096c34b6ece4071488b2e34b6d84142c3c36cdc0f028 -Jen To ensure you are receiving emails from Kiggans for Congress with minimum to no interruption, please add mailto:info@contact.jenforcongress.com info@contact.jenforcongress.com to your safe sender list, for instructions on how to add a contact, please click https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=f0bf9051fd1a2c13fe5b4b8563e1745dbe72119cfc88bdeb0e5beafe8d8da4377f9b52620325478925e92a5ae03b0009f653edcd58055bd79652798422cd7281 here . name: Matthew Diemer
subject: Working together to protect democracy
body:
| |
---
Peter, As we enter 2024, our democracy stands at a crucial juncture, and the decisions made in this election will significantly shape the path of our nation.
The rise of Donald Trump has led to far-right forces becoming more and more prominent, and this has seeped into Congress. That’s why I’m joining forces with the opponents of Marjorie Taylor Greene, Elise Stefanik, and Darrell Issa to fundraise against far-right extremism.

clean_body: | | Peter, As we enter 2024, our democracy stands at a crucial juncture, and the decisions made in this election will significantly shape the path of our nation. The rise of Donald Trump has led to far-right forces becoming more and more prominent, and this has seeped into Congress. That’s why I’m joining forces with the opponents of Marjorie Taylor Greene, Elise Stefanik, and Darrell Issa to fundraise against far-right extremism. | Through working together to build our resources, we aim to magnify our message, reach a wider audience, and form a coalition united against the influence of extremism. This collaborative fundraising effort will bolster our campaigns and empower voters to choose responsible, principled leadership. By endorsing this joint fundraising initiative, you are investing in a future where leaders prioritize unity, empathy, and collaboration and reject division and extremism. Sincerely, Matthew Diemer Democratic Candidate for Congress OH-7 | Diemer for Congress P.O. Box 40042 Bay Village, Ohio 44140 | | | Sent via . body:

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c681237%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RA%2bxVF8FwFRx8rllwhXK9Q&sysid=1 Kari Lake Reveals If She Would Accept VP Slot Under Trump

Republican Senate Candidate Kari Lake of Arizona demurred when asked if she would serve as former President Donald Trump’s running mate Monday evening. Speculation about who Trump would select as his running mate increased after Republican Gov. Ron DeSantis dropped out of the Republican primary race Sunday in a video posted on X, formerly known as Twitter less than a week after Trump won the Iowa caucuses

name: Sen. Chuck Grassley
subject: Help send a true conservative to Washington
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA

Candidates like Tim only come around once in a blue moon. _**"Let's put an end to Democrats representing conservative states in the U.S. Senate."** \- U.S. Senator Chuck Grassley_

Fellow Conservative,

It’s Senator Chuck Grassley reaching out because I need a favor.

**Former Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy is running against one of Chuck Schumer’s foot soldiers in the Senate who votes to deliver the Biden-Harris agenda of open borders and big government spending that fuels the fires of inflation. And Tim needs OUR HELP to win.**

You see, Jon Tester has successfully tricked the people of Montana into sending him to Washington on their behalf since 2006. How, I don’t know. Because his views are not at all in line with the views of voters in Montana – heck, he’d have a real easy time being elected in Oregon, California, or Massachusetts.

**Let’s put an end to Democrats representing conservative states in the U.S. Senate.** If you cannot read to the end of this note, please click this link to donate to defeat Jon Tester before closing your browser.

[**JOIN ME
SUPPORT NAVY SEAL TIM SHEEHY FOR SENATE TODAY **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=4a8136db27ec4151979366067e5985a8&_e=tug3RrNHt0Tb8n_eahjhG0gR-YPTk50LnwjQ33JvTVFRXU9CJoMs_s4GYEiDb49zIiHjoJSBOZP5FJXkUpO--bH9AF4NChkIURRPDiPRQTdRcMWLWSrUU0vNKvuLPfnZ7_FQg2nzWyxyzwlNavM2iydncxE0sNGjz7jMmwmbBNrjcrLAnJu4GeFCpPdIi71Q7H9FE_x0vBlDrgcD2dctf0ABuTnog-0MIzD4ZgndPTZAL-nevksKvlf7h9simQLw4pv7XYJDtfhXLJGBdLWtho0j42PJ11dxS8l6b0wzoTco6yfqY8yoOzWB_aD7NEVvLUjcMfXTgKa1GXDfFWRf73xSA-HGUB0IlPrREbZKLfVe-6WgxAipN4jdYWr6eWWWKa6NX7tFVaYy98YqrXNyGypIWeEFsSOQJNF1VA12KHA%3D)

Republicans have failed to take him down in past elections because we’ve nominated candidates who couldn’t win the necessary votes to take down the incumbent despite coming close twice.

After 16 years of tolerating Jon Tester, we Republicans have a real shot at ousting him next November thanks to Navy SEAL veteran Tim Sheehy who is running this go around.
