body:
| | [](https://www.sareforsenate.com/?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240218_conference1&n=1)
---
Friend
## **_You are invited_**
## Sunday February 18, 2024, 10 am - 5 pm Presidents Day Weekend Conference in NYC
# **America's Next 50 Years**
Will the United States return to our historic anti-colonial identity and join the new paradigm of peaceful economic cooperation typified by the rapidly expanding agreements among the BRICS (Brazil, Russia, India China, South Africa) nations for nuclear power and new pipelines, high speed rail, modern ports and space exploration, or will we continue on the fast track to hell, which has accelerated under President Biden, and will lead to possible thermonuclear war or, minimally, a total physical collapse of our nation to accompany the moral and cultural degradation already expressed by leading members of Congress and the globalist banksters who own them? Since the unjust witch hunt against presidential candidate Lyndon LaRouche which ultimately resulted in his incarceration in January of 1989, no qualified presidential candidate has been allowed to even consider seeking that office. So we now face the greatest crisis in human history, with a senile old man at the helm, and presidential candidates who are not up to the task, although still seen as potential disrupters of the British Empire, as Donald Trump clearly is, as well as Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. The question confronting us all is, "How do we create a political change in the United States which will cause our government to do what is actually required in order to ensure our survival?" This Presidents Day Weekend Conference is dedicated to pulling the natural leaders together from around the nation and around the State of New York to make this happen. That is why my campaign for U.S. Senate, is _not_ a "local" campaign, but a national and international one. Please get your ticket today, and make your plans to be there in person. If you absolutely cannot get to Manhattan for the 18th, you may also [**RSVP for the zoom link**](https://www.sareforsenate.com/presidents_day_conference_zoom?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240218_conference1&n=2) to participate remotely.
* * *
### _Conference tickets are $25. If you've already given the donation limit to my campaign and need a ticket, please call 646-328-1932._
| [](https://www.sareforsenate.com/presidents_day_conference?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240218_conference1&n=3 "BUY CONFERENCE TICKETS") [BUY CONFERENCE TICKETS](https://www.sareforsenate.com/presidents_day_conference?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240218_conference1&n=3)

* * *
\--Diane

name: Congressman Paul Broun
subject: Sign the petition to ban transgender child mutilation
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
Ban Child Mutilation Nationwide|

Dear Concerned American,

Should so-called doctors be allowed to sexually mutilate or chemically sterilize children – even children as young as 8 years for girls and 10 years for boys?

Should publicly-funded schools be permitted to promote this radical trans-sexual abuse often behind the backs of parents?

I hope you say ABSOLUTELY NOT!

Yet it is happening every day in America. In fact, an insider report from a horrified worker at a Missouri Children's Hospital revealed that the number of children sent for "gender transition" has increased by more than 400% in the last five years.

**That's why I'm emailing you today asking you to sign your petition to your U.S. Representative and Senators demanding they take immediate action to ban the transgender child sexual mutilation and chemical castration procedures**.

I am former U.S. Congressman Paul Broun, and I’m more determined than ever to stop the worldwide tide of Leftism I see targeting our children and grandchildren.

CitizenGO represents millions of members and supporters fighting back against the radical anti-family LGBT ideology that has swept through our schools, media, and entertainment, mercilessly attacking the relationships between children and their parents and destroying family morality and faith.

Will you join with millions of pro-family Citizens to defend our children from transgender child sexual mutilation?

**[Click here to sign the petition to Congress demanding they ban all gender transition procedures for minors immediately](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)**!

Puberty blockers, hormone supplements, and drastic sexual organ surgery are all procedures with horrific side effects that children cannot fully grasp. And in a sea of lies and misinformation, few adults understand the true horror.

Make no mistake, the transgender lobby wants them confused and isolated from any dissenting voices. *** _I've seen an entire generation of youth_ come out of their schools confused and assaulted by the transgender ideology attacking gender and their sense of self, persuading them to seek poisonous and severely harmful procedures to change their bodies to "fit in" with the transgender world. *** **I've seen families torn to pieces as the newest generation of children, who are fed radical transgender values with their cereal, clash with bewildered parents over a child's so-called" gender identity."** *** _In a growing number of States_ , children are encouraged to hide their planned mutilations or chemical castrations from their parents by teachers and counselors. *** _Meanwhile, the transgender lobby_ rabidly shuts down or "cancels" any dissenting voices or studies on the harmful effects of child sexual mutilation. *** _They even more rabidly suppress_ any study of the massive number of children who abandon gender transition after the fact...

... and are left with bitter regrets, twisted bodies and awful consequences. _The best way to put a stop to it all is by passing a flat-out Federal ban on administering these procedures to minors_.

Our children, the most vulnerable members of our society, are being conned into irreversible procedures that alter their bodies and lives forever.

This is not a matter of choice or identity – it's a matter of safety and common sense. Minors are not equipped with the life experience or emotional maturity to make such grave, scarring, and often irreversible decisions about their bodies and their futures.

**[Sign your petition today demanding Congress step in and protect our children from transgender mutilation](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MDI1NTcxMSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MDIzLWJjNmFjMzg5ZDIwOTQxYzViZTRmMTRhZjFhMzRiMTE1IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjEiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvdXZwd3Zid3c1aj9zb3VyY2VfY29kZT1GQUxSNDU4MzUifQ/hfbdn0VQoabCjaQWGAg-zQ)**.

14 states have already passed bans on transgender child sexual mutilation, though 2 are being challenged in court.

But states like California and New York will not follow suit willingly, and the transgender lobby is howling for blood at the restrictions being placed on them.

**That's why, once you've signed, I ask you to chip in with a modest contribution to help CitizenGO bring other Americans into the fight against child sexual mutilation. Even a gift of $10 or $25 will be a big boost.**

The success of this campaign relies on the power of Citizens standing together to make our voices heard, and every extra dollar counts when we're fighting to counter the transgender lobby's pervasive ideology.

**[So please, sign your petition, share, and chip in with a quick $10 or $25 contribution to help CitizenGO recruit more signers and win the fight](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MDI1NTcxMSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MDIzLWJjNmFjMzg5ZDIwOTQxYzViZTRmMTRhZjFhMzRiMTE1IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjIiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvdXZwd3Zid3c1aj9zb3VyY2VfY29kZT1GQUxSNDU4MzUifQ/81-Aa4Jdk0HYsQJADKi-pQ)**.

In addition to recruiting more petition signers to increase the impact of our campaign, your contribution will help fund:
* _Hard-hitting advertisements_ to highlight and draw attention to the horrible practices of transgender centers.
* _Targeted petition deliveries_ to key elected officials demanding they take action to defend children.
* _Phone calls to likely supporters_ to raise awareness and recruit new members.
* _Radio and TV ads_ exposing everything the transgender ideology is inflicting on our children, should funds permit.

So once you have signed, I ask that you make a contribution of $10 or $25 to CitizenGO, or perhaps an even more generous gift of $50 or $100, to help expand their recruitment and to fund all of these plans in CitizenGO’s fight to stop child sexual mutilation.

**[So please sign your petition, share, and chip in with a generous contribution of $10 or $25, or perhaps an even more generous gift of $50 or $100 today](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MDI1NTcxMSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MDIzLWJjNmFjMzg5ZDIwOTQxYzViZTRmMTRhZjFhMzRiMTE1IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjMiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvdXZwd3Zid3c1aj9zb3VyY2VfY29kZT1GQUxSNDU4MzUifQ/iw5nVjUy3jF-dbhMM1RsaQ)**.

Thank you for standing with us in this crucial fight for our children's future.

Sincerely,

Paul C. Broun (MD)
U.S. Congressman Georgia 10 Ret.

P.S. I’m more determined than ever to stop the worldwide tide of Leftism I see targeting our children and grandchildren.

_CitizenGO represents millions of members and supporters fighting back against the radical anti-family LGBT ideology, and I want every pro-sanity American to band together to put a stop to child sexual mutilation and chemical castration_.

The best way to do that is with a Federal ban on performing Transgender procedures on minors, and CitizenGO is launching a campaign to do just that. But it will take people power to succeed.

**[That's why I'm counting on you to sign your petition, and then go on to add a modest $10 or $25 contribution, or perhaps an even more generous gift of $50 or $100, to help CitizenGO fight to ban child sexual mutilation](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)**.

**In addition to signing your petition and donating, I need you to share it with your friends and family who share our values so they can have the opportunity to sign as well. CitizenGO's petition page makes it super easy to share in a way you prefer.**

---
| CitizenGO is a community of active citizens that works to ensure that human life, the family and our freedoms are respected worldwide. CitizenGO members live in every nation of the world. Our team is spread across 16 countries on 5 continents and operates in 12 languages.
---
_Not produced or emailed at taxpayer expense._
* * *
Faith & Liberty PO Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178 If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MDI1NTcxMSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MDIzLWJjNmFjMzg5ZDIwOTQxYzViZTRmMTRhZjFhMzRiMTE1IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/T7aPzDma-UIWqSOnydz7Og) to unsubscribe.
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Alfonso=20for=20Congress=20Team?=
subject: Empowering Change
body:
Sign our petition, Support any way you can | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/alfonsoforcongress.com/empowering-change?e=16d812e81c)
---
# Join the Movement for Change!
**I hope this email finds you well and motivated to make a positive impact in our community.**
**Today, I am reaching out to share an exciting opportunity for you to be a part of a movement that is focused on creating real change.**
**Our mission is clear - to stand up against the misguided policies proposed by MAGA GOP leaders like Bill Huizenga and Pete Hoekstra.**
|
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | |
## What we’re up against

**It's time to take a stand and ensure that the voices of hardworking individuals like yourself are heard. Sign our petition to get on the August Ballot and be a catalyst for change. Your support, whether big or small, will play a crucial role in helping us achieve the transformation our community deserves.**
**The MAGA GOP agenda includes plans to tax lower income workers, provide tax breaks for the ultra-wealthy, and keep seniors working longer for their hard earned Social Security benefits.**
**Also perhaps most alarmingly, they are seeking to infringe upon the reproductive rights and body autonomy of all women. This is unacceptable. Now, more than ever, we need your support to push back against these harmful policies.**
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | |
---
|
## What you can do

**Join us in making a difference. Sign our petition to get on the August’s primary ballot, and together, we can stand against injustice, fight for economic fairness, and protect the rights we hold dear.**
**Your involvement is the key to the change we need.**
**Thank you for your time and consideration. Together, we can build a better future for all.**
---
|
---
**Can you help us make a greater impact by contributing $10, $20, or $40 monthly? Your support is crucial, and acting now will ensure we reach more people and make a difference faster. Join us in our mission today!**
| [Donate here](https://alfonsoforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bb75364011dcc8a637f1fdd6f&id=fcf4e5d33a&e=16d812e81c)
---
# April 23rd filing deadline is coming
**Join us Saturday between 3:00p to 4:30p and Sunday between 1:00p to 2:30p**
| [Sign up to get involved!](https://alfonsoforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bb75364011dcc8a637f1fdd6f&id=3ff7b69fa8&e=16d812e81c)
---
**In collaboration with local groups, we are actively advocating for a ceasefire in Gaza. Your support is vital—please sign the virtual petition today to join the call for peace and make a meaningful impact on ending conflict.**
| [Sign Ceasefire for Gaza Kalamazoo Nonviolent Opponents of War (KNOW)](https://alfonsoforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bb75364011dcc8a637f1fdd6f&id=8c0c5c2610&e=16d812e81c)
---

Your support, whether big or small, will play a crucial role in helping us achieve the transformation our community deserves. The MAGA GOP agenda includes plans to tax lower income workers, provide tax breaks for the ultra-wealthy, and keep seniors working longer for their hard earned Social Security benefits. Also perhaps most alarmingly, they are seeking to infringe upon the reproductive rights and body autonomy of all women. This is unacceptable. Now, more than ever, we need your support to push back against these harmful policies. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | What you can do Join us in making a difference. Sign our petition to get on the August’s primary ballot, and together, we can stand against injustice, fight for economic fairness, and protect the rights we hold dear. Your involvement is the key to the change we need. Thank you for your time and consideration. Together, we can build a better future for all. | Can you help us make a greater impact by contributing $10, $20, or $40 monthly? Your support is crucial, and acting now will ensure we reach more people and make a difference faster. Join us in our mission today! | April 23rd filing deadline is coming Join us Saturday between 3:00p to 4:30p and Sunday between 1:00p to 2:30p | In collaboration with local groups, we are actively advocating for a ceasefire in Gaza. Your support is vital—please sign the virtual petition today to join the call for peace and make a meaningful impact on ending conflict. | | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | | Copyright (C) | 2024 | |ALFONSO FOR CONGRESS|. name: =?utf-8?Q?Rob?=
subject: Rob for PA Weekly Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rob for PA]()
body:
Petition Party at Grotto Pizza TONIGHT | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/61b79154ca06/rob-for-pa-weekly-update?e=131e83a3c2)
---
Good morning,
Welcome to the first day of petition season! Thank you, in advance, for signing and circulating for Rob across Northeastern Pennsylvania. We are kicking off the petition period at a staple of Northeastern Pennsylvania, Grotto Pizza (Wilkes-Barre). We look forward to seeing you there, and you will have the opportunity to talk to Rob about his plans to revitalize the Eighth Congressional District. The event runs from 6:00 PM to 8:00 PM. Come join us for FREE pizza and petitions!
[](https://robforpa.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4aaa9665caa590d8638bb435d&id=9abc66e096&e=131e83a3c2)
|
---
We are planning a multitude of petition parties throughout the petition period and hope to see you all there as we continue to get Rob on the ballot! Please see the list of events below. We need to make a statement to the entire district and collect as many signatures as we possibly can. Door knocking will also be a key part of obtaining these signatures. So, stay on the lookout for door to door opportunities to kickoff Rob’s race to the halls of the House.
|
---
Last week was an eventful week on the campaign trail. We obtained endorsements from several of our hardworking State Representatives, spoke to the Republican Northeast Caucus, and Rob attended the commemoration of the Knox Mine Disaster. Citizens across Northeastern Pennsylvania need a Representative in Congress who will fight for them, not coastal elites. We look forward to seeing all of you as we travel across the district, fighting for what’s right. If there is an event that you would like us to attend, please email us at info@robforpa.com.

We will need YOUR help to get Rob on the ballot throughout the petition period. Please reach out to our Political Director Frank Wojtash at (570)793-1487 or at frank@robforpa.com to start circulating and officially join Team Rob! Thank you for all your support!
Best Regards,Team Rob

| [Donate Now](https://robforpa.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4aaa9665caa590d8638bb435d&id=fdc6bbb8a8&e=131e83a3c2)

name: GIFFORDS PAC
subject: Five reasons for $5
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Hi team,
Let us share five reasons why your $5 contribution is so important to GIFFORDS PAC:
1. We’ve officially entered 2024, which means the election year is in full swing. We have to do everything we can now to ensure we have the resources to maintain our gun safety Senate majority, take back the House, and reelect President Biden this November.

2. Gun violence is the NUMBER ONE cause of death for children in America. This is unacceptable. We must do more to keep our children safe from school shootings, domestic violence, accidental shootings, and community violence alike.

3. Riddled with scandal, fraud, and misconduct, the NRA is the weakest it’s ever been. Longtime NRA Executive Vice President and CEO Wayne LaPierre announced his resignation from his position earlier this month, just days before his corruption trial began. We need your support to keep drowning out the NRA and its stranglehold on our political system.

4. GIFFORDS just announced the appointment of our new Executive Director, Emma Brown. As we enter a new decade of our movement for gun safety, your donation is the best way to fuel our work to end gun violence.

5. It’s hard to believe, but we’re rapidly approaching the end of January. Right now, we’re not where we hoped we’d be at this time of the month, and we’re worried we won’t hit our January fundraising goals. With so much on the line this year, falling short is not an option.

The choice is yours, but we hope that these five reasons demonstrate the importance of your contribution to GIFFORDS PAC.
[**If you’re able, please make a contribution of $5 or more to GIFFORDS PAC today to help us continue our work to end gun violence in our nation.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jan24.i9S2EM&refcode=em240123-1-60&t=1&akid=7533%2E3935704%2EFR81qN)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

| **[Other Amount](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-jan24.FODcFH&refcode=em240123-1-60&t=7&akid=7533%2E3935704%2EFR81qN)**

****
Thank you,
The team at GIFFORDS PAC

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=7533%2E3935704%2EFR81qN) if you'd like to unsubscribe. | All:
Bob Good had a meltdown on national TV when he got caught lying about criticizing Trump! After Bob said: "I have never been caught on camera because I have never trashed President Trump," [CNN anchor Kaitlin Collins played the infamous video of Bob trashing Trump on camera.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TDmR7hHNOJfXVMBP03GFNujZRTlVWTZaDEJycc9asjTPO0x-0hzc7De6dG_gd8NayUVVnCewoX3yt6C_l_taEv-WY3rU9fPUkbJ6WTRHwR8fOmh1uRPjXBSozMESnha96heU52dSEJ_ckp3QtmjEBQGr4kDjH9zpRY5BF9-N22qIlnQwyhGr2Enl2ctXLIeT4tPG7jWizfx2Sr4Ay5XTLg==&c=pc2NV3lLXJFODWLPrYAEiz2fcKTymqGu6T5-QS8BJ-DwsGqsP6BgiQ==&ch=oE79SnULBUauJO5pgTlx8hDiOEaFjNM8caZGLS79eFaRbKmwQKPraQ==)
Caught red-handed, Bob again admitted he speaks about Trump differently in private and in public. Collins: "You do say on camera that you don't want to say those things publicly but you'll say them privately. It is notable to hear you say you thought DeSantis would be more effective--" Bob Good: "The context of how that was said was that I don't criticize Donald Trump publicly. If someone asks me privately to answer a question on an issue, I'm going to do that, but the point I was making is that I'm for Governor DeSantis." Collins: "Are you acknowledging you say things differently publicly than privately? That's what your answer sounded like." Bob Good made a bad bet going against our President Donald Trump and against the wishes of Virginia's Fifth District. Now that he's losing his election, he's going to try to lie his way back. Don't believe him. Bob No-Good admitted himself - he'll say one thing in public and then turn around and criticize our president in private. He'll never support the America First agenda and he'll never support President Trump.

name: Colonel Castelli
subject: Not on my watch.
body:
Dear Peter,

You won't believe what Joe Biden has done now. _It 's unbelievable!_

Joe Biden has abandoned American sovereignty and allowed our border to be overrun by drug cartels, human traffickers, and enemies of America. Even worse, he is using Veterans' Administration funds [to pay for health care for illegal migrants](https://www.google.com/url?sa=t&rct=j&q=&esrc=s&source=web&cd=&cad=rja&uact=8&ved=2ahUKEwjPkOrEr_SDAxUgqWoFHYATBWMQFnoECCUQAQ&url=https%3A%2F%2Fnypost.com%2F2024%2F01%2F10%2Fnews%2Fva-ripped-for-reimbursing-migrant-treatment-as-veterans-wait%2F&usg=AOvVaw2Fhsubk0Kp7c3PUprs1J5X&opi=89978449) in federal custody!

While our veterans wait in line for care, their sacrifice is disrespected and priority care is given to illegals instead of our nation's heroes. This will stop when I am elected.

_I_ __'_ m retired Green Beret Colonel Christian Castelli. I've toured our southern border with Sheriff Dannels of Cochise County, Arizona. Border security is an afterthought for the Biden Administration. Our Sheriffs and Border Patrol are NOT provided the tools they need to secure our border. And disrespect for our veterans is unacceptable. _

I am on a mission to protect and secure our border -- and help our veterans. The drug and human trafficking mules have a strategy to infiltrate our country. Joe Biden has no plan to stop them, but I do.

To protect and secure our border, we need more boots on the ground, aerial enforcement, and state of the art surveillance technology. It must be done immediately, and I am prepared to see this mission through.

**If you want America 's sovereignty back, and our border to be protected and secured please make a donation of $500 $250, $100, $50 or $25 TODAY! **

**[](https://secure.winred.com/committee-to-elect-christian-castelli/donate-today)**

We need to get rid of Joe Biden. We need to secure our border. And we need to restore American sovereignty.

Let's send a conservative Green Beret to Congress to protect and secure our border.

**Please make a donation of $500, $250, $100, $50 or $25 TODAY and send a conservative, experienced, and qualified Green Beret to Congress to secure our border.**

**[](https://secure.winred.com/committee-to-elect-christian-castelli/donate-today)**

****

Christian Castelli
Lieutenant Colonel (Retired)
U.S. Army Special Forces
Republican Candidate for the U.S. House of Representatives
(336) 810-8100

This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com** from **colonel@castellifornc.com**.
If you do not wish to receive further messages from us, [ please click here to unsubscribe](https://emailtracking-cm.aristotle.com/frmEmailUnsubscribe.aspx?databaseId=b33a3810-9cbf-4584-a3d2-01672886537a&activityID=ea3143bd-7fb2-467f-909c-c90d8f3b7980).

name: Team Katie Porter
subject: Post-debate update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Katie is the ONLY candidate who has never taken corporate PAC money, and never will.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=36908%2E3422442%2EhZ9tX0)
Derek,
If you missed last night’s California Senate candidate debate, here’s a quick summary:
1. Katie is the ONLY candidate who has never taken corporate PAC money, and never will.
2. Republican Steve Garvey played for the Dodgers, _and he still seems to be dodging every question that comes his way._
3. Katie is the only candidate who opposes earmarks—because they lead to waste, fraud, and abuse of taxpayer dollars—and it’s going to take more than earmarks to solve California’s homelessness crisis.

**Republican Steve Garvey is still polling _ahead_ of Katie, even though he couldn’t solidify a single policy position.** We can’t let Steve Garvey be the reason we lose Katie’s voice in Congress forever, so we need to get clips of last night’s debate in front of voters. **[Can you chip in right now?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240123-1?refcode=em20240123-36908&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36908_3422442_hZ9tX0&akid=36908%2E3422442%2EhZ9tX0)**

Check out a clip from last night's debate here. ⬇️
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240123-1?refcode=em20240123-36908&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36908_3422442_hZ9tX0&akid=36908%2E3422442%2EhZ9tX0)

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=em20240123-36908&amounts=&t=2&refcode2=36908_3422442_hZ9tX0&akid=36908%2E3422442%2EhZ9tX0)**

| | Peter, My family was put on the communist party’s kill list.

America took us in, and if it wasn’t for the generosity of the greatest nation on Earth, I wouldn’t be here today.

Now, I’m fighting to protect our country from going down the same path of socialism, communism, and tyranny as the one I fled.

My name is CAPT Hung Cao, and I’m running for U.S. Senate in Virginia because trust me when I say, if America falls, there is nowhere else to go.

**[I know we’ve just met, but if you want to make sure America NEVER becomes a socialist country, I want you on my team. Will you join us now to DEFEND our great nation from tyranny?](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=c5e01f60018e4e2c9e6d0ba9e1d2ccd8&_e=Si8ISE7aJsdk3OQAUae2ETxTFC8i4NVHYqcFyqZ4feg7Z6Ea7P0wMK_dWsPIDCE-q5yDfSfClICm54pvDKQ2MIKr8SHJ-LoitXPPwAbnanyAwP55d0kjazehSaRKPpHdIIdJGEnEtV3YrqDxAjmSOEaabIScSBZ7Ie4baWCezcBfHpeiVWGS7WE1LdMxpse8ZKHmHocvTCxnWtuK3fYbC2rpFr5u_FiVwrauVBifVi8STCO5EeEwsJh2pNwusmTO6eYNDeHXax99wLSGLFl7yyA6Ajlb1ge0Rsf139IggG9FclRbyhegfffCsDQpmRgaz1XhUhQJcZlOOKA6MojRJwXx3u9kr3dXnD7WDOxKJm6Un52u26G-QZAp9anfT0diLsIvZH66vW0vYCJOa-Ojzw%3D%3D)**

After my family and I made it to America, I knew I had to do something to pay my freedom forward.

That’s why I attended the Naval Academy and went on to serve for 25 years as a Captain in the Navy.

I fought on the front lines, dismantling bombs and performing life-risking deep dives.

It wasn’t easy, but it was worth it, because I was fighting for the country I loved.

Now, I’m running for U.S. Senate with the same mission: to protect and defend our freedom.

_But I’m going to be honest with you, it’s not going to be easy._

The road to the U.S. Senate majority runs through Virginia, and if we’re going to flip our commonwealth RED, we need every patriot to do their part.

This race will be won and lost at the grassroots level. I’m not a career politician, Peter. I don’t have the connections and billions that Tim Kaine has.

_That’s why I’m relying so heavily on my grassroots team, and that’s why I’m reaching out to you today._

**[Can I count on you to step up right now and defend America before it’s too late?](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=c5e01f60018e4e2c9e6d0ba9e1d2ccd8&_e=Si8ISE7aJsdk3OQAUae2ETxTFC8i4NVHYqcFyqZ4feg7Z6Ea7P0wMK_dWsPIDCE-q5yDfSfClICm54pvDKQ2MIKr8SHJ-LoitXPPwAbnanyAwP55d0kjazehSaRKPpHdIIdJGEnEtV3YrqDxAjmSOEaabIScSBZ7Ie4baWCezcBfHpeiVWGS7WE1LdMxpse8ZKHmHocvTCxnWtuK3fYbC2rpFr5u_FiVwrauVBifVi8STCO5EeEwsJh2pNwusmTOhGglF5nnsCHc7UW9eBQpvWTMTT3hQDJCChETffJjlN_g6sGYy5VFb8GOh43S1z87X5BEHx-mAHzLfqiy2XjCP41QAGff0Ik-oSTJX11Mg_S4trOjhvVwoo0FoYstzIlNhtOTkFMCZnvVsRqJ1kxy4A%3D%3D)**

| | Peter, When I delivered the Republican response to President Biden’s State of the Union address, I laid out the obvious truth our country is facing, **“The dividing line in America is no longer between right or left. The choice is between normal or crazy.”** _As we begin 2024, we clearly see that choice is truer now than ever before._ In the radical left’s America, Washington taxes you and lights your hard-earned money on fire, but you get crushed with high gas prices, empty grocery shelves, and our children are taught to hate one another on account of their race, but not to love one another or our great country. **So, I want to know: are you on Team Normal or Team Crazy? Click below...**
---

clean_body: | | | | | Peter, When I delivered the Republican response to President Biden’s State of the Union address, I laid out the obvious truth our country is facing, “The dividing line in America is no longer between right or left. The choice is between normal or crazy.” As we begin 2024, we clearly see that choice is truer now than ever before. In the radical left’s America, Washington taxes you and lights your hard-earned money on fire, but you get crushed with high gas prices, empty grocery shelves, and our children are taught to hate one another on account of their race, but not to love one another or our great country. So, I want to know: are you on Team Normal or Team Crazy? Click below... Whether Joe Biden believes this madness or is simply too weak to resist it, his administration has been completely hijacked by the radical left. It is time for a new generation of Republican leadership. Upon taking office, I signed Executive Orders to ban CRT, racism, and indoctrination in our schools, eliminate the use of the derogatory term "Latinx" in our government, repealed COVID orders and said never again to authoritarian mandates and shutdowns. name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: This is the most tragic lie in America today
body:
Planned Parenthood is lying to itself, to vulnerable women and young girls

| [ ](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8cb45724884942bc91ac1545de6bb34d&_e=_g8qZ0Ujnp1vMiFOa4ykyxEBPX7wmdzQpdFr9pZYtiArW9mklyQNViwbUP5LxbeR51n2XiVEgDrB5o3L0UdFDDsxTx6bk2oAWiU32ihDY0ttFd-XAE5nm2d-wfBEKgv9X8vuJJMAae3YUPEKbunIUbLT_aFaNoL3fTACLsDko7d-LA8Qp3Di66oNHVfVXESZMgLtgh92O2fV0y2xoLT14vCFg5fZpPXjDlUAVDJ-4iFT-C0W1r-YQRjgsMG6rLDvfBX9j8dil9k7DoP5tCxNqupzIJ710ZqE8oidhkw_53KsgaA3dVk1pfOkHPRXt9GqA9W_ABzC2v_Ro9YcQR0Zy644jbyWrMT_wjfygEPpOvKLHasJEkxKv_cEpI2b1sMqnDoXikUimsbBcB_Gh1HhqaY0yr75mmE7jM0GMWqvlWk%3D)
---
Fellow American,

Care, no matter what.

This is the motto of Planned Parenthood. While it sounds great on the surface, Planned Parenthood is lying to itself, to vulnerable women and young girls, and to the American people through manipulative and dangerously subtle language.

While they claim to provide healthcare services to women no matter who they are or where they live, abortion can never be healthcare. Further, while they claim to provide numerous services to women, 97.2% of Planned Parenthood's pregnancy resolution services are devoted to abortions, the purposeful ending of an unborn baby's life.

**[Does 97.2% of cases brought to Planned Parenthood that end in the death of an innocent child sound like"care" to you?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8cb45724884942bc91ac1545de6bb34d&_e=_g8qZ0Ujnp1vMiFOa4ykyxEBPX7wmdzQpdFr9pZYtiArW9mklyQNViwbUP5LxbeR51n2XiVEgDrB5o3L0UdFDDsxTx6bk2oAWiU32ihDY0ttFd-XAE5nm2d-wfBEKgv9X8vuJJMAae3YUPEKbunIUbLT_aFaNoL3fTACLsDko7d-LA8Qp3Di66oNHVfVXESZMgLtgh92O2fV0y2xoLT14vCFg5fZpPXjDlUAVDJ-4iFT-C0W1r-YQRjgsMG6rLDvfBX9j8dil9k7DoP5tCxNqvR9VK0LTJORfU-Ayzlm_jMDs7akjdXBrVQLdHbvvm8v58ajEaFaPW3QVj9F0mowRzWOyOM01Pl9ksyMooqYQbZ1OuLC2NzDWDTx_GjugMCVMcbYQu5a-Ntwg3I_VAXSIeQLdo3dtYol7mqGsgP6-aM%3D)**

Planned Parenthood cares only about the business. It preys on the vulnerable, thrives on women's fear, and fuels itself on greed. When a woman arrives seeking answers to an unexpected pregnancy, the clock to gain a profit starts ticking. They will do whatever they can to make a woman agree to an abortion because each abortion completed is more profit in their pockets.

At SBA Pro-Life America, we are committed to stopping the manipulation and the gruesome deaths of innocent babies. In the last 10 years, Planned Parenthood has the lifeblood of 3.4 million babies on their hands.

[We cannot be the only voice fighting for these precious children and exposing the lies of Planned Parenthood.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8cb45724884942bc91ac1545de6bb34d&_e=_g8qZ0Ujnp1vMiFOa4ykyxEBPX7wmdzQpdFr9pZYtiArW9mklyQNViwbUP5LxbeR51n2XiVEgDrB5o3L0UdFDDsxTx6bk2oAWiU32ihDY0ttFd-XAE5nm2d-wfBEKgv9X8vuJJMAae3YUPEKbunIUbLT_aFaNoL3fTACLsDko7d-LA8Qp3Di66oNHVfVXESZMgLtgh92O2fV0y2xoLT14vCFg5fZpPXjDlUAVDJ-4iFT-C0W1r-YQRjgsMG6rLDvfBX9j8dil9k7DoP5tCxNqgbH4PQAM1-b232jaCmIWOWjryr-SbqkRniVeiNhoxslI7NUFj9cpyD4q-QB5OSyhyw-U17jP1MhyZ_5od50miAef7vSw245kZVQ_gf6X4MvUhF3RS776PZJ9QfUWFS9XNP4oxmUDBl3-RLLAhTyZH4%3D) Would you stand with us and commit to protecting women and unborn babies from the dangers of Planned Parenthood? By signing our pledge to stop Planned Parenthood, you are helping SBA Pro-Life America fight this "_David vs Goliath_ " battle.

Whether you know it or not, Planned Parenthood is impacting YOUR community and YOUR family by taking your hard-earned tax dollars to fund abortions and devaluing the unborn in our country.

**The lies, manipulation, and millions of deaths must come to an end now.**

Help us fight for the vulnerable by standing up against Planned Parenthood by signing our pledge at the link below:

[SIGN YOUR NAME](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8cb45724884942bc91ac1545de6bb34d&_e=_g8qZ0Ujnp1vMiFOa4ykyxEBPX7wmdzQpdFr9pZYtiArW9mklyQNViwbUP5LxbeR51n2XiVEgDrB5o3L0UdFDDsxTx6bk2oAWiU32ihDY0ttFd-XAE5nm2d-wfBEKgv9X8vuJJMAae3YUPEKbunIUbLT_aFaNoL3fTACLsDko7d-LA8Qp3Di66oNHVfVXESZMgLtgh92O2fV0y2xoLT14vCFg5fZpPXjDlUAVDJ-4iFT-C0W1r-YQRjgsMG6rLDvfBX9j8dil9k7DoP5tCxNqnR0bFfT5aJ3a1q7peToL1Vm6h8JUxDPX_7uoBVPkDt1KhixamW2cHTvlMwipmFVPfcgjO55yymnex-HtTQY0YpSkoU-0b9VnkWHs8jB6Lzwd710L2wthyntKafG_ES_uLnAUTnVNyoCCDYLYmcuHyg%3D)
| I can't tell you how important your commitment is today to the pro-life movement and the generations to come tomorrow.
---
For LIFE,

Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, SBA Pro-Life America

Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America
2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr.
PO Box 803
Arlington, VA, 22206

name: Al Franken
subject: If this is a joke… it’s not funny!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf0ca8dda-a16c-4241-8ced-cfe30dbe4895/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, I like to think I’ve got pretty thick skin, but I’m offended. [I’m so fired up that I’m going to ask you right at the top to help kick the jerk who’s pissing me off out of Congress. I’ll explain more below, but will you split a donation between Blue Amp Action and Josh Riley’s campaign right now?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tffa4e1e1-95cf-4b85-bfe2-7ab26f13ea5f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta8f5afc1-e78d-4de4-84e7-e139a9c82a6a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Marc Molinaro, the MAGA Republican representing NY-19 in Congress, voted TWICE to make Jim Jordan the Speaker of the House. When that didn’t work, he found the one guy even crazier than Jordan to actually give the job to. And if putting an anti-abortion extremist in charge of the House wasn’t bad enough, when confronted about supporting these nutsos, this is what Molinaro said: “[Upstate New Yorkers] don’t give a sh*t who the Speaker of the House is... Most of the people I represent wouldn’t know the Speaker of the House if he backed over them with a pickup truck.” Does he think we’re dumb? [I, for one, do give a sh*t who’s running our government... and I know you do, too. If you’re as pissed off as I am, I hope you’ll split a contribution between Josh Riley and Blue Amp Action today to fire both Marc Molinaro AND Mike Johnson.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T076e8a02-1605-4460-89d3-544042f8357f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [CHIP IN NOW >>>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T964e0580-01de-49ff-8e39-f8652c69781b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) It’s clear Molinaro doesn’t think much of the people he represents. But you know who does care a hell of a lot about Upstate New Yorkers? My friend and former Senate counsel, Josh Riley. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcd409131-f493-4f76-963d-62e80ffd39e5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
(I swear I’m not actually this short... Josh is just REALLY tall.) Josh grew up in a working-class neighborhood in Endicott, NY. When the local factories closed, Josh saw his community struggle – but he worked to put himself through school and graduated from Harvard Law. In the Senate, Josh and I brought Republicans and Democrats together to actually get stuff done (yes, it really is possible)! The bills we worked on together expanded rights for survivors of domestic abuse and provided new funding for addiction treatment and mental health programs. It wasn’t easy, but Josh got them signed into law. Josh DID learn how to drive on a pickup truck, so maybe Molinaro was right about that. But he’s dead wrong if he thinks we’re too stupid to know or care that he’s voting to screw us over at every turn. [This is one of the most competitive races in the country, and Josh isn’t going to get to Congress without our help. Please join me by splitting a contribution between Josh and Blue Amp Action right now.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T819b4fa5-20c9-4aaa-bba1-1c26bf9f6441/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9afbcedf-0b77-48a0-89ff-b1c4a7579b74/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Thanks, Al
P.S. I mean seriously, isn’t this guy such a jerk? [Give to Josh today!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tee874929-7688-4511-8bf4-14275b153991/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

name: Diana
subject: re: I've selected you to represent Pennsylvania ->
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
Please don't delay
Hey team -- It’s Diana, the Research Director here at the DSCC.

With the 2024 elections heating up and the battle for Senate control at a fever pitch, we need to stay on top of our strategy. That’s why James Carville reached out and requested your input for an exclusive strategy interview.

**But he didn’t get an answer from you -- and now he's 19 responses short of what he needed in Pennsylvania!**

[**We NEED enough top Democrats like you to participate in this strategy interview to drive us to victory, but the deadline to respond is midnight tonight. Please, will you take 3 minutes and help us WIN? >>**](https://go.dscc.org/go/17119?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240123-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240123-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&akid=13302%2E9716520%2EMYHsVK)

| | [Start your interview](https://go.dscc.org/go/17119?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240123-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240123-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&akid=13302%2E9716520%2EMYHsVK)
---

_**NOTE: Please do not share this link with anyone, as it may corrupt our data**_

Thank you for being a crucial part of our team,

Diana, DSCC

* If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! Online records may not be up to date, but don't worry -- your responses have been recorded.

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: James Carville
Date: Jan 22, 2023
Subject: I've selected you to represent Pennsylvania ->
| | | Hey, it's James Carville and I’m real excited to hear from you.

I'm conducting a series of strategy interviews with the very best, most engaged Democrats, and I've selected _you_ to represent Pennsylvania -- **[so please, click here to get started right now:](https://go.dscc.org/go/17119?ask=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240123-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240123-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&akid=13302%2E9716520%2EMYHsVK)**

| | [Start your interview](https://go.dscc.org/go/17119?ask=5&t=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240123-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240123-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&akid=13302%2E9716520%2EMYHsVK)
---

I’ve been in politics a LONG time, and I’ll be honest, **I don’t think I’ve ever seen an election with more at stake than this one.** If we win, we’ll continue to enact President Biden's agenda and work for ALL Americans. If we lose, **Mitch McConnell and his flat-out wacko candidates will grind all progress to a halt -- and that will only be the beginning.**

All across the country, Republicans are taking away a woman’s right to choose, trying to cut health care, restricting the right to vote, and burying their heads in the sand on climate change. **And if Democrats don’t get fired the hell up, those same crazy Republicans will take control of the Senate this year.**

That's why I want to talk to you. I need to hear from _real voters like you_ \-- not more political types -- so I can help our best and brightest defend the Senate.

**I selected you specifically, so please, will you click here to begin your interview?** **[www.dscc.org/DemocraticInterviewJanuary/](https://go.dscc.org/go/17119?ask=5&t=11&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240123-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240123-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&akid=13302%2E9716520%2EMYHsVK)**

| [Start your interview](https://go.dscc.org/go/17119?ask=5&t=12&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240123-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240123-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&akid=13302%2E9716520%2EMYHsVK)
---

Thank you

\- James

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/17119?ask=5&t=13&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240123-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240123-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&akid=13302%2E9716520%2EMYHsVK)

subject: How would you feel if President Joe Biden lost reelection to Donald Trump?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Our democracy, and your place to help us safeguard our future. | | |
---
_Peter, how would you feel if President Joe Biden lost reelection to Donald Trump?_ It’s the morning of Wednesday, November 6 -- the day after Election Day -- and every news outlet is reporting: President Joe Biden lost reelection to Donald Trump. How would you feel? What would you wish you had done differently? Would you have given $5 when you had the chance? Believe it or not, Peter, you have the power to prevent this nightmare from becoming our reality. **Donald Trump and his MAGA extremists are too radical, too extreme, and too out of touch to lead this country. But the only way we can defeat them is _together_ \-- with folks like you chipping in what they can, when they can.** [Will you please make your first $5 contribution to help reelect Joe and Kamala and defend the White House? clean_body: Our democracy, and your place to help us safeguard our future. | | | Peter, how would you feel if President Joe Biden lost reelection to Donald Trump? It’s the morning of Wednesday, November 6 -- the day after Election Day -- and every news outlet is reporting: President Joe Biden lost reelection to Donald Trump. How would you feel? What would you wish you had done differently? Would you have given $5 when you had the chance? Believe it or not, Peter, you have the power to prevent this nightmare from becoming our reality. Donald Trump and his MAGA extremists are too radical, too extreme, and too out of touch to lead this country. But the only way we can defeat them is together \-- with folks like you chipping in what they can, when they can. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Every month until November is our chance to make an impact before the election, so thank you for coming through today. subject: Monthly donations are the foundation for powerful grassroots movements

body:
Your opportunity to make a major impact on our campaign today
#
Peter — **if you knew that starting a monthly donation today would help us defeat Josh Hawley and elect Lucas Kunce this November... would you do it?**
**[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43080?refcode=em20240123-4665&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4665%2E614464%2ETxsL3b)**
What if you knew that a monthly donation of $25, $10, or even just $3 would give our campaign the ability to confidently plan ahead for all the things we’ll need to win this election, like hiring more staff, opening field offices, and reserving TV ad time?
Or what if we told you that, between its small media markets + electorate, Missouri is our most cost-effective opportunity to flip a GOP-held U.S. Senate seat this year — and that your monthly donation would help us take advantage of this opportunity by giving us the ability to reach voters early and often with Lucas’ winning message?
Or what if you knew that national insiders have targeted Lucas since the day he got into this race — and that being able to count on your monthly support will allow our campaign to fight back the moment they launch another onslaught of desperate attacks?
**Monthly donations are the foundation for powerful grassroots movements** — and since Lucas doesn’t take a cent from corporate PACs, your monthly support is one of the best ways to set our entire campaign up for success this year.
**So what do you say, Peter?[Will you start a monthly donation of $10 or whatever you can afford to help our campaign prepare for the fight ahead? Monthly donations in ActBlue are flexible, so you can cancel anytime if your budget changes!](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43080?refcode=em20240123-4665&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4665%2E614464%2ETxsL3b)**
**[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43080?refcode=em20240123-4665&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=4665%2E614464%2ETxsL3b)**
This is our chance to defeat Josh Hawley and flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat, but we couldn’t do it without supporters like you.
Thanks for your consideration,
Team Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20240123-4665-footer&t=4&refcode2=4665_614464_TxsL3b&akid=4665%2E614464%2ETxsL3b)**

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: Yesterday marked the 51st anniversary of Roe v. Wade
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided in kind by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=20675%2E4449941%2ErvFmAY)
---
Team,

Yesterday marked the 51st anniversary of _Roe v. Wade_ , the Supreme Court case that protected abortion access as a constitutional right for almost half a century.

But today, we’re seeing the heartbreaking aftermath of the _Dobbs_ decision, which overturned _Roe v. Wade_. We’ve seen extreme abortion bans passed in legislatures across the country, women have been denied emergency medical treatments, and some hospitals are no longer providing emergency contraception to women.

Even with extreme bans in place across the South, some lawmakers are going even further to punish and threaten women and doctors with jail time for performing or receiving an abortion.

And now, in a few months, the Supreme Court will decide on further limits on access to the widely used abortion pill, Mifepristone.

**Virginia isn’t immune to these attacks, either.** Governor Glenn Youngkin has said he’d sign any bill “happily and gleefully” to restrict abortion access in Virginia.

Thanks to our small but mighty Democratic majorities in our state legislature, Virginia remains the only state in the South that hasn’t further restricted abortion or women’s healthcare access since the _Dobbs_ decision. We must now elect a governor who will join them in protecting reproductive rights and the health of women. [**As Governor of Virginia, I will always protect women’s reproductive rights, but I need your help to get there. Will you make a split contribution between my campaign and Fight for Reform today to elect a pro-choice Governor of Virginia in 2025 and elect pro-democracy Democrats across the country?**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/36361?t=7&akid=20675%2E4449941%2ErvFmAY) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Fight for Reform and Abigail Spanberger will go through immediately: | [SPLIT $7 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/36362?t=8&akid=20675%2E4449941%2ErvFmAY)
---
[SPLIT $25 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/36363?t=9&akid=20675%2E4449941%2ErvFmAY)
[SPLIT $50 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/36364?t=10&akid=20675%2E4449941%2ErvFmAY)
[SPLIT $100 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/36365?t=11&akid=20675%2E4449941%2ErvFmAY)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/36361?t=12&akid=20675%2E4449941%2ErvFmAY)
Thank you,
Abigail

subject: 13 murdered Americans
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
When Taliban terrorists murdered 13 American soldiers on August 26th, 2021, I knew something had to be done | [Unsubscribe](http://links.justandfreegop.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_s=a8e629db75814abdb3f1d74fbd747439&_t=M02o4hn0gx5D16gPhieCxU5PXP4CyWdtyxWRuFYD-T5_rCNVtSc7fveIeuplzX0hb-gnslDg5DPirzE__n5IUaFvUpvooBI8D6C8NPeaZ9s%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.justandfreegop.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_s=a8e629db75814abdb3f1d74fbd747439&_t=M02o4hn0gx5D16gPhieCxU5PXP4CyWdtyxWRuFYD-T5_rCNVtSc7fveIeuplzX0hb-gnslDg5DPirzE__n5IUaFvUpvooBI8D6C8NPeaZ9s%3D)

[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=a8e629db75814abdb3f1d74fbd747439&_e=FKkQUehDF9YaRiq1GWGSGtYVZEL95Q4G0FroYY31a8dGESPxpQZapxftndJidfUQYGf7DtYnMrPGOxz9-r349HMAEr47oIoUiI3nw2byUeaQpexe4B7aVUwhxfagI2DOF6o-Zxqi6CeNVRviLvOGdeBzbi2r5WWqJc1Zs73kn1V52tjvCo3Xo5Neoz2DuSzIDrerj1-Tk_pYFAfkJpHpkSIavHFraWMs8G-r15QdR9sDHjQz0QG4aB9IwIQlV-cDWBBmPDpVvXDPSVQEeFUV0Gq3H7N0He7304Q1VOeBtCfeK99tXkBK-508fqUlVTxdYJqBluuxvnWV55P7EYVtlwGAA9Env3eG_Qx7OLmkFr094ofQVssS6wZ2qmFje3HyBF-twgASVIfLo40MWM22m7_nTRiwQLn52vKe_cwpvzY%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

**As a former Navy SEAL and combat veteran, I’ve seen my fair share of battle.** Between my and my wife’s service to our country, we’ve sacrificed years of our lives to make America a more safe and prosperous nation and to protect our God-given freedoms and liberties. We served so that our children and yours might grow up to realize their own American Dreams.

My name is Tim Sheehy, Republican candidate for U.S. Senate from Montana. You probably don't know me, or if you do, likely from emails like this one. I’m a former U.S. Navy SEAL and a 2008 Naval Academy graduate. Right now, I'm the only person standing in the way of Chuck Schumer and his Senate majority.

**[I'm reaching out today to make the case that I'm worth your personal endorsement](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=a8e629db75814abdb3f1d74fbd747439&_e=FKkQUehDF9YaRiq1GWGSGtYVZEL95Q4G0FroYY31a8dGESPxpQZapxftndJidfUQYGf7DtYnMrPGOxz9-r349HMAEr47oIoUiI3nw2byUeaQpexe4B7aVUwhxfagI2DOF6o-Zxqi6CeNVRviLvOGdeBzbi2r5WWqJc1Zs73kn1V52tjvCo3Xo5Neoz2DuSzIDrerj1-Tk_pYFAfkJpHpkSIavHFraWMs8G-r15QdR9sDHjQz0QG4aB9IwIQlV-cD7Hk2fDGCCe1eN0tpHm44NDb520gchQq83LDDsYye3onPB5RNb2IifetstJcdyDU39k7sV3L5cIdQn9t2-eYoztEAxRZG-fSTugaHaJEPTpukb3h3lKqav1UEnmZHaIGa_hAs9toLBSm9V3xZ9vEG6wNQMWGNIggWRzWIm7IB9R0%3D)**.

[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=a8e629db75814abdb3f1d74fbd747439&_e=FKkQUehDF9YaRiq1GWGSGtYVZEL95Q4G0FroYY31a8dGESPxpQZapxftndJidfUQYGf7DtYnMrPGOxz9-r349HMAEr47oIoUiI3nw2byUeaQpexe4B7aVUwhxfagI2DOF6o-Zxqi6CeNVRviLvOGdeBzbi2r5WWqJc1Zs73kn1V52tjvCo3Xo5Neoz2DuSzIDrerj1-Tk_pYFAfkJpHpkSIavHFraWMs8G-r15QdR9sDHjQz0QG4aB9IwIQlV-cDH75AvJjtLAFoXzJTw6Kg9a48wO8ksNPe38nr_n--uLxOle_-QMTjomSZ-Y7f_K9R_rv3Q1jxEiwMpcVEVnBKqirPmcK-G4z9Kpqe8FgR-lZIrQ3CylPKvFoZUZ0Q2XHrwgn8sj4crEmeylmAS729Kmp5QBPmfswyHbFnq2p9yn0%3D)
In August 2021, I was putting out wildfires in California by day as part of the aerial firefighting company that I run; by night, my colleagues [**many veterans like me**] and I were working the phones trying to get our friends and allies out of Afghanistan before the takeover by the Taliban. I remember vividly that at one point I was trying to help an ally **sneak through a tunnel to get him and his family to the airport** so that they could be evacuated on a U.S. military aircraft. The Taliban wanted these high-value targets dead; they wanted their families dead.

Unlike Joe Biden, I understand what it is to serve our country. _**Not service in politics, but on the battlefield.**_ I’ve been wounded in service of our nation; I’ve lost mentors and friends who were willing to make the ultimate sacrifice so that future generations will be free.

name: ElissaSlotkin.org
subject: When you woke up
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=1055%2E135344%2E1cO07c)

Friends -
We’re guessing that you didn't wake up this morning, spring out of bed and holler "Today is the day I am going to donate to help Elissa Slotkin hold Michigan's Senate seat for Democrats!"
But we’re reaching out to you right now in the hope that you will consider contributing today anyway. Here’s why:
This month our campaign is going to be making some very important budget decisions. The kind of decisions that will ultimately help determine whether or not we win this race.
Because the truth is that it's going to take a significant amount of resources to win in November. It will require ads, organizers, polling, research, and travel to keep Elissa out on the campaign trail taking her message to voters. And her Republican opponents are, as of this week, already up on TV reaching out to new voters.
Michigan is too competitive of a state for us to leave anything up to chance. And the only way we'll be able to fund the kind of campaign that can win in Michigan is with your support. That's why we're asking:
[**Can you make a $3 contribution to help Elissa Slotkin defend Michigan's Senate seat for Democrats?](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-jan24.--Kpen&refcode=em240123-1-30&t=2&akid=1055%2E135344%2E1cO07c)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

clean_body: Friends - We’re guessing that you didn't wake up this morning, spring out of bed and holler "Today is the day I am going to donate to help Elissa Slotkin hold Michigan's Senate seat for Democrats!" But we’re reaching out to you right now in the hope that you will consider contributing today anyway. Here’s why: This month our campaign is going to be making some very important budget decisions. The kind of decisions that will ultimately help determine whether or not we win this race. Because the truth is that it's going to take a significant amount of resources to win in November. It will require ads, organizers, polling, research, and travel to keep Elissa out on the campaign trail taking her message to voters. And her Republican opponents are, as of this week, already up on TV reaching out to new voters. Michigan is too competitive of a state for us to leave anything up to chance. And the only way we'll be able to fund the kind of campaign that can win in Michigan is with your support. That's why we're asking: If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | | | | | | | | ** Thank you in advance for adding your donation today. When we send Elissa to the U.S. Senate this November, you can know that your donation today made a big difference in making it all possible. \- Team Slotkin PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN P.O. body:
| | |
---
|
---
| #OHGOPSenateDebate: What They Are Saying... "Dolan Got Under Moreno's Skin..." "Dolan Definitely Was the Aggressor and Managed to Get a lot of Attention to His Positions." "Dolan's Strategy Was Clear: Repeatedly Attack Moreno & LaRose for Hypocrisy"
---
|
For Immediate Release: January 23, 2024 | [press@DolanForOhio.com](mailto:press@DolanForOhio.com)
Cleveland, OH - On Monday night, Nexstar stations across Ohio hosted the first Ohio U.S. Senate Republican Primary Debate. Dolan earned broad praise for his appearance, establishing himself from the start as the consistent conservative in the contest that Ohio Republicans can trust to defeat Sherrod Brown, fight for Ohio and get America back on the right track.
---
|
---
| [Matt Dolan, Ohio GOP Sen. Debate](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-7HT2S47bJKyBWxHhMiyJxO1VxcwYgH7nG3VAsQDoKJ_MmcdpAuQULVoYs6DDf_VC3Pw6G3w9JUMA0W1QcX2MPudByKusJZxyzBNrh5mIhVZvxc9ADDWO_hUCrntaJJa8lgRYb6mhvolh5szo0aSvg==&c=rBS3nodoJgDYV1p12AT2Dfr66OmfIJhH1cwZel7Pze2hURXsVlrBEA==&ch=wEp4KBU3Qn0zg2wUalrH0r8HLGZuO_HSB-F8SeDxKRGQ9Ipifapr1A==), Jan 22, 2024
---
| "Public service jobs are about trust. Making sure that you're going to follow through on what you do ... This is about trust. Bernie we learned this week that we don't know if we can trust you. Your employees trusted you to follow a court order and do not destroy documents that helped their case against you. What did you do? You shredded those documents because it helped Bernie Moreno, not the employees. This is a matter of trust. What do we believe in, what are we going to get done and consistency. And I have been a conservative who has been consistent, and I've gotten things done," Matt Dolan said. Henry Gomez, [NBC News](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-7HT2S47bJKyBWxHhMiyJxO1VxcwYgH7nG3VAsQDoKJ_MmcdpAuQULVoYs6DDf_V2yU21Qcnf4q2sI6_1oehU8HRmc_t7bpK3y_hPXVOv3ExvqFP4WqjcfmsgpFWmncd_OCROrJUioWWswnCEBTwIhTiAekne2BLXcGcc6jYZp5UndqA0AkvqScxCTNOv-dTbmZSHZAgwk_pZ35YSDtEngdy2LQrudB5V7pNsYAsJ1VKxcawCOcqU38Wi4mP5HTa&c=rBS3nodoJgDYV1p12AT2Dfr66OmfIJhH1cwZel7Pze2hURXsVlrBEA==&ch=wEp4KBU3Qn0zg2wUalrH0r8HLGZuO_HSB-F8SeDxKRGQ9Ipifapr1A==): "Dolan, who was the night's chief aggressor on stage, also asserted that, given his recent legislative experience, he is the most in sync with Trump while accusing his rivals of 'phony' reverence. 'The reality is I'm the only one in this stage who has enacted Trump policies,' Dolan said.
'These two have spent a great deal of time deleting all their past comments, hateful comments on Trump. And now, because it's in their political best interests, they're saying something completely different.' [Report](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-7HT2S47bJKyBWxHhMiyJxO1VxcwYgH7nG3VAsQDoKJ_MmcdpAuQULVoYs6DDf_V2yU21Qcnf4q2sI6_1oehU8HRmc_t7bpK3y_hPXVOv3ExvqFP4WqjcfmsgpFWmncd_OCROrJUioWWswnCEBTwIhTiAekne2BLXcGcc6jYZp5UndqA0AkvqScxCTNOv-dTbmZSHZAgwk_pZ35YSDtEngdy2LQrudB5V7pNsYAsJ1VKxcawCOcqU38Wi4mP5HTa&c=rBS3nodoJgDYV1p12AT2Dfr66OmfIJhH1cwZel7Pze2hURXsVlrBEA==&ch=wEp4KBU3Qn0zg2wUalrH0r8HLGZuO_HSB-F8SeDxKRGQ9Ipifapr1A==): "Later in the debate, moderators pressed LaRose and Moreno about their shifts in rhetoric since the riot by Trump supporters at the U.S. Capitol on Jan. 6, 2021. At the time, LaRose and Moreno condemned the violence and destruction. Both have since described some of those who have been charged as political 'prisoners' -- language that echoes Trump's. Dolan slammed Moreno for a response that was sympathetic to alleged rioters. 'We just heard an absolute political phony answer,' Dolan said. 'He's trying to reinvent himself. Jan. 6 was a bad day, and I said it then. Jan. 6, was ... a bad day, and I'm saying it now.' That comment and others rankled Moreno. Andrew Tobias, [Cleveland Plain Dealer](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-7HT2S47bJKyBWxHhMiyJxO1VxcwYgH7nG3VAsQDoKJ_MmcdpAuQULVoYs6DDf_VGUXmY86i9gSdXYehoyp9PVXB553y8bHfYECloTvx0r5b7RBqwr3UIHAajPYgvEvtKXGVTDdy3GpbUWi6fa8PE0dp3kdVaceaK8LKxTtfAVCTCVLxLKjEZzgCpmlgdPWTza2HaH-Y47U=&c=rBS3nodoJgDYV1p12AT2Dfr66OmfIJhH1cwZel7Pze2hURXsVlrBEA==&ch=wEp4KBU3Qn0zg2wUalrH0r8HLGZuO_HSB-F8SeDxKRGQ9Ipifapr1A==): "[Dolan's] strategy for tonight clearly is to repeatedly attack Moreno and LaRose for hypocrisy. 'The only thing you can trust about my opponents is when the political winds change, they will change with it. I will not."
"Dolan definitely was the aggressor and managed to get a lot of attention to his positions. He eventually got under Moreno's skin..." Haley BeMiller, [Columbus Dispatch](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-7HT2S47bJKyBWxHhMiyJxO1VxcwYgH7nG3VAsQDoKJ_MmcdpAuQULVoYs6DDf_VRYXZTpRhoOWYmBWjIERSFtq-7vrmXnSUseU063Jt9zWRtehkFiCNGRw446lp7WBNfsyaH06jYCRdd6P6n4RpSL_HmoWP25baRqb7-1RTzuC4GmSdHrzfKp96fZBUhwt52XRNq_FrkuE=&c=rBS3nodoJgDYV1p12AT2Dfr66OmfIJhH1cwZel7Pze2hURXsVlrBEA==&ch=wEp4KBU3Qn0zg2wUalrH0r8HLGZuO_HSB-F8SeDxKRGQ9Ipifapr1A==): "Dolan went after Moreno for destroying documents in the middle of the lawsuit." [Report](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-7HT2S47bJKyBWxHhMiyJxO1VxcwYgH7nG3VAsQDoKJ_MmcdpAuQULVoYs6DDf_V6atGbt4m1yEqjc_qtTE0zyFNR-f8YThJULVTV-EckzJW7kd6P54hMLrGj97vJ-n7QU5k-Bjea29cIS1zOFTKJqIeNR1DHxejHIeNEn_TTE81PUSoajlAuCfHoBo5qFdBOMVbT4FmqvFdv0VL19or6MoaoPAvUHzywMw7WTFMMAZ5yGy3NHT3mNUlQ_AC6J865DC08fW87q1rt18czM60YDRP6cwfNaGAXlt_Oygn41oC--yxlIJXXz08Ofr5GBV7HB0bWnx5wwo=&c=rBS3nodoJgDYV1p12AT2Dfr66OmfIJhH1cwZel7Pze2hURXsVlrBEA==&ch=wEp4KBU3Qn0zg2wUalrH0r8HLGZuO_HSB-F8SeDxKRGQ9Ipifapr1A==): "Near the end of the debate, Dolan attacked his opponents' credibility and accused them of waffling on past positions. He specifically took aim at lawsuits Moreno faced as the owner of a Massachusetts car dealership, which accused Moreno of failing to properly pay sales employees overtime. In one case, a judge sanctioned Moreno for destroying records that flagged who worked overtime at the dealership. Moreno said the data were preserved and the reports weren't necessary, but Dolan seized on his opponent's court troubles. 'I don't know if we can trust you,' Dolan said. 'Your employees trusted you to follow a court order and to not destroy documents that helped their case against you.'" David Skolnick, [Youngstown Vindicator](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-7HT2S47bJKyBWxHhMiyJxO1VxcwYgH7nG3VAsQDoKJ_MmcdpAuQULVoYs6DDf_VW_pkxcXARpW-g51SgSQcvRXsQP5izn7u0b217NXoaOpDHR-vr3M4qkN-Y0GjdcKU32GqYZSQnMbAojxwdEhPxtYbppS23H5GlPI4ysV3EpgBuKcGZuS_wcXktZXiMSDEZeofw7Burop8bWY_8jSTWldmT4i4HeC7Bh0FwZCzALd3N5CFGj4QTQ==&c=rBS3nodoJgDYV1p12AT2Dfr66OmfIJhH1cwZel7Pze2hURXsVlrBEA==&ch=wEp4KBU3Qn0zg2wUalrH0r8HLGZuO_HSB-F8SeDxKRGQ9Ipifapr1A==): "State Sen. Matt Dolan and Secretary of State Frank LaRose took shots Monday at Moreno ... accusing him of changing his positions on immigration, support of Israel, and the Jan. 6, 2021, insurrection at the Capitol. They also went after Moreno on recent revelations that he settled more than a dozen wage theft lawsuits right before he launched his Senate campaign and admitted to shredding documents containing information that was possibly relevant to cases." [Fox8 Cleveland](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-7HT2S47bJKyBWxHhMiyJxO1VxcwYgH7nG3VAsQDoKJ_MmcdpAuQULVoYs6DDf_VmP91gCBDlSeFFke29ibVh5oFMJQcZ6cwgUH-eocnDeBtw8kjkmwODFaV_95369lfbG7-DKEjoeQIILin_mfFGO1ibTf5o55N6_FG21p4f9yds2qle8aP9ynSlf4k7JXFKB_JjKSLUCpL6TIU7gfoehrvUmk_wSwrWRU3entuaMgmY460wMULib9SuZh6mWcn&c=rBS3nodoJgDYV1p12AT2Dfr66OmfIJhH1cwZel7Pze2hURXsVlrBEA==&ch=wEp4KBU3Qn0zg2wUalrH0r8HLGZuO_HSB-F8SeDxKRGQ9Ipifapr1A==) - "A Key Moment": "Dolan said he has been consistent in his stance that the border should be secured. He said Moreno has been inconsistent on border security, claiming that his opponent worked with former New York mayor Mike Bloomberg to ask former President Barack Obama for a path to citizenship and that Moreno wanted a 'path to residency,' going so far as to claim that Moreno received awards in Cleveland for his positions on immigration. He said that Moreno now wants to deport children."
* CAMPAIGN FACT: Bernie Moreno calls for mass deportations today, but during the Obama Administration, Bernie Moreno joined with an organization founded by Michael Bloomberg to lobby Congress on a pathway to legal residency for 11 million illegal aliens.

* "Moreno also believes that there should be a pathway to residency for the 11 million authorized immigrants already living in the United States, particularly those brought to the country as children. 'We can't throw out the people who came here as children. They don't know anyone from their home countries,' says Moreno, who's the chairman of the board of Cleveland State University. 'We need to help them come out of the shadows." ([New American Economy](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-7HT2S47bJKyBWxHhMiyJxO1VxcwYgH7nG3VAsQDoKJ_MmcdpAuQULVoYs6DDf_VPw9ZuFcbdNqczqsdqm65K00e3L3Hm6uz796WNLwjNynVHgMCvM_nQx77aJKwfZ0MPBat7-lp389gRQzxFY8ZgQs9wJtCmJ9WoBEwFwppxCq0qJ-i9BLLH8zn-l19utI0eY-BX61Ylusve05cYXFw1hk-tr7BBQUIQTfsaYNDW1fHvXyjPSZMbAdIht52_zdfpsKP35iXAhE=&c=rBS3nodoJgDYV1p12AT2Dfr66OmfIJhH1cwZel7Pze2hURXsVlrBEA==&ch=wEp4KBU3Qn0zg2wUalrH0r8HLGZuO_HSB-F8SeDxKRGQ9Ipifapr1A==), 08/10/16)

* "Immigration laws should protect immigrants' interests to help them succeed. 'The goal is to help them become Americans,' Moreno says." ([New American Economy](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-7HT2S47bJKyBWxHhMiyJxO1VxcwYgH7nG3VAsQDoKJ_MmcdpAuQULVoYs6DDf_VPw9ZuFcbdNqczqsdqm65K00e3L3Hm6uz796WNLwjNynVHgMCvM_nQx77aJKwfZ0MPBat7-lp389gRQzxFY8ZgQs9wJtCmJ9WoBEwFwppxCq0qJ-i9BLLH8zn-l19utI0eY-BX61Ylusve05cYXFw1hk-tr7BBQUIQTfsaYNDW1fHvXyjPSZMbAdIht52_zdfpsKP35iXAhE=&c=rBS3nodoJgDYV1p12AT2Dfr66OmfIJhH1cwZel7Pze2hURXsVlrBEA==&ch=wEp4KBU3Qn0zg2wUalrH0r8HLGZuO_HSB-F8SeDxKRGQ9Ipifapr1A==), 08/10/16)

---
---
| [Fox8 Cleveland](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-7HT2S47bJKyBWxHhMiyJxO1VxcwYgH7nG3VAsQDoKJ_MmcdpAuQULVoYs6DDf_Vzyc0XlxS5u_YXtjywhkdBHnPJXHlpgyR14MCpxOJKCF5fP1PKMVRlFpOH7aJZgQrc-_w8J5Ov2o5l3LhEOYUCn6Eww-_WkWy8QSjJr9W8R4mtIKVAJsxi5mt1JnBr9_Xxbj7euirJaYnyafhkp1Lkg==&c=rBS3nodoJgDYV1p12AT2Dfr66OmfIJhH1cwZel7Pze2hURXsVlrBEA==&ch=wEp4KBU3Qn0zg2wUalrH0r8HLGZuO_HSB-F8SeDxKRGQ9Ipifapr1A==) Must-See Moment: "Moreno has said Israel doesn't need the U.S.' help or funding -- a view Matt Dolan has called 'isolationist.'
---
|
---
| Mehek Cooke, Political Analyst, [NBC4i Columbus](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-7HT2S47bJKyBWxHhMiyJxO1VxcwYgH7nG3VAsQDoKJ_MmcdpAuQULVoYs6DDf_Vf2ATRFw1ux6ql0QoJEiaoJ5PguzLnm5oneTOzB7FDtOi_31q5W0-74naqisakdqvS7HE0ChTYcP5CCOKIkRkgpJ0B5--spx3rUT8b4yHYztaDhitn_jmK-3Q5Z59z1vZ1zA44ovJuTzXF8mNX7jQIAC8t53PxX-6M0REJ79K8RnJMZ3ffl6AB0NvAkLUEyV50XWXmZQ3H1XFjGmTgwmdoA==&c=rBS3nodoJgDYV1p12AT2Dfr66OmfIJhH1cwZel7Pze2hURXsVlrBEA==&ch=wEp4KBU3Qn0zg2wUalrH0r8HLGZuO_HSB-F8SeDxKRGQ9Ipifapr1A==): "Matt Dolan, who has been very successful in balancing budgets in the Senate." Dan Sewell, Columnist, [Cincinnati Enquirer](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-7HT2S47bJKyBWxHhMiyJxO1VxcwYgH7nG3VAsQDoKJ_MmcdpAuQULVoYs6DDf_VwNMOj21wGFpnfqCFIPxwQlS-QzzDc95lyWQm4AanKvX_UQJ9lhnWEkJ3rRZPVMINyYyUU7CD4qbWVDAykdO_kot2fCREKEGuxQABTUxJnRMs3vlugb8HuF61uB9JqlTg&c=rBS3nodoJgDYV1p12AT2Dfr66OmfIJhH1cwZel7Pze2hURXsVlrBEA==&ch=wEp4KBU3Qn0zg2wUalrH0r8HLGZuO_HSB-F8SeDxKRGQ9Ipifapr1A==): "Moreno is the Trump backed candidate in #OHSEN Bonus: Moreno has suggested 'white reparations' for the Civil War" Doug Moormann, [Mayor of Madeira](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-7HT2S47bJKyBWxHhMiyJxO1VxcwYgH7nG3VAsQDoKJ_MmcdpAuQULVoYs6DDf_Vakrp32jBYQVm14UWJU6LhRPqAL4F3eU0IAGiFOZKISDQPWkk9okpSjF6BYFHnMApXqvZbGt9r095wqyCv4wJ-YU7jmxTLXNvknt27avouIwMlJgD1knq9fzdYb2Yso9JOOzuauyTb3A=&c=rBS3nodoJgDYV1p12AT2Dfr66OmfIJhH1cwZel7Pze2hURXsVlrBEA==&ch=wEp4KBU3Qn0zg2wUalrH0r8HLGZuO_HSB-F8SeDxKRGQ9Ipifapr1A==): "Trust, Principles, Consistent Conservative. I like what I hear from @dolan for Ohio" ***
"MUST SEE NEWS OF THE NIGHT" Bernie Moreno has come under fire in recent days for refusing to disclose lawsuit settlement details and ignoring directives from a Massachusetts court to preserve legal documents. In a deposition, Moreno admitted to shredding the documents. It was branded by pundits as "news of the night..." More information:
---
---
"Former car dealership owner turned GOP candidate Bernie Moreno, whose Ohio Senate race could determine whether Republicans regain control of the chamber, settled over a dozen wage theft lawsuits in the months before launching his campaign last year, according to court documents reviewed by Business Insider. Those settlements came after a jury ordered Moreno to pay over $400,000 to two former employees at his Massachusetts dealership for failing to pay overtime in accordance with state labor laws. As he faced those lawsuits, Moreno admitted in a deposition to shredding documents containing information that was potentially relevant to the case, despite being instructed to preserve records -- drawing a rebuke from a state judge." (Metzger, Brian. "Trump-backed Ohio Senate candidate shredded documents as he faced a lawsuit accusing him of wage theft" [Business Insider](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-7HT2S47bJKyBWxHhMiyJxO1VxcwYgH7nG3VAsQDoKJ_MmcdpAuQULVoYs6DDf_VKNn859LMY2YqHCmk9pPYY3E07c72lwLLOOdvxBIxN8PDPunsEDnwbrAMni00zpgBqj02V4FD-aYRRFDYpGigjWkg2v0G7ZhZkTpHq8ZsIVlCiKN-n-pX00WzH1ZH8ZyWCdPZmTc6kEc3VzrVqUMjY803F_CwO6FUfpn1Gh0xdmFAmlEbkEOHXxcWV8eTZCRF&c=rBS3nodoJgDYV1p12AT2Dfr66OmfIJhH1cwZel7Pze2hURXsVlrBEA==&ch=wEp4KBU3Qn0zg2wUalrH0r8HLGZuO_HSB-F8SeDxKRGQ9Ipifapr1A==), Jan 19, 2024) "In January 2023, Moreno settled 14 of the 16 related lawsuits, court records show. Just 3 months later in April 2023, Moreno launched his comeback bid for US Senate ... Moreno's campaign did not disclose those settlement amounts to Business Insider, and lawyers for Adem and the other former employees declined to comment for this story." (Metzger, Brian. "Trump-backed Ohio Senate candidate shredded documents as he faced a lawsuit accusing him of wage theft" [Business Insider](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-7HT2S47bJKyBWxHhMiyJxO1VxcwYgH7nG3VAsQDoKJ_MmcdpAuQULVoYs6DDf_VKNn859LMY2YqHCmk9pPYY3E07c72lwLLOOdvxBIxN8PDPunsEDnwbrAMni00zpgBqj02V4FD-aYRRFDYpGigjWkg2v0G7ZhZkTpHq8ZsIVlCiKN-n-pX00WzH1ZH8ZyWCdPZmTc6kEc3VzrVqUMjY803F_CwO6FUfpn1Gh0xdmFAmlEbkEOHXxcWV8eTZCRF&c=rBS3nodoJgDYV1p12AT2Dfr66OmfIJhH1cwZel7Pze2hURXsVlrBEA==&ch=wEp4KBU3Qn0zg2wUalrH0r8HLGZuO_HSB-F8SeDxKRGQ9Ipifapr1A==), Jan 19, 2024) "Bernie Moreno, a Trump-backed candidate for Ohio's crucial U.S. Senate seat who touts his success in business, faced multiple lawsuits alleging discrimination against employees in the run-up to the sale of his high-end Cleveland car dealership, an Associated Press review has found. Three discrimination suits were filed in Cuyahoga County between 2015 and 2017. Two accused Moreno and Bernie Moreno Cos. of gender and age discrimination, respectively. The third, in which Moreno was not named, alleged race discrimination against a dealership run by a BMC subsidiary." (Carr Smyth, Julie.
