clean_body: | | | | | #OHGOPSenateDebate: What They Are Saying... "Dolan Got Under Moreno's Skin..." "Dolan Definitely Was the Aggressor and Managed to Get a lot of Attention to His Positions." "Dolan's Strategy Was Clear: Repeatedly Attack Moreno & LaRose for Hypocrisy" | For Immediate Release: January 23, 2024 | mailto:press@DolanForOhio.com Cleveland, OH - On Monday night, Nexstar stations across Ohio hosted the first Ohio U.S. Senate Republican Primary Debate. Dolan earned broad praise for his appearance, establishing himself from the start as the consistent conservative in the contest that Ohio Republicans can trust to defeat Sherrod Brown, fight for Ohio and get America back on the right track. | | ==, Jan 22, 2024 | "Public service jobs are about trust. Making sure that you're going to follow through on what you do ... This is about trust. Bernie we learned this week that we don't know if we can trust you. Your employees trusted you to follow a court order and do not destroy documents that helped their case against you. What did you do? You shredded those documents because it helped Bernie Moreno, not the employees. This is a matter of trust. What do we believe in, what are we going to get done and consistency. And I have been a conservative who has been consistent, and I've gotten things done," Matt Dolan said. Henry Gomez, ==: "Dolan, who was the night's chief aggressor on stage, also asserted that, given his recent legislative experience, he is the most in sync with Trump while accusing his rivals of 'phony' reverence. 'The reality is I'm the only one in this stage who has enacted Trump policies,' Dolan said. 'These two have spent a great deal of time deleting all their past comments, hateful comments on Trump. And now, because it's in their political best interests, they're saying something completely different.' ==: "Later in the debate, moderators pressed LaRose and Moreno about their shifts in rhetoric since the riot by Trump supporters at the U.S. Capitol on Jan. 6, 2021. At the time, LaRose and Moreno condemned the violence and destruction. Both have since described some of those who have been charged as political 'prisoners' -- language that echoes Trump's. Dolan slammed Moreno for a response that was sympathetic to alleged rioters. 'We just heard an absolute political phony answer,' Dolan said. 'He's trying to reinvent himself. Jan. 6 was a bad day, and I said it then. Jan. 6, was ... a bad day, and I'm saying it now.' That comment and others rankled Moreno. Andrew Tobias, ==: "[Dolan's] strategy for tonight clearly is to repeatedly attack Moreno and LaRose for hypocrisy. 'The only thing you can trust about my opponents is when the political winds change, they will change with it. I will not." "Dolan definitely was the aggressor and managed to get a lot of attention to his positions. He eventually got under Moreno's skin..." Haley BeMiller, ==: "Dolan went after Moreno for destroying documents in the middle of the lawsuit." ==: "Near the end of the debate, Dolan attacked his opponents' credibility and accused them of waffling on past positions. He specifically took aim at lawsuits Moreno faced as the owner of a Massachusetts car dealership, which accused Moreno of failing to properly pay sales employees overtime. In one case, a judge sanctioned Moreno for destroying records that flagged who worked overtime at the dealership. Moreno said the data were preserved and the reports weren't necessary, but Dolan seized on his opponent's court troubles. 'I don't know if we can trust you,' Dolan said. 'Your employees trusted you to follow a court order and to not destroy documents that helped their case against you.'" David Skolnick, ==: "State Sen. Matt Dolan and Secretary of State Frank LaRose took shots Monday at Moreno ... accusing him of changing his positions on immigration, support of Israel, and the Jan. 6, 2021, insurrection at the Capitol. They also went after Moreno on recent revelations that he settled more than a dozen wage theft lawsuits right before he launched his Senate campaign and admitted to shredding documents containing information that was possibly relevant to cases." == - "A Key Moment": "Dolan said he has been consistent in his stance that the border should be secured. He said Moreno has been inconsistent on border security, claiming that his opponent worked with former New York mayor Mike Bloomberg to ask former President Barack Obama for a path to citizenship and that Moreno wanted a 'path to residency,' going so far as to claim that Moreno received awards in Cleveland for his positions on immigration. He said that Moreno now wants to deport children." CAMPAIGN FACT: Bernie Moreno calls for mass deportations today, but during the Obama Administration, Bernie Moreno joined with an organization founded by Michael Bloomberg to lobby Congress on a pathway to legal residency for 11 million illegal aliens. "Moreno also believes that there should be a pathway to residency for the 11 million authorized immigrants already living in the United States, particularly those brought to the country as children. 'We can't throw out the people who came here as children. They don't know anyone from their home countries,' says Moreno, who's the chairman of the board of Cleveland State University. 'We need to help them come out of the shadows." (==, 08/10/16) "Immigration laws should protect immigrants' interests to help them succeed. 'The goal is to help them become Americans,' Moreno says." (==, 08/10/16) | == Must-See Moment: "Moreno has said Israel doesn't need the U.S.' help or funding -- a view Matt Dolan has called 'isolationist.' | | Mehek Cooke, Political Analyst, ==: "Matt Dolan, who has been very successful in balancing budgets in the Senate." Dan Sewell, Columnist, ==: "Moreno is the Trump backed candidate in #OHSEN Bonus: Moreno has suggested 'white reparations' for the Civil War" Doug Moormann, ==: "Trust, Principles, Consistent Conservative. I like what I hear from @dolan for Ohio" * "MUST SEE NEWS OF THE NIGHT" Bernie Moreno has come under fire in recent days for refusing to disclose lawsuit settlement details and ignoring directives from a Massachusetts court to preserve legal documents. In a deposition, Moreno admitted to shredding the documents. It was branded by pundits as "news of the night..." More information: "Former car dealership owner turned GOP candidate Bernie Moreno, whose Ohio Senate race could determine whether Republicans regain control of the chamber, settled over a dozen wage theft lawsuits in the months before launching his campaign last year, according to court documents reviewed by Business Insider. Those settlements came after a jury ordered Moreno to pay over $400,000 to two former employees at his Massachusetts dealership for failing to pay overtime in accordance with state labor laws. As he faced those lawsuits, Moreno admitted in a deposition to shredding documents containing information that was potentially relevant to the case, despite being instructed to preserve records -- drawing a rebuke from a state judge." (Metzger, Brian. "Trump-backed Ohio Senate candidate shredded documents as he faced a lawsuit accusing him of wage theft" ==, Jan 19, 2024) "In January 2023, Moreno settled 14 of the 16 related lawsuits, court records show. Just 3 months later in April 2023, Moreno launched his comeback bid for US Senate ... Moreno's campaign did not disclose those settlement amounts to Business Insider, and lawyers for Adem and the other former employees declined to comment for this story." (Metzger, Brian. "Trump-backed Ohio Senate candidate shredded documents as he faced a lawsuit accusing him of wage theft" ==, Jan 19, 2024) "Bernie Moreno, a Trump-backed candidate for Ohio's crucial U.S. Senate seat who touts his success in business, faced multiple lawsuits alleging discrimination against employees in the run-up to the sale of his high-end Cleveland car dealership, an Associated Press review has found. Three discrimination suits were filed in Cuyahoga County between 2015 and 2017. Two accused Moreno and Bernie Moreno Cos. of gender and age discrimination, respectively. The third, in which Moreno was not named, alleged race discrimination against a dealership run by a BMC subsidiary." (Carr Smyth, Julie. "Businessman Bernie Moreno, Trump's Senate pick in Ohio, faced discrimination lawsuits, the AP finds" ==, Jan. 17, 2024) | | == | == == == == | | | | | | | Paid for by Dolan for Ohio | PO Box 91212, Cleveland, OH 44101 | | Sent by mailto:info@dolanforohio.com

[YES!!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77592452/450898587/2001259261?refcode=20240122_AOTL_F_Question_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE2ZWI1MGQzLTEwYmEtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzg0OCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Bdy0RsLcgIV7wpBr7Pxew2Gs00GnGYpJMatNypleNW0=)

Several states — including crucial battleground states — entered the new year with undecided congressional and state legislative maps. Time is running out for us to ensure every voter has a fair chance at electing the candidates of their choice.
With the presidential caucus and primary season kicking off the 2024 elections in earnest, it’s crunch time, team, and this movement needs your help.
[**Say you agree: We need to finalize fair maps in time for this year’s election! And then let’s get ready to work together.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77592456/450898588/2001259261?refcode=20240122_AOTL_F_Question_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE2ZWI1MGQzLTEwYmEtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzg0OCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Bdy0RsLcgIV7wpBr7Pxew2Gs00GnGYpJMatNypleNW0=)

> [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77592458/450898592/-438804700?refcode=20240122_AOTL_F_Question_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE2ZWI1MGQzLTEwYmEtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzg0OCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Bdy0RsLcgIV7wpBr7Pxew2Gs00GnGYpJMatNypleNW0=)

> Team,
> The first presidential primaries of the 2024 election cycle are just days away, underscoring the urgent need for states to finalize maps that give every voter a chance to vote for their candidates of choice.
> But anti-democracy extremists are working feverishly behind the scenes to manipulate maps in a desperate attempt to hold on to power. Let’s be clear: by trying to seize power for themselves, these folks are trying to _steal_ power from voters.
> That’s what gerrymandering does. And that’s why we’re working to end it. **We believe voters — not politicians — should decide elections.**
> **[That work matters a ton right now — chip in today to help All On The Line keep and return voting power to the people and ensure every American has an equal say in our government.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77592459/450898594/-438804700?refcode=20240122_AOTL_F_Question_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE2ZWI1MGQzLTEwYmEtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzg0OCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Bdy0RsLcgIV7wpBr7Pxew2Gs00GnGYpJMatNypleNW0=)**

> ---
> Your contribution to All On The Line supports a multi-prong approach to ending gerrymandering on a state and national level.
> With your help, we’re building a groundswell of grassroots support for the fair maps movement, mobilizing passionate people to demand action when unfair maps threaten the rights of voters, and returning the power to decide elections to people across the nation.
> [**With the first primaries and caucuses taking place in just a few days, we need all hands on deck in our fight for fairness. If you can, please make a contribution of $20.24 or more to All On The Line today.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77592464/450898598/-438804700?amount=20.24&refcode=20240122_AOTL_F_Question_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE2ZWI1MGQzLTEwYmEtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzg0OCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Bdy0RsLcgIV7wpBr7Pxew2Gs00GnGYpJMatNypleNW0=)

Are you ready?

**THIS IS IT. THIS IS GO TIME.**
Friend,

Today marks a significant and game-changing campaign milestone - **the first-in-the-nation New Hampshire primary election!**

_Are you ready?_ 🇺🇸

Polls are open across New Hampshire, and Granite Staters are getting a chance to cast their votes.

The best part is...

Today voters have a choice to elect a new generational leader and move on from the drama and chaos of the past.

A choice to elect a leader who will **DEFEAT** Joe Biden on Election Day this November and right the ship to save our future.
[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=9b32dd931b57408990799e67e4cb463e&_e=DiRNT0XJlemJfYI9PJSljw0Ctg7v_tPNdjg6ZHPbjbcdewh0Df_vrTU8Dpj7ptxEpTjG4IP15y2BMEumt_6kyfxLDyZvhmXDjCW9UujP7sEHSGkeKRkpEV19kcCaUOnKGj6WvaVq3rlp2S458JiRNa1Ba1r2pYCL1Cpw_oXg15u8OfSWpaZ3dzoTPn9CAYrTp3o2FjT4qg8znvlseDPGw77G82_xwTLRQ-NPyVDbRafoDx8fiPI2TRiQo3p1HsCfM8AU_GYywRZGvWiyw2AIqKs93W7PxlyyYOKc2lXJq990nM54sw_2dkBCoXPJEzBKfObhXrAS2H0voK7CdRfTYtecrq0dgwyfSWjICbynv6s%3D)
Making it to this point of the campaign is incredible, and I'm so grateful for each of **YOU** who have helped us reach this.

**NOW,** it's time to keep the momentum surging, make history, and show America we are in it to _**WIN IT.**_

**[Can you please rush a donation of just $20.24 to send a SURGE of support to my campaign before Granite Staters cast their votes?](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=9b32dd931b57408990799e67e4cb463e&_e=DiRNT0XJlemJfYI9PJSljw0Ctg7v_tPNdjg6ZHPbjbcdewh0Df_vrTU8Dpj7ptxEpTjG4IP15y2BMEumt_6kyfxLDyZvhmXDjCW9UujP7sEHSGkeKRkpEV19kcCaUOnKGj6WvaVq3rlp2S458JiRNa1Ba1r2pYCL1Cpw_oXg15u8OfSWpaZ3dzoTPn9CAYrTbhFzcIWObsa3jLKVknIB10MIrm4p5TQUs37coKDThkzBdqJeqeoE2ZXwDhdBVLUBnCiUox2aBqgeqlzMlgjhDdwoYnNunz4nyRhxVDJv7V_Irn8hwk5K5zEDtAkz9K7NmE_j3ApVE0H32ApeA6rV50G_MVfmOoYmONou4tr8TTc%3D)**
| [DONATE](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=9b32dd931b57408990799e67e4cb463e&_e=DiRNT0XJlemJfYI9PJSljw0Ctg7v_tPNdjg6ZHPbjbcdewh0Df_vrTU8Dpj7ptxEpTjG4IP15y2BMEumt_6kyfxLDyZvhmXDjCW9UujP7sEHSGkeKRkpEV19kcCaUOnKGj6WvaVq3rlp2S458JiRNa1Ba1r2pYCL1Cpw_oXg15u8OfSWpaZ3dzoTPn9CAYrTMNmP0FohiIyANMnhb65Q4oG3s5wRNw3hkO69_CLdU6LIfwkjEW99BCKe8AXQvSBZ7pdQOPDBShESggseZFXcuiwFyn-rYAXV63ITLDWHd9OmxThRslXSWxq2mgfiMy1w_NkoEzTx8Fbl4hIihz-GQp9cjot9ZmdERTasqbGypwo%3D)
---

**Going into today, one thing is clear:** Voters are resonating with our message, and our movement is growing stronger each and every day.

Granite Staters and voters across America are looking at the fact that we can't afford another Trump-Biden rematch. We need a leader who offers no drama, no chaos, no nonsense - just results!

_**But we 're running out of time.**_

**[Will you rush a donation to show the strength of our movement today?](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=9b32dd931b57408990799e67e4cb463e&_e=DiRNT0XJlemJfYI9PJSljw0Ctg7v_tPNdjg6ZHPbjbcdewh0Df_vrTU8Dpj7ptxEpTjG4IP15y2BMEumt_6kyfxLDyZvhmXDjCW9UujP7sEHSGkeKRkpEV19kcCaUOnKGj6WvaVq3rlp2S458JiRNa1Ba1r2pYCL1Cpw_oXg15u8OfSWpaZ3dzoTPn9CAYrTom7kNH_PbwUSK7JwIWgJuSv1hW6U6v5mK6-O_jiEe8WUVFfNViGP43OvnF8W7mzRbsDumgnUz2HblaTrhvTpHDkOvPgBHa0GKQM5RUxefR-vTCLYIrK6N2EK8ywiYMjCafJhc9fhUCouLOQ7xllipA-sioTAgvUPvHoakA4vvr4%3D)**

My team and I will be out in full force today making a final push to reach voters, make phone calls, knock doors, and get the vote out before the polls close tonight... but we cannot do it alone.

_We need**YOU** to join us during this critical stretch._

**[Here are just some of the things a donation of just $10 will help us accomplish:](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=9b32dd931b57408990799e67e4cb463e&_e=DiRNT0XJlemJfYI9PJSljw0Ctg7v_tPNdjg6ZHPbjbcdewh0Df_vrTU8Dpj7ptxEpTjG4IP15y2BMEumt_6kyfxLDyZvhmXDjCW9UujP7sEHSGkeKRkpEV19kcCaUOnKGj6WvaVq3rlp2S458JiRNa1Ba1r2pYCL1Cpw_oXg15u8OfSWpaZ3dzoTPn9CAYrT1p1HYx1C1S1m6kS_Vyi-JeOdkW5n8rGJ5qH0Oa62j74exBSpM7LT-MWaVhnXSivjeWfSLwDzCu-YdOWwg7N5vgrMZXIDyU12G3NIi7p69ObJ50X6cqq324OOUTrOqjZ4RudbhJUTr5is83UVjuvEaKHmzKRPB1KuU6hFl9zYvLY%3D)**
* Reach undecided and on-the-fence voters with my message.
* Share my vision with as many voters as possible.
* Amplify my message across the airwaves.
* Encourage voters in New Hampshire to get out to vote _**TODAY.**_
* **WIN the fight to save our future!**

Please join us now...before it is too late.

You can help determine the outcome of this race and our country's future.

[SUPPORT OUR MOVEMENT NOW](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=9b32dd931b57408990799e67e4cb463e&_e=DiRNT0XJlemJfYI9PJSljw0Ctg7v_tPNdjg6ZHPbjbcdewh0Df_vrTU8Dpj7ptxEpTjG4IP15y2BMEumt_6kyfxLDyZvhmXDjCW9UujP7sEHSGkeKRkpEV19kcCaUOnKGj6WvaVq3rlp2S458JiRNa1Ba1r2pYCL1Cpw_oXg15u8OfSWpaZ3dzoTPn9CAYrTe_AT5Uc7WhCOqcm1qyM1had0oB3bmAddbobA5bGb6S9Q3M23vtEg_3ToOJoFS95_Oyi2kLoKFQWQjE4Pqw6CEjrNX7C0p4LMXIjHwkzBLOzOw2To-qV6J5aewJpLpsa103FD_VlO5tugADr0ISKlG9sv3lkuaMyI4tBwX0XmmwU%3D)
---

Thank you in advance.

**Let's do this!**
My very best,

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=9b32dd931b57408990799e67e4cb463e&_e=DiRNT0XJlemJfYI9PJSljw0Ctg7v_tPNdjg6ZHPbjbcdewh0Df_vrTU8Dpj7ptxEpTjG4IP15y2BMEumt_6kyfxLDyZvhmXDjCW9UujP7sEHSGkeKRkpEV19kcCaUOnKGj6WvaVq3rlp2S458JiRNa1Ba1r2pYCL1Cpw_oXg15u8OfSWpaZ3dzoTPn9CAYrTVraWdcuPtYYRQioqkSzbDNsQsj4xwFljV9R496aEO0aEamz4dmWopfw6QZGq_o-X9QALbxTgUpg3N7WkK4wUKZuE-N4UKEiHh3QIMiGE-0OTKMmGIsO716B_fT0cq61v0JiojJsp1a9kx-r7iLaFRhE2plAi4lmu-wOUp0n0Upw%3D)

clean_body: Are you ready? | | | | | THIS IS IT. THIS IS GO TIME. Friend, Today marks a significant and game-changing campaign milestone - the first-in-the-nation New Hampshire primary election! Are you ready? 🇺🇸 Polls are open across New Hampshire, and Granite Staters are getting a chance to cast their votes. The best part is... Today voters have a choice to elect a new generational leader and move on from the drama and chaos of the past. A choice to elect a leader who will DEFEAT Joe Biden on Election Day this November and right the ship to save our future. Making it to this point of the campaign is incredible, and I'm so grateful for each of YOU who have helped us reach this. NOW, it's time to keep the momentum surging, make history, and show America we are in it to WIN IT. | Going into today, one thing is clear: Voters are resonating with our message, and our movement is growing stronger each and every day. Granite Staters and voters across America are looking at the fact that we can't afford another Trump-Biden rematch. We need a leader who offers no drama, no chaos, no nonsense - just results! But we 're running out of time. My team and I will be out in full force today making a final push to reach voters, make phone calls, knock doors, and get the vote out before the polls close tonight... but we cannot do it alone. We needYOU to join us during this critical stretch. Reach undecided and on-the-fence voters with my message. Share my vision with as many voters as possible. Amplify my message across the airwaves. Encourage voters in New Hampshire to get out to vote TODAY. WIN the fight to save our future! Please join us now...before it is too late. You can help determine the outcome of this race and our country's future. Thank you in advance. Let's do this!** My very best, Nikki R. Peter, It’s Mary Peltola, proudly serving Alaska in Congress. I’m always saying that my campaign to keep representing Alaska in Congress is a tossup. Here’s what that really means:
* I have **multiple opponents already running against me** , and there’s still plenty of time for more opponents to jump in the race.
* **Every single vote I take in Washington is scrutinized** , spun, and used to attack me by those who want to unseat me.
* **Dark money groups are digging through video clips of me as we speak** , trying to find footage of me saying things they can use in attack ads and take out of context.
* Special interest groups are already **blasting me in attack ads** , and spending money to lay the groundwork for my defeat.

Peter, running in such a competitive race is exhausting, stressful, and challenging. But I’m up for the challenge because there’s few things I love more than giving Alaskans a seat at the table in Washington. [**I’m in this no matter the odds, but I can only win with your support, Peter – because we can only defeat these special interest millions together. clean_body: | | | Peter, It’s Mary Peltola, proudly serving Alaska in Congress. I’m always saying that my campaign to keep representing Alaska in Congress is a tossup. Here’s what that really means: I have multiple opponents already running against me , and there’s still plenty of time for more opponents to jump in the race. Every single vote I take in Washington is scrutinized , spun, and used to attack me by those who want to unseat me. Dark money groups are digging through video clips of me as we speak , trying to find footage of me saying things they can use in attack ads and take out of context. Special interest groups are already blasting me in attack ads , and spending money to lay the groundwork for my defeat. Peter, running in such a competitive race is exhausting, stressful, and challenging. But I’m up for the challenge because there’s few things I love more than giving Alaskans a seat at the table in Washington. Your support means so much to me, Mary Peltola Congresswoman, Alaska’s At-Large Congressional District If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Eric Sorensen and Mary Peltola will go through immediately:__ | ** | ---|--- | | ** | | Paid For By Eric Sorensen for Illinois Eric Sorensen is a meteorologist born and raised in Rockford, IL representing IL-17 in Congress. He’s seen firsthand the importance of establishing trust with the community, and he’s determined to use his expertise as a climate communicator to fight for Illinoisans on environmental justice and more in Washington. To support Eric, P.O. Box 1172 Moline, IL 61265 United States | | Sent via . clean_body: Fellow American, please read this before tomorrow. This is urgent. | | | Drop out of the race? The party has just begun! When they impeached me TWICE, they thought you 'd ABANDON me. When they arrested me and took my mugshot, they PRAYED you 'd throw in the towel. And when they ERASED me off the ballot, they were hoping, begging, PLEADING I 'd drop out of the race. But here's what they don't know... I 'LL NEVER GIVE UP! I'LL NEVER SURRENDER! BECAUSE OF YOUR SUPPORT, WE WILL MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! WE WILL MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! Thank you, | | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States | Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. name: Adam Schiff
subject: Re: Steve Garvey’s debate performance
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=5188%2E5257348%2Ev9-5Ut ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek,

Last night, I was proud to stand on the debate stage in Los Angeles and
share our campaign’s unifying message directly with the people of
California.

But there’s something I can’t get off my mind,
Derek. [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2024_abs_em_debate.U6fU0L&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20240123_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=1004&akid=5188%2E5257348%2Ev9-5Ut ]Before I share more,
will you pitch in
$10 to
help me defeat MAGA enablers and stand up for Californians in the Senate?
With just a few days until early voting begins, our campaign is working
day and night to earn every last vote.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2024_abs_em_debate.U6fU0L&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20240123_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=1005&akid=5188%2E5257348%2Ev9-5Ut ]DONATE
$10

In the middle of the debate, my Republican opponent Steve Garvey refused
to say whether he’d support Donald Trump — saying “When the time
comes...I’ll make my choice.”

That’s an unacceptable answer. So I asked him plainly: What more do you
need to denounce Donald Trump?

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2024_abs_em_debate.U6fU0L&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20240123_AM1_V1_S1&t=1006&akid=5188%2E5257348%2Ev9-5Ut ]Adam Schiff on the debate stage with Steve Garvey

For Steve Garvey, it wasn’t enough that Donald Trump undermined our
alliance with NATO.

Or that he threw our country’s national security under the bus to buddy up
with Vladimir Putin.

Or that he dismantled Roe v. Wade and stripped millions of women of their
reproductive freedom.

Or that he incited the January 6 insurrection and attempted to overthrow
the government.

That’s where Steve Garvey and I differ,
Derek.

I was censured by MAGA Republicans for standing up to the corrupt
president. And I would do it again.

I’m not afraid to say that Donald Trump is a danger to our country. So is
Mitch McConnell. And Jim Jordan. And the rest of his MAGA enablers who’ve
worked tirelessly to hide the truth.

The people of California deserve to know whether Steve Garvey believes
that a President who incited a violent attack on the Capitol should be
trusted with power again. If he can’t answer the most of basic of
questions, he cannot be trusted to represent Californians in the Senate.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2024_abs_em_debate.U6fU0L&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20240123_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=1007&akid=5188%2E5257348%2Ev9-5Ut ]I am the strongest candidate to take on MAGA enablers like Steve Garvey
and deliver for Californians in the Senate. With early voting beginning in
just a matter of days, will you rush in
$10 to win
this race?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=jan2024_abs_em_debate.EO9oH-&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20240123_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=1008&akid=5188%2E5257348%2Ev9-5Ut ]EXPRESS DONATE
$10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=jan2024_abs_em_debate.EO9oH-&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20240123_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=25&t=1009&akid=5188%2E5257348%2Ev9-5Ut ]EXPRESS DONATE
$25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=jan2024_abs_em_debate.EO9oH-&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20240123_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=50&t=1010&akid=5188%2E5257348%2Ev9-5Ut ]EXPRESS DONATE
$50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=jan2024_abs_em_debate.EO9oH-&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20240123_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=100&t=1011&akid=5188%2E5257348%2Ev9-5Ut ]EXPRESS DONATE
$100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=jan2024_abs_em_debate.EO9oH-&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20240123_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=250&t=1012&akid=5188%2E5257348%2Ev9-5Ut ]EXPRESS DONATE
$250

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2024_abs_em_debate.U6fU0L&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20240123_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1013&akid=5188%2E5257348%2Ev9-5Ut ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Thank you,

Adam

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2024_abs_em_debate.U6fU0L&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20240123_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1014&akid=5188%2E5257348%2Ev9-5Ut ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/3492?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20240123_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1015&akid=5188%2E5257348%2Ev9-5Ut ]DONATE WEEKLY

What happens when extremists take over?
We've seen it in our state party and in the US House. Suffice it to say, it's not good.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/Extremism.png]
Your donation helps fund my campaign and ensure we can continue spreading our message of unity, progress, and hope. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
CONTRIBUTE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bobvsbergman?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
CONTRIBUTE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bobvsbergman?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
CONTRIBUTE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bobvsbergman?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50]
Friend,
When extremists took over the Republican Party in Michigan, it caused party bankruptcy, disarray, physical fights, and decreased support in our state.
In the Nation, it has caused t he worst leadership in House history , with Congress barely passing meaningful legislation and physical altercations on the House floor.
Not to mention, with the help of my opponent, Rep. Jack Bergman, extreme lawmakers ignited the Jan. 6th insurrection on the US Capitol.
Friend, I am a proud Democrat willing to work with the party of Lincoln, Teddy Roosevelt, and Eisenhower on bipartisan legislation to heal our country. Today's GOP is a far cry from its foundations. To get more done, we must take extremists out of politics, including Rep. Bergman.
That's why I am reaching out to you today. Thank you for joining me in this fight for a better future for our community and our country.
Together, we can create a better Michigan and a more unified America. Help me send extremists home.
Grateful,
Bob Lorinser
Dr. Bob Lorinser
Candidate for US Congress
Northern Michigan / Upper Peninsula
Democrat, MI01
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/dbsignature.png]
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bobvsbergman]
Or, send a check to:
FRIENDS OF DR. BOB
PO BOX 936
Marquette, MI 49855
United States
PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR. BOB LORINSER

name: 4Patriots
subject: Food Shortage Notice
body:
[View in Web Browser](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kD1vwjAQhn_NZSOy7-wYBg-kKB1adazU0fijGNkkOIHAv69IaYdb7uO5R6_JQ4rhrkG1gHiIbgREoC0gnr_mXC7H_Pa6urbt6tx8ZPkY4gsgTvfB_28-IbXPJqZHV-0qpyk4JiqvuWINI46qqQ5abJy1vlEyrC3na87lZk8oKXhPMjhRRY0MBeNIXJEgUYfgGbr9nhwTxJ0DwZY_tcm-RGv4OM2mlL7Pte1zlfRhmoZxEesAu7n09elik7-Mv2e2z4DdUxmwuz7q04Tb8TafWqBuCYF2dym7d7Wlqmg3zDGlODYKBPv-o_wEAAD___LtYBI)

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJx0js1uqzAQhZ9m2IHGMwbCgkVyEVdV1XbdVWT8k7jBhRgnUd6-Ioq663LO-WbmU2Eevbu3UO-A6OjNAkTAWyA6f95CvHyF1__5dbfLz9V7KNeS_gFRus_2l3weKWxQflzTustMy86gzGwraqyQBdVVdmyVa9hqqlHxBitRqqExQklpndNUapX5lpAkCmJRs2RZOGeRzDCwQcnCGJD4-FOoYKPXSizppmKcplDoKWRje0xpXh5iPVAv5xRPJNYOqNej1yfgPsWrN8CdoAYboGrbv3TriE0JVCnn9stlWIMNY_4UwnybL6IptdisK5cU9lqFWfnDN3DHbx_5X3QWWzPf_Dj6papB4uHhr6fwEwAA__890W2b). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJx0js1uqzAQhZ9m2IHGMwbCgkVyEVdV1XbdVWT8k7jBhRgnUd6-Ioq663LO-WbmU2Eevbu3UO-A6OjNAkTAWyA6f95CvHyF1__5dbfLz9V7KNeS_gFRus_2l3weKWxQflzTustMy86gzGwraqyQBdVVdmyVa9hqqlHxBitRqqExQklpndNUapX5lpAkCmJRs2RZOGeRzDCwQcnCGJD4-FOoYKPXSizppmKcplDoKWRje0xpXh5iPVAv5xRPJNYOqNej1yfgPsWrN8CdoAYboGrbv3TriE0JVCnn9stlWIMNY_4UwnybL6IptdisK5cU9lqFWfnDN3DHbx_5X3QWWzPf_Dj6papB4uHhr6fwEwAA__890W2b) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJx0js1uqzAQhZ9m2IHGMwbCgkVyEVdV1XbdVWT8k7jBhRgnUd6-Ioq663LO-WbmU2Eevbu3UO-A6OjNAkTAWyA6f95CvHyF1__5dbfLz9V7KNeS_gFRus_2l3weKWxQflzTustMy86gzGwraqyQBdVVdmyVa9hqqlHxBitRqqExQklpndNUapX5lpAkCmJRs2RZOGeRzDCwQcnCGJD4-FOoYKPXSizppmKcplDoKWRje0xpXh5iPVAv5xRPJNYOqNej1yfgPsWrN8CdoAYboGrbv3TriE0JVCnn9stlWIMNY_4UwnybL6IptdisK5cU9lqFWfnDN3DHbx_5X3QWWzPf_Dj6papB4uHhr6fwEwAA__890W2b) on these survival food kits while you can.
---

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **America First War Room**

108 S Washington St. Suite 300
Alexandria, VA 22314

[Unsubscribe](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kD1TwzAMhn-NsjVnS45NBw8tPTPAsTMm_qDm4jq1E3L991xLYH0lPXru7dM0xnDToI6AeI6uAiLQARCvH2sqy1d6fdl9H4-7q3xP3X2Iz4A43yb_v7lBWp_6ON5TdWqcpuCYaLzmiklGHJVszjrsAyeU8slzhbh3wlkfeCctc152PWuiRoaCcSSuSJBoQ_AM3TCQY4K4cyDY40_bJ1-i7Xmd176UnFNrc2pGfZ7nqT7EDKBZS24vix39Un_PbE6AZlMGNHUZqi1xmmO-VECzXLZk8EDm0Qidbl1n3tSBmqLdtMZxjFUqEOzzD_kTAAD__0EwZb4)

name: Jane Fonda
subject: 📢 Greta’s calling. Time to answer. ✊
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
Will you stand with me and take this pledge?

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77596845/450908264/1328794144?refcode=ea.344757bb-15ba-ee11-bea1-002248223848&ms=ea.344757bb-15ba-ee11-bea1-002248223848&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM0NDc1N2JiLTE1YmEtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzg0OCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=eahE6lGCz0E5oBxHJNp6hRcROXg_wkhTasD-3NGhOsI=&emci=215ee94d-55b9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=344757bb-15ba-ee11-bea1-002248223848&ceid=4823105)
---
Today, I want to talk about a young woman who has redefined what it means to be an activist in our time – Greta Thunberg. Greta is a powerful voice for the climate movement and a beacon of hope for the next generation. She reminds me of the urgent need for action, not tomorrow, not in a year, but right now. That kind of urgency? It’s rare. And it's incredibly moving. From a lone voice outside her school to sparking a worldwide movement, Greta’s shown us it’s not about how big you are, but how big you dream and fight. Standing tall even when she stood alone, she’s still out there, pushing for real change. And you know what? Her spirit ignited a fire in me. **_[Now, today, I’m inviting you to join me in a pledge to stand with Greta, amplify her call to action, leave our comfort zones, and keep fighting for our planet. Are you with me?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77596855/450908271/-1502214037?refcode=ea.344757bb-15ba-ee11-bea1-002248223848&ms=ea.344757bb-15ba-ee11-bea1-002248223848&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM0NDc1N2JiLTE1YmEtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzg0OCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=eahE6lGCz0E5oBxHJNp6hRcROXg_wkhTasD-3NGhOsI=&emci=215ee94d-55b9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=344757bb-15ba-ee11-bea1-002248223848&ceid=4823105)_** | [**PLEDGE TO STAND WITH GRETA**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77596858/450908286/-1502214037?refcode=ea.344757bb-15ba-ee11-bea1-002248223848&ms=ea.344757bb-15ba-ee11-bea1-002248223848&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM0NDc1N2JiLTE1YmEtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzg0OCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=eahE6lGCz0E5oBxHJNp6hRcROXg_wkhTasD-3NGhOsI=&emci=215ee94d-55b9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=344757bb-15ba-ee11-bea1-002248223848&ceid=4823105)
---
Greta helped me realize that it's not enough to just make personal lifestyle changes. We need structural shifts, and massive policy changes – and fast. Inspired by her Friday strikes, I knew I had to do more. So, back in 2019, I took my activism to the front lines, right to the steps of the White House, every Friday. I was ready to be arrested, ready to make a statement.
**Yes, if Greta could do it, I knew I had to step up too.**
This isn’t just about standing with Greta. It’s about joining forces, loud and clear, saying we're in this together. That we hear her, we see her, and we're not backing down.
[**PLEDGE TO STAND WITH GRETA**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77596860/450908294/-1502214037?refcode=ea.344757bb-15ba-ee11-bea1-002248223848&ms=ea.344757bb-15ba-ee11-bea1-002248223848&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM0NDc1N2JiLTE1YmEtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzg0OCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=eahE6lGCz0E5oBxHJNp6hRcROXg_wkhTasD-3NGhOsI=&emci=215ee94d-55b9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=344757bb-15ba-ee11-bea1-002248223848&ceid=4823105)
---
Let’s keep fighting!
Jane Fonda

clean_body: Will you stand with me and take this pledge? | Today, I want to talk about a young woman who has redefined what it means to be an activist in our time – Greta Thunberg. Greta is a powerful voice for the climate movement and a beacon of hope for the next generation. She reminds me of the urgent need for action, not tomorrow, not in a year, but right now. That kind of urgency? It’s rare. And it's incredibly moving. From a lone voice outside her school to sparking a worldwide movement, Greta’s shown us it’s not about how big you are, but how big you dream and fight. Standing tall even when she stood alone, she’s still out there, pushing for real change. And you know what? Her spirit ignited a fire in me. | Greta helped me realize that it's not enough to just make personal lifestyle changes. We need structural shifts, and massive policy changes – and fast. Inspired by her Friday strikes, I knew I had to do more. So, back in 2019, I took my activism to the front lines, right to the steps of the White House, every Friday. I was ready to be arrested, ready to make a statement. Yes, if Greta could do it, I knew I had to step up too. This isn’t just about standing with Greta. It’s about joining forces, loud and clear, saying we're in this together. That we hear her, we see her, and we're not backing down. Let’s keep fighting! Jane Fonda | = | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

body:
show your thanks!
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/60125?t=6&akid=12543%2E878179%2E64PcCb) We can’t believe how much Biden has done for our country, so we’re sending him a HUGE card to thank him for his hard work!

[**So you’ve been personally selected to sign our letter thanking President Biden for fighting for the American people! Please, we need 10,000 signatures by midnight to demonstrate massive support! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/60125?t=7&akid=12543%2E878179%2E64PcCb) | [Donate $3 to sign the letter now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/60125?t=8&akid=12543%2E878179%2E64PcCb)
---
TO: President Biden
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: I’m so grateful.

**Dear President Biden,

I’m so thankful for everything you’ve done as President!

**Despite MAGA turmoil, over the last three years, you’ve fought TIRELESSLY for the American people — defending abortion rights, confirming an incredible Supreme Court Justice, saving Social Security from GOP cuts, and creating millions of jobs for the people.**

I know standing up to MAGA Republican attacks isn’t easy, but it is always the right thing to do.

So as the 2024 race kicks into high gear, I wanted to show my support and thank you for being such an amazing leader for our country!

[**I hope you know that there are MILLIONS of us across the nation who stand with you. That’s why I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to thank you and to keep electing incredible Democrats up and down the ballot »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/60126?t=9&akid=12543%2E878179%2E64PcCb)** | [SPACE RUNNING OUT: Donate $3 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/60126?t=10&akid=12543%2E878179%2E64PcCb)
---
**_X A THANKFUL AMERICAN_**
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=12543%2E878179%2E64PcCb). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=12543%2E878179%2E64PcCb).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=12543%2E878179%2E64PcCb) to request fewer emails. name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: I know what it's like to have the label "pre-existing condition" attached to my health care
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| Here’s why I got into public service:
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1892%2E35263%2EY2nCkr)
Peter — When I was a child, I was diagnosed with a serious illness and spent three months in the hospital. When I got better, my grandparents, who raised me, began looking for an insurance policy that would cover me in the future. But they couldn’t find such a policy because of my previous illness. Not from any insurer. Not at any price. They had to pay for my health care out of pocket — and they had to make enormous sacrifices to do so — all because I was a child labeled with those words: **"pre-existing condition."** Peter, I got into public service because I saw my grandparents stay up late at night, worried sick that I would fall ill again and that they wouldn't be able to afford my care. No one should ever have to go through that. **Like 133 million Americans, I know what it's like to have the label "pre-existing condition" attached to my care — and before the _Affordable Care Act_ was passed, many of us could be denied coverage.** Today, insurance companies can no longer discriminate against someone based on their pre-existing condition. I championed health reform and fought to allow young people to stay on their parent’s insurance plan up to age 26. These policy changes have led to millions more Americans getting the health insurance they need. So, you can imagine my frustration whenever Republicans attack our health care or threaten protections for folks with pre-existing conditions — people like me. The GOP has spent years playing politics with people’s lives. And if Mitch McConnell and his Republican mega-donors flip my seat in Wisconsin and take hold of the Senate majority next election, countless Americans could find themselves in a place where insurance companies, once again, write all the rules. The people of Wisconsin did not send me to Washington to take people’s health care away, which is why I fought against Republican repeal efforts and why I will never back down. But I can’t defend the hard-fought progress we’ve made without your help, Peter. **[So today, I’m humbly asking: Will you make a donation to my reelection campaign to defend our Senate majority? That’s the only way we’ll prevent Republicans from rolling back the progress we’ve made expanding access to affordable health care.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3587?c0=tbe-em-jan24.9rGJ2t&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240123_AM1_V2_S1&t=14&akid=1892%2E35263%2EY2nCkr)** _Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3604?c0=tbe-em-jan24.7tZQlC&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240123_AM1_V2_S1&t=15&akid=1892%2E35263%2EY2nCkr)
---

---
| [CHIP IN $25 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3606?c0=tbe-em-jan24.jWw7rr&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240123_AM1_V2_S1&t=17&akid=1892%2E35263%2EY2nCkr)
---
[CHIP IN $50 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3607?c0=tbe-em-jan24.HOnTMP&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240123_AM1_V2_S1&t=18&akid=1892%2E35263%2EY2nCkr)
---
| [CHIP IN $100 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3608?c0=tbe-em-jan24.JEwqBa&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240123_AM1_V2_S1&t=19&akid=1892%2E35263%2EY2nCkr)
---
[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3587?c0=tbe-em-jan24.9rGJ2t&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240123_AM1_V2_S1&t=20&akid=1892%2E35263%2EY2nCkr)
---
I am not going to let anyone make me forget where I came from or why I got into public service in the first place. My experience has always inspired my work to do everything I can to make sure that every American has quality, affordable health care coverage and stand up against those who want to take it away.
As long as you're with me, I know we can overcome any challenge we may face on the road ahead and stop the Republicans from taking away health insurance from millions of Americans once and for all. **[It starts by defending our Democratic Senate majority so please chip in, if you can, to help me keep Wisconsin’s Senate seat blue.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3587?c0=tbe-em-jan24.9rGJ2t&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240123_AM1_V2_S1&t=21&akid=1892%2E35263%2EY2nCkr)**
Thank you for standing with me.
— Tammy
P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701
**[www.tammybaldwin.com](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=2&akid=1892%2E35263%2EY2nCkr) | [INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM](mailto:INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/68?t=3&akid=1892%2E35263%2EY2nCkr)**

name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
subject: Did you catch me on MSNBC?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
huge momentum behind us right now
| | |
---
Hi there, friend, did you see me on _MSNBC_ last night?
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77597237/450909719/849749119?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk704-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDljMDQxNmUtMTZiYS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzODQ4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Nuqpo0NwxUrhnA19T2zMeqYL3r7e5bG3WkEspH--llU=)
Just last week, Democrat Tom Keen won his special election in House District 35, flipping a key Florida House district from red to BLUE. And earlier this month, voters in Florida officially secured enough signatures to put abortion rights on the ballot this November. This ballot initiative will finally give us the chance to enshrine reproductive rights in our state constitution and overturn Republicans' extremist bans. **This is incredible news for my state and for my campaign's momentum — but we still have a long road ahead of us.**
The Sunshine State is ready to flip blue this fall. **I've seen it firsthand while talking to voters who are fed up with far-right radicals and in the polling data that shows my race for Senate is a statistical tie. Now, we're seeing this momentum for change materialize at the ballot box.**
There's huge momentum behind us right now, but Rick Scott has already spent $3 MILLION running attack ads to smear my campaign — that's more than any other GOP Senate candidate has spent so far! _And, as a mega-millionaire, he has plenty more where that came from._
**[The election year is now well under way, and we can't be caught empty-handed as we head into our first end-of-month deadline. clean_body: huge momentum behind us right now | | | Hi there, friend, did you see me on MSNBC last night? = Just last week, Democrat Tom Keen won his special election in House District 35, flipping a key Florida House district from red to BLUE. And earlier this month, voters in Florida officially secured enough signatures to put abortion rights on the ballot this November. This ballot initiative will finally give us the chance to enshrine reproductive rights in our state constitution and overturn Republicans' extremist bans. This is incredible news for my state and for my campaign's momentum — but we still have a long road ahead of us. The Sunshine State is ready to flip blue this fall. I've seen it firsthand while talking to voters who are fed up with far-right radicals and in the polling data that shows my race for Senate is a statistical tie. Now, we're seeing this momentum for change materialize at the ballot box. There's huge momentum behind us right now, but Rick Scott has already spent $3 MILLION running attack ads to smear my campaign — that's more than any other GOP Senate candidate has spent so far! And, as a mega-millionaire, he has plenty more where that came from. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = I'm so grateful for your support in this fight. — Debbie | * | | | = Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

name: Ellen Malcolm, EMILYs List
subject: If you told me in 1973 that we'd still be fighting for this, I wouldn't have believed it.

body:
Roe was the floor. We need to build a new ceiling. |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77597342/450910153/1237601583?refcode=WTEFEM45_20240123_EllenRoeRS&sourceid=1052737&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYTJlNGY3Zi0xNmJhLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM4NDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JNGo5ZQXO4kOhS8fcQzT7nQtUxAlbiLhpXLbyvGUI4Y=) I am furious that we had more rights in 1973 than we have today. But I am also hopeful, because we have something that didn't exist yet in 1973: We have the millions-strong community of EMILYs List candidates and supporters. We have a movement.

**Be part of the movement to STOP anti-choice extremism and SAVE reproductive rights. ---
Peter,

Two big things have stayed with me for the last 51 years, since _Roe v. Wade_ was decided on January 22, 1973.

First: The decision was momentous, an event to be celebrated, and _permanent_. In other words, when the U.S. Supreme Court issued its decision confirming a constitutional right to bodily autonomy, **it was unfathomable to think that the precedent set that day could be ignored or invalidated at _any_ point in the future**. If you had told me then that women in 2024 would have fewer rights than we had in 1973, I would have been shocked... and _very, very angry_.

Second: _Roe_ was so important for _everyone_ of childbearing age — but the deepest reaction came from anyone who had gone through the process of getting an abortion pre-_Roe_. I've talked to women who had horrible experiences in dark and dirty hidden "medical" offices, who dealt with serious health problems caused by the procedure, who were terrified others would find out. The trauma of needing care in a country that outlawed it has stayed with them, which is why the women who still live with those memories are some of the most ardent warriors in today's pro-choice movement. Those of us who were alive pre-_Roe_ are DETERMINED that young women will not have to undergo similar terrible experiences.

I am furious that we had more rights in 1973 than we have today. But I am also hopeful, because we have something that didn't exist yet in 1973: We have the millions-strong community of EMILYs List candidates and supporters. We have a movement.

Anti-choice extremism won't stop as long as anti-choice politicians are in power. [**Peter, I'm asking you to be part of the movement to STOP anti-choice extremism and SAVE reproductive rights. name: =?utf-8?Q?Max=20Ukropina?=
subject: Did you see the big news??
body:
This is a huge moment for our campaign.

Hi Peter - did you see the incredible endorsement message below from former Trump Cabinet Official Richard Grenell?

This is a HUGE moment for our campaign. Grassroots America First patriots have been driving this campaign from Day One. I'm thrilled and honored to have Grenell's endorsement.

We have to keep the momentum going ... which is why (https://secure.anedot.com/max-ukropina-for-congress-2024/vote-pledge?utm_medium=Email&utm_source=Ukropina&utm_campaign=Grenell_Endorsement_12324) I hope you'll join Grenell and ADD YOUR NAME to endorse my campaign for Congress TODAY. (https://secure.anedot.com/max-ukropina-for-congress-2024/vote-pledge?utm_medium=Email&utm_source=Ukropina&utm_campaign=Grenell_Endorsement_12324)

ENDORSE MAX (https://secure.anedot.com/max-ukropina-for-congress-2024/vote-pledge?utm_medium=Email&utm_source=Ukropina&utm_campaign=Grenell_Endorsement_12324)
Get ready ... we are going to win this Primary on March 5, flip the 47th District back into Republican hands in November, and send real America First leadership to Washington!

- Max Ukropina
----------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Richard Grenell (Trump Cabinet Official)
Subject: BIG America First endorsement 🇺🇸
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Peter, this is President Trump's former Cabinet Official Richard Grenell.

If there's one thing I learned while serving in Donald Trump's cabinet, it's that we need more America First patriots serving in Washington. It's crucial.

That's why I am proudly endorsing my friend Republican Max Ukropina for Congress in Orange County's 47th District ... and I'm writing to urge you to do the same.

---> Watch my endorsement video message here. (https://secure.anedot.com/max-ukropina-for-congress-2024/vote-pledge?utm_medium=Email&utm_source=Ukropina&utm_campaign=Grenell_Endorsement_12324)
https://secure.anedot.com/max-ukropina-for-congress-2024/vote-pledge?utm_medium=Email&utm_source=Ukropina&utm_campaign=Grenell_Endorsement_12324
Max isn't a career politician who's run for office for decades. He's a political outsider. He's been working hard as a business owner creating jobs. He understands what's at stake for our great country.

Most importantly, I've watched Max out-campaigning, out-organizing, and out-energizing his opponent Scott Baugh in this primary.

It's the same fighting spirit he'll bring to the Democrats in November.

As someone who's seen his fair share of political battles, believe me: Max is our best chance to flip this seat into Republican hands and send a badly-needed America First leader to Washington.

Whether it's securing Biden's wide open border, getting our mind-boggling spending and debt under control, or rooting out corrupt government bureaucrats, Max will be on the frontlines every day fighting for our country and for Orange County.

I hope you'll join me in supporting Max today and contributing whatever you can to help send him to Washington and let him know you have his back. (https://secure.anedot.com/max-ukropina-for-congress-2024/vote-pledge?utm_medium=Email&utm_source=Ukropina&utm_campaign=Grenell_Endorsement_12324)

Thank you,

Richard Grenell
Former President Trump Cabinet Official

SUPPORT MAX TODAY (https://secure.anedot.com/max-ukropina-for-congress-2024/vote-pledge?utm_medium=Email&utm_source=Ukropina&utm_campaign=Grenell_Endorsement_12324)

============================================================
Copyright © 2024 Max Ukropina for Congress, All rights reserved.
You are receiving this email because you signed up for updates from Max Ukropina for Congress.

Our mailing address is:
Max Ukropina for Congress
PO Box 5780
Newport Beach, CA 92662-5780
You can ** update your preferences (https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/profile?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=77339c80b8&e=86e91e802d&c=c6779d46b9)
or ** unsubscribe from this list (https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=77339c80b8&e=86e91e802d&c=c6779d46b9)

name: John Fetterman
subject: We need to step up big time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
#
Hi there, Derek.
URGENT news in the PA Senate race -- 🚨 **David McCormick outraised my friend + fellow PA Senator Bob Casey last quarter.** 🚨
McCormick even cut himself a $1 million check, and with his massive personal fortune that he is using to self-fund his campaign, million$ more could be on the way. To fight back, we need to step up for Bob -- _big time._
**[So please, please, please 🙏 Will you chip in right now to support my friend Bob Casey + defend this seat from Mitch McConnell and David McCormick?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240123-1?refcode=em20240123-1-8760&refcode2=8760_434096_H0bytJ&akid=8760%2E434096%2EH0bytJ)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240123-1?amount=5&refcode=em20240123-8760&refcode2=8760_434096_H0bytJ&akid=8760%2E434096%2EH0bytJ)**
Just like in 2022, Pennsylvania’s going to be one of the closest + most expensive Senate races in the country. Mitch McConnell and the GOP are going to throw in everything they’ve got to flip this seat red. A super PAC supporting McCormick already raised an unprecedented $18 million, not to mention the immense support he’s been promised by McConnell.
If we’re going to keep the Senate blue, we have to have Bob’s back.
**[We made history in 2022-- let’s do it again in 2024. Chip in any amount right away to keep Bob in the Senate. ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240123-1?refcode=em20240123-1-8760&refcode2=8760_434096_H0bytJ&akid=8760%2E434096%2EH0bytJ)**
Thanks to your help, Bob and I are fighting for working PA families in the Senate. Let’s keep it that way.
THANK YOU!! 🙏
❤️ John
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20240123-8760-footer&t=1&refcode2=8760_434096_H0bytJ&akid=8760%2E434096%2EH0bytJ)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=8760%2E434096%2EH0bytJ)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8760%2E434096%2EH0bytJ)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Gloria Johnson
subject: I’m a “threat” to Marsha Blackburn’s power
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee
body:
My opponent just keeps attacking me.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77598556/450911852/-849459103?refcode=ea.6246c74c-18ba-ee11-bea1-002248223848&ms=ea.6246c74c-18ba-ee11-bea1-002248223848&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjQ2Yzc0Yy0xOGJhLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM4NDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OVh8xaF-QTdHAxmCgs8N1jQBpJfWA8pZmeC_U4MhHuw=&emci=4846c74c-18ba-ee11-bea1-002248223848&emdi=6246c74c-18ba-ee11-bea1-002248223848&ceid=46764483)
---
Peter — Just hours after I launched my campaign for Senate, my opponent — MAGA Marsha Blackburn — started attacking me. Back then, she called me a “direct threat to our way of life.” 🙄 **The fact is, I’m only a threat to Marsha Blackburn’s power.** Now, Marsha is running right-wing click-bait ads attacking me — she’s trying to paint me as a “radical socialist” to pander to the extremist GOP. **Let’s be real: Marsha Blackburn doesn’t know what those words mean.** Marsha’s going after me because she’s a bully — and it’s easier to paint me as “dangerous” than to address her constituents’ concerns. Look, I believe that women deserve access to reproductive health care and that we have to protect access to the ballot box while defending our democracy from right-wing threats. And you know what _is_ dangerous? Advocating for extreme abortion restrictions that endanger women’s health and supporting the Big Lie of election fraud that stoked an attempted insurrection. _(One guess who I’m talking about.)_ **Peter, I’m not afraid to say it: Marsha Blackburn is a MAGA hack who cares more about maintaining her far-right bona fides than doing what’s right for Tennessee._And it’s time for her to go._** **_[You can help me send Marsha a one-way ticket out of Washington by donating any amount NOW. clean_body: My opponent just keeps attacking me. | Peter — Just hours after I launched my campaign for Senate, my opponent — MAGA Marsha Blackburn — started attacking me. Back then, she called me a “direct threat to our way of life.” 🙄 The fact is, I’m only a threat to Marsha Blackburn’s power. Now, Marsha is running right-wing click-bait ads attacking me — she’s trying to paint me as a “radical socialist” to pander to the extremist GOP. Let’s be real: Marsha Blackburn doesn’t know what those words mean. Marsha’s going after me because she’s a bully — and it’s easier to paint me as “dangerous” than to address her constituents’ concerns. Look, I believe that women deserve access to reproductive health care and that we have to protect access to the ballot box while defending our democracy from right-wing threats. And you know what is dangerous? Advocating for extreme abortion restrictions that endanger women’s health and supporting the Big Lie of election fraud that stoked an attempted insurrection. (One guess who I’m talking about.) Peter, I’m not afraid to say it: Marsha Blackburn is a MAGA hack who cares more about maintaining her far-right bona fides than doing what’s right for Tennessee.And it’s time for her to go. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, Gloria = | Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care. For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors. Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights. | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee Contributions or gifts to Gloria for Tennessee are not tax deductible. **Chrissy is ready to fight tooth and nail to defend her seat from her GOP opponent and defend the incredible progress Democrats have made – but she can't do it without this team behind her.[So, please: Will you chip in to power Chrissy's campaign? clean_body: Republicans made huge voter registration gains last year in Pennsylvania, significantly narrowing the gap with Democrats | | | Worrisome news, Derek: Republicans made huge voter registration gains last year in Pennsylvania, significantly narrowing the gap with Democrats With the threat of another Trump presidency looming and Republicans focused on growing their House majority, we knew this election wouldn't be easy. But now, Republicans are rapidly expanding their numbers in the Commonwealth, and we can't leave anything to chance. Chrissy is ready to fight tooth and nail to defend her seat from her GOP opponent and defend the incredible progress Democrats have made – but she can't do it without this team behind her.= So many critical issues – from reproductive rights to the security of our democracy – are on the line in November. In this climate, we can't take anything for granted, and it's going to take every Democrat in PA-06 to join in this fight against the far right. = | | = – Team Chrissy | Chrissy Houlahan for Congress P.O. subject: Darin's ready to do the work
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Harbick for Oregon ID 23118
body:
I hope you and your family are well, safe, and thawing from the ice storm that swept through this last week! | | | | |
---
Peter,
I hope you and your family are well, safe, and thawing from the ice storm that swept through this last week! Like us, I know many of you lost power, suffered damage to personal property, and more.
It’s been tough, and the experience has made one thing clear: our communities need leaders who don't simply sit behind desks. **We need a leader who gets their hands dirty getting the job done for Oregonians.**
Darin is that man.
He spent hours helping people in our community whose homes were damaged by the ice storm. He even manned a self loading log truck to help Lane Electric remove a fallen tree off downed power lines!
Hard work is a way of life for Darin—as it is for many small business owners. When our employees aren’t able to show up, it's Darin and I who serve our customers, log trees, and care for those struggling with addiction.
**I know Darin is ready to bring that hard work ethic to the Oregon Legislature and get the job done in Salem for our communities.**
Will you pledge today to vote Darin Harbick in May?
| [PETITION: Commit to vote for Darin Harbick](https://harbickfororegon.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ed96bc27b78bb6b7e94ca23a&id=95f0dddd06&e=3362c31595)
---
| | | | | | | | | Thank you, and please let us know how you have been faring in this weather!
Sincerely,
Kail Harbick
---
|
---
|

name: Team Schrier
subject: Did you see this message from Kim about Roe v. Wade’s anniversary?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
Recommit to fighting for Roe v. Wade We wanted to make sure you saw this message, Peter.

Just over 50 years after the landmark _Roe v. Wade_ decision, abortion rights are now hanging by a thread. If Republicans continue to have their way, we'll have a nationwide abortion ban. We need your help to fight back against these attacks and continue to ensure everyone has access to the reproductive care they need.

**[Rush a donation of $5 or whatever you can today to celebrate the anniversary of _Roe v. Wade_ and join Kim in the fight to protect access to reproductive health care this election.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77599454/450913889/-660155977?refcode=em24_240123_roe2_fndd_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240123_roe2_fndd_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=9fb23c3a-19ba-ee11-bea1-002248223848&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmIyM2MzYS0xOWJhLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM4NDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3RceFFokE0QLgl8oyf1t3hMKlmLOqmZ_3Z9wOOISBFs=)** \----------Begin Forwarded Message---------
Sender: Dr. Kim Schrier
Subject: Today is a reminder that the fight for reproductive rights continues
Date: Monday, January 22nd, 2023 Team,

51 years ago, _Roe v. Wade_ became the law of the land when the Supreme Court ruled that women had the right to make their own reproductive healthcare decisions without interference from any state up until viability. Yet, thanks to an extremely conservative Supreme Court in the summer of 2022, decades of progress and precedent were overturned.

This set the stage for the return of draconian laws taking medical decision-making away from women and their doctors. We've already seen how devastating this decision has been. Immediately following the ruling, fourteen states worked to pass a near-total ban on abortion. Seven more chose to pass some of the most restrictive abortion access laws in the country.

Now Republicans are in control of the House, and political analysts suggest a Republican sweep in November is possible–meaning abortion is once again on the ballot. This time, not as a Supreme Court decision, but as the potential for a national ban on abortion that would supersede state laws that protect women. While we may not be able to celebrate _Roe_ Day as we used to, its importance is something we cannot forget.

As a doctor, I know that deeply personal reproductive health care decisions should be made by a patient in consultation with her doctor. Extremist politicians in D.C. must not make medical decisions.

That's why last year, I worked to reintroduce the Let Doctors Provide Reproductive Health Care Act to ensure every woman has access to the reproductive health care she needs.

It is also why, just last week, I voted against a bill that would take money away from programs for needy families and use it to support sham Crisis Pregnancy Centers. These centers masquerade as clinics, offering free pregnancy tests and ultrasounds, often without any healthcare provider. Then, they lie to patients and spew anti-abortion rhetoric meant to stop women from considering abortion. Make no mistake, this bill passed the Republican House and is part of their march toward a national abortion ban.

**[Team,_Roe v. Wade_ has never been more important, and that's why I'm asking you to celebrate this _Roe_ Day by donating $5 or whatever you can to keep the only pro-choice woman doctor in the House fighting to defend abortion clean_body: Recommit to fighting for Roe v. Wade We wanted to make sure you saw this message, Peter. Just over 50 years after the landmark Roe v. Wade decision, abortion rights are now hanging by a thread. If Republicans continue to have their way, we'll have a nationwide abortion ban. We need your help to fight back against these attacks and continue to ensure everyone has access to the reproductive care they need. = \----------Begin Forwarded Message--------- Sender: Dr. Kim Schrier Subject: Today is a reminder that the fight for reproductive rights continues Date: Monday, January 22nd, 2023 Team, 51 years ago, Roe v. Wade became the law of the land when the Supreme Court ruled that women had the right to make their own reproductive healthcare decisions without interference from any state up until viability. Yet, thanks to an extremely conservative Supreme Court in the summer of 2022, decades of progress and precedent were overturned. This set the stage for the return of draconian laws taking medical decision-making away from women and their doctors. We've already seen how devastating this decision has been. Immediately following the ruling, fourteen states worked to pass a near-total ban on abortion. Seven more chose to pass some of the most restrictive abortion access laws in the country. Now Republicans are in control of the House, and political analysts suggest a Republican sweep in November is possible–meaning abortion is once again on the ballot. This time, not as a Supreme Court decision, but as the potential for a national ban on abortion that would supersede state laws that protect women. While we may not be able to celebrate Roe Day as we used to, its importance is something we cannot forget. As a doctor, I know that deeply personal reproductive health care decisions should be made by a patient in consultation with her doctor. Extremist politicians in D.C. must not make medical decisions. That's why last year, I worked to reintroduce the Let Doctors Provide Reproductive Health Care Act to ensure every woman has access to the reproductive health care she needs. It is also why, just last week, I voted against a bill that would take money away from programs for needy families and use it to support sham Crisis Pregnancy Centers. These centers masquerade as clinics, offering free pregnancy tests and ultrasounds, often without any healthcare provider. Then, they lie to patients and spew anti-abortion rhetoric meant to stop women from considering abortion. Make no mistake, this bill passed the Republican House and is part of their march toward a national abortion ban. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you, Kim Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat in 2024. = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress PO Box 2728 Issaquah, WA 98027 United States

name: Transform the Party via Our Revolution
subject: Dark money spent against progressives will be at an all-time high
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14232?t=1052?refcode=email-20240123&akid=5234%2E5885482%2EXhyrF5 ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

Progressives are up against a lot in 2024. Corporate Democrats. Right-wing
mega-donors. Wall Street. The list goes on.

If we’re going to build lasting progressive change in America, we need to
transform the Democratic Party. And we can do that by defeating corporate
Democrats backed by right-wing money, electing more progressives to key
Party positions, and outright getting rid of dark money in primaries.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14232?t=1089?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20240123&akid=5234%2E5885482%2EXhyrF5 ]Chip in today to help us transform the Democratic Party and defeat
corporate Democrats.

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14232?t=1076?express_lane=true&amount=12&refcode=email-20240123&akid=5234%2E5885482%2EXhyrF5 ]CHIP IN $12 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14232?t=1077?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20240123&akid=5234%2E5885482%2EXhyrF5 ]CHIP IN $27
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14232?t=1078?express_lane=true&amount=35&refcode=email-20240123&akid=5234%2E5885482%2EXhyrF5 ]CHIP IN $35 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14232?t=1079?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=email-20240123&akid=5234%2E5885482%2EXhyrF5 ]CHIP IN $50
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14232?t=1080?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=email-20240123&akid=5234%2E5885482%2EXhyrF5 ]CHIP IN $100 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14232?t=1081?&amount=12&refcode=email-20240123&akid=5234%2E5885482%2EXhyrF5 ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

Despite a proposal by progressives to stop dark money in democratic
primaries, the DNC refused to even discuss it. That’s after a wide range
of big dark money spenders, including crypto tycoons, AIPAC, and a wide
range of right-wingers and even “liberal” organizations, dumped record
amounts of money into Democratic primaries. All to stop progressives.

We have out-organized big money to win many important races, but we have
to change the status quo of unlimited dark money in primaries.

Dark money will likely be an even bigger factor in Democratic primaries
this year, particularly in districts where corporate Democrats are running
against progressives. Especially after AIPAC said it will spend $100
million against the Squad and any progressives who criticized Israel’s
relentless bombing campaigns against the Palestinian people in Gaza.

Here’s just one example: Jamaal Bowman is not only facing AIPAC’s big
money in his heated primary in New York against a corporate Democrat — a
big Republican donor who donated to Trump, the RNC, Lindsey Graham, and
Elise Stefanik just announced a fundraiser for the corporate Democrat in
the race. It’s the entire political establishment against progressives.

It’s critical that we change the rules of the Democratic Party so there’s
an equal playing field for primaries. Our Revolution is doing the work of
electing progressive slates to Democratic Party committees so that we can
transform the Party from the inside. And we’re organizing to re-elect
progressives like Rashida Tlaib and Jamaal Bowman, and elect Barbara Lee
to the U.S. Senate, because we won’t let AIPAC and corporate Democrats
roll back our progress.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14232?t=1087?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20240123&akid=5234%2E5885482%2EXhyrF5 ]As the largest grassroots-funded progressive political organization in the
country, we’re on the forefront of changing the Democratic Party — but we
need your help. Can you chip in now to build progressive power in 2024?

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=5234%2E5885482%2EXhyrF5 ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=5234%2E5885482%2EXhyrF5 ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=5234%2E5885482%2EXhyrF5 ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=5234%2E5885482%2EXhyrF5 ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=5234%2E5885482%2EXhyrF5 ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10247?t=1006&akid=5234%2E5885482%2EXhyrF5 ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13135?t=1007&akid=5234%2E5885482%2EXhyrF5 ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13135?t=1008&akid=5234%2E5885482%2EXhyrF5 ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a 2024 Movement Builder with a
recurring donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13136?t=1009&akid=5234%2E5885482%2EXhyrF5 ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13139?t=1010&akid=5234%2E5885482%2EXhyrF5 ]GIVE ONCE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=5234%2E5885482%2EXhyrF5

Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a
