name: Col. Mike Waltz (Ret.)
subject: Terrorism on TikTok?!
body:

As a veteran, a congressman, and a parent, I’m extremely disturbed.

Our kids are being inundated with **pro-terrorist messaging on TikTok.**

From defending Hamas to _even praising Al Qaeda_ , these messages are extremely dangerous to the next generation.

**I’m taking action to STOP this new wave of terrorist sympathy in America, but I want your opinion.**

[Are YOU worried about pro-terrorist messaging on TikTok?](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=717ff0ffb9764cf8abcc47750bc745d0&_e=LjCGzazpPEMw4fTgpeslA3FVL7m3bDck-BV4qZOWAvBVOq-xbn_fpINLxwEhRAwVaUGLXdmkPIAYOdr3X76J8iHslshVO0ttOY5XRpiH_VXE1YL520_QrIpdc-9UruKieIKUCbPCEcrn-1YMmiOipJdUtkXIf_clLV6GmnGW3o-0VF9auSCD2XqMqB4NeG3gq_AGanT9IH14WpgBo1yoIq9zTEwoUbnu1_00kmCg4ATurFjKYSyxi2hmXaZVsFfNnWo8QYuPrAwK_qsqMmUczDF39DkcXaP-gbQxrbqszyOJtAQqSVqyW_91yPkawJ6-1prLq4yvSz6x_wGFx6fZV3HYjubfP0fAuO618w_WYlRDsHCOiR9D8eSTARH8lYTA)

I need to ask you directly, Peter.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77601871/450918103/94202041?amount=3&refcode=UTS_FR_90DO_240123_2_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRjNzY4MzcxLTFiYmEtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzg0OCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=aV6_mcSHhAeoxZ4AtTagrf8fLfNihN8CPDsiEHowlVY=)
Peter: we're officially in the full swing of the election year. And I'm _all in_ to protect my battleground seat in Nevada so I can keep up the fight for affordable health care, reproductive freedom, and the issues that matter most to working families. **But I need people like you by my side to win.**
Here's why: _CNN_ ranks me as one of the most vulnerable senators on the ballot, which is why Mitch McConnell has personally recruited a far-right Republican to defeat me. And polling has already shown me 2 points down – in the race that will likely decide Senate control.
If I'm going to fight back and defeat the GOP here in Nevada, it's critical that we show the full strength of this grassroots team right from the start. That's why I have a personal request for you, Peter:
[_**I'm looking for 100,000 people to step up and become Election Year Founding Donors by midnight tonight, and I'm counting on you to be one of them. _**"Let's put an end to Democrats representing conservative states in the U.S. Senate."** \- U.S. Senator Chuck Grassley_

Peter,

It’s Senator Chuck Grassley reaching out because I need a favor.

**Former Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy is running against one of Chuck Schumer’s foot soldiers in the Senate who votes to deliver the Biden-Harris agenda of open borders and big government spending that fuels the fires of inflation. And Tim needs OUR HELP to win.**

You see, Jon Tester has successfully tricked the people of Montana into sending him to Washington on their behalf since 2006. How, I don’t know. Because his views are not at all in line with the views of voters in Montana – heck, he’d have a real easy time being elected in Oregon, California, or Massachusetts.

**Let’s put an end to Democrats representing conservative states in the U.S. Senate.** If you cannot read to the end of this note, please click this link to donate to defeat Jon Tester before closing your browser.

[**JOIN ME
SUPPORT NAVY SEAL TIM SHEEHY FOR SENATE TODAY **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=ed5a1b2d1c4c4b2d8e2e6c293198524d&_e=Lt0HqB2khmWoOy7rSne0--Hdwof1uKR5hVNuC5xcFOHEvA5Bt6_rxA5q69GGUypnoHTXNYyy5-2fgIivXiAOk_PTBXnc5faT2-0_BEnNvup4SRnJdXTiMmlbCh-ouy0MYYwq3BPLqdIiqoumJ6up-Ll7j3zm-SmewxiR3brchcaiu-YkNoAccd2jDKP1J6h1VHKs6uBiQV-gnuzOXRcSixkciv0ruKSJ_rLdEaFPgkOnQO0ihMu2XmQNyJXzw4h_w_u_jTC81jLuFu1TUwZf5Gjn28pL_B8-Xw4ktUCTLcVZ5PRrMs8sv3z7G17q9kWQqCS1aQ3FSZBxrA_UmhKa4O6RNt5auujyUpiv7MyR-82x_kaa9Oh0INvgaeOXU43V9KipEzFCqJQT6ILcIZ6F1kmS9Vf47fYR8beL436B9YI%3D)

name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: Will you renew your membership for the 5th consecutive year?

body:
|
---
| | |
**Are you there? I still haven 't heard back from you...**

Friend,

It's Kevin McCarthy. name: Angela Alsobrooks
subject: this race is personal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
|
---
[ ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2092?t=1&akid=956%2E52803%2EJ-e2iP)

| | On the campaign trail, voters aren’t asking me about fundraising benchmarks or the list of Maryland leaders who’ve graciously chosen to endorse my run for Senate. They want to know what we’re going to do to improve their lives, expand opportunities for their children, and take some of the financial pressure off their families. That’s why with every policy I support and position I take, I view it through the lens of, _“how does this help Marylanders and their families?”_ **[Will you consider pitching in $25 to support my campaign to represent Maryland in the Senate so that we can deliver tangible change for working families?](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/9690?t=11&amount=25&akid=956%2E52803%2EJ-e2iP)** | | | [Donate $25](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/9690?t=12&amount=25&akid=956%2E52803%2EJ-e2iP)
---
| | [Other Amount](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/9690?t=13&amount=35&akid=956%2E52803%2EJ-e2iP)
---
I hear and understand Marylander’s concerns, Peter, because I can relate to the issues they’re facing.
_As a mother, I want to expand opportunities for young Marylanders, ensure they can get a good, affordable education, and grow up happy, healthy, and safe._
_As someone with bills to pay, I want to know that my elected officials understand the challenges families face when it comes to education, health care, and housing._
**These are all things that inform my policy decisions, Peter, because I truly believe that together, we can go farther and do better for Maryland.**
**[So what do you say, Peter: Will you chip in $25 (or whatever you can) toward my campaign so we can continue pushing for policies that put Maryland families first?](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/9690?t=14&amount=25&akid=956%2E52803%2EJ-e2iP)**
_If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._

Thanks!
—Angela Alsobrooks

name: =?utf-8?Q?Liz=20Economou=2C=20WAGOP?=
subject: Grassroots Republican action is needed!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
House Democrats in the State Government & Tribal Relations committee are currently hearing HB 2030 and we need to stop them from passing it.

http://wsrp.org
Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WeGlgXqOx-Y

With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms.

We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! (https://form.jotform.com/212737084845058)
State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates
https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws
State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. (https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws)
Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate
Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press:

“We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions.

“Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative."

Read the full statement. (https://jtwilcox.houserepublicans.wa.gov/2021/10/18/republican-leaders-todays-vaccine-deadline-threatens-critical-services-public-safety/?fbclid=IwAR3WxI9H29hbbmfbZhdkDS9QjqdVd2TIRCdjNjUkUlLdeThtbUjK_WBWJuw)
Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter
Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here (https://www.smileyforwashington.com/issues) .
Contact:
Steve Johnson
Communications Director
Washington State Republican Party
(425) 460-0570
steve@wsrp.org (mailto:steve@wsrp.org)

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BINKLEY FOR PRESIDENT 2024
body:
** Campaign News and Views
------------------------------------------------------------

** New Hampshire Primary Today!
Polls close by 8 PM ET
------------------------------------------------------------
(Closing times may vary, review your location)

**
In the News

------------------------------------------------------------

** Ryan in the Media
------------------------------------------------------------
Binkley has appeared on multiple interviews and news channels in the Granite State, sharing his message and agenda for revitalizing America.

https://rumble.com/v48jqz0-gop-presidential-candidate-ryan-binkleys-explosive-interview.html?mref=1wxk5&mc=ehuil&mc_cid=12511887ab&mc_eid=UNIQID

** The Jeff Dornik Show
------------------------------------------------------------
Ryan speaks with Jeff Dornik about his agenda, Christian values, and the importance of freedom in America. They also discuss the New Hampshire Primary. Watch here (https://rumble.com/v48jqz0-gop-presidential-candidate-ryan-binkleys-explosive-interview.html?mref=1wxk5&mc=ehuil&mc_cid=12511887ab&mc_eid=UNIQID)
https://www.foxcarolina.com/video/2024/01/22/ryan-binkley-talks-2024-republican-presidential-primary/?mc_cid=12511887ab&mc_eid=UNIQID

** Fox Carolina Interview
------------------------------------------------------------

Ryan answers the question 'Who is Ryan Binkley?' He also discusses the current division in America and how we need to take our country back. Watch here (https://www.foxcarolina.com/video/2024/01/22/ryan-binkley-talks-2024-republican-presidential-primary/?mc_cid=12511887ab&mc_eid=UNIQID)

**
Coming Up

------------------------------------------------------------

** Way to Freedom Sign Wave with Ryan
------------------------------------------------------------
Join Ryan for a sign waving from 3:00 to 5:30 pm ET, at the following locations:
Christa McAuliffe Elementary School
17 North Spring Street (Rumford Street/Gymnasium Entrance)
Concord, NH 03301

David R. Cawley Middle School
89 Whitehall Road
Hooksett, NH 03106

Londonderry (Ryan Binkley Stop-by)
268B Mammoth Road
Londonderry, NH 03053

Bedford High School
47 Nashua Road
Bedford, NH 03110

All locations are open to the press.

** News Nation Interview
------------------------------------------------------------

Ryan will join News Nation tonight for an interview, at 7 pm ET in Roger & Francine Jean Student Center Event Space, 100 St. Anselm Drive, Manchester, NH 03102.

** NHGOP Watch Party
------------------------------------------------------------
Ryan will be at the Goat Bar and Grill for the New Hampshire GOP's Post-Primary Watch Party. The party begins at 8 pm ET, at 50 Old Granite St, Manchester, NH 03101.
Contribute Today! (https://secure.winred.com/binkley-for-president-2024/donate-now?mc_cid=12511887ab&mc_eid=UNIQID)
• LIKE AND COMMENT on all social media posts
• A simple "I support Ryan Binkley for President" goes a long way!

name: Navy SEAL
subject: 13 murdered Americans
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
When Taliban terrorists murdered 13 American soldiers on August 26th, 2021, I knew something had to be done | [Unsubscribe](http://links.justandfreegop.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_s=3e8a76c51c7c4b8a85e50400d6626943&_t=FPED6eTfSHB7Cqt5yN7aEWtj7RE2bMWEJU5AnzOpzSVcrVWbsSkILMb76jAwlJAPFOJQWkCWkEL3besRP9POLTsYZasz6T2HJZc6jEcSX9g%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.justandfreegop.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_s=3e8a76c51c7c4b8a85e50400d6626943&_t=FPED6eTfSHB7Cqt5yN7aEWtj7RE2bMWEJU5AnzOpzSVcrVWbsSkILMb76jAwlJAPFOJQWkCWkEL3besRP9POLTsYZasz6T2HJZc6jEcSX9g%3D)
---
[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=3e8a76c51c7c4b8a85e50400d6626943&_e=FT-VI7rYukCI4d5I_gzidcZ4BJ_Np3zFFpYb-SUihFB8WzfSq6UgKIxth4FzHKxBbXMEbbTDingfHJPfJ8d9qNT0hQJSBJeESM0TwBLFarU5aUJIMLVYL2S6VrPI-uFJD7G516iF5RkQsxGMJR9aIJv9hLAj3VP_1foJmmqhBAIfSOItkGlh4HPFjedj10IoNINx1cRI0dCo61siPINGmRVb-2jC6XIVoq7u8qLWoKz1Nds4U5AgsKc_52lTy-vM3AnN7lFKIxgKBMNa-cng8IivGrlPMwcBI6tprfhZWHjHXdlArCyE9V_g0X1Ug4kdOo33qzWVovLHGsWkTDKgG6sXDzMhJuBG_1Tv36Eup7hQ7iWuTaMFwbHO67_qxn77g6rQ7h9CRmWIH629XD3DsQwGmDd9kA3BctPneBjr_M4%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

**As a former Navy SEAL and combat veteran, I’ve seen my fair share of battle.** Between my and my wife’s service to our country, we’ve sacrificed years of our lives to make America a more safe and prosperous nation and to protect our God-given freedoms and liberties. We served so that our children and yours might grow up to realize their own American Dreams.

My name is Tim Sheehy, Republican candidate for U.S. Senate from Montana. You probably don't know me, or if you do, likely from emails like this one. I’m a former U.S. Navy SEAL and a 2008 Naval Academy graduate. Right now, I'm the only person standing in the way of Chuck Schumer and his Senate majority.

body:
| | | Peter,

Thank you so much for being a part of our grassroots team.

Josh and the rest of our team are SO thankful for all that you do.

I know you’ve heard it before, but I want to make sure you know that this race will come down to the grassroots level.

# **[NEW PODCAST EPISODE OUT NOW](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=fe3fc31508&e=5bd167f239)**
---
|
## Happy 2024 everyone and what better way to start off the New Year than with a brand spanking new episode of the Latino Podcast. Chuck Rocha and Mike Madrid are back to discuss the various political dynamics related to the Latino vote. Expect this year's podcast to be lively and engaging, with occasional humor and a whole lot of focus on the 2024 election year.

In this short yet sweet episode, the guys examine the recent Iowa caucus, highlight the significance of the podcast in providing unfiltered information to the Latino community, and express the importance of Latino voters this year. Chuck summarizes it perfectly in this episode "Our voters will determine who the president will be. Our voters will determine who's in control of the U.S. Senate, and our voters will control exactly who wins the U.S. House."
---
| [PLAY EPISODE NOW](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=e4e9db68a6&e=5bd167f239 "PLAY EPISODE NOW")

body:
The Tampa Bay Buccaneers are out. So are the Democrats. | | |
---
[](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=f94df7a4caff47a6bb78d09c04422e35&_e=asis_Or-kc9nEEh7Q98m5Qt2GF8VD016txA1OSA13w8w2F7s7JgluUjMwhA6LSpDz4PDlDGPHwcLDzB-04sdfIiqxsXo0qPdN93q6rRnUg-fqKUjoxbQ3R_OPoRdO4HUrqfG155YctYQKWNbeNkucI-n7L1w91hp9hgNHkcD4bnUuX5z2UQc9l7q-V-zpCEfzNTGJjftHiuXkhNSbOdpeeC62r2oToqgp19faQWdXRYhGKBuIwjSVvEdrbZysrXAUT-bj-q-BJ6oJ5VC0TPjwlj41FgQ1Gc4FroLCgu_t6s9ExNFv_gVTY6Eq5NBDZz2tpmc6kGw8nm-kj603X93n59y7nzhgGtwN8yI6SnhKGOJ--rFIwktlwdanSN9OPpTDLQuIirLDPYGZxwhmQNsaw%3D%3D)
---
Friend, THE LIONS HAVE WON! On Sunday, we watched our Detroit Lions beat the Tampa Bay Buccaneers to advance to the NFC Championship for the FIRST TIME since 1991!

It was a tough fight, but they pulled it together and got it done.

And after years and years of disappointment for us Lions fans, it has FINALLY paid off.

But you know what else hasn’t happened since the 1990s, Friend?
**[Michigan hasn’t elected a Republican to represent them in the Senate since 1994.](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=f94df7a4caff47a6bb78d09c04422e35&_e=asis_Or-kc9nEEh7Q98m5Qt2GF8VD016txA1OSA13w8w2F7s7JgluUjMwhA6LSpDz4PDlDGPHwcLDzB-04sdfIiqxsXo0qPdN93q6rRnUg-fqKUjoxbQ3R_OPoRdO4HUrqfG155YctYQKWNbeNkucI-n7L1w91hp9hgNHkcD4bnUuX5z2UQc9l7q-V-zpCEfzNTGJjftHiuXkhNSbOdpeeC62r2oToqgp19faQWdXRYhGKBuIwjSVvEdrbZysrXAXELrooJwZzRxAtm9M1X6A1kpeXC5b6dD7JdJX5yp0r1_oeSwLzznHYTiFun1Nz-4vG0Lk_GvQeldXtCGVWlRdlo_IoB2yf-z9n9dpm7ajSS6Oga-x8-n3x-cauUXm9Ag7eTLwmkGbH7kicq5BZttSg%3D%3D)** And maybe I’m crazy for thinking this, but I have a hunch that history is going to repeat itself.

If the Lions can pull it off, so can we.**
** **[So I'm asking for your support, Friend](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=f94df7a4caff47a6bb78d09c04422e35&_e=asis_Or-kc9nEEh7Q98m5Qt2GF8VD016txA1OSA13w8w2F7s7JgluUjMwhA6LSpDz4PDlDGPHwcLDzB-04sdfIiqxsXo0qPdN93q6rRnUg-fqKUjoxbQ3R_OPoRdO4HUrqfG155YctYQKWNbeNkucI-n7L1w91hp9hgNHkcD4bnUuX5z2UQc9l7q-V-zpCEfzNTGJjftHiuXkhNSbOdpeeC62r2oToqgp19faQWdXRYhGKBuIwjSVvEdrbZysrXAwvp4e298VhuOXF1os-GTInQOYJpSc8IGSuhy6PbnA4oVB3fTGoMScSzFmLF4b0_1yxeokuntjAtqxIM1xq_iwUszeLnbLtXL0UzSb7VWWT1OLP2zabdqfGETNKCUbh8xG-bC__c1tiNfSKchfQo6ng%3D%3D)**.

[**CHIP IN TO TAKE MICHIGAN BACK**](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=f94df7a4caff47a6bb78d09c04422e35&_e=asis_Or-kc9nEEh7Q98m5Qt2GF8VD016txA1OSA13w8w2F7s7JgluUjMwhA6LSpDz4PDlDGPHwcLDzB-04sdfIiqxsXo0qPdN93q6rRnUg-fqKUjoxbQ3R_OPoRdO4HUrqfG155YctYQKWNbeNkucI-n7L1w91hp9hgNHkcD4bnUuX5z2UQc9l7q-V-zpCEfzNTGJjftHiuXkhNSbOdpeeC62r2oToqgp19faQWdXRYhGKBuIwjSVvEdrbZysrXAi1k3E_OMoVU2RU913ADPC9EzlePS9fi3CMddC8W_jeH_2FRgmXs-sAn4KdWgWLFdPS03D9tLDkz0CPECvYQ-bfpE_Snf1rcrqxlZBxl8Fh_LScV_SnEodxzdzMOd6iAL-YCpRDnLsMgWCWpkq9MVgw%3D%3D)

This year is one of the most important years in our nation’s history. Michigan is the ONLY open competitive Senate seat in the **COUNTRY. ** We’ve seen what the Democrats have done not only to Michigan, but to our country as a whole, **ESPECIALLY** since Joe Biden took office. Their disastrous agenda has led to unprecedented inflation and illegal immigration, rising power in China, and wokeness in our military. **[But we’ve got the power in 2024 to put a stop to this. ](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=f94df7a4caff47a6bb78d09c04422e35&_e=asis_Or-kc9nEEh7Q98m5Qt2GF8VD016txA1OSA13w8w2F7s7JgluUjMwhA6LSpDz4PDlDGPHwcLDzB-04sdfIiqxsXo0qPdN93q6rRnUg-fqKUjoxbQ3R_OPoRdO4HUrqfG155YctYQKWNbeNkucI-n7L1w91hp9hgNHkcD4bnUuX5z2UQc9l7q-V-zpCEfzNTGJjftHiuXkhNSbOdpeeC62r2oToqgp19faQWdXRYhGKBuIwjSVvEdrbZysrXAEJlDbT6opFwKFYiUYR0bYucuvZDCgd5aM7nDvWYWkrUjrAqUYHsyqFc43yFaTfEtNKdmja41LMmjqEKD-4uBDXT_M3Q_flb5HEYaNUdr1q80vGUUCOhGVkh4daa6y69IOdE2O-LscX_2LMwcG0h9jA%3D%3D)** **[Would you consider contributing $20.24 to help us take back the Senate in 2024?](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=f94df7a4caff47a6bb78d09c04422e35&_e=asis_Or-kc9nEEh7Q98m5Qt2GF8VD016txA1OSA13w8w2F7s7JgluUjMwhA6LSpDz4PDlDGPHwcLDzB-04sdfIiqxsXo0qPdN93q6rRnUg-fqKUjoxbQ3R_OPoRdO4HUrqfG155YctYQKWNbeNkucI-n7L1w91hp9hgNHkcD4bnUuX5z2UQc9l7q-V-zpCEfzNTGJjftHiuXkhNSbOdpeeC62r2oToqgp19faQWdXRYhGKBuIwjSVvEdrbZysrXAjHFGWmzEcJOcWVSMzHp_vTDS1w0eU5sHb_El3UoKP6Y9RYQT4nR5IlPIXaKcrQZ4CC1TrSJmgKj5WU2y689CkbSlAnqTffHUhMXyaQwJDAzBELckJKY27kcnuJLGf7vTMxS2JSR1D3y7r2FvJKkuzA%3D%3D)** Thank you for your support, Mike Rogers

The catch is, I can’t call _everyone_ in the next few days, so I’m hoping you’ll forgive me for reaching out via email this time instead. But if we _were_ on the phone right now, here’s how our conversation may go: **There are lots of Democrats asking me for a donation right now.**
**Why should I donate to your campaign specifically?** I’m one of a handful of Democrats elected statewide in Arizona. In 2022, I defeated a Trump-endorsed QAnon conspiracy theorist and January 6 attendee, and I need your help to be ready to defend this seat. **Oh, well good job.**
**But that crazy guy wouldn’t have actually won right?** It’s disturbing to think about, but he could have. name: Team Cori
subject: "One of the progressives who gave us hope in 2023"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
The Nation recognized Cori for her bold pro-peace, pro-humanity leadership in Congress | |
---
Peter, **** **** **** **** **** **** The Nation just published an article titled “The Progressives Who Gave Us Hope in 2023” naming labor leaders, activists, academics, and politicians who shone a light of hope during some of the darker days from last year, and **Cori was named as “The Bold House Member” for her pro-peace, pro-humanity leadership in the movement for ceasefire.** The Nation wrote:
> After the October 7 attack on Israel, the heartbroken Democratic representative from Missouri immediately condemned the targeting of civilians and pledged to aid constituents who had loved ones in the region. But unlike most members of Congress, Bush didn’t stop there. She called for “an immediate ceasefire and de-escalation to prevent further loss of life”

The Nation wrote: After the October 7 attack on Israel, the heartbroken Democratic representative from Missouri immediately condemned the targeting of civilians and pledged to aid constituents who had loved ones in the region. But unlike most members of Congress, Bush didn’t stop there. She called for “an immediate ceasefire and de-escalation to prevent further loss of life” When Cori introduced the Ceasefire Now Resolution in Congress, it was to take a stand to affirm that all human life is precious, regardless of faith, ethnicity, or nationality. She did this understanding that it was not only the right thing to do, but it is what the vast majority of people all across our country support. Taking a moral stand takes courage and unfortunately comes at a price. Cori loudly and proudly advocates for a ceasefire and for Palestinian and Israeli life despite the millions of dollars AIPAC has pledged to spend against her and her pro-peace, pro-humanity colleagues in Congress. The Nation even said: That [pro-ceasefire] stance earned her a backlash—including the threat of a 2024 primary challenge that’s likely to be financed by the political arms of AIPAC and other groups that support Israeli hard-liners—but Bush remained steadfast. Bold leadership means taking the righteous position no matter how much your opponents will spend against you. And Cori’s been demonstrating that each and every day. # [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77605161/450928970/1033648996?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU2NTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWQyYTc3NzctMjNiYS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzODQ4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YEzuaFjhSqdOU_aCG9CRn9QnHb_GlO5K-hZTV0vn0V0=)
Peter, I have exciting news to share:

**Our first TV and digital ad is now live!**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77605162/450928971/671885613?refcode=em-1.23.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU2NTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWQyYTc3NzctMjNiYS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzODQ4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YEzuaFjhSqdOU_aCG9CRn9QnHb_GlO5K-hZTV0vn0V0=)
_Click[**here**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77605163/450928972/671885613?refcode=em-1.23.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU2NTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWQyYTc3NzctMjNiYS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzODQ4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YEzuaFjhSqdOU_aCG9CRn9QnHb_GlO5K-hZTV0vn0V0=) to watch._
This ad is about resilience and it is about the future of Orange County. With less than two weeks until ballots are mailed in CA-47, it could not come at a more pivotal time.

**[That is why we need to keep this ad funded to get undecided voters on our side. My finance team tells me they set a $25,000 goal to do just that – will you chip in $3 or any amount to keep our ad live?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77605164/450928973/671885613?refcode=em-1.23.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU2NTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWQyYTc3NzctMjNiYS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzODQ4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YEzuaFjhSqdOU_aCG9CRn9QnHb_GlO5K-hZTV0vn0V0=)**
| ****[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77605165/450928974/671885613?refcode=em-1.23.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU2NTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWQyYTc3NzctMjNiYS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzODQ4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YEzuaFjhSqdOU_aCG9CRn9QnHb_GlO5K-hZTV0vn0V0=)****
---

This is a huge moment for our grassroots campaign. **With our first ad of the election cycle, we can reach thousands of undecided voters in their homes and on their phones.**

As I say in the ad, I am no stranger to challenges. Surfing is one of the things that taught me that – _how to fall and get back up_. Being an attorney and a mom taught me that. Founding a nonprofit to protect our democracy taught me that.

That will be no different in Congress. I know it will be a challenge to stand up to extremists, but I am not fazed. It will be my duty to show up for Orange County and deliver for this community.

**[I am fired up to win our primary election in less than six weeks, but first, I need your support to boost our new ad to get voters on our team. Will you chip in $3 toward our $25,000 ad fund goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77605166/450928975/671885613?refcode=em-1.23.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU2NTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWQyYTc3NzctMjNiYS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzODQ4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YEzuaFjhSqdOU_aCG9CRn9QnHb_GlO5K-hZTV0vn0V0=)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Lexi=20Reese?=
subject: Happy New Year and Invitation to Join a Weekly Newsletter
body:
A month after exiting the Senate race, I am kicking off a weekly correspondence about co-creating a world that works better fo | | | | |
---
Friends:
Happy New Year! A month after exiting the Senate race, I am kicking off a weekly correspondence about co-creating a world that works better for people, planet, and democracy.
The first post is [Losing an Election, Finding a Superpower](https://lexireese.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=833a984b31aaa09af9ff0ffae&id=06d4702117&e=0f9388ee95). Please subscribe, comment there and on LinkedIn, Instagram, Facebook @lexireese.
The weekly dispatch will spotlight ideas, people, and organizations going all out to work together, to build a better future together where everyone thrives together. The areas of focus will be on the future of work, government, and families with an eye on the role technology plays in all of these spaces.
Together with our social posts, the goal is to help educate, inspire and activate folks. If done well, the work should equip people to feel and build differently for the better.
I welcome any/all thoughts on any of this and thank you for encouraging me to keep the dialogue we started during the campaign.
Building a brighter future takes all of us. I'm excited to keep working on it with all of you.
I look forward to hearing from you!
Lexi
| [Subscribe](https://lexireese.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=833a984b31aaa09af9ff0ffae&id=41e21c728d&e=0f9388ee95)
---
|
---
| | |
Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://lexireese.us8.list-manage.com/profile?u=833a984b31aaa09af9ff0ffae&id=c1ff26b88f&e=0f9388ee95&c=28e97e1b2c) or [unsubscribe](https://lexireese.us8.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=833a984b31aaa09af9ff0ffae&id=c1ff26b88f&e=0f9388ee95&c=28e97e1b2c)

name: Shamaine Daniels
subject: Petitions start today!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Daniels For Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdemail2023 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdemail2023]
Dear Friend
The petition process is starting today! It’s an important time for our campaign and exciting for me as a candidate. To get on the primary election ballot in April, I need to collect 1000 signatures from Democrats in the district. It’s a chance for me and my campaign volunteers to talk to voters about the issues they care about and to gauge their support of my efforts.
Can you chip in $25 or whatever you can afford to help make sure we have the resources to collect signatures and get on the ballot in April? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdemail2023]
We have a number of volunteers signed up to go door to door to collect signatures or host petition-signing parties for our campaign. We plan to add more over the next three weeks as well. Your contribution helps us with printing, campaign information, pens (that work in freezing weather!), and warm drinks and snacks for our volunteers.
This is a crucial time for our campaign and I’m asking for your financial support to make sure we make it on the ballot. If you can chip in, please click here. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdemail2023]
With gratitude,
Shamaine
Donate Now! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdemail2023]
Paid for by Daniels For Congress
Daniels For Congress
2018 North 3rd Street
Harrisburg, PA 17102
United States

name: Diane Sare
subject: 01/26 Friday Symposium: Help End The Election Fraud Psychological Warfare
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sare for Senate
body:
| | [](https://www.sareforsenate.com/?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240126_ny_symposium&n=1)
---
Friend, This week's Symposium will be presented with Daniella May and Elisa Nahoum, both of whom have run for elected office at the city and state level, respectively, and have run into serious problems with election fraud. Not only are votes stolen, voters intimated, communities coerced, and debates run as private events, but, most importantly, all of this amounts to a campaign of psychological warfare to keep American citizens from finding out what their neighbors are actually thinking. People might assume that the "other side" must be crazy to vote in "those" people; but at the same time the majority of people, as polls increasingly show, are fed up with _all_ the infants running the "potty system." Their tactics of divide-and-conquer have worn thin, and the main question now is what do we do about the rampant election fraud? We have more in common than we know. But the only way we can find this out is through free speech and open dialogue. | Participation in the Sare for Senate NY Symposium Dialogue does not constitute endorsement of the campaign, nor do the opinions expressed necessarily reflect the views of the candidate. The NY Symposium is a dialogue on important matters of policy to enable the voters to develop an informed, as opposed to arbitrary, opinion.
---

clean_body: | | Friend, This week's Symposium will be presented with Daniella May and Elisa Nahoum, both of whom have run for elected office at the city and state level, respectively, and have run into serious problems with election fraud. Not only are votes stolen, voters intimated, communities coerced, and debates run as private events, but, most importantly, all of this amounts to a campaign of psychological warfare to keep American citizens from finding out what their neighbors are actually thinking. People might assume that the "other side" must be crazy to vote in "those" people; but at the same time the majority of people, as polls increasingly show, are fed up with all the infants running the "potty system." Their tactics of divide-and-conquer have worn thin, and the main question now is what do we do about the rampant election fraud? We have more in common than we know. But the only way we can find this out is through free speech and open dialogue. | Participation in the Sare for Senate NY Symposium Dialogue does not constitute endorsement of the campaign, nor do the opinions expressed necessarily reflect the views of the candidate. The NY Symposium is a dialogue on important matters of policy to enable the voters to develop an informed, as opposed to arbitrary, opinion. To attend this week's symposium in-person, RSVP below. "RSVP" ** "DONATE" \--Diane | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Sare for Senate

name: Officer Harry Dunn (ret.)
subject: Three years ago, I defended the U.S. Capitol from violent insurrectionists. Now, I'm the Democrat running for Congress in MD-03 and I hope you’ll become a Founding Donor of my campaign.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]
Hey team , it's Harry Dunn here, one of the Capitol police officers who defended the U.S. Capitol against MAGA insurrectionists just three years ago and testified in front of the January 6th Committee.
I've got an important announcement: I'm hoping to make my return to DC – but not as a Capitol police officer. I'm officially running to serve Maryland's 3rd Congressional district in the U.S. House.
I’m counting on your support to get there. Can you rush $10 or more to me and Seth Moulton become a Founding Donor of my campaign? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]
Here’s the thing team, I never thought I would run for office. Growing up, I wanted to be just like my dad, who was an athlete and a U.S. Air Force Veteran. I played football and earned an athletic scholarship that sent me to college. (I was pretty good, but being 6-foot-7 sure didn’t hurt!)
But wearing a football uniform taught me something special: it gave me purpose and made me feel a part of something bigger than myself.
So when I put on my Capitol police uniform for the first time over 15 years ago to protect our nation’s Capitol, it felt right.
But I never thought I’d see the day that our democracy would be attacked by Donald Trump and an army of insurrectionists that HE directed to the Capitol.
I couldn't have been any closer to the chaos of January 6. I put my life on the line during the violence and destruction that Trump encouraged. So trust and believe when I tell you: we cannot allow our democracy to be in the hands of these MAGA-extremists.
I fought for our democracy and our Capitol once as Officer Dunn, and I'll do it again as Congressman Dunn.
Please, can you chip in $10 or $25 to my team and Seth Moulton to become a Founding Donor of my campaign? I seriously appreciate any help you can give today >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]
Let's do it,
Harry Dunn
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]

name: Working Families Party
subject: Roe

body:
| | | Peter,
This week, we should have been celebrating the 51st anniversary of Roe. But instead, it is yet another week where the right to an abortion is not guaranteed in nearly 50% of the states in this country.1 Ever since the Republican majority on the Supreme Court struck down the protections of Roe and overturned a half century of precedent, we have lived through the terrifying consequences:
* 21 states have banned or restricted abortion in the 18 months since Roe was overturned;
* For millions, it has become impossible to obtain a medical exemption to such an extent that women like Katie Cox in Texas have to flee their home states in order to get lifesaving abortion care;2
* Women who have had miscarriages have been prosecuted, as in the the case of Brittany Watts in Ohio;3
* And Republicans are promising a nationwide abortion ban if they capture the White House and full control of Congress this November.

**But we’ve also seen voters continue to reject abortion restrictions, time and time again. 4 **From Kentucky to Ohio to Virginia, from the 2022 midterms to referendums in 2023, from red states to blue states and everywhere in between — wherever abortion rights have been on the ballot, voters have shown up. The Republican Party wants to ban abortion nationwide, but we know we can stop them if our side has the resources to fight back. **[Will you rush a contribution of $15 or any amount to help us elect candidates in key races who will defend abortion rights in 2024?](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUwZ-ZiMGZk8ALVB2APPwauLcrsIHVzKD_SkWusU4uKH_rp-DgwHB2I04dXiWorm0klRWtvZlrHackYZO0-GLh1A075qLoQ2Uf7DQYi-SSIhMqmA91Rq2Xo8bTd2hksnvRAZQA94SLWQ8L5ygTv9C6Fu8YOVF1dsg8HA67zHSUX3BhLpv2SAXR3qmJVPZeY61piZssqWBx2Ql2rwPqD7cc4wBBt_Cq9V3YRpIxq31QAjVsQhNF8pbBlZiygCxNN1tin2R0TStk9BIP4tm441gAzfaF7lEQcr0S37ClMx_v98zIWEbDJGNUjpdjgmSfwYab/438/VDMwSw4wRvqTXNbB_pTt7Q/h0/QP8EGssCuM0y2kIIVRM75TZLm72nM38QYY8lvafCEWA)** **[Contribute $15 »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUwZ-ZiMGZk8ALVB2APPwauLcrsIHVzKD_SkWusU4uKH_rp-DgwHB2I04dXiWorm0k6YzDMxX1Pb5XHU_xYZblezBcVKsS7dsooc-dlf4eQ45I4vHm9N-SuJjeYwrx3jLhMlpDwrfqct9pYDF6-wQL_lKAGcjFplsYIUcTf7VWLJgxR9NocllABttSgnYtczKJc6L2Llo9OewCwa9lxAcHovp030r9wp5jcTLVytCiUyA3sikKLH6eCi66EFh0F22xop1WqQu7camhRWRQ7kbyOubCoMoQSX4OIG5eTtFUau2KZFi6fbTFu5c-Ip3aby_l/438/VDMwSw4wRvqTXNbB_pTt7Q/h1/1dJBJyRV2FCg61yUBo2UlkxuhE6pqt5XYcRZmQ66yvA)** **This year, abortion rights are on the ballot.** And how we and our candidates do at the polls in 2024 — from the fight for Congress to ballot initiatives and state and local elections — will determine the future of abortion rights in this country. But instead, it is yet another week where the right to an abortion is not guaranteed in nearly 50% of the states in this country.1 Ever since the Republican majority on the Supreme Court struck down the protections of Roe and overturned a half century of precedent, we have lived through the terrifying consequences: 21 states have banned or restricted abortion in the 18 months since Roe was overturned; For millions, it has become impossible to obtain a medical exemption to such an extent that women like Katie Cox in Texas have to flee their home states in order to get lifesaving abortion care;2 Women who have had miscarriages have been prosecuted, as in the the case of Brittany Watts in Ohio;3 And Republicans are promising a nationwide abortion ban if they capture the White House and full control of Congress this November. But we’ve also seen voters continue to reject abortion restrictions, time and time again. 4 From Kentucky to Ohio to Virginia, from the 2022 midterms to referendums in 2023, from red states to blue states and everywhere in between — wherever abortion rights have been on the ballot, voters have shown up. The Republican Party wants to ban abortion nationwide, but we know we can stop them if our side has the resources to fight back. This year, abortion rights are on the ballot. And how we and our candidates do at the polls in 2024 — from the fight for Congress to ballot initiatives and state and local elections — will determine the future of abortion rights in this country. name: Courier Newsroom || Granite Post
subject: How your support is fueling our coverage of the New Hampshire Primary
body:
Tonight, New Hampshire voters head to the polls for the first-in-the-nation primary election.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77605723/450931195/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTk1NWMwYzYtMjViYS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzODQ4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zDkRa4oVQr5u6khMyNsBoKslbRbfIiNRm0L1M1pFh6Y=&emci=6e603250-11ba-ee11-bea1-002248223848&emdi=1955c0c6-25ba-ee11-bea1-002248223848&ceid=14016711)
Peter,
**Tonight, New Hampshire voters head to the polls for the first-in-the-nation primary election.** And thanks to the generous support of small-dollar donors who have pitched in to support our newsrooms, _Granite Post_ is on the ground covering the race.
Like many states, New Hampshire has been hit hard by shrinking news budgets and newsroom closures. (Two local papers even launched an initiative to train citizen journalists who could help with news reporting!) It’s an urgent crisis, and we’re proud that the _Granite Post_ can help provide high-quality coverage to New Hampshire communities without access to trustworthy local news.
While the national media has obsessively covered the horse race between Nikki Haley and Donald Trump in the Republican primary, what’s happening on the Democratic side has been almost completely neglected. Neglected, that is by everyone BUT the _Granite Post,_ whose team shared this surprising update over the weekend:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77605725/450931199/-927058166?refcode=em20240123&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTk1NWMwYzYtMjViYS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzODQ4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zDkRa4oVQr5u6khMyNsBoKslbRbfIiNRm0L1M1pFh6Y=)
Peter, the _Granite Post's_ coverage of this and other important local stories is only possible thanks to thousands of small-dollar contributions from people like you. We're on the ground reporting in 10 battleground states across the country. With the 2024 election now in full swing, our teams need your help now more than ever.
**[So Peter, if you want to support Democracy's Newsroom in the most important election of our lifetime, please pitch in $5 or any amount you can today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77605727/450931201/-927058166?refcode=em20240123&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTk1NWMwYzYtMjViYS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzODQ4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zDkRa4oVQr5u6khMyNsBoKslbRbfIiNRm0L1M1pFh6Y=)**

name: Juliana at United We Dream Action
subject: This is URGENT
body:
Help us pressure Congress to reject this awful deal before it’s too late. | | | This is **URGENT** , Peter: | | **"Congress is Sleepwalking Into a Draconian Asylum Ban"**

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Are you ready for the end times?
body:
Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
| | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/i3fD5aPJjfdfWaOpouTrRQ~~/AARclAA~)
---
Hello Friend,

Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return.

That's the heart of Revelation.

Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness.

Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead.

It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near.

This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey.

Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ.

When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence.

As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King.

In my brand-new book, _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into:

1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist?
2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event?
3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture?
4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance?
5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem?

Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure.

In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative.
[](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/i3fD5aPJjfdfWaOpouTrRQ~~/AARclAA~)I would like to send you my brand-new book _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_.
Make your generous gift here: [https://secure.ptv.org/mysteries-of-the-end-times-generous-gift-1-dr-robert-jeffress](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/i3fD5aPJjfdfWaOpouTrRQ~~/AARclAA~)

_Pathway to Victory_ is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support.

May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus.

Sharing the Truth of God's Word, ____
---
| | Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas
---

Restore Our Nation
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem? Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure. In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative. would like to send you my brand-new book Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of Pathway to Victory. Make your generous gift here: Pathway to Victory is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support. May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus. Sharing the Truth of God's Word, __ | | Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas Restore Our Nation PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | ~~_

| | Hi there, Was checking my email and texts en route to an appointment and came across many disingenuous asks for money for this cause, that campaign, and others who didn't even identify themselves. I've always campaigned honestly and asked for donations transparently. I couldn't explain to you what a 1500% match is... but what I can tell you is that I will be 1,500% better than the current representation we have in Congress here in Alaska. I care deeply about our state and our country. That's why I'm running. Our moral compasses seem to be all messed up, and it's time we bring our state motto, "North to the Future," to Congress. 🧭 If you agree, I hope you can take 30 seconds to add your name to my growing list of supporters to show Mary Peltola and the Democrats that we want our seat in Congress back! Add your name here >> **[https://NancyforAlaska.com/supporter](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=a8e41c2a970b44d0a291e2cbf8512a7f&_m=72ac46925e37436faf2257904b42a464&_e=rOD91k_XKVclUTd9pTxMuBqL6ywqGwFqrP-p5YHRDcVG2RR24ws3wlr-_gqYC1RYVv6XWT0Kvp8wIYRQG3mybx1UlgKWrIRai8oGjGU1T6LAbd2U-gEgtpnitMLR2B6W0XTYqRVdWkN4QLfQ24pIfEBgZmweBocpfSsMRe2Ou20AwmN3MUYlRVzZjW1xsJOmq11VVT4hJp4BnXb-dIku_GPQwfqxqLsQ0yOdZSsrtOPmi7A0CqjL-REp5oyR67Wu)** Thanks for listening and joining my campaign. Fellow American,
The petition period has officially started! My supporters and volunteers are now out collecting petitions. You can help me get on the ballot up until Tuesday, February 13th. If you haven’t already gotten your petition packet, please contact my campaign.
Below is a list of petition events that are coming up this week. Please try to stop by one of the events and sign my petition so I can be on the ballot for Congress, and ultimately go on to defeat Susan Wild!
• Petition Circulation Training Completed• Tuesday Jan. 23rd Petition Party (Allentown)• Wednesday Jan. 24th Petition Party (Carbon County)• Thursday Jan. 25th Petition Party (Northampton County)• Saturday Jan. 27th Petition Party (Lehigh County)
As always, if you need to get in contact with our campaign, please feel free to reach out at (484) 347-8777.
All the Best,
**RYAN MACKENZIE**
|
---
**OUR TEAM**
Our team is growing by the day!
Yesterday, we held a petition circulation event for key volunteers to learn how to take a petition out on the street and collect signatures from fellow Republicans.
Please let us know if you want to join our efforts!
|

**Tuesday, Jan. 23rd Liberty Tavern Allentown****6:00 P.M. to 8:00 P.M.****(Lehigh County)**

**Wednesday, Jan. 24th Pizza Como Lehighton****6:00 P.M. to 8:00 P.M.****(Carbon County)**

**Saturday, Jan. 27th Don Corleone’s Restaurant (New Tripoli)****12:00 P.M. to 1:30 P.M.**

name: Ben Wikler, WisDems Chair
subject: this is our best chance yet
disclaimer_text: paid for by the State Senate Democratic Committee, Jeff Smith, Treasurer
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ssdc-email?refcode=20240123_em_fr_b1_BW_NGP [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ssdc-email?refcode=20240123_em_fr_b1_BW_NGP]
Hi, Ben Wikler here — Chair of the Democratic Party of Wisconsin.
As we gear up for another crucial election cycle in Wisconsin, I'm reaching out to ask for your help in supporting Democrats running for state senate this year.
Our current state senators are value-driven leaders who have been at the forefront of this fight for progress. They’ve championed reproductive rights, a strong democracy, and a fair shot for working families.
But here's the truth: They can't do it alone, and the WisGOP is going to do everything they can to stop us this cycle.
That's why I'm asking you to join me and help the Wisconsin SSDC support our state senators and flip seats in critical down ballot races.
Thanks to the WI Supreme Court, we’ll finally have fair maps and a real chance to elect more pro-choice, pro-democracy candidates. Chip in to help us elect candidates in the new fair districts! >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ssdc-email?refcode=20240123_em_fr_b1_BW_NGP]
The Wisconsin SSDC needs your help NOW to prepare for this year’s unprecedented election cycle.
Every donation to the SSDC provides [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ssdc-email?refcode=20240123_em_fr_b1_BW_NGP] critical resources to support state senate candidates. Will you contribute today to help us take back a Democratic majority in 2024? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ssdc-email?refcode=20240123_em_fr_b1_BW_NGP] [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ssdc-email?refcode=20240112_em_fr_b1_BW_SB]
GIVE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ssdc-email?refcode=20240123_em_fr_b1_BW_NGP]
In solidarity,
Ben Wikler
Chair, WisDems
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ssdc-email?refcode=20240123_em_fr_b1_BW_NGP [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ssdc-email?refcode=20240123_em_fr_b1_BW_NGP]
The Wisconsin State Senate Democratic Committee (SSDC) is working around the clock to elect more Democrats to the Wisconsin State Senate. And with a fair, impartial State Supreme Court coupled with the prospect of fair legislative lines, we’re ready to Win Wisconsin and take back our Democratic majority, finally giving a voice to Wisconsin voters who for so long haven’t had one in our legislature.
2024 is going to be a crucial election year. But we need your help if we’re going to take back our majority.
Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to:
Wisconsin SSDC
P.O. Box 164
Madison, WI 53701

United States

name: Kamala Harris
subject: How dare they
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
The leading Republican candidates for president, including Donald Trump, have made it clear they would support an extreme nationwide ban on abortion. | | |
---
Peter, For nearly 50 years, Americans relied on the protections of _Roe v. Wade_ \-- including the constitutional right for a woman to make decisions about her own body. **And now, on the 51st anniversary of _Roe_ , we speak of the decision in the past tense.** Ever since the Supreme Court overturned _Roe_ and took a constitutional right away from the American people, Republican so-called leaders have seized this opportunity to attack our basic freedoms. Republican-controlled states across the country have passed extreme bans restricting women’s ability to access care and threatening doctors and nurses with jail time for doing their jobs. And now, they’re threatening to go even further. **The leading Republican candidates for president, including Donald Trump, have made it clear they want to ban abortion nationwide.** _That’s why Joe, Jill, Doug, and I will be hosting an event today to highlight the importance of this election when it comes to a woman’s right to make her own reproductive health care decisions -- highlighting the very real threat of a Republican-led national abortion ban._ It’s going to take all of us coming together to fight for freedom, and we are counting on your support to win, Peter. When I heard the news of the Court’s decision to overturn _Roe_ , I was on my way to a maternal health event in Illinois.
I called Doug outraged. We talked about our daughter. We talked about my goddaughters, my niece, and her daughters.
Because Donald Trump hand-picked three Supreme Court Justices, their generation would have fewer rights than my generation or my mother’s generation.
Three words came to mind.
**_How dare they._**
**How dare they attack basic health care. How dare they attack our fundamental rights. How dare they attack our freedom.**
It is enraging. And it is why we must fight. We must fight for our basic freedoms. For the right to make decisions about our own bodies.
It is why we must elect leaders who will defend our rights -- and stop the Republicans responsible for overturning _Roe_ , like Donald Trump, from taking power once again.
[**That is why today, I’m asking you to support our reelection campaign with a contribution of $25 or whatever you can afford. We must reelect Joe Biden to protect our fundamental freedoms >>**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yEOQgSlkg29MQMFLkzVkhZRof5tOr_McSDl340cJ372Kxf_4Tv9lJOAKPf8Y0XBoJeeO4_2Tf3feBy8bVLB5UVG-LOio3BKaUEBgXseU0T2V3naMN_0UuUf6k2OEuCaoN0p7_RuIHoSBXPNfK27bINY8IwSCnzQNecFwGa18ntmbvVcPy7k1dBzpXd8r8EyF9bN6q1ftwoKoRzRsfyIQ1aFasdvILmiD3xGfYHNmSvdhX-C704fTvsb5IKmO4Bew9EGRYQGjumBVf1HmNoL95JP2QCx0--6whoL4z2rATGQR3CaC-DRchbpd6HtD2osj2dHtl9HPjgn3vpepZtwXhlJm8zi6E3hhCzDZ-NGhMKjw/438/_PibMq1XQxm8U0odJEOxAA/h7/KUpuQgVdCej7J-YqWN5QKr7DN48OUteErVZ8ZftVGZI)

clean_body: The leading Republican candidates for president, including Donald Trump, have made it clear they would support an extreme nationwide ban on abortion. | | | Peter, For nearly 50 years, Americans relied on the protections of Roe v. Wade \-- including the constitutional right for a woman to make decisions about her own body. And now, on the 51st anniversary of Roe , we speak of the decision in the past tense. Ever since the Supreme Court overturned Roe and took a constitutional right away from the American people, Republican so-called leaders have seized this opportunity to attack our basic freedoms. Republican-controlled states across the country have passed extreme bans restricting women’s ability to access care and threatening doctors and nurses with jail time for doing their jobs. And now, they’re threatening to go even further. The leading Republican candidates for president, including Donald Trump, have made it clear they want to ban abortion nationwide. That’s why Joe, Jill, Doug, and I will be hosting an event today to highlight the importance of this election when it comes to a woman’s right to make her own reproductive health care decisions -- highlighting the very real threat of a Republican-led national abortion ban. It’s going to take all of us coming together to fight for freedom, and we are counting on your support to win, Peter. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | When I heard the news of the Court’s decision to overturn Roe , I was on my way to a maternal health event in Illinois. I called Doug outraged. We talked about our daughter. We talked about my goddaughters, my niece, and her daughters. Because Donald Trump hand-picked three Supreme Court Justices, their generation would have fewer rights than my generation or my mother’s generation. Three words came to mind. How dare they. How dare they attack basic health care. How dare they attack our fundamental rights. How dare they attack our freedom. It is enraging. And it is why we must fight. We must fight for our basic freedoms. For the right to make decisions about our own bodies. It is why we must elect leaders who will defend our rights -- and stop the Republicans responsible for overturning Roe , like Donald Trump, from taking power once again. Thank you for all that you do, Kamala Kamala Harris Vice President of the United States

Peter, You can be the front-runner for the Republican primary nomination.
You can have a commanding lead in national polls.
You can win the Iowa Caucus with 51% percent against multiple opponents.
You can even be a _former President of the United States of America._

**_And yet, a liberal activist court will STILL try to kick you off the presidential ballot... UNLESS WE STOP THEM._**
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=ccd6481907c041e48c50650865d83c18&_e=ds6ey4xxViyvGXZIx0G4t8XNmzdORW0Pi1_oIvX7gm_bdTHkJ2zduqWu-gM9ngJGUQhzQd9RrQQN_DZn-bFkxMGxiXGz1JJ4ssuJXsRHc3lZPWw4vUHLBcExAZIfeUAj72J8WSyAUPkRqQroQHdL_BVZ9rlPEXUKX2nlC5c3cBvg2GHTK7nzNR0z0TO6k411Yfs4jNQAdZN3UHYR4yVWNh8J7Fo15iyVrPn0bwLwQMH4_NyDARQ92gVtv5rm5PCuoCUs0pJ3Oqqfay1Xzz6m434WVr6xYW6AfT_hYySBYWI0QxwcqRY1LdfKXNy-SvIkuhLZtbK-v4TDdcOMw8EfaL26Yk6797wnNVYClmOWGvUEo8NCRCsy4J7IxSqizdll)

As the chief conservative organization tracking the left-wing judicial activists taking over our state supreme courts, we’ve been sounding the alarm that Donald Trump could be kicked off the ballot because of Soros-funded judicial activism... **_and our worst fears are coming true._**

It's not enough for us to cobble together legal defense funds to fight rulings like these.

**We have to go on offense. It's time to fight the root problem: the leftist activists who have infiltrated our judicial system.**

_**[Fair Courts America exists to put a stop to all that.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=ccd6481907c041e48c50650865d83c18&_e=ds6ey4xxViyvGXZIx0G4t8XNmzdORW0Pi1_oIvX7gm_bdTHkJ2zduqWu-gM9ngJGUQhzQd9RrQQN_DZn-bFkxMGxiXGz1JJ4ssuJXsRHc3lZPWw4vUHLBcExAZIfeUAj72J8WSyAUPkRqQroQHdL_BVZ9rlPEXUKX2nlC5c3cBvg2GHTK7nzNR0z0TO6k411Yfs4jNQAdZN3UHYR4yVWNh8J7Fo15iyVrPn0bwLwQMGJvnGD8Ms2mC_AG3jY9yMoGKy0BoVC7g-SrO3i_msWBs6NVH17FySG37wqDRYDs8dsHc51qg2LROmJJSWMMF5sH2pXSSMImOUQcAUAgkVuYLCgCBjPo3tHHc7lyEck_1wAu7st7-Fz-kiiJrKufdn1)**_

We say NO to anyone who would endanger equal justice under the law. You can’t use your judicial powers to intimidate your political enemies.

If we lose the rule of law in our country... we lose our republic. It’s as simple as that.

But Peter, because we’ve been tracking this for some time, we also have a plan to fight back. And we want you to fight with us.

**As the left gets bolder in their judicial overreach, we need more allies like you who will fight back. Will you join us to defend equal justice under the law, before it’s too late?**
---
**YES: I WILL JOIN THE FIGHT!**

clean_body: Trump getting booted from the ballot isn’t even the worst part.| | | Peter, You can be the front-runner for the Republican primary nomination. You can have a commanding lead in national polls. You can win the Iowa Caucus with 51% percent against multiple opponents. You can even be a former President of the United States of America. And yet, a liberal activist court will STILL try to kick you off the presidential ballot... UNLESS WE STOP THEM. As the chief conservative organization tracking the left-wing judicial activists taking over our state supreme courts, we’ve been sounding the alarm that Donald Trump could be kicked off the ballot because of Soros-funded judicial activism... and our worst fears are coming true. It's not enough for us to cobble together legal defense funds to fight rulings like these. We have to go on offense. It's time to fight the root problem: the leftist activists who have infiltrated our judicial system. We say NO to anyone who would endanger equal justice under the law. You can’t use your judicial powers to intimidate your political enemies. If we lose the rule of law in our country... we lose our republic. It’s as simple as that. But Peter, because we’ve been tracking this for some time, we also have a plan to fight back. And we want you to fight with us. As the left gets bolder in their judicial overreach, we need more allies like you who will fight back. Will you join us to defend equal justice under the law, before it’s too late? YES: I WILL JOIN THE FIGHT! | | Thank you, Andrew Wynne Executive Director | Fair Courts America P.S. Consider this: If someone who meets all of the qualifications above, like Donald Trump, can be booted off of the ballot...what chance do other, lower-profile conservatives stand against an activist court?We have to act now, Peter, while we still can. Help us save our courts by joining us at this secure link now: | | | | | | | Paid for by Fair Courts America | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

| | This week marks the 51st anniversary of _Roe v. Wade_ , the landmark Supreme Court decision that legalized abortion nationwide. While we should be commemorating the historic decision that affirmed the right to reproductive healthcare, instead we’re resuming the fight we won over half a century ago.

When the Supreme Court overturned this historic decision in 2022, ignoring decades of precedent and ignoring judicial restraint, the consequences were dire, endangering Americans across the country.

_[It's critical that we elect leaders who are ready to fight for reproductive freedoms. He'll never support the America First agenda and he'll never support President Trump.

name: Nikki Haley
subject: It’s game time
body:
Are you ready?

| |
---
| | [Unsubscribe](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_s=13cfb135b40144f68ec78a6a12f6df3e&_t=iFe9cGRXNjXT-ZWKlg8cX3KWDegWeiR90b9Ordspla25nc9-ZVPBV5NIl3lR_HQaCE6gTOKvJzTm51afJi-DC6GjOPJbqPdyTr59c-clHKM%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_s=13cfb135b40144f68ec78a6a12f6df3e&_t=iFe9cGRXNjXT-ZWKlg8cX3KWDegWeiR90b9Ordspla25nc9-ZVPBV5NIl3lR_HQaCE6gTOKvJzTm51afJi-DC6GjOPJbqPdyTr59c-clHKM%3D)

**THIS IS IT. THIS IS GO TIME.**
Peter,

Today marks a significant and game-changing campaign milestone - **the first-in-the-nation New Hampshire primary election!**

_Are you ready?_ 🇺🇸

Polls are open across New Hampshire, and Granite Staters are getting a chance to cast their votes.

The best part is...

Today voters have a choice to elect a new generational leader and move on from the drama and chaos of the past.

Granite Staters and voters across America are looking at the fact that we can't afford another Trump-Biden rematch. We need a leader who offers no drama, no chaos, no nonsense - just results! Fellow Conservative,

Republicans are the only thing stopping President Biden and Chuck Schumer from bankrupting our country.

This isn’t just political hyperbole. It’s as real as it gets!

It’s our Republican majority that allows us to hold them accountable. Without it, we would effectively be relegated to “sitting on the sidelines” and watching as:
* The Biden Administration does nothing to address the growing border crisis,

* **Crime continues to rise, and dangerous drugs pour into our country,**

* The Washington swamp holds critical funds hostage in order to send more untracked American tax dollars to Ukraine, and

* Liberals try to protect their political power by brazenly opposing election integrity measures ... _**even going as far as trying to keep President Trump off the ballot!**_****

But thankfully, our majority acts as a backstop against Democrats running roughshod over our values, our wallets, our country, and our constitution.
**_
But Fellow Conservative,...all that goes away if we lose our majority in November’s election...and I would be lying to you if I told you that wasn’t a real possibility._**

As we head into the most important election in recent memory, our majority has recently shrunk from four to TWO.

**How did this happen?** Over the past couple of months there have been several Republican members of Congress who resigned or retired. Having such a slim majority puts us in a very precarious position going into an election year –and to be honest, we’re in real trouble right now, which is why I’m reaching out today.

It’s anyone’s guess right now as to how things will play out, but if I can tell you one thing it’s this: **if we lose control of the House and fail to retake the Senate, Republicans won’t be able to block Democrats from crushing our economy, diverting taxpayer money to their pet projects or stop them from prosecuting political opponents who dare to speak the truth!**

I’m certain Democrats will have all the money they’ll need in the fight to flip the House. But will Republicans? Democrats will turn in big numbers. That’s why we’re beginning the long, arduous process of identifying conservatives to help us hold onto our slim majority now.

Time is of the essence, and **[we need to know whether you’re on our team.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=cb6cf0b24e5c4abd8bd104abca581d23&_e=3cj5OMiGs8NRokXGHFxgnLuq6yeytEsdBllFubyFrb5iTQmSaPSQ2Q9AZ8EmD0YgnrIohB19qW9yG6ddeha7j6p0QzFtb0l_HUXsA2qIux95wXNsDRgHTP9ovrIp6HeY_v8D0GzIlu0z1j-D0RSwp_cCT_N8vOCq51UHbHEbUjuCnorKh2Hm6K1SY-x5zt9hAaZcYvdMnXEjxjgcNmn35-N3oKEKpHbksn3wZDne__n0zGAuiIJqq2n70yB7jNaKlfjxr8yQvvOJj7DF3TSUA717RISabRomRFLeI8801kfxn1vGMRHMcKtbheZgwqid4J2EJAp1s3TJGuoKBSMqUCizfoHXinGHyQf8iA0tJYoWpqjxP1iby45AAEvEZW_wpmbWWpfmCDyUvoiLaYgichzg3PxsBi8Pz80-ud2FWdDrIJdp2VhPTwL8kKZJiLLmOdmu_SRv4k8dqC7Rg_6GNB4SqUGQXNoXwpzB24cgX4WRTr7T9JYrKHleYJKzNHILIgSQIhTFSBuGEhWlSgzteYyTTAriVLUiFLn7XTCbtc8%3D)**

We hope you will be among the first to **[sign up and signal your commitment](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=cb6cf0b24e5c4abd8bd104abca581d23&_e=3cj5OMiGs8NRokXGHFxgnLuq6yeytEsdBllFubyFrb5iTQmSaPSQ2Q9AZ8EmD0YgnrIohB19qW9yG6ddeha7j6p0QzFtb0l_HUXsA2qIux95wXNsDRgHTP9ovrIp6HeY_v8D0GzIlu0z1j-D0RSwp_cCT_N8vOCq51UHbHEbUjuCnorKh2Hm6K1SY-x5zt9hAaZcYvdMnXEjxjgcNmn35-N3oKEKpHbksn3wZDne__n0zGAuiIJqq2n70yB7jNaKlfjxr8yQvvOJj7DF3TSUA717RISabRomRFLeI8801kfxn1vGMRHMcKtbheZgwqid4J2EJAp1s3TJGuoKBSMqUCizfoHXinGHyQf8iA0tJYoWpqjxP1iby45AAEvEZW_wpmbWWpfmCDyUvoiLaYgichKacw1OHFtC4OJkjuR_IBY5estUcf7Rz5X0ypx5Nfrlc8YJMxXxWzWtazlo2lCGBS8YX8xQr5EXL-idKF4VFUasjeADBIdn94Sr4wcwbqRKecyhfSRPGl383Sa_iFr-_RbMxWaYSIPGCrWmiRyhxU0%3D)** to holding onto our Republican majority in the House.

It’s anyone’s guess right now as to how things will play out, but if I can tell you one thing it’s this: if we lose control of the House and fail to retake the Senate, Republicans won’t be able to block Democrats from crushing our economy, diverting taxpayer money to their pet projects or stop them from prosecuting political opponents who dare to speak the truth! I’m certain Democrats will have all the money they’ll need in the fight to flip the House. But will Republicans? Democrats will turn in big numbers. That’s why we’re beginning the long, arduous process of identifying conservatives to help us hold onto our slim majority now. Time is of the essence, and We hope you will be among the first to ** to holding onto our Republican majority in the House. For Liberty, Jim Jordan | Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress PO BOX 355 Delaware, OH 43015

**About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dave=20Min=20for=20Congress?=
subject: The Korean American Democratic Committee Backs Min
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/eb7ae0e34657/the-korean-american-democratic-committee-backs-min-15669092?e=7017cc100e)
---
| |
---
| | **For Immediate Release:** January 23, 2024
**Contact:**[press@davemin.com](mailto:press@davemin.com)
**The Korean American Democratic Committee Backs Min**
**IRVINE, CA** — The Korean American Democratic Committee is throwing their weight behind Dave Min for California’s 47th Congressional District. Min is the only Korean American in the California State Senate, and–with Rep. Andy Kim running for US Senate–would be one of two Democratic Korean Americans in the US House. Min is widely seen as the AAPI community’s best pick up opportunity of the 2024 cycle, with AAPI Victory Fund and ASPIRE PAC having made early endorsements.

**"The Korean American Democratic Committee is pleased to offer our endorsement to State Senator Dave Min," said the KADC Endorsement Board. "As the son of Korean immigrants, Dave has spent his career fighting to preserve the American Dream that brought so many families to this country. His advocacy for AAPI communities, and the Korean American community specifically, is crucially important, and his candidacy is an opportunity to better represent the Korean American community in Washington. We are thrilled to join his broad coalition of support."**

Since its inception in 1992, KADC has mobilized the Korean American community to vote and participate in the local, state and federal electoral process. Their stated mission is to promote the political empowerment of the Korean-American community through advocacy, education, and civic participation in the spirit of Democratic Party principles.

This endorsement builds on Senator Min’s incredible momentum in his campaign to keep this seat Blue. Last week, [Min received the coveted endorsement of the Los Angeles Times](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=02ba389d90&e=7017cc100e). He is also endorsed by outgoing Rep. Katie Porter, as well as the California Democratic Party, Service Employees International Union (SEIU), the National Education Association, the American Federation of Teachers, and over 150 local, state, and federal officials. Min is the unanimous choice of organized labor in this race, as he is the only candidate to receive support from national, statewide, and local unions, and received the backing of the California Labor Federation. A full endorsement list is available [here](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=6f0b452842&e=7017cc100e). ###

_California’s 47th is an open Congressional District in Orange County that includes the Cities of Costa Mesa, Huntington Beach, Irvine, Newport Beach, and Seal Beach, and portions of Laguna Beach, Laguna Hills, and Laguna Woods. Incumbent Katie Porter is vacating the seat to run for U.S. Senate. In 2022, Porter defeated former Assemblymember Republican Scott Baugh by 3.44% in this “toss-up” district. State Senator Dave Min currently represents over 80% of Congressional District 47 in Sacramento. In 2020, Min received over 158,000 votes within CA-47, defeating incumbent John Moorlach by 5.15% in this area. 19% of the registered voters in CA-47 are of Asian and Pacific Islander descent, including one of the largest Korean-American populations in the country. _
---
| | **Our mailing address is:**
PO Box 5959, Irvine, CA 92616
---

| This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[_why did I get this?_](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/about?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=700e70ffe1&e=7017cc100e&c=5a0eb6f8f9) [unsubscribe from this list](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=700e70ffe1&e=7017cc100e&c=5a0eb6f8f9) [update subscription preferences](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/profile?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=700e70ffe1&e=7017cc100e&c=5a0eb6f8f9)
Dave Min For Senate * PO Box 5959 * Irvine, CA 92616-5959 * USA

I’ve dedicated the past six years to improving maternal health care, combating gun violence, and improving our schools. Now, I’m running for the U.S. Senate to take my fight for moms and families to Washington DC, and I’m keeping moms where they belong — at the very heart of this campaign. **That’s why today we’re launching Moms for Murphy and inviting you to join us.** **[ADD YOUR NAME HERE to join our new Moms for Murphy coalition and fight for better health care, safer schools and neighborhoods, and a brighter future for moms, kids, and families.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77609417/450943487/776462547?refcode=AU_TMNJ_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20240123_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDk1NzMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTJkZDcwZmUtMzFiYS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzODQ4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YOMfgTr5f5a0r9TEsbS_uBReVESgDZJmDGV4eijLGLc=&emci=4f7a0ae4-2cba-ee11-bea1-002248223848&emdi=92dd70fe-31ba-ee11-bea1-002248223848&ceid=18002451)** **** | **[JOIN MOMS FOR MURPHY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77609419/450943489/776462547?refcode=AU_TMNJ_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20240123_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDk1NzMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTJkZDcwZmUtMzFiYS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzODQ4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YOMfgTr5f5a0r9TEsbS_uBReVESgDZJmDGV4eijLGLc=&emci=4f7a0ae4-2cba-ee11-bea1-002248223848&emdi=92dd70fe-31ba-ee11-bea1-002248223848&ceid=18002451)**

Friend, Just a year ago, it was unfathomable to me that I would be writing this email. It's a bit long, but I would ask you to read it in its entirety. I spent a lot of time writing it and did my best to make every word count. I write it with great sadness and astonishment, sadness for our country which I hold so dear, and astonishment at Joe Biden's desecration of the Oath of Office he took with his hand on the Bible in front of the world. **It has come to light that the Federal Bureau of Investigation has had 40 informants inside the Biden family over the past 15 years.** For 15 years, Credible Informants have been providing criminal information against the Biden's to FBI Field Offices across the country, and for 15 years, everytime the information has been brought to FBI HQ, the leadership of the FBI shuts it down. But it's not just the FBI, it's the Department of Justice as well. I heard sworn witness testimony that the Biden Bribery allegations on the FD-1023 Form were CREDIBLE, and that he referred the criminal matters originating from it to three separate U.S. Attorney's offices in Brookly, Manhattan and Delaware for further investigation. Then, just like at the FBI, nothing happened. **As I 've been saying since I started this investigation; the allegations about Joe Biden are being covered up... because they are TRUE!** While words don't have any meaning to the Left, they still mean something to me and the law in this country. **CONSPIRACY NOUN** con*spir*a*cy An agreement between two or more people to commit an illegal act, along with an intent to achieve the agreement's goal. The media loves to talk about how Republicans believe in "conspiracy theories" like the Russian-Collusion Hoax, the origins of COVID, and the Steele-Dossier... _but they sure have been silent about the conspiracy at the highest levels of government to cover up the expansive criminal operation being run by the Biden Crime Family._
