It's because they are complicit in the cover-up. I've said it before, and it's more true today than ever before; I am facing down and exposing the rotten corruption of the most powerful and unholy triumvirate in American history, the Biden Family, the Federal Bureaucracy, and the Corporate Media. They are hellbent on stopping my investigation and they are throwing everything they have at me. **I 'll be honest, it is brutal... but I'm a country boy from West Kentucky who was taught to stand up for what's right, and who certainly doesn't back down from a fight.**

As Theodore Roosevelt said "Nothing worth having is easy" and having an honest government free of corruption is not just worth having, **it 's the promise of America to all of her citizens. **

clean_body: In the Biden Family | | Friend, Just a year ago, it was unfathomable to me that I would be writing this email. It's a bit long, but I would ask you to read it in its entirety. I spent a lot of time writing it and did my best to make every word count. I write it with great sadness and astonishment, sadness for our country which I hold so dear, and astonishment at Joe Biden's desecration of the Oath of Office he took with his hand on the Bible in front of the world. It has come to light that the Federal Bureau of Investigation has had 40 informants inside the Biden family over the past 15 years. For 15 years, Credible Informants have been providing criminal information against the Biden's to FBI Field Offices across the country, and for 15 years, everytime the information has been brought to FBI HQ, the leadership of the FBI shuts it down. But it's not just the FBI, it's the Department of Justice as well. I heard sworn witness testimony that the Biden Bribery allegations on the FD-1023 Form were CREDIBLE, and that he referred the criminal matters originating from it to three separate U.S. Attorney's offices in Brookly, Manhattan and Delaware for further investigation. Then, just like at the FBI, nothing happened. As I 've been saying since I started this investigation; the allegations about Joe Biden are being covered up... because they are TRUE! While words don't have any meaning to the Left, they still mean something to me and the law in this country. CONSPIRACY NOUN conspiracy An agreement between two or more people to commit an illegal act, along with an intent to achieve the agreement's goal. The media loves to talk about how Republicans believe in "conspiracy theories" like the Russian-Collusion Hoax, the origins of COVID, and the Steele-Dossier... but they sure have been silent about the conspiracy at the highest levels of government to cover up the expansive criminal operation being run by the Biden Crime Family. | It's because they are complicit in the cover-up. I've said it before, and it's more true today than ever before; I am facing down and exposing the rotten corruption of the most powerful and unholy triumvirate in American history, the Biden Family, the Federal Bureaucracy, and the Corporate Media. They are hellbent on stopping my investigation and they are throwing everything they have at me. I 'll be honest, it is brutal... but I'm a country boy from West Kentucky who was taught to stand up for what's right, and who certainly doesn't back down from a fight. | I've only been able to weather the attacks with the support of patriotic Americans across the country, and I'm once again asking for your help to defend my good name as I delve deeper into the belly of the corrupt beast that is ravaging our country: THE BIDEN CRIME FAMILY. As Theodore Roosevelt said "Nothing worth having is easy" and having an honest government free of corruption is not just worth having, it 's the promise of America to all of her citizens. | With Courage, James Comer Chairman, House Oversight Committee | | | | | | | | Paid for by Comer for Congress**

body:

Hello,
**[I’d like to ask you to split a contribution between my campaign and Debbie Mucarsel-Powell's ahead of her daily fundraising deadline](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77610522/450947683/1318177582?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk707-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTg0N2QxMjYtMzViYS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzODQ4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=NvsrWhyOB3wl0OR6dybwxTXQ4fkPQtPpXojCqKIEes0=)** , but first, I think it’s important to give you an update on the race and explain why your support makes such a difference, especially right now.
**I’m very proud of the campaign we’re running.** Every day, I’m connecting with folks across Montana — on family farms or in high schools or with Montana’s veterans. I always keep those conversations in mind when fighting for Montana’s priorities in the Senate. All of that work is powered by folks like you, and I’m deeply appreciative of your support.
But while I’m focused on defending Montana’s values and fighting to keep our state the Last Best Place, you better believe that out-of-state super PACs are gearing up to spread lies and attack my record.
This is just the beginning, folks. We’ll only face more attacks from here on out as my opponents pour more money into this race. The bottom line is that we’ve got to be ready to take them on.
**Mitch McConnell is trying to buy this Senate seat — and we can’t let him.**
**[That’s why I’d really appreciate anything you can pitch in a split donation ahead of Debbie's daily fundraising deadline. I wanted to take a moment to introduce myself: my name is Molly Kraus, and I am Susan Wild’s new campaign manager. As a new member of Team Wild, I’m hoping to make a good impression.= | = As campaign manager, my job is to coordinate all the moving pieces of our campaign so that Susan can focus on talking to voters and advocating for the issues that matter most to Pennsylvania, like health care, infrastructure, and education. I’m excited to be working for someone as committed to her constituents as Susan. In my short time on Team Wild, I have already seen how passionate she is about fighting for the families and workers of the greater Lehigh Valley and the entire nation. Now, as you may have heard, this race isn’t going to be easy. National experts at Sabato’s Crystal Ball and The Cook Political Report are forecasting this race as a complete toss-up. name: Indiana Democrats
subject: Priorities
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
|
---
Peter, Now that we’re two weeks into another legislative session under supermajority Republican control, it’s easy to see the priorities of Statehouse Republicans couldn’t be more detached from reality. Republicans are busy supporting bills to make it harder for civic organizations to register new voters, expand child labor, and destroy Hoosier wetlands. This Republican agenda is a slap in the face to Hoosiers who want real action on childcare, healthcare, climate change, higher education, and more. **[The contrast couldn’t be clearer with Democratic priorities to expand child care opportunities, raise teacher pay, and protect rural healthcare access. With your help, we can spread this message of a better Indiana to all 92 counties in 2024 to break the supermajority and restore balance in Indianapolis.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77610822/450948225/405560545?refcode=240123Priorities&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMGM4ZDA1Ny0zNmJhLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM4NDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IXiXh8TCQyCeEHp-fT-1oV5k040Z0TTRh_fzqNwN4WY=)** Republicans are trying to make it harder for Hoosiers to vote because they are scared of our voices when we all have a chance to be heard. clean_body: With recent retirements and resignations, our Republican House majority has shrunk from four to two. We're looking for 100,000 conservatives to join our efforts in support of flipping the House before Biden's first State of the Union on February 23rd. Don't want to receive our emails? | HOLD THE HOUSE PETITION: With recent retirements and resignations, our Republican House majority has shrunk from four to two. The only way that we're going to defy expectations and defend our House majority is if we have the right people in place leading up to November. We're laying the groundwork now, and that's why I'm asking for you to sign up to be a member of my 2024 House Majority Taskforce. . For Liberty, Jim Jordan | Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress PO BOX 355 Delaware, OH 43015

If Cathleen flips this Republican-held seat and Edith protects her race for an open blue seat, it will bring the Republican majority to a _single-seat advantage_.

body: Background on House committee suspicions about Hunter/Joe Biden and whole life insurance [NEWSLINK] BREAKING NEWS... [600x300] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66700&L=31192&F=T&&hash=5095584675f4719a29990aacf29d91bf6296f7aa33b29766eeccc46ef50e70b3] Treasury reports allegedly flagged Hunter’s insurance, opening new line of inquiry in impeachment [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66700&L=31192&F=T&&hash=5095584675f4719a29990aacf29d91bf6296f7aa33b29766eeccc46ef50e70b3] Source: Just the News [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66700&L=31192&F=T&&hash=5095584675f4719a29990aacf29d91bf6296f7aa33b29766eeccc46ef50e70b3] GOP Representative Eric Burlison, who sits on the House Oversight Committee, says documents he and the committee \ reviewed indicate that there may be yet more methods that Hunter Biden used to pass benefits to his father both while he was Vice President and after he left office. One thing that caught Rep. Burlison’s eye: Mention of transactions involving whole life insurance policies contained in the Suspicious Activity Reports (SARs) that the Treasury Department produced on Hunter Biden. [13x13x1] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66700&L=31192&F=T&&hash=5095584675f4719a29990aacf29d91bf6296f7aa33b29766eeccc46ef50e70b3] READ MORE And on top of this obstruction, Garland’s Justice Department is violating federal FOIA law to cover up this serious scandal,” said Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. clean_body: Background on House committee suspicions about Hunter/Joe Biden and whole life insurance [NEWSLINK] BREAKING NEWS... [600x300] [] Treasury reports allegedly flagged Hunter’s insurance, opening new line of inquiry in impeachment [] Source: Just the News [] GOP Representative Eric Burlison, who sits on the House Oversight Committee, says documents he and the committee \ reviewed indicate that there may be yet more methods that Hunter Biden used to pass benefits to his father both while he was Vice President and after he left office. One thing that caught Rep. Burlison’s eye: Mention of transactions involving whole life insurance policies contained in the Suspicious Activity Reports (SARs) that the Treasury Department produced on Hunter Biden. [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] Background Notes from Judicial Watch [180x150x1] [] 2023-05-23 Judicial Watch Sues National Archives for Biden Family Business Records [] Source: Judicial Watch [] On May 10, House Committee on Oversight and Accountability Chairman James Comer (R-KY.) released financial records of the Biden family’s business dealings showing that millions of dollars flowed from China and other foreign sources through a labyrinth of Biden family companies: [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] [180x150x2] [] 2023-07-28 Judicial Watch Files FOIA Lawsuit against Justice Department for Hunter Biden IRS Investigation Documents [] Source: Judicial Watch [] "Evidence shows Garland Justice Department obstructed an IRS criminal investigation implicating Joe Biden. And on top of this obstruction, Garland’s Justice Department is violating federal FOIA law to cover up this serious scandal,” said Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] [180x150x3] [] 2023-06-28 Judicial Watch Sues for FBI Document Alleging Bidens’ Bribery Scheme with Burisma Owner [] Source: Judicial Watch [] A June 8, 2023, Washington Examiner story states: Republicans said the FBI form indicated Ukrainian businessman and Burisma owner Mykola Zlochevsky allegedly told the FBI informant that he paid $5 million apiece to Hunter and then-Vice President Biden to shake off a corruption investigation. name: Hold The Line
subject: 🎙 Hold The Line Podcast #59 The Church Down Under: How Covid Was Driving the Australian Church Underground | Daniel Hagen
body:
| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=e047c73262f14be2977586f74e6775f0&_e=JsljYkhXgKH8V6ndLbV_4qV-V2B1eNepFTCBMVm9HGbZDQXVNZxRBpNHKv9b7oeIjbOuM-3Fk3hrK_g1barSOEy7LGTw3NP95B3N7MxZ6eo2-Kna_c-pWUoH-3ktTm1WsSzZYOUxpMqS6_vGRIwjX_tAhuxERztTuMK2M-N7jRppNhoIjL4dacQptpR2rSt0PGwGcQkop1JouM1veu8kaw6vI-hDDhGUWrlLJiJyWif-QysUmOspQODQfDhhFWf2xkVSfxWyg5KgaleBcXXW0Wa-DR7geTYsL-IGk4Yqh7L8wYtQRmQ8sJTVk6GcgqNo)

| | Fellow American,
---
Sean is currently on the ground in Iraq spending time and ministering with the underground church. This week's Hold The Line Podcast comes from a sitdown with someone who knows a thing or two about worshiping in the underground church. But this story doesn't come from the third world— it comes from Australia!

When the world used COVID-19 as an excuse to silence the church, Daniel Hagen was one of the few Christian leaders in Australia who stand up for the rights of Australians to worship throughout the pandemic. Australia experienced some of the worst lockdowns in the world — people were even being arrested for putting their trash bins out on their own property without wearing a mask. Daniel shares his story, the state of the Church in Australia, and what he has learned.

name: Chris Deluzio
subject: I'm running for reelection, Derek
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRIS DELUZIO FOR CONGRESS Chris Deluzio is a United States veteran
body:
I want you on my team.

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77611493/450950901/-1807168276?refcode=wrpr_hdr&ms=240123_cd_launchemail&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDQ0MjU1My0zYWJhLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM4NDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rWN-SEEbpee6TdQQTllOAx8m5x01D0lDuj5374c4QZY=)
---
Hi Derek, I'm proud to officially announce that I am running for reelection to continue representing PA-17. Western PA is where I grew up. It's where I'm raising my family, where I joined my first picket line, and where I call home. **But for far too long, my neighbors, fellow veterans, union workers, and Western PA families have been taken advantage of by corporate forces and extremist politicians.** We've seen companies that supported entire communities ship jobs overseas, we've seen top bosses get bonuses while workers are denied the right to organize and negotiate fair contracts, and we've seen politicians in Washington say they stand with our service members while putting hard-earned benefits and services at risk. These same people have actively fueled assaults on democracy, a woman's freedom to make her own health care decisions, and our core American institutions. **We can't let these corporate jagoffs and extremist politicians continue to rip Americans off.** If there's one thing you should know about me, it's that I don't back down from a fight. **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77611494/450950902/-1807168276?refcode=240123_cd_launchemail_img&ms=240123_cd_launchemail&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDQ0MjU1My0zYWJhLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM4NDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rWN-SEEbpee6TdQQTllOAx8m5x01D0lDuj5374c4QZY=)** I'm running for reelection to take them on and fight against political extremism. I'm fighting for the Common Good and the union way of life – where politicians work for voters, not their own pocketbooks or corporate buddies, and where families and workers in Western PA have good pay and benefits. [**This is going to be a tough fight, Derek, and I want you on my reelection team. Will you help get my reelection campaign off to a strong start? clean_body: I want you on my team. | | = Hi Derek, I'm proud to officially announce that I am running for reelection to continue representing PA-17. Western PA is where I grew up. It's where I'm raising my family, where I joined my first picket line, and where I call home. But for far too long, my neighbors, fellow veterans, union workers, and Western PA families have been taken advantage of by corporate forces and extremist politicians. We've seen companies that supported entire communities ship jobs overseas, we've seen top bosses get bonuses while workers are denied the right to organize and negotiate fair contracts, and we've seen politicians in Washington say they stand with our service members while putting hard-earned benefits and services at risk. These same people have actively fueled assaults on democracy, a woman's freedom to make her own health care decisions, and our core American institutions. We can't let these corporate jagoffs and extremist politicians continue to rip Americans off. If there's one thing you should know about me, it's that I don't back down from a fight. = I'm running for reelection to take them on and fight against political extremism. I'm fighting for the Common Good and the union way of life – where politicians work for voters, not their own pocketbooks or corporate buddies, and where families and workers in Western PA have good pay and benefits. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Thank you for joining my reelection campaign and the fight to protect the Common Good in Western PA. With appreciation, – Chris Deluzio | Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran running for Congress in Pennsylvania's 17th District. He'll be a champion for our unions, fight to guarantee good healthcare for every American, take on corporate power, and advocate for bold action to protect and strengthen our democracy. name: Sydney Nelson, Communications Director
subject: What makes 8 weeks out so important
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY QASIM FOR CONGRESS]
body:
[ https://act.qasimforcongress.org/go/9?t=1001&akid=35148%2E120265%2E-yFpqR ]Qasim for Congress

Friend,

This is a huge week for our campaign. Today officially marks 8 weeks until
Election Day, which is when most voters start tuning into races like ours.
It’s also when our communication and voter outreach efforts have the
greatest impact.

The fact that we have the [ https://act.qasimforcongress.org/go/5212?t=1002&akid=35148%2E120265%2E-yFpqR ]first candidate forum tomorrow night makes
this week even more important! Our opponent, Bill Foster, has declined to
participate, again, but Qasim is committed to showing up and speaking with
voters. You can watch the forum on January 24th online to hear directly
from Qasim and learn about his vision for IL-11.

Now that we’re officially 8 weeks from Election Day, it’s crucially
important for voters to hear from the candidates who could represent them
in Congress. [ https://act.qasimforcongress.org/sign/QR-IL-11_EMAIL_230124_ENG_8-weeks-out/?t=1003&akid=35148%2E120265%2E-yFpqR ]With just 56 days left for voters to make a decision — and
fewer opportunities for them to hear from their sitting representative —
we need you to add your voice and tell Bill Foster: It’s time to cut the
charade and debate Qasim. Add your name now!

ADD YOUR NAME

The more folks who speak up and tell Bill Foster that his constituents
deserve to hear from him, the more of an impact it will make. [ https://act.qasimforcongress.org/sign/QR-IL-11_EMAIL_230124_ENG_8-weeks-out/?t=1004&akid=35148%2E120265%2E-yFpqR ]Can you
add your name right now and demand Bill Foster debate Qasim?

Thank you for your support,

Sydney Nelson
Communications Director

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

Receive Fewer Emails: https://act.qasimforcongress.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1005&akid=35148%2E120265%2E-yFpqR
Update Your Information: https://act.qasimforcongress.org/signup/update-your-info/
Unsubscribe: https://act.qasimforcongress.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1006&akid=35148%2E120265%2E-yFpqR

name: Carmen Goers
subject: Empower Families: Celebrate National School Choice Week
body:
Join the Team

| | | | | | | |
---
| | | |
---
| | | **Empower Families: Celebrate National School Choice Week**
---

Dear Peter,
This National School Choice Week, let’s affirm our commitment to empowering families in Washington’s 8th congressional district with the freedom to choose the best educational paths for their children. Every child deserves access to a quality education that fits their unique needs, talents, and aspirations.
Our campaign is devoted to expanding and supporting diverse educational opportunities – from public and charter schools to homeschooling and private options. We believe in empowering parents and guardians to make informed decisions about their children's education.
But to turn these goals into reality, we need your support.

---
| | | |
---
|
A contribution of $25, $50, or $100 will help us:

* Advocate for policies that enhance school choice options.
* Support initiatives that provide equitable resources to all educational paths.
* Ensure every family in our district has access to the information and resources needed to make the best educational choices.

---
| [ DONATE TODAY! ](https://vgq.soundestlink.com/link/65b03a6536cd861b17ff8637/65affb9414b09c3610440268/652845d9aa222127cf458b43?signature=cfc480e392fb63818e3d29d41fb00b8123bbcd0b633cc758684600238e92314f)
---
| | | Your donation today signifies more than just financial support; it’s an investment in the future of our children and our community. Let's work together to create an environment where every child can thrive and achieve their fullest potential.
Thank you for championing educational choice and opportunity.

Sincerely,

Carmen Goers

---
|
---
| | | | [](https://vgq.soundestlink.com/link/65b03a6536cd861b17ff863b/65affb9414b09c3610440268/652845d9aa222127cf458b43?signature=cfc480e392fb63818e3d29d41fb00b8123bbcd0b633cc758684600238e92314f) | [](https://vgq.soundestlink.com/link/65b03a6536cd861b17ff863d/65affb9414b09c3610440268/652845d9aa222127cf458b43?signature=cfc480e392fb63818e3d29d41fb00b8123bbcd0b633cc758684600238e92314f)

name: Pat Harrigan
subject: READ INSIDE: My plan for an America first future!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee
body:
| | | [](http://links.patharriganforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d400fe4f8ca24360a0914af7db39ca7b&_m=609c1be1d61147749587a0e8afa6cf72&_e=Icfwvb-EHXJ8xyIK-e9jgQRsn9EF1pXG6hwh6y-LR3dYWWU2PVOCUkl_UwqVQOb5sFCXS28jX5uCE6jeO2PN6uH-wynIL91Q17DOtxklXFJjgwHFSngNTZ7Q7a6oapYTbTQETMvi0SnFit6Q6lR286tdLnu-3OP97FjRW-x5RpcotJZROFDUipHUGIX_78gppocA2fg-0YaXXneTbW_DnhvzsK-rM6aXo0zXzdNidSGExR79VGuemOSge0f-TxDjSdo4HG9QpFEuqx1GsQU-usgcWYpmHSGSuu5CHOzdrVvLeQjvoh7mCiUXeek_OQyeY0NGuo2nil6O83sawz4E7S9qyLFClwnaVtPcp-H8Gg8tr21EZXRJMzgKNHLXagxD2lZ11ml1qwP9VbV8g2uMMg%3D%3D)
---
Fellow American, As a Green Beret, I wouldn't dare go into a mission without a plan. _But right now, politicians are leading our entire country willy-nilly without any direction._ That ends TODAY. **I have a simple three point plan to get our country back on track:**
1. **Protect our Nation:** secure the border, reclaim energy independence, enhance public safety, and strengthen manufacturing.
2. **Unleash our Economy:** lower the national debt, stop wasteful government spending, fight for lower taxes, and support small businesses.
3. **Restore Government Integrity:** reduce government corruption, protect women’s sports, put parents in charge of education, and take care of our veterans.

THIS is the path forward for America, but if we’re going to put it into action, we have to defeat the career politicians and socialists standing in our way. **[**Will you stand with me in my mission to get our great nation back on track?**](http://links.patharriganforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d400fe4f8ca24360a0914af7db39ca7b&_m=609c1be1d61147749587a0e8afa6cf72&_e=Icfwvb-EHXJ8xyIK-e9jgQRsn9EF1pXG6hwh6y-LR3dYWWU2PVOCUkl_UwqVQOb5sFCXS28jX5uCE6jeO2PN6uH-wynIL91Q17DOtxklXFJjgwHFSngNTZ7Q7a6oapYTbTQETMvi0SnFit6Q6lR286tdLnu-3OP97FjRW-x5RpcotJZROFDUipHUGIX_78gppocA2fg-0YaXXneTbW_DnhvzsK-rM6aXo0zXzdNidSGExR79VGuemOSge0f-TxDjR9Al4XAqnua9wQp-u1A5q7RYs2HG7iemmujExPFscD5F-psd14IX_8oIXJ2vfn4YIB1mBmPN--kfHd29u4fyvA3RTqHAObLWh9F8SrLU2dGbAdrvh1ZrIFOz1sH-yUtq3lszPNCWEdPNUhIgT3fTuA%3D%3D)**
---
[**PITCH IN NOW **](http://links.patharriganforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d400fe4f8ca24360a0914af7db39ca7b&_m=609c1be1d61147749587a0e8afa6cf72&_e=Icfwvb-EHXJ8xyIK-e9jgQRsn9EF1pXG6hwh6y-LR3dYWWU2PVOCUkl_UwqVQOb5sFCXS28jX5uCE6jeO2PN6uH-wynIL91Q17DOtxklXFJjgwHFSngNTZ7Q7a6oapYTbTQETMvi0SnFit6Q6lR286tdLnu-3OP97FjRW-x5RpcotJZROFDUipHUGIX_78gppocA2fg-0YaXXneTbW_DnhvzsK-rM6aXo0zXzdNidSGExR79VGuemOSge0f-TxDjm6w4qJTOmvmqz7kwTh5JhloXe3nHb4xHQplzoMS6_52sHAFvlBjqAbFROs8R4Kf4ABMCKrGag00b_rS6k9R0yhe73fPLQ0V1WDr4t3rCkrJBx9y9F2VdwDv0tdU3Pwq0Dzw916l2zy0THbk9I9C7xQ%3D%3D)
---
Unlike the career politicians who run for office to serve themselves, I’m going into this mission with a plan to serve America. Together, we CAN save our great country, but I need your help.
---

clean_body: | | | Fellow American, As a Green Beret, I wouldn't dare go into a mission without a plan. But right now, politicians are leading our entire country willy-nilly without any direction. That ends TODAY. I have a simple three point plan to get our country back on track: 1. Protect our Nation: secure the border, reclaim energy independence, enhance public safety, and strengthen manufacturing. 2. Unleash our Economy: lower the national debt, stop wasteful government spending, fight for lower taxes, and support small businesses. 3. Restore Government Integrity: reduce government corruption, protect women’s sports, put parents in charge of education, and take care of our veterans. THIS is the path forward for America, but if we’re going to put it into action, we have to defeat the career politicians and socialists standing in our way. Unlike the career politicians who run for office to serve themselves, I’m going into this mission with a plan to serve America. Together, we CAN save our great country, but I need your help. Thank you, Pat Harrigan | | Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee | | Pat Harrigan is a former member of the U.S. Army. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense. Team, yesterday was the 51st anniversary of the _Roe v. Wade_ Supreme Court decision.

51 years ago, the right to reproductive healthcare was enshrined as precedent, protecting abortion rights nationwide.

_**And yet, in 2022, the far-right Supreme Court went against decades of precedent and overturned abortion rights.**_

As a doctor, I believe women should have the right to make healthcare decisions without interference from Supreme Court justices or far-right politicians.

**That’s why I’m reminded why it’s so important for us to keep fighting.**_As red states across the country restrict a woman’s right to choose, I know we must flip the House so we can codify reproductive rights nationwide, friend._

[**If you’re with me in this fight, I hope you’ll step up with a donation of $10 – together, we can build the resources to flip the House and protect reproductive rights! »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77612542/450954666/-686654137?amount=10&refcode=RRFC_20240123_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWVhMGY3ZDYtM2NiYS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzODQ4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_LAn_mziaPRsMe8HxZatNnl-hvgA94wlRPE8HfjWMWw=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77612543/450954669/-686654137?amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100&express_lane=true&refcode=RRFC_20240123_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWVhMGY3ZDYtM2NiYS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzODQ4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_LAn_mziaPRsMe8HxZatNnl-hvgA94wlRPE8HfjWMWw=)

clean_body: | = Team, yesterday was the 51st anniversary of the Roe v. Wade Supreme Court decision. 51 years ago, the right to reproductive healthcare was enshrined as precedent, protecting abortion rights nationwide. And yet, in 2022, the far-right Supreme Court went against decades of precedent and overturned abortion rights. As a doctor, I believe women should have the right to make healthcare decisions without interference from Supreme Court justices or far-right politicians. That’s why I’m reminded why it’s so important for us to keep fighting.As red states across the country restrict a woman’s right to choose, I know we must flip the House so we can codify reproductive rights nationwide, friend. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = Thank you, Dr. Raul Ruiz | | Paid for by Dr. Raul Ruiz For Congress Committee P.O. name: Becca Balint
subject: We all know and love people who have had an abortion.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont
body:
These are not nameless, faceless people. They are our friends, neighbors, and family.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77612846/450955438/966991095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MGNhMDk4ZS0zZWJhLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM4NDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D5f7_eIt6J7jcm33ZqemooMbMu7fflQ2qdK6Z1FXBw4=&emci=32ceded1-3aba-ee11-bea1-002248223848&emdi=60ca098e-3eba-ee11-bea1-002248223848&ceid=43402272) | Dear Peter, Yesterday marked the 51st anniversary of the landmark Supreme Court case _Roe v. Wade_ , which ruled that the Constitution protected the right to have an abortion. _Roe_ prohibited states from banning the procedure before 23 weeks for 49 years, until a conservative majority on the court overruled _Roe_ in June 2022. Today, 14 states have outright banned abortion in nearly all circumstances, and 7 states have restricted the procedure to earlier in pregnancy than the standard set by _Roe_. I’m proud that Vermont is a safe haven for those seeking abortions, protected not only by state law but also by an amendment approved by voters in 2022 that enshrined abortion access in the state constitution. **But it isn’t enough – not when people in other states have lost this essential freedom.** Reproductive freedom is fundamental to the fight for economic, racial, and gender justice. That’s why I will never stop fighting to pass federal protections for abortion in Congress. [_**If you’re with me, can I count on you to chip in a few bucks to my re-election campaign?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77612847/450955439/-526253979?refcode=E6068-20240123-RoeAnniversaryYesterday-SL-AbortionReproRights&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MGNhMDk4ZS0zZWJhLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM4NDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D5f7_eIt6J7jcm33ZqemooMbMu7fflQ2qdK6Z1FXBw4=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[$5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77612848/450955440/-526253979?express_lane=true&refcode=E6068-20240123-RoeAnniversaryYesterday-EG-AbortionReproRights&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MGNhMDk4ZS0zZWJhLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM4NDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D5f7_eIt6J7jcm33ZqemooMbMu7fflQ2qdK6Z1FXBw4=)** | **[$15](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77612849/450955441/-526253979?express_lane=true&refcode=E6068-20240123-RoeAnniversaryYesterday-EG-AbortionReproRights&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MGNhMDk4ZS0zZWJhLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM4NDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D5f7_eIt6J7jcm33ZqemooMbMu7fflQ2qdK6Z1FXBw4=)**

Peter, we all know and love people who have had an abortion. These are not nameless, faceless people. They are our friends, neighbors, and family.
I’m fighting for a world where not only are abortions legal and safe, but also de-stigmatized and accessible to all. [_**If you’re with me, please consider donating to my re-election campaign today.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77612854/450955446/-526253979?refcode=E6068-20240123-RoeAnniversaryYesterday-SL-AbortionReproRights&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MGNhMDk4ZS0zZWJhLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM4NDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D5f7_eIt6J7jcm33ZqemooMbMu7fflQ2qdK6Z1FXBw4=)

Becca Balint

clean_body: These are not nameless, faceless people. They are our friends, neighbors, and family. | | Dear Peter, Yesterday marked the 51st anniversary of the landmark Supreme Court case Roe v. Wade , which ruled that the Constitution protected the right to have an abortion. Roe prohibited states from banning the procedure before 23 weeks for 49 years, until a conservative majority on the court overruled Roe in June 2022. Today, 14 states have outright banned abortion in nearly all circumstances, and 7 states have restricted the procedure to earlier in pregnancy than the standard set by Roe. I’m proud that Vermont is a safe haven for those seeking abortions, protected not only by state law but also by an amendment approved by voters in 2022 that enshrined abortion access in the state constitution. But it isn’t enough – not when people in other states have lost this essential freedom. Reproductive freedom is fundamental to the fight for economic, racial, and gender justice. That’s why I will never stop fighting to pass federal protections for abortion in Congress. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Peter, we all know and love people who have had an abortion. These are not nameless, faceless people. They are our friends, neighbors, and family. I’m fighting for a world where not only are abortions legal and safe, but also de-stigmatized and accessible to all. = Thank you, Becca Balint = If you'd like to receive fewer emails and only see our most important updates, **If you'd rather not stay up to date with Becca's work, you can . If you prefer to contribute by check, you are welcome to send a contribution to the campaign at the address below. To comply with Federal law, we must use our best efforts to obtain, maintain and submit the name, mailing address, occupation and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 per election cycle. Thank you in advance for including that information along with your check. | Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont Becca for Vermont P.O. Box 291 Burlington, VT 05302 United States

name: Mike Thompson
subject: this is how we fight back
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress [unsubscribe](https://support
body:
|
---
| | Peter,

On what should be a week of celebrating how far our nation has come, we must instead focus on how we can move forward.

51 years ago, the historic Supreme Court decision in _Roe v. Wade_ affirmed abortion rights nationwide. 2 years ago, the Court rendered an extremist overturn that ignored the decades of precedent that followed the _Roe_ decision.

_**[We have to make it clear that the majority of Americans support reproductive rights. Add your name today to demand that Republicans respect the right to choose.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77612873/450955548/1260268720?refcode=EM_NBI_MT_20240122_PT_RoeAnniversary_0_3MO_MikeThompson_NA_NA_Roe&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjI5ZjFkZS0zZWJhLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM4NDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HE_UmjAWLuZo1h2eTSFcTOLBtBUGmVvMCRG2EyXFgIM=&emci=4462f74f-63b9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=6229f1de-3eba-ee11-bea1-002248223848&ceid=2678920)**_ | | [Sign your name!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77612874/450955549/1260268720?refcode=EM_NBI_MT_20240122_PT_RoeAnniversary_0_3MO_MikeThompson_NA_NA_Roe&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjI5ZjFkZS0zZWJhLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM4NDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HE_UmjAWLuZo1h2eTSFcTOLBtBUGmVvMCRG2EyXFgIM=&emci=4462f74f-63b9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=6229f1de-3eba-ee11-bea1-002248223848&ceid=2678920)
---

The best way for us to honor the anniversary of _Roe_ is to continue the fight that led to it. Everyone deserves to make their own medical decisions and we must stand up to those that believe they have the right to legislate on someone else’s body.

_**[Join me today by adding your name to the long list of Americans ready to defend reproductive rights against extremist attacks →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77612875/450955550/1260268720?refcode=EM_NBI_MT_20240122_PT_RoeAnniversary_0_3MO_MikeThompson_NA_NA_Roe&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjI5ZjFkZS0zZWJhLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM4NDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HE_UmjAWLuZo1h2eTSFcTOLBtBUGmVvMCRG2EyXFgIM=&emci=4462f74f-63b9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=6229f1de-3eba-ee11-bea1-002248223848&ceid=2678920)**_

Thank you for your support,

Mike

name: Bob Casey
subject: We need your help
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=1781%2E552475%2EubtR4l)
Peter, today marks the first day of the petition period here in Pennsylvania.
Over the next three weeks, we need to collect signatures to get on the ballot and show the grassroots support we’re building across the Commonwealth. If you’re a registered voter in PA, will you sign on to volunteer to collect signatures in your county?
**[Volunteer to collect signatures ››](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/882?t=2&akid=1781%2E552475%2EubtR4l)**
Adding your name to help me get on the ballot is one of the best ways to publicly show you’re on this team.
We’re in for one heck of a race, so find an event near you to sign our petition.
**[Volunteer ››](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/882?t=3&akid=1781%2E552475%2EubtR4l)**
Thank you.
With gratitude,
Bob Casey

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=4&akid=1781%2E552475%2EubtR4l)
* [Update Your Information](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=1781%2E552475%2EubtR4l)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)
PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC.

subject: One year since the launch of this campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
#

Peter:
**January 23, 2023** — one year ago today. That was the day we launched this campaign.
And besides our launch, the most important day of this campaign:
**October 10, 2023.** The day Kari Lake launched her own campaign.
That’s the day this became a real race, because she’s no ordinary Republican.
When a MAGA extremist, a liar, an election denier like Kari Lake decides to run, it makes the stakes crystal clear.
Before that day, this race was about control of the Senate. Now, it’s about defending our democracy itself.
So today, one year out from the launch of this campaign, we’re making a humble request:
[**Can you get in this fight and make your first online donation to Ruben Gallego’s campaign and help him defeat Kari Lake? What better day than this important anniversary.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-jan24.RCwesN&refcode=em240123-2-90-t2&t=1&akid=1822%2E734936%2EsELUlk)

# Going LIVE to discuss primary results as the come in...
Join me TONIGHT live at 7p on my YouTube channel as the results from New Hampshire come in. We’ve done a few live streams now and being able to take your questions in real time has been a lot of fun and we’ve had some great discussions.
Tune in at 7p ET:
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=d3da8b1d74&e=f6564bbe3b)
| [Watch NOW](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=5cb75ff3f3&e=f6564bbe3b)
---
Don’t forget to subscribe and hit the bell to get notified every time a new episode drops.
Would also greatly appreciate it if you could subscribe to the audio version and give us a 5 star review. It really makes a big difference in growing this show and being able to put out great content at no cost to you all.
| [Subscribe to the podcast here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=58a19eeb6f&e=f6564bbe3b)

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Why we must win in Ohio
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia
body:
Last night made the stakes of this race abundantly clear.

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77613379/450957333/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjc4ZjUwYS00MWJhLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM4NDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rjb78xbN1HSkUEmeEX06EqXU4G6AzBvYuP7MwZRCXuk=&emci=0b89dd95-3aba-ee11-bea1-002248223848&emdi=b278f50a-41ba-ee11-bea1-002248223848&ceid=43566853)

| | Peter, last night, three Ohio Republicans debated for the chance to defeat me in the race that will decide whether Democrats defend our Senate majority or hand control back to Mitch McConnell.

It'll be another two months before I know who my opponent will be, but one thing is abundantly clear after last night: **All three of these Republicans would be an _absolute disaster_ for Ohioans and our country.**

**That's why I'm urgently asking for your support now to make sure I have the resources to defeat whichever one of them is on the ballot:** [**_Will you split $25 or more now between my campaign and the GA Dems to help us win in Ohio and Georgia and keep the Senate blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77613380/450957334/-843865763?refcode=20240123.2_ShB_1AJ&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjc4ZjUwYS00MWJhLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM4NDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rjb78xbN1HSkUEmeEX06EqXU4G6AzBvYuP7MwZRCXuk=)**_

All three of my potential opponents have said they'd support a national abortion ban – and any one of them winning would be a victory for Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and their megadonor allies. Social Security, fair wages, reproductive rights – so much of what we care about will be at risk if they flip this seat and the Senate red.

**That's why it's so important that we raise the resources we need to go toe to toe with the GOP. But unlike my self-funding opponents, I can't write myself a million-dollar check – I'm counting on grassroots folks like you to power us to victory, Peter.**

[**_So please, will you rush $25 or more now to me and the Democratic Party of Georgia to help us stand up to the GOP's attacks, win in Ohio and Georgia, and keep the Senate blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77613381/450957335/-843865763?refcode=20240123.2_ShB_1AJ&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjc4ZjUwYS00MWJhLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM4NDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rjb78xbN1HSkUEmeEX06EqXU4G6AzBvYuP7MwZRCXuk=)**_

Thank you,
Sherrod

It'll be another two months before I know who my opponent will be, but one thing is abundantly clear after last night: All three of these Republicans would be an absolute disaster for Ohioans and our country. That's why I'm urgently asking for your support now to make sure I have the resources to defeat whichever one of them is on the ballot: = All three of my potential opponents have said they'd support a national abortion ban – and any one of them winning would be a victory for Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and their megadonor allies. Social Security, fair wages, reproductive rights – so much of what we care about will be at risk if they flip this seat and the Senate red. That's why it's so important that we raise the resources we need to go toe to toe with the GOP. But unlike my self-funding opponents, I can't write myself a million-dollar check – I'm counting on grassroots folks like you to power us to victory, Peter. = Thank you, Sherrod | | Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.georgiademocrat.org | Democratic Party of Georgia P.O. BOX 89202 Atlanta, GA 30312 United States

name: Sharice Davids
subject: 51 years this week
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
| This week marked 51 years since the original _Roe v. Wade_ ruling and, while I continue to fiercely defend reproductive rights, some anti-abortion extremist members of Congress are continuing their assault on our freedoms.

**Just last week, they introduced not one, but two bills that attack our right to choose.**

At the same time, the proposed Kansas Republican Party platform takes a firm stance against abortion access, despite Kansas voters overwhelmingly voting in favor of it. My opponents have made it clear that when it comes to reproductive freedom, they are on the wrong side of history.

**_[The GOP are out of step with where voters are and it’s up to us to fight back this anniversary week and every day. Will you join by being one of the 1,000 activists we need to sign on by midnight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77613450/450957443/246735105?source=EM_NBI_SD_20240123_PT_1.1_0_1MO_candidate_NA_NA_roevwade&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNmY0ZTMzYi00MWJhLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM4NDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SdecrxqJehmSnhGGsjOWk6_MuNX0cs7vQ2iNuxNiBzE=&emci=20f4e33b-41ba-ee11-bea1-002248223848&emdi=26f4e33b-41ba-ee11-bea1-002248223848&ceid=22117458)_** | **[Sign On](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77613451/450957444/246735105?source=EM_NBI_SD_20240123_PT_1.1_0_1MO_candidate_NA_NA_roevwade&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNmY0ZTMzYi00MWJhLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM4NDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SdecrxqJehmSnhGGsjOWk6_MuNX0cs7vQ2iNuxNiBzE=&emci=20f4e33b-41ba-ee11-bea1-002248223848&emdi=26f4e33b-41ba-ee11-bea1-002248223848&ceid=22117458)**

Change is an uphill battle but if we elect a Kids First Majority anything is possible. We will have leaders in Washington who understand that healthy kids grow to become healthy adults and will create a thriving nation.

| | | **You’ve been selected!**

We’ve reserved a handful of spots on our Exclusive Advisory Board for the most active Democrats in Pennsylvania -- and you made the cut! **[Claim your reserved spot and join the Advisory Board right away by taking a quick survey >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/17293?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240123-ActionNeeded-AdvisoryBoardCountdownClock-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240123-ActionNeeded-AdvisoryBoardCountdownClock-ETG-sl1&akid=13319%2E9716520%2EJagIMA)**

| | [Join advisory board](https://go.dscc.org/go/17293?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240123-ActionNeeded-AdvisoryBoardCountdownClock-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240123-ActionNeeded-AdvisoryBoardCountdownClock-ETG-sl1&akid=13319%2E9716520%2EJagIMA)
---

The stakes of this year’s elections couldn’t be higher. Our Senate majority hinges on just TWO seats, and we're defending TWICE as many seats as Republicans. With _millions_ already pouring in from Donald Trump’s allies, we have to perfect our strategy NOW to defeat Republicans and win in November.

That’s why we selected YOU to join the Advisory Board that will lead us to victory. **But the invitation will close at midnight, and right now, your spot is unfilled!**

**Please, don’t let this offer expire:**

| [Join advisory board](https://go.dscc.org/go/17293?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240123-ActionNeeded-AdvisoryBoardCountdownClock-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240123-ActionNeeded-AdvisoryBoardCountdownClock-ETG-sl1&akid=13319%2E9716520%2EJagIMA)

Team DSCC

name: Geoff Simpson
subject: Summer Lee’s primary election is only 3 months from now.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

The first Democratic primary election for our Squad is rapidly
approaching: Rep. Summer Lee’s primary in Pennsylvania’s 12th district is
officially 3 months away on April 23.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240123-sl.cdT4PM&refcode=em20240123-32973-a&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1001&akid=32973%2E1203867%2EVZnR_x ]Can you chip in a split donation right now to directly support Summer’s
campaign and Justice Democrats ahead of our first primary battle of 2024?

Summer made history in 2022 when she became the first Black Congresswoman
from Pennsylvania — despite facing more than $3 million in attacks from
AIPAC.

Since then, she’s courageously fought for bold, progressive change
including police reform, workers’ rights, a livable wage, and a permanent
ceasefire in Gaza.

AIPAC wasted no time working to recruit candidates to challenge Summer in
her 2024 re-election race. The anti-Palestinian lobby group launched
attack ads against Summer in November, and they’re planning to spend an
unprecedented $100 million to unseat her and fellow Squad members this
year.

As of today, there are just three months left for us to fight back against
AIPAC’s influx of right-wing, mega-donor dark money and ensure Summer wins
her primary against two moderate opponents this April.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240123-sl.cdT4PM&refcode=em20240123-32973-a&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1002&akid=32973%2E1203867%2EVZnR_x ]If you can afford to, please split $5 or more to
re-elect Summer this year!

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240123-sl.cdT4PM&refcode=em20240123-32973-a&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1021&akid=32973%2E1203867%2EVZnR_x ]Contribute $5

We appreciate anything you can give to power our young, diverse,
working-class movement and protect one of the most progressive leaders in
Congress challenging the status quo.

In solidarity,

Geoff Simpson
Campaigns Director

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20240123-32973-footer&t=1022&refcode2=32973_1203867_VZnR_x&akid=32973%2E1203867%2EVZnR_x

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1023&akid=32973%2E1203867%2EVZnR_x

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

Friend,

I wanted to let you know how grateful I am for your support. Generosity from grassroots supporters like you is the reason I am able to fund my campaign and fight for America's future.

Now, I want to take a few minutes to talk with you about the journey I have been on. **[Once you've finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me fund my campaign so I can get my message out to every voter!](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=25af36c126424fa89144b31f9a455462&_e=DWx82oB0DiLqfxeUsfTn22gBChtZjsQsEj3iGXzo6yV54eeY8XVHzfDfVXiIuPsLTFZW6dEdMBo98MUx6uFJ_4HnRAJwAbnYlS9BsffANFIh_KOupZtuU9feGWcH-AXrpH7moQ7sdUod6MUO5epPJIbnppNviD-2BOz3U_di8BYlx7PROPeJMRIfdlygPT4yZwuJSnnR2cbJWZkPzwFUDjiqnOePop0Bcm6D0zdyLYd59SkjG8qlwnM2KRA-XRh4gdo0wb62V4pUEjeVeG0BVPJCA2HjgLz5DxaozScVlg1bPeFVv88UmVj6Ib3K8AMkhNrsm-gaiqJ_f7ZbZh8gCkJXFb7XKVFC7PeQk14pGdi0XUOIGhufSmcNN-K-Ql7RcdYkE-VpQSnULrlzYFEwOwkyROSKXh6pA3GFcbKtBQsl_dkWSoqgOOULWVR04boiefCP4FXV8N1ds1-HIZn0RYnWo8uro9IJAH_vI8z3Md5yTDxrrZUknyNZXWwcWO5YN5DPxm8yfg6goZvn0GTCt91qT4rtdBfRUTMjh9DzIiMGJgek8CCn1YM5zklq3dabUQwjHwNaxj88zf-LGZP1Z3LjSibd_QNSw4bGqmRxcp8%3D "Once you’ve finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me fund my campaign so I can get my message out to every voter!")**

Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. _**Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words.**_
---
| | | | [](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=25af36c126424fa89144b31f9a455462&_e=DWx82oB0DiLqfxeUsfTn22gBChtZjsQsEj3iGXzo6yV54eeY8XVHzfDfVXiIuPsLTFZW6dEdMBo98MUx6uFJ_4HnRAJwAbnYlS9BsffANFIh_KOupZtuU9feGWcH-AXrpH7moQ7sdUod6MUO5epPJIbnppNviD-2BOz3U_di8BYlx7PROPeJMRIfdlygPT4yZwuJSnnR2cbJWZkPzwFUDjiqnOePop0Bcm6D0zdyLYd59SkjG8qlwnM2KRA-XRh4gdo0wb62V4pUEjeVeG0BVPJCA2HjgLz5DxaozScVlg1bPeFVv88UmVj6Ib3K8AMkhNrsm-gaiqJ_f7ZbZh8gCkJXFb7XKVFC7PeQk14pGdi0XUOIGhufSmcNN-K-Ql7RcdYkE-VpQSnULrlzYFEwOwkyROSKXh6pA3GFcbKtBQsl_dkWSoqgOOULWVR04boi-lwwpyYq6soGsu1lLsumRKqg-75Qean5pkCLKcuEUZRKvojzVbqykt88o_5ruwczMcB0PnWM8IxiAhiuuUPUGO1hRBaMcoUq7xFl6MiP6sCX9KZ2ZM-tqjjdx5E3pEGCQoVKReG4Pn_ebsi0Jd4ImLIm0iTsUIDRzvhP6sK7I88%3D)

| I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it.
---
After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: _" Don't complain. Do something about it." _
---
| | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and hardly anyone thought I had a chance. I was polling at 15 percent a week before the primary. **But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won. ➡️**
---
| | [](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=25af36c126424fa89144b31f9a455462&_e=DWx82oB0DiLqfxeUsfTn22gBChtZjsQsEj3iGXzo6yV54eeY8XVHzfDfVXiIuPsLTFZW6dEdMBo98MUx6uFJ_4HnRAJwAbnYlS9BsffANFIh_KOupZtuU9feGWcH-AXrpH7moQ7sdUod6MUO5epPJIbnppNviD-2BOz3U_di8BYlx7PROPeJMRIfdlygPT4yZwuJSnnR2cbJWZkPzwFUDjiqnOePop0Bcm6D0zdyLYd59SkjG8qlwnM2KRA-XRh4gdo0wb62V4pUEjeVeG0BVPJCA2HjgLz5DxaozScVlg1bPeFVv88UmVj6Ib3K8AMkhNrsm-gaiqJ_f7ZbZh8gCkJXFb7XKVFC7PeQk14pGdi0XUOIGhufSmcNN-K-Ql7RcdYkE-VpQSnULrlzYFEwOwkyROSKXh6pA3GFcbKtBQsl_dkWSoqgOOULWVR04boi_vA6hoLtfCrj32iQcuvXJQprizQ-fIjNtaJmatGOAwSI_3VMGEBi32ctu5xGwGTAzJZl-5d-e7jFMzBXIoz7G84ewUiLg0C6FbpP-X3e2OLrYYdlm0pPZmpM8O-NoQAwZ-SA9eHWVq7hy-lGZQuP2GY4NYre9lGhcQWFTWNcAVc%3D)
---
It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor.

When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy.

When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them.

---

My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=25af36c126424fa89144b31f9a455462&_e=DWx82oB0DiLqfxeUsfTn22gBChtZjsQsEj3iGXzo6yV54eeY8XVHzfDfVXiIuPsLdOczrB7fryMXkG9Xi8mIVKPyvfGne9mYFA-C20A95vtx3AICZWkowumnm4MyK1WpdrCZGdvn79p9GPJNvhpb44ZCmwo2xzffqhSry4CLTTmRuvaYX2A6Lvk1e7YCzhRMDKK0-_RigHLIznk6z0ShUtSCMWf7xeZnv2bkZKNM1rPYFHCFGpzfT_aiIgZvoyhbPrMgmx4O-uJA-6eeZApXjBDEe2qXZ52Ka4mPCV3gjnwT8NEJoymY_o-Fv6cMbiq5HkK0LsnJ2xqxU-GRFX5Dd9Sh2dzm7lQtXLOyHIgw_V8RU7Y22NBYs5Ef9mXpTr2AJE9YVnbZUlqIiF9b7VQIKCisEZAq5c97ICxZoRbX3L5rKN5bipEtbLV3VfLgWpK87-EohsTIYZ8tf3Oo2bqfTGqqatr0hDH8V1Iu0QsCtWvVi5TrTU2ae82gMr4KIoDfUhzr_u7v7FixqlJblSuCQjbYksKyKlHcti_pTBvTO1qFtw_y_e4FG671-ZAn0LGldThmbtEIMFytm3fwe2iiiA%3D%3D "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

clean_body: | | | | | | Friend, I wanted to let you know how grateful I am for your support. Generosity from grassroots supporters like you is the reason I am able to fund my campaign and fight for America's future. Now, I want to take a few minutes to talk with you about the journey I have been on. "Once you’ve finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me fund my campaign so I can get my message out to every voter!" Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words. | | | | | I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it. After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: " Don't complain. Do something about it." | | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and hardly anyone thought I had a chance. I was polling at 15 percent a week before the primary. But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won. ➡️ | | It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor. When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy. When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them. | Now, I'm running for President because our country is heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class. "It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this today could send a donation of just $5 to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG! >>" Your donation will not only show that my campaign is a force to be reckoned with, but it will also play a vital role in helping fund our campaign in the upcoming days. "Will you consider making a one-time donation of any amount today to show the strength of OUR movement?" | | Friend, throughout my life, I've been shaking up the status quo. I'm hoping to do the same as your next President. But in order to get there, "I need your help – starting right now. " Your contribution is what keeps this movement alive and thriving, so thank you for standing with me. My very best, | Nikki Haley | | | | | | | | "NikkiHaleyMerch" | | "Claim Your Mug" | | More About Nikki Haley | "NikkiHaleyPodium" My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States. I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A. I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor" because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future. "Will you join me today and help me save our country?" | | "DONATE" | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc. **By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided by from each of Team Stand For America, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, SFA Fund Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. Texts may be sent via an automated telephone dialing system. Consent not required to contribute. Message frequency varies. Message and data rates may apply. and . You can opt out at any time. Text STOP to end. Text HELP for help. . . Contributions are not tax-deductible. Team Stand For America does not accept contributions from foreign nationals. Our mailing address is: 186 Seven Farms Drive, Ste F-401 Daniel Island, SC 29492

body:
Last night made the stakes of this race abundantly clear.

Peter, last night, three Ohio Republicans debated for the chance to defeat me in the race that will decide whether Democrats defend our Senate majority or hand control back to Mitch McConnell.

It'll be another two months before I know who my opponent will be, but one thing is abundantly clear after last night: **All three of these Republicans would be an _absolute disaster_ for Ohioans and our country.**

**That's why I'm urgently asking for your support now to make sure I have the resources to defeat whichever one of them is on the ballot:** [**Will you split $5 or more now between my campaign and Shontel Brown’s to help me win in Ohio and keep the Senate blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77613793/450958619/1368611189?refcode=EM_F_240123split_N_SB_90DO_5_NG_N_L1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjgxM2MxZi00M2JhLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM4NDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vKm_8lpyBMCjOellFF3eTTHeVHrGZVATY4umX-n7q5U=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed and will be automatically split between Shontel Brown and Sherrod Brown immediately:_ | | **[$1 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77613796/450958623/1368611189?refcode=EM_F_240123split_N_SB_90DO_5_NG_N_EB1&express_lane=true&amount=1&refcode2=EL1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjgxM2MxZi00M2JhLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM4NDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vKm_8lpyBMCjOellFF3eTTHeVHrGZVATY4umX-n7q5U=)**

All three of my potential opponents have said they'd support a national abortion ban – and any one of them winning would be a victory for Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and their megadonor allies. Social Security, fair wages, reproductive rights – so much of what we care about will be at risk if they flip this seat and the Senate red.

**That's why it's so important that we raise the resources we need to go toe to toe with the GOP. But unlike my self-funding opponents, I can't write myself a million-dollar check – I'm counting on grassroots folks like you to power us to victory, Peter.**

[**So please, will you rush $5 or more now to me and Shontel Brown to help me stand up to the GOP's attacks, win in Ohio, and keep the Senate blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77613840/450958683/1368611189?refcode=EM_F_240123split_N_SB_90DO_5_NG_N_L2&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjgxM2MxZi00M2JhLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM4NDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vKm_8lpyBMCjOellFF3eTTHeVHrGZVATY4umX-n7q5U=)

Dear Peter,
While we appreciate the headline news, _the reality is_ our campaign is not counting on winning the Presidential election via vote taken by the U.S. House of Representatives.
_Our aim is to win the election outright, as an Independent candidate, on November 5, 2024—in just over 9 months_.
Winning on Election Day, and being declared the winner on Election Day, should be the goal of every candidate.
Sadly, our current election process mirrors that of a banana republic, in some instances, rather than that of the United States Republic.
Often we don’t know who won an election until months after our votes have been cast and the winner is declared only after multiple recounts and court orders.
Bottom line: Our campaign, despite the odds, seeks to win the election on Election Day.
But the key to winning is you.
Your actions today are crucial to protecting the “republic for which it stands.”
Your actions today will help secure a prosperous and free future for your children and grandchildren.
And you know as well as we do that no one is coming to save us.
That’s why we’re writing to you.
Without you, Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. will not appear on the ballot in 50 states.
With your support, he will.
Without you, Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. will not be on the debate stage.
With your support, he will.
So we must move beyond the wild speculations of canceling the election or hoping the House of Representatives will decide who our next President is—and embrace the reality that our real opportunity to win lies with you.
You are our path to victory on Election Day. _Your support will help to ensure Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. receives more votes than either Biden or Trump._
[Your maximum gift of $6,600 will propel this campaign into the mainstream news cycle, onto the debate stage, on to your state ballot, and into the White House in 2025.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=path_1_23_24_email_1_1_nd&n=3)
[Your gift of $5, $10, $15, or even $24 a month will help us in our historic effort.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=path_1_23_24_email_1_1_nd&n=4)
Any amount you can give will help us achieve the 100% participation we need to sustain the incredible momentum we’ve built together!

name: Doug Lindner, LCV
subject: Supreme Court set to seize EPA's authority -- TAKE ACTION: Tell Congress to Rein in the Supreme Court >>
body:
Help us reach 5,000 signatures demanding a judiciary that works for people and our planet. |
---
| | **
Tell Congress to Rein in the Supreme Court**
The Supreme Court just heard arguments in two key cases that threaten the EPA's and other agencies' ability to protect the people from big business __.

Congress must stop MAGA judges' right-wing power grab. [Help us reach 5,000 signatures demanding that Congress rein in the Supreme Court and urgently prioritize confirming pro-environment, pro-democracy judges.](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/w_ywTd_x_) |
---
**[**TAKE ACTION NOW**](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/w_ywTd_x_)**

** **
|
Peter -- the Supreme Court just heard arguments in two critical cases -- _Relentless, Inc. v. Department of Commerce_ and _Loper Bright Enterprises v. Raimondo_ -- that could gut the federal government's authority to enforce even the most basic environmental protections.

In both cases, corporate interests backed by big oil are suing in order to hamstring federal agencies' authority to protect people from powerful special interests. **If these plaintiffs get their way, it would move authority over every area of public policy from public-interest agencies like the EPA to the MAGA-dominated federal courts.**

In the last two years, extremist Justices on the Supreme Court have already severely limited the federal government's ability to regulate climate pollution from power plants, stripped Clean Water Act protections from most of the wetlands in the United States, and overturned _Roe v. Wade_. Some even take lavish gifts like private jet flights from the same billionaires bringing cases like this for them to rule on. Now, they're looking to overturn a bedrock doctrine of the American legal system in order to increase their own power.

**Our planet and our communities are counting on us -- we need your help to make our voices heard. We're asking 5,000 LCV members to take action before midnight tonight.** [Tell Congress to take action to rein in the Supreme Court and fill judicial vacancies with pro-environment, pro-democracy judges before it's too late >>](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/w_ywTd_x_)

These critical cases target what's called the _Chevron_ Doctrine. This longstanding Supreme Court precedent says that when something is unclear in a federal law administered by an expert agency, such as the way the EPA administers the Clean Air Act, federal courts should defer to agency experts' reasonable interpretations of what the law means. The Chevron Doctrine is critical to enforcing the laws that protect our environment and our communities from pollution and other harms. It touches every issue, from climate to democracy to healthcare, reproductive rights, consumer protection, workers' rights, student debt, and so much more.

Put simply, if the Supreme Court rules in favor of the plaintiffs in _Relentless_ and _Loper Bright_ , it will gut the ability of federal agencies like the EPA to implement the laws Congress passes, _transferring that power to unelected right-wing judges_. And if Congress doesn't act, far-right judges will keep control of our Supreme Court, and keep rolling back our rights, for decades to come.

**Congress must stop this MAGA power grab.** We need lawmakers to pass the Judiciary Act to expand and rebalance the Supreme Court. They must also pass the Supreme Court Ethics, Recusal, and Transparency (SCERT) Act to ensure our nation's highest court doesn't have the lowest ethical standards. And we need the Senate to prioritize confirming President Biden's pro-environment, pro-democracy judicial nominees to every vacancy on the federal bench.

**We _can_ rein in corrupt MAGA judges, Peter, but it will only happen if our movement joins together to demand it.** [Please, take action right now. Tell Congress to rein in the Supreme Court and fill judicial vacancies. It only takes a moment to help us reach our goal >>](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/w_ywTd_x_)

Thank you for joining LCV's campaign for a democracy that works for our planet and for our communities.

Onward,

Doug Lindner
Senior Director of Judiciary & Democracy
League of Conservation Voters |

---

| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=10507455&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTkwMDQ3MTUwNwS2&spReportId=MTkwMDQ3MTUwNwS2). [Click here to unsubscribe](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=10507455&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTkwMDQ3MTUwNwS2&spReportId=MTkwMDQ3MTUwNwS2) from our supporter list. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](mailto:feedback@lcv.org), or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

[740 15th St NW, 7th Floor
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683](https://links.messages.lcv.) |

subject: Peter, is there anything I can say?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY 2026
body:
