Peter, is there ANYTHING that I can say right now to convince you to make a contribution to my campaign?

**What if I told you** that more than 40,000 people lost their lives to gun violence last year while the gun lobby strengthened its vice grip on GOP leaders?

**What if I told you** that GOP leaders across the nation are rapidly stripping away our reproductive freedoms – but as long as I’m attorney general, New York will _always_ be a safe haven for all who need reproductive care?

**And if I told you** that the most powerful and corrupt forces in our country who I work to hold accountable are rooting for me to fail so they can continue to act without consequence?

**Peter, truly, the list could go on and on. There are so many reasons why I need your support right now to start this new year, so I’m humbly asking: [Can I count on you to chip in $5 to my campaign right now so I can keep New York protected from far-right extremism and corruption?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77614013/450959397/-2022193277?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk1326-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDFhYWRkNC00M2JhLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM4NDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VldjpKXt8YoOWNoX7XrkThEonKhg9BdlElC1uu8NZGY=)**

2024 is here. Election day is around the corner, and we need your help to keep NY-11 a conservative stronghold in New York City.

It's the start of the year, which means we have roughly 11 months to activate our America-First support infrastructure, knock on doors, put up TV and radio ads, and spread our conservative message far and wide.

2024 will be the year we keep NY-11 red, maintain the GOP Majority in the House, and gain seats in blue districts across the country.

2024 will be the year we WIN the Senate Majority and can pass legislation to help the American people swiftly through the House and out of the Senate.

2024 will be the year we turn Biden's White House into Trump's White House and start putting America first again, at home and abroad.

**But we can only make 2024 our year with your help.**

When Lauren Boebert suddenly announced last month that she was packing up her bags and leaving Western Colorado, we were all shocked. But maybe we shouldn’t have been.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77614115/450959687/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTQxNTUwOS00NGJhLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM4NDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xN3OSLuQV1sW7h37WAu39b6ynfxqAgETVL4aQwj7S0E=&emci=1380f474-43ba-ee11-bea1-002248223848&emdi=3a415509-44ba-ee11-bea1-002248223848&ceid=19445147)

Hello,
When Lauren Boebert suddenly announced last month that she was packing up her bags and leaving Western Colorado, we were all shocked. But maybe we shouldn’t have been.
My husband Adam Frisch had run against Boebert in 2022 and came just 546 votes short of defeating her. Our family, campaign team, and all of our volunteers had worked hard – very hard. Adam drove over 24,000 miles with our son Felix meeting with voters across the entire district. But ultimately, we were out-spent and came up short.
This past year, we decided to give it another go, and we’ve been working even harder than the last campaign. With support from grassroots donors like you, we were out-raising Boebert – and Adam had already driven _another_ 24,000 miles to listen to voters. It looked like we were heading for a win... so Lauren Boebert ran off scared.
**But with Boebert now out of the race, things are going to be harder.** We’ve got new Republican opponents who are trying to hide their extremism, and the Republican Super PACs are already circling to try to stop us from winning.
**This is a must-win seat this November. Ours was the closest race in the entire country in 2022. But if Adam is going to win and replace Lauren Boebert in Congress, we’re counting on grassroots donors like you to give now:**
[**Please, can Adam count on you to chip in $5 or more right now – whatever you can afford to give before midnight tonight – to help him finish the job, win this seat, and replace Lauren Boebert in Congress?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77614117/450959689/1610638071?refcode=em20240123pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=3a415509-44ba-ee11-bea1-002248223848&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTQxNTUwOS00NGJhLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM4NDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xN3OSLuQV1sW7h37WAu39b6ynfxqAgETVL4aQwj7S0E=)

body:

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77614214/450960008/106679703?refcode=BLU_EM_LGC_2024-01-23_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmY3ZDVkNC00NGJhLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM4NDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UgwIo9lnp7beaeNqw3_6Cg9oQXzkiiFupyPJ07VKq8s=)

I need your immediate attention, Peter!

I’ve been around Democratic politics for decades. So when I tell you that **New York’s Fourth District is one of the most critical seats to flip blue** if Democrats want to retake the House majority this year, you can be sure it’s the truth.

Anthony D’Esposito has been ranked the most vulnerable incumbent in the country, meaning Republicans will be spending millions to hold onto their razor-thin majority with NY-04. But we simply cannot let that happen.

Hi friend – It’s Blakely, Janelle’s campaign manager, here with a quick campaign update. There’s been so much happening here on the ground over the past few months (_town halls, house parties, candidate forums – you name it!_) and with 2024 shaping up to be just as busy,**I just wanted to reach out with the three most important things to know about our election right now.**
1. **[This is a pure TOSS UP seat.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77614244/450960125/476240478?refcode=em_fr_2024.01.23_b1_bwcm_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzgxMGZhZjEtNDRiYS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzODQ4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zqeqMKRJbS_J7cqFNi0HQiy2sSH5ujcWao1U9wxL1ys=)** Numerous non-partisan election forecasters have deemed our race a pure toss up – meaning it could go either way on Election Day. If we’re being honest, the fate of this election could come down to only a handful of votes. That’s why having the resources to reach and turn out every single voter is so important.

2. **[Extreme Republican dark money groups are going to target our campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77614245/450960126/476240478?refcode=em_fr_2024.01.23_b1_bwcm_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzgxMGZhZjEtNDRiYS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzODQ4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zqeqMKRJbS_J7cqFNi0HQiy2sSH5ujcWao1U9wxL1ys=)** National Republicans and their far-right dark money backers have already signaled that keeping OR-05 red is an absolute priority for them. We know we’ll be up against millions of dollars worth of GOP attack ads next year.

3. **[The path back to the Democratic House Majority runs through Oregon’s 5th.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77614246/450960127/476240478?refcode=em_fr_2024.01.23_b1_bwcm_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzgxMGZhZjEtNDRiYS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzODQ4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zqeqMKRJbS_J7cqFNi0HQiy2sSH5ujcWao1U9wxL1ys=)** Our ability to stop the extreme MAGA Majority and ensure Congress can actually pass meaningful legislation on healthcare, education, reproductive rights, climate change prevention, and so much more hinges on our district flipping blue. With everything we care about on the line, we absolutely can’t afford to fall short here.

**[Bottom line: We desperately need your help if we’re going to stay on track to send Janelle to Congress. Can I count on you to pitch in $5, $25, or whatever you can afford to give?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77614247/450960128/476240478?refcode=em_fr_2024.01.23_b1_bwcm_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzgxMGZhZjEtNDRiYS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzODQ4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zqeqMKRJbS_J7cqFNi0HQiy2sSH5ujcWao1U9wxL1ys=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$5 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77614248/450960129/-438343666?refcode=em_fr_2024.01.23_b1_bwcm_all-nd&amount=5&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzgxMGZhZjEtNDRiYS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzODQ4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zqeqMKRJbS_J7cqFNi0HQiy2sSH5ujcWao1U9wxL1ys=) | [$25 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77614249/450960130/-438343666?refcode=em_fr_2024.01.23_b1_bwcm_all-nd&amount=25&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzgxMGZhZjEtNDRiYS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzODQ4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zqeqMKRJbS_J7cqFNi0HQiy2sSH5ujcWao1U9wxL1ys=)

name: Andy Kim
subject: Have you heard of "the line"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey
body:
In 19 of New Jersey’s counties, Democratic and Republican county leaders are allowed to place their favored primary candidates on what is known as “the line.”
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77614379/450960604/41798106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDJkMDY4Mi00NWJhLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM4NDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kPpA9BK7YEUOql3wBRMbAQBvyse3--zhyZtx-iXvGDc=&emci=61b70110-3aba-ee11-bea1-002248223848&emdi=5d2d0682-45ba-ee11-bea1-002248223848&ceid=26261389)
---

| | There's something about New Jersey politics you might not know about. Something that gives party bosses incredible power by choosing where candidates are on the ballot. Something that keeps the well-off and well-connected in control while minimizing the votes and voices of the people. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77614380/450960605/-1197072038?refcode=2024-01-23-theline&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=5d2d0682-45ba-ee11-bea1-002248223848&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDJkMDY4Mi00NWJhLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM4NDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kPpA9BK7YEUOql3wBRMbAQBvyse3--zhyZtx-iXvGDc=) The system is called "the line." In 19 of New Jersey's 21 counties, Democratic and Republican county leaders are allowed to place their hand-picked candidates in positions to give them an advantage. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77614381/450960606/-1197072038?refcode=2024-01-23-theline&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=5d2d0682-45ba-ee11-bea1-002248223848&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDJkMDY4Mi00NWJhLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM4NDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kPpA9BK7YEUOql3wBRMbAQBvyse3--zhyZtx-iXvGDc=) (Photo of "the line" ballot design. Candidates not on "the line" are placed in "ballot siberia") This may seem like a small thing, but studies show that being given "the line" could mean a real tangible advantage **over opponents who aren't chosen by party bosses.** Many organizations have called New Jersey's ballot system rigged, leaving unendorsed candidates off to the side near the ballot's edge. Trust me, I know we have what it takes to overcome this unfair ballot manipulation and strike a major victory for our democracy. Latest polling shows me with a **23 point lead** , and with strong name recognition across the state, **we can win.** It will be competitive, but it's the right thing to do. That's why it's so vital that we raise the resources and funds needed to get our message out to the people. But I have to say that it is so sad to see leaders in the Democratic Party using these unfair tactics to manipulate voters. We are supposed to be the party that defends democracy and stands up against those seeking to circumvent the will of the people. We cannot be hypocritical when it suits us. I decided to run for office more than five years ago because I believe that power belongs to the voters. I've fought against corruption - from big corporate money to Donald Trump's attempts to steal an election - and when I saw that Senator Menendez betrayed the public's trust, I knew I had to take that fight to the Senate. But if corruption exists anywhere, it can thrive everywhere. **That's why we need your support to put an end to corruption in New Jersey - whether it's buying influence through gold bars or buying a place on the ballot through influence.** I am in this race to restore integrity back into our politics, show people that there are public servants that are trying to do the right work, and put the people ahead of personal gain or ambition and just be able to deliver for my state – **and all I'm asking for as a candidate for the United States Senate is that we give the people a fair shot at representation that works for them.** We're working hard to win this election, even with the political reality of "the line." But the truth is it's going to take a lot of resources to keep our strong momentum going to primary day. We need to show voters that a vote for our campaign is a vote to restore trust in government to strengthen our democracy, rooting out corruption through major ethics reform, getting dark money out of politics through campaign finance reform, and empowering voters to elect the candidate of their choice through ballot reform. [**I'm building a different kind of campaign, but I need your support to get it done. Will you join us in fighting for a better government by pitching in today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77614382/450960607/-1197072038?refcode=2024-01-23-theline&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=5d2d0682-45ba-ee11-bea1-002248223848&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDJkMDY4Mi00NWJhLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM4NDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kPpA9BK7YEUOql3wBRMbAQBvyse3--zhyZtx-iXvGDc=) [Donate Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77614383/450960608/-1197072038?refcode=2024-01-23-theline&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=5d2d0682-45ba-ee11-bea1-002248223848&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDJkMDY4Mi00NWJhLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM4NDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kPpA9BK7YEUOql3wBRMbAQBvyse3--zhyZtx-iXvGDc=) Thank you, _Andy_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:

name: Forever Organizing
subject: There's still time! Register for our Digital Organizing Training
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP35/1/80994/images/CADEM%20Logo%20%281%29.png]
Hey fellow Democrats!
It's Cameron, the Digital Organizing Manager with CADEM's Forever Organizing team. Our Digital Organizing Training is just TWO days away!
https://www.mobilize.us/cadems/event/599997/ [https://www.mobilize.us/cadems/event/599997/]
If you've already taken the time to sign up -- thank you! But if you're still not sure about attending, let me share why this training matters so much for the 2024 election.
Make no mistake -- the House majority will run through California this year. With five must win red-to-blue congressional districts in our state, the balance of power hinges on our ability to get communities of voters to the polls in regions where it counts the most.
Election analysts agree that many of our congressional elections will be nail-biters. That's where you come in.
Together we can beat the odds and deliver California Democrats to victory in every corner of our state. In 2024, reaching voters online has become more important than ever to elect driven Democrats who will fight for working families.
This training will provide:
*
Background
on
Digital
Organizing
and
its
value
*
Information,
resources,
and
know-how
to
mobilize
voters
online
*
Social
media
platform
overview
*
Introduction
to
our
own
organizing
app,
CADEM
Connect!
Whether you're a super-star volunteer, neighborhood activist, or just looking for a way to get involved for the first time, this is the best way to get involved and turn out Democrats in California.
Join us this Thursday, January 25th, remotely via Zoom. Any questions, comments, concerns, or ideas? Feel free to respond to this email, and I'll get back to you as soon as possible! [https://www.mobilize.us/cadems/event/599997/]
RSVP LINK → [https://www.mobilize.us/cadems/event/599997/]
Thank you for being part of this team Friend. Let's work together to win our battleground districts.
- Cameron

clean_body: [] Hey fellow Democrats! It's Cameron, the Digital Organizing Manager with CADEM's Forever Organizing team. Our Digital Organizing Training is just TWO days away! [] If you've already taken the time to sign up -- thank you! But if you're still not sure about attending, let me share why this training matters so much for the 2024 election. Make no mistake -- the House majority will run through California this year. With five must win red-to-blue congressional districts in our state, the balance of power hinges on our ability to get communities of voters to the polls in regions where it counts the most. Election analysts agree that many of our congressional elections will be nail-biters. That's where you come in. Together we can beat the odds and deliver California Democrats to victory in every corner of our state. In 2024, reaching voters online has become more important than ever to elect driven Democrats who will fight for working families. This training will provide: Background on Digital Organizing and its value Information, resources, and know-how to mobilize voters online Social media platform overview Introduction to our own organizing app, CADEM Connect! Whether you're a super-star volunteer, neighborhood activist, or just looking for a way to get involved for the first time, this is the best way to get involved and turn out Democrats in California. Join us this Thursday, January 25th, remotely via Zoom. Any questions, comments, concerns, or ideas? Feel free to respond to this email, and I'll get back to you as soon as possible! [] RSVP LINK → [] Thank you for being part of this team Friend. Let's work together to win our battleground districts. - Cameron [] [] [] [] Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www.cadem.org Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. California Democratic Party 1830 9th St Sacramento, CA 95811 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

body:
Public schools are irreplaceable.
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77614490/450960976/823540626?refcode=ea.45154a41-46ba-ee11-bea1-002248223848&ms=ea.45154a41-46ba-ee11-bea1-002248223848&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTE1NGE0MS00NmJhLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM4NDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0BPDwCQMfQGk8SSJPpxX_Cq1APn1A9SFeYGNKUUrBa8=&emci=e448798e-2eba-ee11-bea1-002248223848&emdi=45154a41-46ba-ee11-bea1-002248223848&ceid=1049176)
We have amazing public schools in North Carolina that are doing great work. But they won’t be able to keep it up much longer unless we fully fund them. Our great teachers are underpaid and underappreciated. Our strong public schools are woefully underfunded, and our Republican legislators refuse to act. **It's time for that to change.** If we don’t act, our children and grandchildren, our businesses, and our communities will bear the consequences. We can’t rank near the bottom for public school funding and teacher pay and expect that our schools will remain competitive. | [EMAIL YOUR LEGISLATORS »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77614491/450960977/-907562860?refcode=ea.45154a41-46ba-ee11-bea1-002248223848&ms=ea.45154a41-46ba-ee11-bea1-002248223848&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTE1NGE0MS00NmJhLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM4NDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0BPDwCQMfQGk8SSJPpxX_Cq1APn1A9SFeYGNKUUrBa8=&emci=e448798e-2eba-ee11-bea1-002248223848&emdi=45154a41-46ba-ee11-bea1-002248223848&ceid=1049176)
---
**I’m proclaiming 2024 the Year of Public Schools in North Carolina.**
We know parents support fully funding our schools, and they are doing their part. So are students and teachers. But the legislature — time and time again — says no. Instead, the legislature plans to waste more than FOUR BILLION dollars over the next decade on vouchers for unaccountable and unregulated private schools.
**[Peter, I need YOU to email your state legislators and demand they fully fund our public schools. Click here to take action NOW>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77614492/450960978/-907562860?refcode=ea.45154a41-46ba-ee11-bea1-002248223848&ms=ea.45154a41-46ba-ee11-bea1-002248223848&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTE1NGE0MS00NmJhLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM4NDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0BPDwCQMfQGk8SSJPpxX_Cq1APn1A9SFeYGNKUUrBa8=&emci=e448798e-2eba-ee11-bea1-002248223848&emdi=45154a41-46ba-ee11-bea1-002248223848&ceid=1049176)**
Our public schools educate all children, power our economy, and provide opportunity in every community in North Carolina.
It is time for us, _all of us_ , to stand up and demand that our legislature stand up for public schools. Nothing will have a longer-lasting impact for North Carolina than to once again, honor — and support — our public schools.
**[We need as many North Carolinians as possible to make their voices heard in the next 24 hours. Email your legislators now to ensure they know you want them to fight FOR public education>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77614493/450960979/-907562860?refcode=ea.45154a41-46ba-ee11-bea1-002248223848&ms=ea.45154a41-46ba-ee11-bea1-002248223848&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTE1NGE0MS00NmJhLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM4NDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0BPDwCQMfQGk8SSJPpxX_Cq1APn1A9SFeYGNKUUrBa8=&emci=e448798e-2eba-ee11-bea1-002248223848&emdi=45154a41-46ba-ee11-bea1-002248223848&ceid=1049176)**

body:
The wealth of the world’s five richest men more than doubled in the last four years — that’s just wrong.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20240123-3424-footer&t=1&akid=3424%2E420207%2EQYfV_w)
Peter, it’s time to tax the damn rich.
Poor and working families are struggling to make ends meet due to corporate greed, predatory student loans and sky high prices on utilities, groceries, medical bills, and more. **Meanwhile, the wealth of the world’s five richest men more than doubled in the last four years.**
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20240123.Vx5aUd&refcode=em20240123-3424&t=2&akid=3424%2E420207%2EQYfV_w)
**Make no mistake:** this is a direct result of Republicans in Congress who would rather force tax cuts for the rich than confront the crises facing families today.
Pramila is determined to hold these MAGA extremists accountable, but she needs our grassroots support to amplify our mission amidst the cacophony of Republican chaos.
[**Can we count on you to chip in $3 or more to ensure Pramila can stay in Congress and continue calling out Republicans pushing tax cuts for their wealthy donors?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20240123.Vx5aUd&refcode=em20240123-3424&t=3&akid=3424%2E420207%2EQYfV_w)

Hey Peter, Harry Dunn here.

This is a tough email to start – how do you talk about one of the darkest days of your life? Not to mention, an irreparable stain on this country's history.

So I guess I'll start with a question. Is this America?

Is attacking Capitol police officers – honest, good people dedicated to protecting and serving democracy – with baseball bats and spears, spraying them with WD-40, calling them hateful slurs – is that America?

Is a President of the United States emboldening a riot on the Capitol, encouraging people threatening to kill former Speaker Nancy Pelosi, former Vice President Mike Pence, who traveled to Washington ready to act on those threats – is that America?

**That's not America to me.** I believe in an America that protects its people, regardless of their political beliefs. An America that values democracy and those that are chosen to represent it. That's what I believed in while I served as a Capitol police officer during the January 6 insurrection.

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77614839/450962303/-46109959?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYmQ4MzdkZS00N2JhLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM4NDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UNFpv2Pumc4MsfFPEHqkgTJhPm3MPqecqcXXC3qZHDE=)

**Rep. Mike Garcia: House Republican impeachment efforts are “going to be therapeutic.”**

**[Garcia is engaging in the partisan scheme to impeach Democrats in retaliation for holding Trump accountable. * * *

Peter,

On a private campaign call, our far-right opponent Mike Garcia said that GOP impeachment efforts of one of President Biden’s cabinet officials would be **“therapeutic.”**

He acknowledged that these sham impeachment efforts wouldn’t succeed, but still said that the House GOP majority still needs **“a pound of flesh.”**

This leaked audio really shines a light on Garcia’s priorities. These aren’t the words of someone interested in uplifting our community. Garcia is putting political retribution before his constituents. That’s exactly why _his approval rating in CA-27 has plummeted by nearly 10%_ in the last few months.

**[Here’s the good news: We can kick Garcia out of Congress for good if we elect George Whitesides, but we need your support to get there. clean_body: | = BREAKING via Punchbowl News: Rep. Mike Garcia: House Republican impeachment efforts are “going to be therapeutic.” = | **= Peter, On a private campaign call, our far-right opponent Mike Garcia said that GOP impeachment efforts of one of President Biden’s cabinet officials would be “therapeutic.” He acknowledged that these sham impeachment efforts wouldn’t succeed, but still said that the House GOP majority still needs “a pound of flesh.” This leaked audio really shines a light on Garcia’s priorities. These aren’t the words of someone interested in uplifting our community. Garcia is putting political retribution before his constituents. That’s exactly why his approval rating in CA-27 has plummeted by nearly 10% in the last few months. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: **= | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, Team George Whitesides =** | = = = George has spent his career solving problems. name: Team Lizzie
subject: #TeamLizzie Update—6 Weeks Until Primary Day
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe240123wu?refcode=lpfe240123wu [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe240123wu?refcode=lpfe240123wu]
With just six weeks to go before the Texas primary, Lizzie and the team have been out and about across the district, and we have lots of great things to report.
We had a great Day of Action this Saturday, with volunteers showing up to block-walk and deliver yard signs—even in 30 degree-weather! We also had folks come in to write postcards and to pick them up and take them home. Lizzie was also the featured speaker at the Front Porch Democrats meeting this weekend in Fort Bend!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe240123wu?refcode=lpfe240123wu [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe240123wu?refcode=lpfe240123wu]
Our next big Day of Action is Saturday, February 3, starting at 9 a.m. Mark your calendar and sign up here to join us! [https://www.mobilize.us/fletcherforcongress/event/596443/]
https://www.mobilize.us/fletcherforcongress/event/596443/ [https://www.mobilize.us/fletcherforcongress/event/596443/]
Can’t wait? You don’t have to. Sign up to help from now until Election Day at this link [https://www.mobilize.us/fletcherforcongress/] :
https://www.mobilize.us/fletcherforcongress/ [https://www.mobilize.us/fletcherforcongress/]
One other fun idea that you can do from anywhere: host a postcard party or come to one of ours. It’s a great way to gather with friends for a good cause. We’ll supply the postcards and lists. Let us know if you want to host here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/BTHco4oEI0KctgQZfZ3hSQ2]
https://www.mobilize.us/fletcherforcongress/event/596445/ [https://www.mobilize.us/fletcherforcongress/event/596445/]
And for those in the district, there is one more thing that helps: plant a free #TeamLizzie yard sign! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lfc20-yardsigns?]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lfcyardsign24 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lfcyardsign24]
Yesterday marked the 51st anniversary of Roe v. Wade . Lizzie’s been speaking out and listening in with people across our community about the state of reproductive health care in Texas. She joined Congressman Colin Allred, State Senator Wendy Davis, and candidate Michelle Vallejo for a joint press conference on Texas after Dobbs that was covered across the state, reminding Texans of what is at stake in 2024.
As Lizzie has pointed out, Roe v. Wade was brought by Texas women, raising hell and challenging the system, and today Texas women like Amanda Zurawski, Kate Cox, and Austin Dennard are leading the fight again, sharing their stories and taking action. There is a way every Texan, and every American, can fight back: vote against those taking away our freedom and vote for those who are fighting to restore it. Our campaign will make sure voters know that this year.
News Flash! New endorsements keep rolling in for Lizzie. The Texas Gulf Coast Area Labor Federation—the largest AFL-CIO in the country, which unites 95 local unions with over 60,000 members—has endorsed Lizzie again in 2024.
And #TeamLizzie continues to grow! This week, the Greater Heights Democratic Club and Area 5 Democratic Club both endorsed Lizzie! She is so grateful for the partnership of these hard-working Harris County Democratic Clubs! You can check out all of Lizzie’s 2024 endorsements here. [https://www.lizziefletcher.com/endorsements-2024/]
Thanks for being a part of the team,
Team Lizzie
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe240123wu?refcode=lpfe240123wu]
PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
Lizzie Fletcher for Congress
3262 Westheimer Road, PMB 636
Houston, TX 77098
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/yiT4vmtXrUCBvy-D5k60rg2?unsubscribedata=NZNShKbL%2BYbq884s1jRE5jBR6GSOT1ZHBWdkFmhRpeLondrcsmTOBmV55RFD5HvhbH%2FH8A5tV%2BcDipwtk6zAEvms7PEypBO4wHsYLRMhGPkLp7vWOV07DIu71%2BLKkrfZHXo%2B44i6TkHRS3oUhxzL5V%2BP2F2FDtSEoaJuDktRTERx8BO9B6fn6pZbmeNBuJQZPQFDDcrVacjbRDUxWkmZtTbCDJbZthp4iWEj7hvrCkOkqcWCVkDEUGiJjEsE9XUHqwMiM6ioGdU%2BapaP6s4DCff8CdPR%2B6Y1y9KmKWH499v371mySo4B3K8k7HhpZFBqaXj8WuFqClyc1eT26MEch5u33op%2B7ntPnWY3z%2FVZPEtjCAIV0Jvb7MriuSWc3jfdPA8j8cDU3H7QWp66RBtAgvfroC56bkA8scsx9hzOBl4f1vyS2zzrv8DhmTlOdBII .

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: The hill I’ll die on
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Johnson for Louisiana This Email was Sent to dpwillis67@gmail
body:
Chuck Schumer wants me to sign off on his open borders wishlist. I REFUSE. | | |
---
[](http://links.primaryupdate.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=d771a9ff8e6547a4a5f83c81bb934f46&_e=qa5ozzAcveApUuJX7KZCtT9DzwqJAMFdVtent2qmeHtdF3Lk2sQ38Dxv82Ojf6T8rTAfHADVnoz5BFz2LFEi2W85lLlhqLCDbiVSWhk2xLf1DtUayRgAFOO79NTJxHD1Q9fJ4Cgznwxmu-bHq0_iElqEn449F8YNc5QxRn5Qaj62L0sTeMcnpkYagtnCUweCHMEUBlg3PPIMykA2epiBjWlgH9pUTfe5GiPfSTq62SnEXaRLSrSedJfaNDUVQMtu0tfQT640oVokBsdNwVLk9Vjpk3abDdIynjSCpkXglvTZqn7IkMsJFSgiXDyiGaV7PWaEhuxF1ilUtHM9PBhiTLOaYC10OoTam1uRE3ukeleGWswqrAoDkHPFSCJ6VJhZ2vnxZi3BNfHjTtR1E5WkS4ftQT-NsscNDzfMQxFssc2zErqMdgmnhylUTXI_2J0Y)
---
Friend, the Democrats have a bridge to sell you. They want you to believe that the deal they're offering to the American people is a "compromise." **_[Schumer wants you to sign off on:](http://links.primaryupdate.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=d771a9ff8e6547a4a5f83c81bb934f46&_e=qa5ozzAcveApUuJX7KZCtT9DzwqJAMFdVtent2qmeHtdF3Lk2sQ38Dxv82Ojf6T8rTAfHADVnoz5BFz2LFEi2W85lLlhqLCDbiVSWhk2xLf1DtUayRgAFOO79NTJxHD1Q9fJ4Cgznwxmu-bHq0_iElqEn449F8YNc5QxRn5Qaj62L0sTeMcnpkYagtnCUweCHMEUBlg3PPIMykA2epiBjWlgH9pUTfe5GiPfSTq62SnEXaRLSrSedJfaNDUVQMtu0tfQT640oVokBsdNwVLk9Vjpk3abDdIynjSCpkXglvSFcmg-DptgbOywS7RIhD87WaPGY8i_FMmvM__mbchCbX0xThiWrdr2ZJaiLD2lMSI_F8MLHb-onU02ZgMOJ_M3DwaIQDlhqMrfnnP7RERitmf1omMgH2b0dilt312V_YTS6PCu4lyMprbczZZJm2n6)_**

\- 150,000 illegal immigrants entering the country uninhibited per month. (That's nearly the population of my hometown in Louisiana) \- Work permits for EVERY illegal alien who's been released into the country **_\- And they want YOU to pay for their legal fees._** My answer is NO. Absolutely NOT. Friend, Democrats have become the Party of open borders lawlessness and I need your help to stop them. **[This is the hill I'll die on. ](http://links.primaryupdate.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=d771a9ff8e6547a4a5f83c81bb934f46&_e=qa5ozzAcveApUuJX7KZCtT9DzwqJAMFdVtent2qmeHtdF3Lk2sQ38Dxv82Ojf6T8rTAfHADVnoz5BFz2LFEi2W85lLlhqLCDbiVSWhk2xLf1DtUayRgAFOO79NTJxHD1Q9fJ4Cgznwxmu-bHq0_iElqEn449F8YNc5QxRn5Qaj62L0sTeMcnpkYagtnCUweCHMEUBlg3PPIMykA2epiBjWlgH9pUTfe5GiPfSTq62SnEXaRLSrSedJfaNDUVQMtu0tfQT640oVokBsdNwVLk9Vjpk3abDdIynjSCpkXglvQPmLqL-f_vptGC03PkHJ88ybvSnAWBCdw7SDDusrstrOpkg_KMGqscqWRGZDq3SufgPXB4Lj5I_LekZkmyyJHYpY3HeS-sMzGa5MJw2qoJ6TomuoCSY6PleZ2VzCRKMDKW4QRHSPnLik2Rnh4MeUru)** **Will you step up to help me and House Republicans end the Biden Border Crisis today?** Let me put this in the clearest terms possible: Since the day Joe Biden took office, he's been blatantly ignoring federal law. _In 2006, Republicans passed a law that directed the President and the executive branch to build the border wall._ **Every Democrat President since has done everything in their power to IGNORE the law. ** I've said it before and I'll say it again. If Joe Biden would just get out of our way, we could end the Biden Border Crisis tomorrow. **_My promise to you is that I 'll do everything in my power to ensure that Democrats respect the rule of law and fight to ensure that our border is strong._** But I need your help to ensure that after this election REPUBLICANS are in the driver's seat. **[**Would you chip in $15, $20, or $25 today to take back control of our border?**](http://links.primaryupdate.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=d771a9ff8e6547a4a5f83c81bb934f46&_e=qa5ozzAcveApUuJX7KZCtT9DzwqJAMFdVtent2qmeHtdF3Lk2sQ38Dxv82Ojf6T8rTAfHADVnoz5BFz2LFEi2W85lLlhqLCDbiVSWhk2xLf1DtUayRgAFOO79NTJxHD1Q9fJ4Cgznwxmu-bHq0_iElqEn449F8YNc5QxRn5Qaj62L0sTeMcnpkYagtnCUweCHMEUBlg3PPIMykA2epiBjWlgH9pUTfe5GiPfSTq62SnEXaRLSrSedJfaNDUVQMtu0tfQT640oVokBsdNwVLk9Vjpk3abDdIynjSCpkXglvQarkcl5dqWiQJ69DEin40A-ZfqN5T6J4Gm08VlbC1vfAZS--VFKCBHbYvEDLyp4VYNc3ZYtxYD6yDMp0SXnUSUMCin8bH4-6vpPBuSmbUnj4zWG1FNvwevBJbuVeugDyPorGPKOy2I9iUXbsYBwBGw)**
---
[**END THE BIDEN BORDER CRISIS**](http://links.primaryupdate.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=d771a9ff8e6547a4a5f83c81bb934f46&_e=qa5ozzAcveApUuJX7KZCtT9DzwqJAMFdVtent2qmeHtdF3Lk2sQ38Dxv82Ojf6T8rTAfHADVnoz5BFz2LFEi2W85lLlhqLCDbiVSWhk2xLf1DtUayRgAFOO79NTJxHD1Q9fJ4Cgznwxmu-bHq0_iElqEn449F8YNc5QxRn5Qaj62L0sTeMcnpkYagtnCUweCHMEUBlg3PPIMykA2epiBjWlgH9pUTfe5GiPfSTq62SnEXaRLSrSedJfaNDUVQMtu0tfQT640oVokBsdNwVLk9Vjpk3abDdIynjSCpkXglvTXnZcPBHQttjb4tI-b-DVVvuhGompn-3C_S9RQXncjdi2vF9_sDRV2CdKp0xiTZ9xh3exBehAAD9qOuduvBdnsJcglIkWnO5w8hQoToiOUksSpNSPJPX_i4zS6RSzWsSeV41A8Tb7at14iWvOl6jrc)
---
Thank you in advance for your support.

Sincerely,
---
[](http://links.primaryupdate.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=d771a9ff8e6547a4a5f83c81bb934f46&_e=qa5ozzAcveApUuJX7KZCtT9DzwqJAMFdVtent2qmeHtdF3Lk2sQ38Dxv82Ojf6T8rTAfHADVnoz5BFz2LFEi2W85lLlhqLCDbiVSWhk2xLf1DtUayRgAFOO79NTJxHD1Q9fJ4Cgznwxmu-bHq0_iElqEn449F8YNc5QxRn5Qaj62L0sTeMcnpkYagtnCUweCHMEUBlg3PPIMykA2epiBjWlgH9pUTfe5GiPfSTq62SnEXaRLSrSedJfaNDUVQMtu0tfQT640oVokBsdNwVLk9Vjpk3abDdIynjSCpkXglvTpM48rjBqDwkVh_sjuKwL2gC_xKT49bxQj4rmIS9lZlpyDxb4TUYy1kGGgGsWsmC5zfn9e2NRi1vu8G434qSMDSaf5RawujNn5WCwnqNGNQKXTXk4YXm4wxGYyXZfHd0mVRd25UsqAegsiFcxcSiTS)
---
Speaker Mike Johnson
---
| | [](http://links.primaryupdate.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=d771a9ff8e6547a4a5f83c81bb934f46&_e=qa5ozzAcveApUuJX7KZCtT9DzwqJAMFdVtent2qmeHtdF3Lk2sQ38Dxv82Ojf6T8rTAfHADVnoz5BFz2LFEi2W85lLlhqLCDbiVSWhk2xLf1DtUayRgAFOO79NTJxHD1Q9fJ4Cgznwxmu-bHq0_iElqEn449F8YNc5QxRn5Qaj62L0sTeMcnpkYagtnCUweCHMEUBlg3PPIMykA2epiBjWlgH9pUTfe5GiPfSTq62SnEXaRLSrSedJfaNDUVQMtu0tfQT640oVokBsdNwVLk9Vjpk3abDdIynjSCpkXglvRLhL2iTmVicFD27Z6NsOiwsq2p6Xk6k8t-3zRXrEH-zUw3wBY3zItPfSCA9IydfiTBfha3c-Df6pJRoNzxiBCosAH7iFgaz_uf7KEIILTkD79S63gOqHcjim28oxi0rGbcU6wN6B9hKVq0bnKHP-sE)

body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=5203%2E5257348%2EIx8fKf ]Adam Schiff for Senate

candidate Steve Garvey uses baseball analogies left and right on the campaign
trail and on the debate stage to cover up the fact that he stands for nothing.

He won’t stand up to Donald Trump.

He won’t commit to protecting reproductive rights around the country.

Americans' health care.

Forgive my own baseball analogy, but those non-positions are a total swing and a

name: Brandon Herrera
subject: He voted for a vaccine tracking database.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Brandon Herrera Victory Committee
body:
Dear Supporter,
I'm running against a "Republican" who consistently votes against protecting our constitutional freedoms. Not only did he cave on gun rights, but he also voted to fund a vaccine tracking database, enabling the federal government to trample on medical freedom.
When the government was locking down the economy and forcing unconstitutional mandates on the American people, Tony Gonzales was voting to give bureaucrats more power over your life.
We're still short of our fundraising goal to expose Tony's voting record to all of the Republican Primary voters through mail, digital, texting, calls, and television.
Can you help me out by chipping in a contribution at [https://BrandonHerreraforCongress.com/Donate](https://contact.brandonherreraforcongress.com/l/6fI53a1vdu7637OWRF387YCA/hAsYRM5uT6q0oSW0CYSAkw/Lkzo5892yEoAPVUOByTfr5aw)?
Instead of fighting for his constituents, Tony Gonzales voted to empower the surveillance state and violate the privacy rights of Americans. He has demonstrated that he cannot be trusted to uphold the Constitution and protect the rights of Texans.
We have a great chance to retire him on March 5th - but only if we can inform Republican primary voters about his anti-freedom voting record.
Please make a donation today at [https://BrandonHerreraforCongress.com](https://contact.brandonherreraforcongress.com/l/6fI53a1vdu7637OWRF387YCA/hAsYRM5uT6q0oSW0CYSAkw/Lkzo5892yEoAPVUOByTfr5aw).
**I 'll give one lucky donor my AKG Built Tantal AK-47 in 5.45.** Every $5 you contribute will earn you an entry. I've already given away one rifle and one trip to a range day in San Antonio, and I can't wait to notify the next winner.
Thanks for all your help.
Respectfully,
Brandon Herrera
PS: You're invited to my reception at SHOT Show in Las Vegas on Wednesday evening - get your ticket at [https://BrandonHerreraforCongress.com/SHOTShow](https://contact.brandonherreraforcongress.com/l/6fI53a1vdu7637OWRF387YCA/lLWjplVVbhQFLIYA65Fy1Q/Lkzo5892yEoAPVUOByTfr5aw).
PPS: Every $5 you donate gives you one chance to win my AKG Built Tantal AK-47. Please chip in what you can today at [https://BrandonHerreraforCongress.com](https://contact.brandonherreraforcongress.com/l/6fI53a1vdu7637OWRF387YCA/hAsYRM5uT6q0oSW0CYSAkw/Lkzo5892yEoAPVUOByTfr5aw).
Paid for by the Brandon Herrera Victory Committee

name: Sydney for Team Debbie
subject: no room for error
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
We're running out of time
| | |
---
Hi there, team — it's Sydney, Debbie's finance director. I hate to reach out like this, but I've got some tough news: **We missed our critical fundraising goal by about $7,250.**
I know it's hard to believe, but the election year is here. And now that it has officially begun, Rick Scott won’t pull any punches. So here at Team Debbie HQ, we're all hands on deck. Every single goal is absolutely critical. And every single dollar helps fuel the grassroots operations that we need to win — from reaching out to voters and running vital ads to hiring more campaign staff.
We have to leave the first month of 2024 with a strong grassroots war chest — but we're running out of time. ** I’m meeting with Debbie in the morning, and I know it would make her day if we close this gap. **
**We're competing against a self-funded mega-millionaire who spent $64 MILLION of his own money to win this seat last time by just 10,033 votes. We have a real chance to retire Rick Scott this year, but there's no room for error.[So please, friend, if you care about electing Debbie, flipping Florida blue, and defending the Senate, will you rush $5 before midnight to make up the gap?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77615281/450963807/849749119?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=jtk688-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWZhMmViY2UtNGFiYS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzODQ4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=y1HWPGGD3Gf7QX6pUuVbRiqEOFUH1vf7g3z_mGooFmU=)**
